SPAR - FRAGADIS es una compañía de supermercados de referencia en el sector, líder en su área de influencia.
 
De capital privado y familiar, hace más de 40 años que la compañía forma parte de la vida cotidiana de miles de personas. Durante su desarrollo Fragadis ha ido evolucionando en paralelo a las necesidades del consumidor, ofreciendo a sus clientes las mejores soluciones en alimentación, higiene personal, cuidado del hogar y mascotas, poniendo a su disposición una amplia variedad de artículos, con una especial orientación en los frescos, de la más alta calidad a los precios más competitivos del mercado.
 
Es socio de Euromadi, el mayor grupo de compras a nivel estatal, miembro a su vez de EMD, el mayor grupo de compras europeo y socio de SPAR ESPAÑA, con distribución exclusiva en las provincias de Barcelona, Tarragona, Lleida y Castellón.

Contamos con un gran equipo humano, más de 2.000 personas altamente comprometidas, que comparten nuestro compromiso de ofrecer un servicio excelente.

Por ello nuestra política de recursos humanos se caracteriza por ofrecer empleo estable y de calidad, formación continua y posibilidades de promoción interna.

Actualmente la empresa se encuentra en un ambicioso proyecto de expansión y profunda reestructuración en todos sus departamentos, dotándose de nuevos medios, tanto materiales como humanos, para la optimización de su gestión y desarrollo futuro.

Name: Mega Cash & Carry
Description:
O MEGA CASH & CARRY  é um Operador de referência na distribuição alimentar em Angola que se dirige essencialmente a clientes profissionais do sector do Retalho,  Hotelaria e Restauração, que procuram produtos de qualidade a preços competitivos e soluções adaptadas às suas necessidades.

Entre um sortido alargado de mais de 5.000 artigos com enfoque em produtos perecíveis, o MEGA conta também com uma gama variada de 20 marcas próprias, onde se destacam marcas especialmente dirigidas ao retalho como PRAMESA, DAHORTA, VEGI, DUMAR, ORIZA, ou HERDADE DO OLIVAL e uma marca criada particularmente para o sector da Hotelaria e Restauração designada CHEF MEGA.

O negócio do MEGA abrange também duas outras insígnias sendo elas o BEM PERTO - armazéns localizados junto aos mercados e BEM ME QUER -  líder no sector do comércio de proximidade em Angola, contando já com uma rede de mais de 400 lojas. 

A nossa estratégia passa por continuar a investir fortemente no canal da Hotelaria e Restauração e no BEM ME QUER, na perspectiva neste caso, de inovar e modernizar o comércio a retalho, contribuindo assim para a melhoria das condições de vida da população Angolana.

No MEGA apostamos fortemente nas pessoas, pilares no nosso sucesso e determinantes para o crescimento e reconhecimento por parte dos nossos clientes.

Name: Proença Supermercados
Description: O Proença Supermercados, com sede em Pereira Barreto, no interior do estado de São Paulo, foi fundado em 1960 pelo empreendedor Fernando Lopes Farinha. Com muito trabalho e dedicação, a empresa cresceu e se transformou na rede Proença Supermercados. As parcerias firmadas ao longo dos anos, aliadas ao profissionalismo e dedicação, transformaram a marca Proença em sinônimo de qualidade e economia. As lojas possuem infraestrutura de ponta com instalações amplas e confortáveis, a fim de proporcionar o melhor atendimento. além da eficiência nos serviços prestados, a rede promove campanhas com sorteio de prêmios, um grande sucesso entre os consumidores. O Proença segue em desenvolvimento, ampliando o volume de operações e investindo em diversidade de produtos e serviços. Em cada cidade que se instala, a empresa conquista clientes e criar raízes, além de oferecer oportunidade de trabalho para centenas de pessoas. Através de uma política correta e arrojada, o Proença escreve sua história, trabalhando continuamente pelo bem-estar do consumidor.

Name: FrischeParadies GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Das FrischeParadies ist der kulinarische Hotspot in der Welt hochwertiger Lebensmittel - egal, ob für private Genussmenschen oder professionelle Köchinnen & Köche. Es ist ein Ort zur genussvollen Weltreise durch die feinsten und genussreichsten Regionen dieses Planeten. Wagyu aus Japan, Ananas aus Panama, Langusten aus dem Südatlantik, Geflügel aus Südfrankreich, Weine und Spirituosen aus Deutschland, Italien, Spanien und dem Rest der Welt – die Krönung internationaler Feinkost ist in den zwölf FrischeParadiesen vereint an einem Ort.

Unser Anspruch als Lebensmittelhändler in Sachen Kulinarik ist ganz klar definiert, denn hier erfolgt konsequent die Suche nach den besten Lebensmitteln, bevorzugt von kleinen handwerklichen Betrieben und Herstellern mit schonenden Verarbeitungsmethoden. Um diesem Anspruch Tag für Tag gerecht zu werden, sind viele Profis im Auftrag der feinen Kulinarik unterwegs und kümmern sich mit fachkundiger Expertise und ganzer Hingabe um das mehr als 12.000 Delikatessen umfassende Sortiment.

„Um mit qualitativ hochwertigsten Lebensmitteln erfolgreich zu sein, braucht es vor allem zwei Dinge: Leidenschaft und kompetente Mitarbeiter. Bei uns bekommen die Kunden beides.“

Name: Mercado Brasco
Description:
Nossa história começou em 2012, quando dois amigos vindos do interior para cursar faculdade em Porto Alegre sonharam juntos em um lugar que trazia a atmosfera dos bolichos do interior pra capital.  Anos se passaram desde o primeiro passo e hoje, falar em "Mercado Brasco" é sinônimo de vizinhança, acolhimento e olho no olho. 

Através de uma proposta diferenciada que engaja a comunidade mais próxima de nós, buscamos resgatar o espírito de vizinhança com espaços que favoreçam a convivência e as relações cada vez mais humanas. Priorizamos parcerias com fornecedores locais e enxergamos nos produtos disponíveis nas nossas prateleiras oportunidades de incentivar uma alimentação mais saudável.

Nossa primeira loja fica na Rua Florêncio Ygartua, 151. No coração de um bairro que valoriza a vida a pé, o grande diferencial dessa unidade é o parklet: um espaço para tomar um café ao ar livre ou fazer um happy hour depois do trabalho. A padaria recheada de quitutes quentinhos é mais um dos motivos pelos quais esse Brasco é tão querido pelos nossos clientes. 

Nossa segunda loja fica dentro do Viva Open Mall, um shopping a céu aberto próximo do Jardim Europa. Com uma adega caprichada e os principais itens de conveniência sempre à mão, é impossível entrar nesse Brasquinho e não encontrar algo especial para levar pra casa. Sem falar na romiseta à moda antiga que serve de fruteira e faz sucesso entre as crianças!

Em 2020, nos encaminhamos para a abertura da nossa terceira loja, que é mais do que um Mercado Brasco: é o Espaço Brasco. Localizada na esquina da antiga Espaço Vídeo no Bom Fim, essa unidade busca servir a vizinhança como a sala de estar do bairro. Além de um Mercado, restaurantes parceiros entraram nessa junto com a gente para criar o lugar perfeito para relaxar, comer bem, encontrar alguém especial ou trabalhar.  

Siga o Instagram do Mercado Brasco para saber mais e ficar por dentro das novidades!
Location: Porto Alegre, RS - Rio Grande do Sul

Description:
A empresa foi criada nos anos 80 pela Família Maglioni, extensão de um pequeno negócio no ramo de farelo de trigo e material de construção civil. 

Foi fruto do empenho e dedicação de um grupo de estudantes de engenharia que acreditavam que, para se obter sucesso, é necessário união, trabalho e honestidade.
Esta foi uma receita que deu certo.

Description:
At Woermann Brock, we’re more than just a trusted Namibian retail brand — we’re a company built on integrity, innovation, and service since 1894.
With over 60 branches nationwide, we take pride in offering quality, affordability, and variety to the communities we serve.
But it’s our people who drive our success. We value professionalism, teamwork, and the growth of every colleague.

Name: ECR Austria
Description:

ECR bietet den Mitgliedern eine übergreifende Plattform im gesamten Wertschöpfungs-Netzwerk zwischen Handel, Industrie und Dienstleistern, wo gemeinsam branchenrelevante Themen definiert und proaktiv gelöst werden.

Name: Pais e Filhos Supermercados
Description:
O Pais e Filhos é uma empresa familiar, que teve seu início com o casal José Ribeiro e Neida, no ano de 1984. O casal adquiriu uma pequena mercearia, no Bairro Benfica, em Juiz de Fora-MG. Anos depois, compraram um lote a poucos metros da mercearia e  deu-se início a construção de uma loja maior, com variedade, conforto e qualidade no serviço oferecido aos clientes.

Junto com sua família, em novembro de 1990, foi inaugurada a primeira loja do Pais e Filhos Supermercados. Desde então nossa rede não parou de crescer, tendo, atualmente mais de 450 colaboradores e 4 lojas: Benfica, Francisco Bernardino, Olegário Maciel e Borboleta.

Atualmente, a empresa é gerida pela segunda geração, tendo à frente os filhos Marco Antonio, Vânia e Vanessa, além da nora Joana e do genro Emerson. E a geração do futuro já participa da gestão, com os netos Caio, Mateus e Maria Eduarda.

Name: Dubé Loiselle
Description:
Dubé Loiselle is a food distributor for a variety of fresh, dry and
frozen food products, as well as cleaning and packaging supplies.

Founded in 1948, we are committed to meeting our clients’ needs
with a selection of 8,500 products from more than 220 suppliers.
Our many products are distributed throughout a large network of
3,800 clients, including childcare centres, fine dining restaurants,
canteens, ice cream parlours, campgrounds, retirement homes,
skating arenas, sugar bushes, golf courses, the network of hospitals
in the greater Québec area, the Société des casinos du Québec,
and most recreation centres.

Dubé Loiselle has three distribution centres in Granby, covering a
total area of 107,000 square feet. One distribution centre is for
dry products; one is for fruits & vegetables; the other is for refrigerated and frozen products.

Equipped with freezing units, the 24-truck fleet travels more than
1 million kilometres annually throughout its more than 250-kilometre
service territory.

Name: Toko Mama
Description:
Toko Mama is a proudly local hard discount store built for Indonesian families, and small businesses who want to save their budget—without cutting corners on quality.

With our tagline, “Diskon Setiap Hari”, we offer over 600 essential SKUs at truly low prices—every single day. From rice and cooking oil to frozen chicken and snacks, we focus on what really matters: good products, simple stores, and fair prices.

 Low Prices Every Day – No promos or gimmicks. Just honest prices, always.
 Smart 600+ SKU Selection – Focused only on what people really need.
 Simple & Efficient Stores – Fast to shop, easy to navigate, and cost-efficient to run.
 Quality Private Label Products – Tasty, affordable, and developed for local tastes.
 We’re built for families.

View our career page for opportunities join our team.

Name: Distribution Canada Inc. (DCI) / Canadian Independent Grocery Buyers Alliance (CIGBA)
Description:
Distribution Canada Inc. (dci) was formed as a buying group for "Independent Canadian Grocers" in 1981. To date, membership has grown to include independent grocers, small grocery chains, wholesalers/distributors, and C-store chains. Collectively members / retailers operate over a thousand retail outlets with combined annual retail sales in the Billions.

Distribution Canada Inc. is a national organization of independent retailers that foster collaborative selling relationships between its members, manufacturers, and key stakeholders in the Canadian retailing industry.

In 2019, Distribution Canada Inc. (DCI) commenced a restructuring for the purpose of ensuring that DCI’s business practices are aligned to current and future changes in the market, as well as to explore potential new growth opportunities. The redesign included the formation of a new not-for-profit corporation called “Canadian Independent Grocery Buyers Alliance (CIGBA)”.

Name: Hussmann India
Description:
Since 1906, Hussmann has provided innovative products, services and solutions for preserving and merchandising fresh foods. It is recognised throughout the world as a leader in manufacturing, selling, installing, and servicing display equipment and refrigeration systems for customers in the retail food industry. It also provides a variety of services to help food retailers become more efficient and effective. Hussmann serves several key markets, including supermarkets, mass merchants,  convenience stores, drug stores, dollar and discount stores, and foodservice operations.

Hussmann is enabling excellence in food retailing by providing innovative solutions in areas such as merchandising, energy efficiency and sustainability, food quality and integrity, refrigeration, design and engineering, service and installation, and improving retail performance. We are passionate about  food retailing and have a relentless dedication to our customers' success. 

Hussmann was acquired by Panasonic Corporation on April 1, 2016.

Name: Maxì Supermercati
Description:
I supermercati Maxì, appartengono al gruppo Vega soc. coop., una qualificata realtà del commercio associato che aderisce al Gruppo VéGé. 
I punti vendita, Maxì e Maxì Family, si adattano alle diverse esigenze del consumatore di vicinato e sono insediati in Veneto e in Friuli Venezia Giulia.
Convenienza, accoglienza, cortesia e, soprattutto, attenzione alla qualità dei prodotti: il consumatore è sempre il protagonista nei punti vendita Maxì, da più di 50 anni. Ai classici servizi se ne aggiungono di sempre più innovativi e in continua evoluzione, dalla possibilità di ordinare la spesa online al ritiro degli acquisti effettuati su Amazon.
In Maxì abbiamo a cuore la spesa dei clienti.

Name: Morton Williams - The Fresh Marketplace
Description: Morton Williams is a family-owned and operated supermarket chain that has served New York City since 1952. With 17 locations across the metropolitan area – many of them open 24/7 – Morton Williams is known for its upscale offerings, personalized service, and deep roots in the neighborhoods it serves. The stores feature fresh, high-quality produce, gourmet cheeses, premium meats, and chef-prepared meals. Morton Williams also provides full-service catering, as well as convenient online shopping and delivery, bringing a curated grocery experience to generations of New Yorkers.

Name: Gruppo ISA
Description:
Il Gruppo ISA opera nel settore della distribuzione organizzata in Sardegna, isola perla del Mediterraneo con una popolazione di 1,6 milioni di abitanti, caratterizzata da un clima splendido e prodotti alimentari di primissima qualità.

ISA è l’acronimo di Industria Servizi Agroalimentari, azienda operante da oltre 40 anni nella distribuzione organizzata con sede a Villacidro a 35 minuti da Cagliari.

Il Gruppo ISA è composto da società operanti in diversi settori dell’economia: vendita all’ingrosso e al dettaglio, produzione agroindustriale, servizi, agricoltura, e-commerce. Il fulcro dell’organizzazione è la ISA S.p.A, società di distribuzione di prodotti agroalimentari. Con una moderna e capillare rete di vendita rifornisce oltre 2000 clienti, di cui oltre 400 affiliati e oltre trenta punti di vendita di proprietà e diversi centri commerciali.
Il Centro di distribuzione, con una superficie di circa 150.000 mq, evade con precisione e rapidità gli ordini pervenuti dai punti vendita diretti e da quelli affiliati.

Il Gruppo Isa nell’arco degli anni ha strutturato anche un fornitissimo settore non food con un centro distributivo dedicato; su una superficie di 10.000 mq l’assortimento propone oltre 12mila articoli tra cui giocattoli, giardinaggio, casalingo, arredo giardino, scuola, tessile casa, articoli estivi, piccolo e grande elettrodomestico, combustibili, addobbi e argenteria.
 
Un Gruppo sardo al 100% le cui origini risiedono nella lungimiranza e nelle capacità imprenditoriali di Giovanni Muscas, fondatore e presidente del gruppo. Muscas, nato a Villacidro nel 1944 da una famiglia di agricoltori, iniziò giovanissimo come commerciante ambulante negli anni '50. Da allora tanta strada è stata percorsa: fino all’e-commerce, settore in cui il Gruppo Isa opera con 2 siti specializzati:
italianfood.nonnaisa.com dedicato ai prodotti sardi con consegne in tutta Italia e shop.nonnaisa.com per la spesa online di tutti i giorni.

Name: Central Nutrition
Description:
Somos a marca dos novos centenários.

Na Central Nutrition, acreditamos que viver bem e melhor é uma escolha, e ela começa agora.

Desenvolvemos suplementos funcionais integrativos com base na ciência da sinergia dos nutrientes, respeitando a saúde do ser humano em sua totalidade: um sistema único e integrado. 

Nosso propósito vai além dos produtos: somos guia para quem escolheu nutrir hoje o bem-estar de amanhã.

Aqui dentro, valorizamos quem compartilha dessa missão. Somos movidos por um time que acredita em escolhas conscientes, crescimento constante e no impacto real da saúde no futuro. 

Se você acredita que viver bem é uma escolha, e que saúde é a base de tudo, esse é o seu lugar.

Escolhas de hoje, centenários de amanhã.

Name: L'Esprit Vrac
Description:
L’Esprit Vrac, c’est une start-up qui a l’ambition d’offrir un mode de consommation des produits en vrac en GMS et bientôt en ligne. Notre mission, aujourd’hui, est de vous proposer une autre façon de consommer : plus sain, plus simple, plus raisonnable, plus écologique et plus accessible.

Nous sélectionnons les produits les plus naturels pour favoriser notre santé et bien-être au quotidien et pas que … nos animaux de compagnie ont également besoin de manger les meilleurs produits !

Chez nous, vous trouverez : 
 Une variété des thés du monde 
 Des infusions déclinées en 7 gammes : Sommeil, Minceur, Équilibre, Circulation, Digestion, Maté & Rooibos et Fruitée 
 Des aromates pour vos plats gourmands 
 Des fruits séchés, le grignotage sain tout en faisant plaisir 
 Des produits pour vos animaux de compagnie : friandises, croquettes, des aliments naturels et veggies 

Valorisons des produits de qualité à la quantité juste et prenons soin de notre bien-être dans la durée !

Name: Cricaré Supermercados e Um Superatacado
Description:
O Cricaré nasceu em 1987 como uma pequena mercearia na cidade de Nova Venécia sob iniciativa da família Maestri. Os negócios foram crescendo até se tornar supermercado e, depois, uma rede de supermercados no Norte do Espírito Santo. Em 2016, com o aumento das atividades comerciais, foi inaugurado o Cricaré Super Atacado na cidade de Nova Venécia, passando então a atuar também no setor de atacado.
São mais de 30 anos fazendo história, com 6 unidades no Espírito Santo e breve expansão para Minas Gerais, com previsão de inauguração de nova unidade na cidade de Aimorés para 2020.
Já estamos presentes nas cidades de Nova Venécia, São Gabriel da Palha, Pinheiros e Ecoporanga.

Name: MARINOPOULOS S.A.
Description:
Η Μαρινόπουλος Α.Ε. είναι η μεγαλύτερη αμιγώς ελληνική λιανεμπορική αλυσίδα, με πρωταγωνιστικό ρόλο στην εγχώρια αγορά εδώ και 54 χρόνια. Με σεβασμό στον Έλληνα καταναλωτή, η εταιρεία παρέχει ποιοτικά προϊόντα σε ανταγωνιστικές τιμές, ακολουθώντας μια συστηματική πολιτική εκπτώσεων και προσφορών, που απευθύνεται σε όλους τους καταναλωτές και ιδιαίτερα στις ευπαθείς κοινωνικές ομάδες. 

Σήμερα, το δίκτυο των καταστημάτων της Μαρινόπουλος Α.Ε. στην Ελλάδα αριθμεί περίπου 800 καταστήματα σε κάθε γωνιά της χώρας και 25 στην Κύπρο και στα Βαλκάνια.

Στο δυναμικό της εταιρείας εντάσσονται πάνω από 12.500 εργαζόμενοι ενώ το ποσοστό των προμηθειών τροφίμων που πραγματοποιούνται από εγχώριους παραγωγούς και προμηθευτές φτάνει το 86% των συνολικών αγορών της εταιρείας.

Η υποστήριξη στους Έλληνες παραγωγούς, η προώθηση των τοπικών προϊόντων, η προσφορά καινοτόμων υπηρεσιών και η ανάπτυξη προϊόντων ιδιωτικής ετικέτας στη μεγαλύτερη ποικιλία της αγοράς, συνιστούν βασικά συστατικά της στρατηγικής της Μαρινόπουλος τα τελευταία χρόνια. Φυσικά, στο επίκεντρο βρίσκονται πάντα η ποιότητα, οι χαμηλές τιμές, η υιοθέτηση τεχνολογιών φιλικών προς το περιβάλλον και, κυρίως, η διαχρονική και συνειδητή τοποθέτηση του καταναλωτή στην καρδιά των αποφάσεων της εταιρείας.

Για τη Μαρινόπουλος Α.Ε. η επιχειρηματική της ανάπτυξη οφείλει να έχει αντίκρισμα στην κοινωνία. Γι’ αυτό το λόγο υλοποιεί συστηματικά, ολοκληρωμένα προγράμματα Εταιρικής Υπευθυνότητας, προσφέροντας τη στήριξή της σε ευπαθείς ομάδες, σε κάθε ευκαιρία.

Name: Çağdaş Marketler
Description:
MİSYONUMUZ  
Çağdaş, gerçek anlamda "Hem kaliteli hem hesaplı" bir süpermarket zinciridir. Tazeliği hissettirir, yöresel tat lezzetlerin gelişimini sağlar. Sağlıklı, kaliteli ve güvenli ürünleri, bol çeşit, temiz ve ferah iyi aydınlatılmış mağazalarda, bilinçli tüketicileri hedef alarak satışa sunar. Bunu eğitimli çalışanlarla yapmak ister. Yaşam kalitesini alışverişçi sinden, çalışanına ve tedarikçisine kadar gözetir. Ülke ekonomisine katkısının farkındadır ve müşteri adına hesaplı alış veriş yapabilmenin önemini bilir. Fiyat rekabetinde kazancı "alırken" sağlar ve "sunarken" paylaşır.

Name: Mashtelat Balaban משתלת בלבן
Description:
Welcome to Mashtelat Balaban, a top leading nursery with special products. Our mission is to provide exceptional service and care to our customers and help them create beautiful and inspiring indoor and outdoor spaces.

We specialize in a wide variety of high-quality plants, including tropical plants, succulents, cacti, and more. Our team of skilled professionals is dedicated to providing personalized service and expert advice to help our customers find the perfect plants for their needs.

In addition to our wide selection of plants, we also offer custom planters and garden design services to help our customers create truly unique and personalized spaces.

At Mashtelat Balaban, we are committed to sustainability and environmentally responsible practices. We use organic and sustainable methods to grow and care for our plants, and we are constantly seeking new ways to reduce our environmental impact.

With years of experience in the industry, we have built a reputation for excellence and are proud to be a trusted source for all of our customers' plant and garden needs. Thank you for choosing Mashtelat Balaban, and we look forward to serving you.

Name: Meadow Lane
Description:
Meadow Lane is a gourmet prepared foods market coming to Tribeca in 2025, focused on organic, high-quality culinary offerings. Our store will carry an expansive menu of delicious prepared foods made fresh from our on-site kitchen. All menu items will be available grab-and-go style, to fit the fast pace of NYC while satisfying New Yorkers’ needs for delicious, healthy, and nutritious food in a beautiful environment.
 
Our partnerships with local, sustainable farms will bring a variety of fresh farm produce under one roof, saving our shoppers a trip to the farmers market and connecting more small farms with the NYC customer. Our beverage program consists of a coffee, tea, and matcha bar, organic smoothies, and a menu of organic juices. Fresh pastries and other sweet and savory treats will be available for takeaway.

Meadow Lane will stock a curated assortment of snacks and dry goods brands, along with household staple items. We have selectively chosen brands in a handful of categories to bring exclusive collaborations to Meadow Lane. In our floral studio, bespoke specialty floral arrangements will be designed each day for custom orders, events, hospitality and fashion partnerships, and weekly floral house accounts.

www.meadowlane.nyc

NOSSA MISSÃO

Realizar nosso trabalho com eficiência e dedicação, oferecendo produtos e serviços de qualidade, proporcionando satisfação aos nossos clientes.

NOSSA VISÃO

Ser reconhecida como uma empresa de referência em seu setor de atuação.

NOSSOS VALORES

INTEGRIDADE: Demonstrar honestidade, profissionalismo e comportamento sério em todas as transações de negócios além de integridade pessoal em todas as relações. Ter integridade significa estar integrado com os princípios da empresa.
PERSISTÊNCIA: Qualidade de sempre persistir, ser constante para conseguir alcançar metas e objetivos.
JUSTIÇA: Virtude de dar a cada um aquilo que é seu. Não atuar com desigualdade e sim com igualdade e coesão.
RESPONSABILIDADE: Ser responsável e responder com eficiência e determinação pelos atos efetuados na organização.
COMPROMETIMENTO: Estar comprometido com a Empresa, seus objetivos e metas. A disciplina e o engajamento são princípios motivadores para transformar desafios em oportunidades.
COOPERAÇÃO: Trabalhar juntos, em equipe, para alcançar os interesses coletivos de uma organização.

Name: Centre E.LECLERC Les Sables d'Olonne
Description:
Mieux nous connaitre …

E.Leclerc Les Sables c’est d’abord une entreprise dynamique, connue et reconnue pour ses qualités commerciales, qui ne cesse de se réinventer pour satisfaire les attentes du consommateur, et ça depuis 1989 ! Aujourd’hui, la diversité fait la force du centre, au travers de nombreux concepts, qui font de nos collaborateurs de véritables spécialistes dans une multitude de domaines : les produits frais, la culture, le bien-être, le bricolage et bien plus encore.

 

Intégrer l'enseigne E.Leclerc, c’est aussi devenir membre d’une communauté qui bouge, et qui bouleverse les idées reçues !

 

Les adhérents du mouvement E.Leclerc et leurs équipes ont eu l'audace, avant d'autres, d'engager des combats qui paraissaient perdus d'avance, comme celui de la libération du prix des carburants, de la commercialisation de produits parapharmaceutiques, de bijoux ou de voyages, de la suppression des sacs plastiques 12 ans avant la parution de la loi.

 

Engagés pour la défense du pouvoir d'achat, cela passe par offrir le meilleur au meilleur prix, mais aussi reverser 25% des bénéfices à nos collaborateurs. Le pouvoir d’achat, bien sûr, mais aussi l'environnement, l'emploi local, la qualité alimentaire, la santé et la culture.

 

Le groupement E.Leclerc est depuis longtemps dans le top 10 des marques préférées des Français.

Avec 662 magasins, et une part de marché de 21,6%, on peut vraiment dire que l’enseigne est le leader de la grande distribution française, de quoi susciter des vocations !

Name: Pasifik Shopfitting
Description:
PASIFIK SHOPFITTING

Pasifik Shopfitting Company has been founded as manufacturer of market shelving products for local and foreign industry. In the years following, the company diversified its product range to Market Shelves, Industrial Shelves, Storage Shelving and Shopping Carts, Checkouts and related complementary accessories  for hypermarkets, DIY markets, grocery stores, pharmacies, electronic markets, storage warehouses etc...
Pasifik Shopfitting Company has used its 25 years of experience of the sector to design and implement automatic shelves and panel production line with 30.000 tons annual capacity. We can produce 16 shelves per minute with European norms and quality.
Pasifik Shopfitting Company, in its new production facilities has designed and implemented electrostatic painting line with its own conception of 2.500 sqm surface, 3.5m/min speed and 10.000 sqm/day capacity.
Pasifik Shopfitting Company stepped into a new dimensions while gaining great respect in the local market and foreign markets for its quality and performance. In the same year, Pasifik Shopfitting Company also started exporting its products all over the world.
Everyday, we are adapting new technologies and our R&D Department is continuously developing new and special products by request of our beloved customers. Pasifik Shopfitting Company gives importance to Research & Development activities and all our designs are certified with ISO 9001 and CE documents.
With accumulated experience and customer trust, we have been delivering solution and products as an Original Equipment Manufacturer to many well-known brands, majorly located in Europe, USA, Asia and Middle Eastern countries along with other countries of the world.
Pasifik Shopfitting Company’s vision is to become one of the forces among the international leaders of the market that provides innovative and quality services.
Please check our website; http://www.pasifikraf.com.tr 
For inquiries: export@pasifikraf.com.tr

Name: The Predetarian
Description:
The Predetarian is on the hunt for biodiversity. We offer a fair alternative to factory farming. With us you can eat delicious food with real game, without cages, additives and with restoration of nature. Easy to order and home delivered.

All our products, except game, are free of animal products.

Why?
Factory farming and intensive agriculture threaten to put nature out of balance. This imbalance causes some animals to put too much pressure on their habitat.

They eat the landscape bare, causing insects, pollinators, birds and other vulnerable flora and fauna to disappear.

How?
By properly managing and using nature, we can help restore balance. This benefits biodiversity and produces a beautiful piece of wild meat.

At the same time, we are working on restoring ecosystems so that intervention is less and less necessary.

What?
We collect game where this is possible or necessary, and process it into 100% Predetarian products and deliver it to your home. 

At the same time, we are working on restoring ecosystems in our affiliated areas.

Description:

Arden Süpermarketleri ikinci mağazasını Kasımpaşa’da, üçüncü mağazasını Şerifali’de halkımızın hizmetine sunmuştur. Şu anda İstanbul içi ve Türkiye çapında 10 farklı lokasyonda mağazası bulunan Arden Süpermarketleri ülkemizin en önemli süpermarket zinciri olma yönünde hızla büyümeye devam etmektedir. Arden Süpermarketleri; “Kaliteli, Güvenli ve Hesaplı Alışverişin Adresi”  sloganıyla müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmayı dert edinmiştir. Arden Süpermarketleri olarak mağazalarımızın iç dizaynı, ürün kategorileri, müşteri ilişkileri, hizmet verenlerimizin hizmet alanlara karşı gösterdiği yaklaşım ve sıcak atmosferi ile siz değerli müşterilerimizin rahat ve güvenle alışveriş yapabilmeleri için gereken tüm özen ve hassasiyet gösterilmiştir. Arden Süpermarketleri olarak ürün seçimi ve tedariğinde olmazsa olmaz kriterlerimiz; güven, kalite, doğallık, tazelik olmakla beraber bu ülkülerinden taviz vermeden siz değerli müşterilerimize ulaşımını keyifle sağlamaktır.Aynı zamanda Arden Süpermarketleri olarak ürünlerimiz kalite ve güven vaadiyle en uygun fiyat politikası ile siz kıymetli müşterilerimize sunulmaktadır.

Name: The Art of Spice
Description:
Mit The Art of Spice haben wir die Möglichkeit etwas zu bewegen.

Wir sind lecker, wir sind nachhaltig, wir sind lokal und sozial!

Ausgefallenheit, ein cooles Design, welches sich sehen lassen kann, hochwertige und natürlich Zutaten, welche ohne jegliche Zusatzstoffe auskommen – das alles sind die Ansprüche, die wir an unsere Produkte haben. Doch entwickeln wir das nicht nur nach unseren Vorstellungen, sondern ziehen unsere Kundinnen und Kunden in diesen Prozess mit ein.

Wir arbeiten ausschliesslich mit traditionellen Schweizer Importeuren zusammen, welche genau wie wir, hohe Ansprüche an Qualität, Hochwertigkeit und Transparenz haben. Unsere Abfüllung geschieht in Zusammenarbeit mit Stiftungen, die unsere Werte Fairness, Chancengleichheit und Integration auf Augenhöhe teilen.

Diese Kombination und diese Leidenschaft, die wir und ihr unseren Gewürzmischungen zukommen lassen, schmeckt man einfach. Und zu sehen, wie sich unsere Kunden über diese vielseitig einsetzbaren und natürlichen Gewürzmischungen freuen, ist für uns das größte Kompliment.

Wir geniessen gutes Essen und sind begeistert, dass wir es schaffen Menschen zusammenzuführen, sich über Gefühle und Gemeinsamkeiten auszutauschen und Gerichte neu zu entdecken. Das schätzen wir sehr und wollen es am liebsten mit allen Menschen teilen.

Kommt lasst uns kochen.

Name: Rami Levy Hashikma Marketing
Description:
רמי לוי שיווק השקמה הינה רשת הקמעונאות אשר הובילה מהפך מחירים במדינת ישראל.
רמי לוי שיווק השקמה פועלת במתווה ייחודי של רשת דיסקאונט השמה לה למטרה להעניק לצרכן סל מוצרים במחיר הזול ביותר בכל סביבה בה נמצא סניף מסניפיה. הרשת פיתחה מודל עסקי לפיו המטרה היא למכור הרבה, להרוויח מעט ולאפשר לצרכנים מעוטי היכולת לקנות יותר.
אסטרטגיית המחיר של הרשת אינה באה על חשבון השירות והאיכות.
ברשת רמי לוי מוענק ללקוח השירות המיטבי והיחס החם והאישי בזכות אלפי עובדים הרואים ברשת רמי לוי בית ומשפחה.
תפיסת העולם של הרשת שלנו, השמה במרכזה את הלקוח, נפרסת לתחומי פעילות נוספים בהם מבקשת הרשת להביא בשורות חדשות ללקוחותיה בפרט ולציבור בכלל.
בשנת 2011 חוללה הרשת מהפך בתחום התקשורת והוזילה את שירותי הסלולאר במאות אחוזים.
הרשת מעניקה חוויות תרבות ופעילויות לכל המשפחה במחירים שלא ידענו כמותם במדינת ישראל ובכך מאפשרת למשפחות רבות במדינה ליהנות מתרבות ופנאי במחירים השווים לכל כיס.
רמי לוי שיווק השקמה מפתחת ומשווקת בסניפיה מגוון רחב של מוצרי המותג הפרטי שלה, תוך הקפדה על איכות גבוהה ומחירים אטרקטיביים.
כמו כן, רשת רמי לוי חוללה מהפך בתחום בשר הבקר הטרי כאשר הורידה ממדפיה את הבשר הקפוא מופשר מעובד ופתחה שעריה לבשר בקר טרי ואיכותי מיובא במחירים מהם נהנים גם הצרכנים אשר לא היה ביכולתם לרכוש בשר בקר טרי לעיתים תכופות בשל מחיריו.
על כל זאת ועוד מודים לנו כלל לקוחותינו ומצביעים ברגליים.
 
רשת רמי לוי שיווק השקמה אשר התחילה כחנות קטנה בשוק מחנה יהודה, נרשמה כחברה ציבורית שמניותיה נסחרות בבורסה לניירות ערך בתל אביב בשנת 2007, הלכה ונהייתה לרשת המובילה דרך בענף הקמעונאות בארץ, חוללה מהפך צרכני בתחום המחירים ומתכננת להגיע ולהעניק לכל בית בישראל את האפשרות לרכוש סל מוצרים במחירים התחרותיים ביותר.

Name: JK Kilgelmann Supermercados
Description:
Nuestra historia comienza en el año 1943 cuando el matrimonio Jorge A. Kilgelmann (padre) y Esther Beltrame inician la actividad comercial instalando una carnicería, para luego incorporar el servicio de fiambrería y despensa en lo que hoy se encuentra la propia sede administrativa de JK KILGELMANN S.R.L., situada en Blas Parera 7901 de la ciudad de Santa Fe. A partir de un constante desarrollo y crecimiento, se amplía el local, inaugurando el primer Autoservicio en el año 1971 y dando inicio formal a la actividad supermercadista.

De la misma manera, en 1986, 1987 y 1991 se llevan adelante la apertura de nuevos locales acrecentando sustancialmente la productividad y el servicio que se ofrece al cliente. En 1995, la sociedad de Jorge F. Kilgelmann y Maria Cristina Pagella, se convierte en la única titular de la firma JK KILGELMANN S.R.L. y a partir de esa fecha, se diseña y construye un importante Centro de Distribución.

En el año 1997, se inaugura un nuevo supermercado en Av. Aristóbulo del Valle y al año siguiente, se estrenan otros dos locales, uno en calle Lavaise y el segundo, en la ciudad de Santo Tome. En 1999, se instala el quinto supermercado en la Av. Facundo Zuviria; al año siguiente, otro en Av. General paz y en el 2001, uno más en la ciudad de San Carlos Centro.

Para seguir expandiendo el servicio, en el año 2009 se realiza la apertura de un local ubicado en Av. Peñaloza , en el 2012, se inaugura otro más en Av. J.J. Paso y en el año 2018 una nueva sucursal en la ciudad de Esperanza.

De esta forma, en la actualidad nuestra cadena cuenta con nueve locales distribuidos estratégicamente en la ciudad de Santa Fe, Santo Tome, San Carlos y Esperanza, una sede administrativa y un centro de distribución y de producción, lo que consolida a JK KILGELMANN S.R.L. como una empresa de reconocida trayectoria, líder en la región y en un constante desarrollo teniendo como objetivo principal la satisfacción total del cliente.

Name: OmnichannelGrocer
Description:
At Omnichannel Grocer (@OmnichannelGrocer on LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, and IG), we explore the future of grocery and consumer packaged goods (CPG) — where retail, eCommerce, and AI converge to create seamless shopping experiences.

Consumers no longer shop in a straight line. They discover products on social media, price-check on mobile, buy online for in-store pickup, and expect loyalty rewards that work across every channel. Omnichannel Grocer dives into how brands and regional grocers can adapt, unify their messaging, and build loyalty across every touchpoint — online, offline, and everything in between.

Our channel covers topics like:
BOPIS & curbside pickup strategies that boost convenience and sales.
Retail media networks and how to maximize ROI on digital shelf space.
AI-driven personalization to meet customers where they are with the right offer, at the right time.
Loyalty & retention programs that strengthen long-term relationships.
Case studies & real-world tips from leading brands and emerging innovators.

With 2,000+ subscribers in just our first month, Omnichannel Grocer is quickly becoming a go-to source for grocery and CPG leaders who want to understand how today’s consumers shop, and how to prepare for tomorrow.

 Subscribe to our YouTube channel: @OmnichannelGrocer

 Have a new technology, platform, or idea that can help regional grocers or brands succeed with seamless commerce? We’d love to hear from you. Contact us to explore how we can feature your innovation and share it with our growing community of grocery and retail leaders.

Name: Sutterlüty
Description:
Seit Ulrich Sutterlüty das Unternehmen 1952 als kleinen Hofladen in Egg gegründet hat, hat sich bei Sutterlüty vieles verändert. Eines allerdings ist für uns über all die Jahrzehnte gleich geblieben: Regionalität war, ist und bleibt das Herzstück unseres Handelns. Das B’sundrige daran: Nachhaltiges Denken, ein verantwortungsvoller Umgang mit Ressourcen und Wertschätzung gegenüber Mensch, Tier und Natur sind für uns untrennbar mit Regionalität verbunden. Deshalb sehen wir uns nicht nur als Nahversorger sondern vielmehr als Vermittler und Bewahrer unserer regionalen Genusskultur, der dafür so wichtigen Kulturlandschaft und all dem B’sundrigen, was daraus jeden Tag entsteht. Nur so wird B’sundrig zum besseren Regional.

Sutterlüty ist der Lieblingsmarkt der Vorarlberger für regionale Lebensmittel – und ein b’sundriges Arbeitsumfeld für talentierte Genussmenschen. Als erfolgreiches Familienunternehmen garantieren wir einen sicheren Arbeitsplatz mit abwechslungsreichen Aufgaben und langfristigen Karrierechancen, sowie überdurchschnittlichen Sozialleistungen. Wer sich für einen Arbeitsplatz oder eine Ausbildung bei Sutterlüty interessiert, dem stehen alle Wege offen. Die Ländlemärkte sind nicht nur ein familiengeführter, sondern auch ein familienfreundlicher Betrieb. Mit individuellen Karrieremöglichkeiten, flexiblen Arbeitszeitmodellen, der Sutterlüty Akademie, tollen Zusatzleistungen und sozialem Engagement. Das macht Sutterlüty zu einem mehrfach ausgezeichneten Arbeitgeber – überzeuge Dich selbst!

B’sundrig. Wenn man Teil eines starken Teams ist.

Name: Quesos La Florida
Description:
Descubre por qué Caquetá es Rico:
https://youtu.be/TUvKpCParUo

Somos apasionados por la elaboración de quesos frescos de pasta hilada. Para elaborar quesos de calidad, exquisito sabor y excelente rendimiento, se requiere vocación genuina, conocimiento integral, disciplina y alta exigencia en inocuidad. 

Pertenecer a este arte de origen milenario es un gran compromiso que nos llena de orgullo. Nuestra leche proviene del piedemonte de la cordillera oriental, donde se produce la mejor leche del país. Nuestra planta de produción se encuentra ubicada en Puerto Rico, Caquetá, rodeados de una riqueza natural que se traslada a la calidad y sabor de nuestros quesos.    

En 25 años hemos logrado un destacado posicionamiento en el corazón de los colombianos, a través de las principales cadenas del canal moderno, superetes, horeca e industriales. 

Nuestras líneas de producto son: Quesillo, Mozzarella, Doble Crema, queso Costeño industrial, y nuestro nuevo queso semigraso Fitchiss.

Name: Jumbo Balen
Description:
Jumbo is groot geworden door de klant altijd op één te zetten en van onze klanten échte fans te maken. Ook in België bouwen we Jumbo om de klant heen en willen we boodschappen doen prettiger, leuker en fijner maken.  

Eind 2019 openden de eerste Belgische Jumbo supermarkten. Met onze passie voor lekker en gezond eten verwachten we ook het Belgische supermarktlandschap te kunnen verbeteren. Zo biedt Jumbo volop inspiratie voor lekker en gezond eten, onder andere met heerlijke recepten die eenvoudig te maken zijn. En de ingrediënten? Die vind je natuurlijk in iedere Jumbo supermarkt in België.

Name: SOCHILI
Description:
Scharfe Saucen & Gewürze, die im wahrsten Sinne des Wortes empowern: 1 Produkt = 1 Tag Strom!

 Mit jedem Produkt ermöglicht SOCHILI Familien im globalen Süden den erstmaligen Zugang zu Elektrizität und bekämpft damit das gravierende Problem von Stromarmut. 

 Zudem fördert SOCHILI direkten Handel mit Farmer:innen im Senegal, um neue und faire Handelsbeziehungen zwischen Afrika und Europa zu etablieren.

Name: VILEDA Tunisie
Description:
Vileda  is a world leader in manufacturing innovative cleaning and disinfecting systems used within Controlled Environments, Cleanrooms . 
Facilities that are manufacturing products and adopting a contamination control program now have a resource. Vileda  offers solutions that help you clean faster and more effectively while lowering your total costs! Some of our newest innovations include: Vileda Steam, Windomatic Power , VR 201 PetPro ..

 

With Vileda Tunisia  investments in Research and Development, we are dedicated to providing you with the most innovative and effective cleaning systems available in the industry. Our professional, highly skilled team will not only help determine and implement the best system for your organization, but will offer their support and expertise whenever needed. Our service and solution based approach is what sets us apart from our competitors.

 

Vileda  is a member of the Freudenberg Group. Founded in 1849, the Freudenberg Group is a diversified family-owned company with market leading activities in non-wovens, system and tool engineering, lubricants, and many other areas. The Freudenberg Group operates in 60 countries and employs more than 48,000 people.  Vileda  is working in 20 of those countries with over 300 employees.

Name: Neptun Supermarket
Description:
Neptun Supermarketlər Şəbəkəsi 2003-cü ildə Azərbaycanda qida sektoru sahəsində fəaliyyətə başlayıb. Neptun Supermarketləri zənciri yaradılması ilə paralel olaraq 2004-cü ildə 3500 m2-ə yaxın ərazidə anbar və ofis yeri tikilərək Azərbaycanda ilk dəfə olaraq supermarketlər vahid mərkəzi sistemlə idarə olunmağa başlandı. Neptun Supermarketlər Şəbəkəsi həm yerli həmdə xarici məhsulların satışını həyata keçirir. Burada keyfiyyəti, ekoloji təmiz tərkibi, saxlanma müddəti və s. ilə seçilən Almaniya və digər Avropa məhsulları yer almışdır. 
Yüksək keyfiyyətli məhsul müxtəlifliyi ilə seçilən Neptun Supermarketlər şəbəkəsi hər zaman müştəriləri üçün  sağlam, müasir və ekonomik  xidmət göstərməyə çalışır. Supermarketlər şəbəkəsində müxtəlif növ qida məhsulları, məişət-təsərrüfat malları, kiçik ev elektronikası kimi məhsullar  əldə etmək mümkündür. Bundan əlavə supermarketlərdə mövcud olan “Uşaq aləmi”  bölmələrində balacaların qayğısına qalmaq üçün keyfiyyətli uşaq qidası, paltarlar, oyuncaqlar və məktəb ləvazimatları əldə etmək olar.Əsas prinsipi sağlam qidaya üstünlük olan Neptun Supermarketlər şəbəkəsi  optimal şəraitdə saxlanılan məhsullarla artıq  20 ildir ki, geniş alıcı kütləsinin inamını qazanıb.

Name: CAVAVIN
Description:
CAVAVIN is Canada’s leading manufacturer and distributor of wine cellars and wine coolers. Roger Fortier, a contractor specialized in air conditioning and heating services since 1956, founded CAVAVIN in 1981 in order to respond to increasing demand for wine cellars. Today, the company’s head office and production facility is located on the south shore of Montreal and is now managed by his daughter, Nathalie Fortier, a business administration graduate.

Over the years CAVAVIN has earned a reputation for the high quality of its wine cellars and wine coolers, its excellent selection and variety of products as well as its after sale service. There are now five distinctive collections to answer all your needs, taste and budget: a wine cooler collection, a wine cellar collection, a wine preservation cellar collection, a wine cellar cooling systems collection, as well as a collection of beverage centers and other refrigeration products.

Name: Otter ijs en chocolade
Description:
Bij Otter hebben we dagelijks vers schepijs en chocolade van de beste ingrediënten. Kom langs voor een heerlijk ijsje, bonbon, huur een ijskar of bestel een heerlijke ijstaart.
Maar ook naar wens verpakt in een luxe bonbondoos, hartendoos of als brievenbus-bonbons.
Heb je bijzondere wensen of ben je op zoek naar maatwerk zoals een bonbon met logo? Neem even contact met ons op.
Trots op onze cacao: al onze chocolade wordt gekeurd door Cacao Horizons. 
Vragen? Bel of WhatsApp via: 085-1307804

Name: Przedsiębiorstwo Produkcji Lodów Koral
Description:
Przedsiębiorstwo Produkcji Lodów KORAL z siedzibą w Nowym Sączu będące własnością braci Mariana i Józefa Koral rozpoczęło swoją działalność w 1979 roku. Z małego zakładu rzemieślniczego produkującego lody cukiernicze na przestrzeni wielu lat firma przekształciła się w największego w Polsce producenta lodów.

P.P.L.  KORAL posiada zakłady w Nowym Sączu, Limanowej i Rzeszowie. Sprzedaż prowadzona jest na terenie całego kraju poprzez własną sieć dystrybucji oraz poprzez sieć hurtowni.         
Obecnie produkowanych jest ponad 50 asortymentów lodów, każdy w kilku smakach.

W związku z ciągłym rozwojem firmy oraz z możliwością sprzedaży naszych wyrobów na rynkach Unii Europejskiej  proponujemy  szeroką współpracę w  zakresie dystrybucji hurtowej  jak i sprzedaży detalicznej lodów Koral.

Name: Cermak Fresh Market
Description:
Cermak Fresh Market is a premier Chicago Supermarket Chain located in the Midwest, United States. Our company specializes in a variety of ethnic foods catering to Mexican, Puerto Rican, Greek, Italian, Polish, Russian and other European and Latin American cultures. We serve our customers only the best quality in hand picked fresh produce, local and international groceries, superior meats from the Certified Angus Beef brand, fresh fish selects, wholesome dairy, a fresh bakery and a large selection of beverages both foreign and domestic.

At Cermak, we believe our success is testament to our superior fresh foods and the utmost quality of customer service. Aside from our competitive prices, you'll clearly notice the difference when you walk into one of our beautiful local neighborhood stores.

Our courteous staff is dedicated to serving our customers with the best possible grocery shopping experience. In instances where special foods are requested, we'll do our very best to meet your needs and fulfill any order. If your looking to purchase produce or other store items in bulk, Cermak has the flexibility to meet your needs. As a leading food wholesaler in the Chicago land area we're determined to take any measure to ensure that your request is met.

Cermak Fresh Market is committed to the belief that if we continue to provide our customers with what they want at the highest of service, we will succeed in our mission; To forever be your friendly neighborhood market.

We accept multiple forms of payment. Although we do not accept personal checks, work checks can be accepted in particular instances per management approval. We accept all major credit cards, Illinois Link Card and WIC Program Payments.

Thank you for shopping at Cermak and visiting our Linkedin page!

From snacks to beauty, and everything in between, we help Creators dream it, build it, and blow it up. No guesswork, no fluff. Just real roll-up-your-sleeves expertise.

Name: Military Deli & Bakery Services
Description: Military Deli & Bakery Services, Inc. (MDBS) is the largest operator of Deli and Bakery departments in military commissaries. Military commissaries are government owned shopping facilities operated by the Defense Commissary Agency (DeCA). DeCA commissaries look much like a commercial supermarket except they are located on military bases. Commissaries sell groceries and household goods to military service members and their families. Large commissaries include a Deli and Bakery department. These departments look much like those departments found in commercial supermarkets. Due to the special knowledge required to operate these specialty departments, commissary Deli and Bakery departments in the US are operated by commercial companies under contract with the US Government.

Name: APRAS Londrina
Description:
O que é a Apras?

UNIÃO DA CLASSE PARA SER REFERÊNCIA NO ESTADO
E NO PAÍS.

49 anos depois de sua fundação por Ruy Senff em 1971, a APRAS segue defendendo os interesses políticos, econômicos e sociais dos supermercadistas paranaenses. À matriz em Curitiba já se somam 8 regionais que cobrem o Estado: Guarapuava, Irati, Jacarezinho, Londrina, Maringá, Cascavel, Pato Branco e Ponta Grossa.

A nossa responsabilidade, além de defender os interesses do segmento, é capacitar o setor para atender milhões de clientes diariamente, contribuindo com a formação de novos profissionais para a geração de empregos de forma permanente, como também fomentar o relacionamento com parceiros e fornecedores.

O associativismo é fundamental para propor e implementar ações que beneficiem a todos. Todos os dias trabalhamos para desenvolver ferramentas que possibilitem aos nossos associados obterem novas conquistas.

Associe-se e cresça com a gente.

Name: Community Food Co-op
Description: The Community Food Co-op is a consumer-owned natural foods grocer with two locations serving Bellingham and Whatcom County with quality products. Both Community Food Co-op stores are full-service supermarkets and feature a full array of departments including certified organic produce, a deli cafe, bakery, wine shop, bulk foods, flower shop, health and wellness, mercantile area, meat and seafood market, and espresso bar. Established in 1970, the Co-op provides ongoing support for local farmers and community organizations.

Name: Kalea
Description:
Kalea, which means "giving joy" in Hawaiian, is a passionate player in the world of beer, originating in Salzburg in 2010. Through close collaboration with numerous independent craft breweries, Kalea has made a name for itself. The centerpiece of the company is undoubtedly the Beer Advent Calendar, which has been surprising consumers since 2010 with a fresh selection of beers each year and has now become a cult item. The success of this calendar inspired the team to introduce a variety of additional offerings and tasting boxes centered around beer. In 2016, Kalea also launched the first German-language beer rating platform, called BeerTasting.APP, which now features an impressive 150,000 beers from over 14,500 breweries. Additionally, Kalea provides BeerTasting.com, an online marketplace for craft breweries, offering a wide audience access to the diversity and quality of artisanal beers.

The company gained recognition through the Beer Advent Calendar, which has been surprising consumers annually with a new selection of beers since 2010, becoming a true cult item. The success of the calendar inspired the team to introduce many more offerings and tasting boxes centered around beer. In 2016, Kalea developed the first German-language beer rating platform. On this platform (BeerTasting.APP), there are currently around 277,000 beers from over 14,500 breweries listed. Since 2023, the Kalea team has been organizing exciting beer events under the name "BeerTasting Challenge." These events are not only found in cities like Salzburg, Munich, Vienna, and Linz but also extend to smaller venues such as the Hochkönig ski resort.

Alliance started with one large out of town supermarket in Guernsey and has more recently expanded into Jersey, with a flagship store in Sand Street, and stores in Halkett Street, Broad Street and St Ouens.

Alliance have supply partnerships with Waitrose in Jersey and exclusive Sainsbury’s supply in Guernsey.

Name: SVALBARDBUTIKKEN (Coop Svalbard SA)
Description:
Coop Svalbard SA eier og driver Svalbardbutikken, verdens nordligste varehus. 
Varehuset består av følgende avdelinger: dagligvare, ferskvare, kiosk, hus/hjem, gave/suvenir, parfymeri og elektro. I tillegg har Coop Svalbard SA leie- og driftsavtale med Nordpolet AS med enerett for salg av alkohol. Vi har også en leieavtale med Avinor for drift av Svalbardkiosken ved Svalbard Lufthavn. Vi har ca 40 ansatte, omsetning i 2022 var 183 millioner kroner og forventet omsetning i 2023 er 197 millioner. Svalbardbutikken er og blir et naturlig møtepunkt i Longyearbyen. Svalbard/Longyearbyen besøkes årlig av ca 140 000 mennesker fra forskjellige land i verden, med andre ord et stort innslag av internasjonalitet preger varehuset. Coop Svalbard har investert NOK 95 mill i nye 1000kvm i 2 etasjer, modernisert butikken med 1000 kvm og leid ut 1000 kvm i 2.etg i nybygg til Longyearbyen Lokalstyre som har flyttet inn med 2 ungdomsklubber, kino og Galleri.

Coop Svalbard SA owns and operates Svalbardbutikken, the northern most department store in the world.
The warehouse consists of the following departments: grocery, fresh products, kiosk, house / home, gift /souvenir, perfume and electro. In addition, Coop Svalbard SA has a lease and operating agreement with Nordpolet AS with exclusive rights for the sale of alcohol. We also have a lease agreement with Avinor for the operation of Svalbard kiosk at Svalbard Airport. We have about 40 employees, revenue in 2022 was NOK 183 million, and expected revenue in 2023 is NOK 197 million. The Svalbard store is and will be a natural meeting point in Longyearbyen. Svalbard / Longyearbyen is visited annually by approximately 140,000 people from different countries in the world, in other words, a large feature of internationality characterizes the department store.

Name: Прима Дистрибьюшн
Description:
ТОО «Прима Дистрибьюшн» - является одной из ведущих компаний в сфере дистрибуции товаров народного потребления. Служба продаж поддерживает необходимый ассортимент товаров в магазинах всех крупных городов Казахстана, где имеются свои представительства, и охватывает более 35 000 торговых точек по всей стране.

В сферу деятельности компании входит дистрибуция продуктов питания и бытовой химии. Продукция, поставляемая компанией, включает в себя более 55000 наименований в таких направлениях, как бакалея, консервация, бытовая химия, гигиена, уход за телом, household и т.д.

ТОО «Прима Дистрибьюшн» имеет партнерские отношения с компаниями по всему миру. Большая часть продукции поставляется из стран европейского союза. Для оптимизации товарных потоков и консолидации товара компанией создан HUB в городе Вильнюс (Литва).

На благо компании трудится более 4000 высококвалифицированных специалистов. В собственности компании находится современный логистический центр, автопарк, насчитывающий большое количество специализированной грузовой техники для осуществления своевременных и качественных поставок. «Прима Дистрибьюшн» использует склады класса А, соответствующие международным стандартам. Торговые команды компании оснащены современными КПК позволяющими отправлять заявки в онлайн режиме операторам в офис.

ТОО «Прима Дистрибьюшн» очень дорожит репутацией честного партнера, поэтому мы ставим порядочность, строгое соблюдение ценовой политики, соблюдение условий договора во главу работы с любым поставщиком и покупателем.

Особое значение мы придаем личному контакту с покупателем, стремимся установить с ним, прежде всего, человеческие отношения, так, чтобы каждый понимал и чувствовал, что благополучие его бизнеса для нас очень много значит. Ценности нашей компании позволяют вести взаимовыгодное сотрудничество с некоторыми партнерами уже более10 лет.

Сотрудничество с нами – это стабильный доход и хорошее настроение!!!

Name: Lombardi & C. S.r.l.
Description:
La storia imprenditoriale del Gruppo inizia nell'anno 1896 quando il sig. Basilio Lombardi avvio' a Triggiano (BA) un'impresa per la produzione di confetti, sciroppi, liquori, effervescenti ed estratti per liquore che ha proseguito la sua attivita' fino ad epoca assai recente. 

Gia' nel 1985, i fratelli Silvio e Sandro decisero di ampliare il core business aziendale, affiancando la distribuzione di alimentari all'attivita' di produzione. Cio' avveniva mediante l'acquisizione di una avviata attivita' di commercio all'ingrosso tradizionale. 

Nel 1991, da autentici pionieri, inaugurarono l'attuale Cash&Carry. Una nuova formula di distribuzione commerciale che tanto successo avrebbe riscosso negli anni a venire. 
Gli eventi che si sono succeduti, da allora fino ai giorni nostri, hanno sempre visto il "Marchio" Lombardi come una costante, unico elemento dominante e distintivo di ogni attivita' che, col passare del tempo, e' diventato sinonimo di garanzia ed affidabilita' ovunque si operi. 

Le indiscusse competenze nel settore dolciario, la gestione attenta del business, la cura delle relazioni, la voglia di crescere e migliorarsi sono ormai tutti elementi riconosciuti e apprezzati dalla clientela. 

Nell'ottica della crescita e dello sviluppo del Gruppo sono da ricercarsi le motivazioni dell'avvio di una nuova sfida commerciale: un CENTRO DI DISTRIBUZIONE di circa 12.000 mq a Capurso (BA) destinato all'approvigionamento di ogni genere di prodotto per supermercati et similia con i quali instaurare rapporti economici capaci di produrre reciproche e crescenti utilita'.

Description:
Centrale d'achats pour supermarchés

Nous faisons partie du groupe FRANCAP et approvisionnons supermarchés et grossistes à l'export.

UN PROJET DE CRÉATION DE SUPERMARCHÉ ?

Les équipes de CABF sont à votre disposition pour vous accompagner durant toutes les étapes de votre projet, des plans à l’ouverture de votre supermarché. Ensuite, nous pourrons répondre à l’ensemble de vos besoins d’approvisionnement en vous permettant de bénéficier de tous les services de notre centrale d’achat .

Nous pouvons vous apporter un concept marketing complet, innovant et attractif, sous forme d’une franchise réellement indépendante de supermarché permettant de rivaliser avec les plus grandes enseignes des groupes de distribution. Cette franchise peut se faire avec l’une des enseignes nationales de notre centrale d’achat : Coccinelle, Coccimarket, Coccinelle express, Coccimarket City.

Name: Trojan Group
Description:
Trojan Group: Circular Growth and Sustainable Innovation

About Us:
Trojan Group is a fast-growing European leader in eCommerce, circular solutions, and contract electronic manufacturing (CEM). We help global brands scale their digital operations, reduce waste, and manufacture responsibly — combining commercial agility with deep technical expertise.

Our Divisions:

Trojan eCommerce – Launches and manages online stores and marketplaces for global FMCG and consumer brands. We power sales across Amazon, eBay, Tesco, TikTok, and B&Q, and operate direct-to-consumer (D2C) websites for leading manufacturers.

Trojan Circular Solutions – Delivers repair, testing, refurbishment, and resale for electronics, helping brands extend product life and reduce e-waste.

Trojan CEM – Provides contract electronic manufacturing, design integration, and assembly services focused on sustainable innovation.

Our Infrastructure:
With over 1 million sq. ft. of warehousing and operational space across the UK and Netherlands, Trojan offers full 3PL, storage, and fulfilment solutions alongside eCommerce growth and marketplace management. As part of the Buy It Direct Group, we connect digital capability with logistics, marketing, and technical expertise at scale.

Our Mission:
To help brands grow profitably and sustainably — through smarter commerce, responsible manufacturing, and circular innovation.

Why Trojan Group?
One trusted partner for growth, fulfilment, circularity, and manufacturing — redefining what it means to grow responsibly across Europe.

Name: Multiexpress
Description:
Multiexpress es una compañía de supermercados físicos y online líder en Posadas. 
Compuesta por 3 sucursales distribuidas en puntos estratégicos de la ciudad.

De capital familiar, Multiexpress tiene por objetivo ofrecer a sus clientes las mejores soluciones, con la máxima calidad en alimentación, surtido de productos y experiencia de compra. 

Multiexpress cuenta con el mejor talento: con una dotación de entre 80 a 100 empleados altamente comprometidas, que comparten el modelo y la pasión por la excelencia en el servicio.

Para ello, dispone de una política de recursos humanos diferencial, caracterizada por ofrecer empleo estable y de calidad, planes de formación continua y promoción interna, entre otros valores.

Name: Bónus
Description: Bónus has been a leading discount supermarket chain in Iceland for the past 30 years. Currently there are 33 stores all over Iceland.

Name: HeroMarket (My Hero Hypermarket Sdn Bhd)
Description: HeroMarket has grown with the city of Klang Valley. Starting as a small, friendly neighborhood store in 2005 has expanded into 35 outlets across Peninsular Malaysia.

Name: Vince's Market
Description:
The mission of Vince’s Market is to serve our customers quality and fresh food through an experience of convenience, cleanliness, and accessibility provided by a team dedicated to superior service. We are committed to building long-term relationships with our team members and partner vendors in an effort to encourage high performance and personal growth. It is our commitment to make a difference in every community we serve.

Vince’s Market is a small chain of independent grocery stores located in Sharon, Newmarket, Uxbridge, and Tottenham Ontario. We pride ourselves on fresh departments such as produce, bakery, meat and deli. The Vince brothers began the business in 1956. Upon Bob Vince’s passing the business was left to his daughter Carol, who ultimately sold the business to Carmen Trimarchi and his partner Mario Testa. Since 1986, the business has grown, we had partnership changes along the way with Mario exiting after more than 15 years, Brian Johns joining the team during our expansion years as well for just over 15 years, and Giancarlo Trimarchi joining his father as a managing partner in the business. All of this was built on our reputation for being the best at fresh produce and our accompanying fresh departments. Vince’s Market is operated today by Carmen, and his son, Giancarlo, with the help of their management team and dedicated staff.

Name: E. LECLERC CAEN
Description:

Name: FINGO E-COMMERCE INDONESIA

Kenapa Bisnis Afiliasi ??
- Semua latar belakang bisa menjalankan Bisnis Afiliasi, karena SANGAT MUDAH mengerjakannya.
