Name: Drakes Supermarkets
Description:
Welcome to Drakes Supermarkets, Australia’s leading independent supermarket retailer. With over 5,500 employees in over 60 sites in South Australia and Queensland including newsagencies and liquor stores, the Drakes story is a novel of incomparable success.

The expansion of Drakes has been continuous, starting in 1974 with Roger's first store - a 4 lane supermarket at Mitcham, South Australia. The principles of a family culture and commitment to customer service has meant that Drakes has experienced unprecedented growth, expanding the business to various operational arms such as fruit and veg wholesaling, meat production and warehousing. No longer is working in or for a supermarket simply about  stacking shelves, it’s about having skill, being business minded, while possessing a passion for serving customers, contributing to the community and achieving excellence in retailing that is unmatched.

The future at Drakes is hugely exciting. The business continues to make investments in new and existing stores, operational advancements to gain a competitive edge and most importantly the business continues to invest in its people.

Experience The Drakes Difference.

Name: Supermercados Andreazza
Description:
A história da Rede de Supermercados Andreazza inicia sobre forte alicerce nos valores familiares. O esforço, a dedicação, a união e a simplicidade conduziram o mercado para a trajetória de sucesso que se desenha até hoje.

Na década de 60, Orlando Pedro Andreazza trabalhava como pedreiro, e sua esposa, Dona Terezinha, cuidava da horta e produzia alimentos coloniais, que eram revendidos à vizinhança. Com o passar dos anos, perceberam a oportunidade de inaugurar um pequeno armazém, que cresceu até se tornar o que é conhecido atualmente como Super Andreazza Pioneiro. Um negócio que se tornou próspero devido à união do casal e o relacionamento com cada cliente.

Ano após ano, a clientela aumentava e a liderança dos negócios passa aos filhos: Vitor, Jaime, Mauro e Marcos Andreazza, que dão continuidade aos negócios. Unidos, os irmãos levam o Super Andreazza a novos patamares, sempre lembrando do início, dos valores da família e do compromisso com o cliente.

Com base de atuação em Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul, o Super Andreazza se faz presente com lojas nos principais bairros da cidade e municípios da Serra Gaúcha.

O sucesso da Rede de Supermercados Andreazza se concretiza mais e mais a cada dia, em cada atividade. Hoje, o Super Andreazza é uma das principais redes mercadistas da região Sul do Brasil, graças à dedicação em facilitar o acesso de toda a comunidade aos mais diversos produtos, o que faz do Super Andreazza o verdadeiro Amigo da Família.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: No Frills
Description:
Welcome to NO FRILLS!

We are proud to lead the charge when it comes to helping Canadians stretch their dollar. Synonymous with fresh products, low prices, high quality, and a wide assortment, we are committed to innovation and passing on savings to our customers. 

Over three decades, our first prototype store with only a few hundred items has grown into 280+ franchise locations across Canada. While much has changed over the years, our focus on fresh produce and meat remains, alongside our commitment to community and trusted low prices. Today, No Frills offers thousands of products including fresh produce, meat, President's Choice, and no name products. 

No Frills continues to deliver high quality products at affordable prices with exceptional customer service. Operating since 1978 as local franchise operations focused on community engagement, our franchisees prioritize customer satisfaction and investment back into local communities. They work through sponsorships, donations, fundraising for President’s Choice Children’s Charity, and various partnerships that support community events and projects. 

Every new franchisee is trained through the No Frills Franchise Academy. This developmental opportunity offers seasoned retail operators the chance to take their leadership skills, experience and knowledge of retail operations to the next level. 

Of course, so much of our continued success goes to our dedicated, cashiers, clerks and managers who work hard for their neighbourhoods, day-in and day-out. Together, we forge ahead building thriving communities that nourish lives while continuing our success story.

Join us here on LinkedIn for further insights and updates about exciting ventures!

Name: Pettitt's SuperValu
Description:
The Pettitt family has a long history of retailing in Wexford. In 1946 Cormac Pettitt’s Grandfather, Jack Pettitt, who was then working with the L&N., took over the Beechville Dairy in Wexford’s main street, one of the premises formerly owned by his grandfather.

From here he ran a counter service store until 1965 when he purchased the premises next door, merged them together and pioneered the first self-service operation in Wexford. In 1974, Jack Pettitt went on the expansion trail when he acquired his third main street premises, increased the total size to 2,300sq.ft.

In 1975, a new acquisition was added in the form of a 4,000 sq.ft. supermarket in St. Aidan’s Shopping Centre , Wexford. Cormac Pettitt's Father - Des Pettitt became responsible for the general management of this store and it has been extended twice bringing its total size to 17,000 sq.ft. 

In 1978, another store was purchased in Enniscorthy and in 1983 a new supermarket was opened in Gorey. Both have been extended since.

The Pettitt family bought its first store outside of County Wexford in 1987 in Athy, Co. Kildare and then again in Arklow, Co. Wicklow in 1989.

In January 2006, Pettitt’s joined SuperValu, the franchise group operated by Musgrave’s, the largest grocery distributor in Ireland. The strong Irish brand compliments what Pettitt’s is known for: superior customer service and quality fresh produce.

In June 2021, a state-of-the-art store opened in Bray, bringing with it 80 new job opportunities and a host of innovative plans aimed at supporting and fostering growth within the local community.

Pettitt’s Supermarkets have a strong reputation for being customer and community focused. A huge amount of time and effort is put in working with local suppliers to offer customers high quality, local produce at good value.

Name: fairmischt GmbH
Description:
Wir sind fairmischt – dein nachhaltiges Food-Startup aus Wuppertal, das den Pflanzendrink-Markt neu definiert.
Mit unseren Haferdrink-Konzentraten zum Selbermischen bieten wir eine revolutionäre und umweltfreundliche Alternative zu herkömmlichen Pflanzendrinks. Unsere Konzentrate sind nicht nur voller Geschmack und cremig, sondern helfen dabei, den Verbrauch von Verpackungsmaterialien und CO₂-Emissionen drastisch zu senken.

 Unsere Mission: Wir wollen den Konsum von Pflanzendrinks nachhaltiger gestalten und Menschen dazu inspirieren, bewusster zu handeln. Unsere hochkonzentrierten Haferdrinks sparen nicht nur Verpackung, sondern auch wertvollen Platz und Ressourcen beim Transport. Das Ergebnis? Weniger Plastikmüll, weniger Emissionen und eine bessere Zukunft für unseren Planeten – ohne dabei auf Geschmack oder Komfort zu verzichten.

Warum fairmischt?

 Bis zu 90% weniger Verpackung: Mit unseren hochkonzentrierten Haferdrinks sparst du enorm viel Verpackungsmüll im Vergleich zu herkömmlichen Getränkekartons.

 Weniger Transport, mehr Umweltbewusstsein: Dank der kompakten Größe unserer Produkte reduzieren wir den Transportaufwand und damit auch die CO₂-Emissionen.

 Frischer Genuss, wann du willst: Mische deinen Haferdrink in Sekundenschnelle selbst an – zu Hause oder unterwegs – und genieße den frischen Geschmack nach deinen Wünschen.

 Bewusst und einfach: Nachhaltigkeit war noch nie so bequem – mit fairmischt kannst du einen direkten Beitrag zu einer ressourcenschonenden Lebensweise leisten.

Unser Versprechen:
Mit fairmischt bekommst du nicht nur eine leckere und flexible Pflanzendrink-Alternative, sondern trägst aktiv zur Reduktion von Plastikmüll und Transportemissionen bei. Nachhaltiger Konsum war noch nie so einfach – mischen, genießen, Umwelt schützen.

Schließ dich uns an und werde Teil der nachhaltigen Pflanzendrink-Revolution!

Name: BEES Coop
Description:
Launched in March 2014, BEES Coop (bees-coop.be) is a citizens driven project with the aim of creating the first consumers owned supermarket in Belgium.

The main mission of BEES Coop is to allow every citizen to buy quality food  - mostly organic and local products - at affordable prices, up to 30% lower than the market average. This objective is strictly linked with a strong attention for producers - assuring them fair prices and  supplying conditions - and the environment - preferring loose supplies.

The business model of BEES Coop is innovative for a supermarket. In our shop consumers will have a triple hat of consumers, owners and managers of the cooperative. Main decisions will be taken by its members at the General Assembly. Along with that, members will be asked to work as volonteers for 2h45 a month (main and technical tasks will be assured by a team of professional workers).
This will:
- reduce costs for the cooperatives and economies will be used for reducing final prices to consumers;
- allow consumers to regain an active role in consumption, driving it towards a new sustainable path for people and the environment.
- demonstrate that a different way of making business in retail sector is possible.

We planned to open the supermarket by the end of 2016 in a popular area of Brussels. 
The shop will be a one stop shopping, distributed on a 700m2 surface.

Currently, BEES Coop is organised as an association of 60 volonteers, working in 8 small working groups on different aspects of the project development.
One of them is the purchasing group, counting more than 180 households and 280 products (Februray 2015). 
The aim of the purchasing group is to be the laboratory for the future cooperative in which we test products and all participative activities.

Other groups as BEES are growing up in Brussels and in Belgium. Should you need more information on our projet, do  not hesitate to contact us for more information, adiveces or help !

Name: Sri Ternak Group Of Companies
Description:
Sri Ternak Group of Companies may not be a household name, but it has been a well-known brand among Selangor residents for 45 years. Led by the founders, Mr. Ho Ah Chai and Madam Tee Geok Lan, and with the efforts of their second-generation descendants, Dato’ Raymond Ho Cheng Hann, Mr. Alan Ho Cheng Yek, and Mr. Williem Ho Cheng Yen, the business has expanded to several locations in Klang Valley. With a team of over 2,800 people and 09 wholesale supermarket branches that operate 24/7, Sri Ternak Group aims to bring more convenience to more people.

Over time, Sri Ternak Group has evolved from a traditional supermarket to a modern one, keeping up with market trends and customer feedback. For example, the second branch in Sri Kembangan was designed with a superior and tidy environment in 2013. Before that, in 2003, Sri Ternak Group established the first 24-hour wholesale supermarket, Sri Ternak Food Mart, in the Selayang wholesale market. Neatly arranged goods on sturdy iron shelves maximized space utilization, allowing more products to be displayed. 

Motto’s : “Helping People & Business Save Money, Time & Live Better”

In 2018, Sri Ternak Group collaborated with Malaysian No.1 artist Datuk Rosyam Nor to establish ST Rosyam Mart, offering customers a five-star shopping experience at wholesale prices. Today, the ST Rosyam brand has expanded to 06 branches, while the two old Sri Ternak branches are also undergoing renovation and transformation into a new model. In addition to purchasing fresh fish and vegetables directly from local fishermen and farmers daily, Sri Ternak Group imports various food items, including seafood, frozen seafood, vegetables, meat, and dry goods, from several countries. The company operates its processing factory, reducing intermediate costs and providing fresh daily produce at wholesale prices. 

Motto’s : Berbelanja Di ST Rosyam Mart, Dompet Abang Selamat !

Good Earth seeks to employ people from all walks of life who share a passion for personal and ecological health and support that passion by investing in certified organic food and natural farming methods. 
Good Earth is a positive working community that values each employee’s well-being – physically, emotionally and mentally. We focus on respectful communication, listening to staff, setting clear expectations, good training, promoting from within, and offering a range of benefits for staff.

At Good Earth we feel, very strongly, that if we go out and do good things for our community, good things will come back to us in time.   With our store in Fairfax and our second store in Tam Valley, we invite you to check our job postings and join us in offering the highest quality natural foods in Marin County.

Name: BETTER CAKEZ
Description:
BETTER CAKEZ wurde 2024 von Isabelle Forster gegründet, die Kuchen über alles liebt, aber durch eine Gluten- und Laktoseunverträglichkeit sehr eingeschränkt in ihrer Ernährung war-und insbesondere ihren heißgeliebten Bäckerkuchen nicht mehr essen konnte.
In ihrer Verzweiflung hat sie sich 2 Jahre in die Küche gestellt, um für sich selbst Kuchen zu kreiren, die vor allem sündhaft lecker schmecken, aber einfach viel gesünder sind und für jeden leicht verträglich. Ihr Umfeld war so begeistert, dass Isabelle überzeugt wurde, nicht noch ihr 2. Staatsexamen in Jura zu machen, sondern nun ihre gesünderen Snack-Kuchen to go auch anderen zugänglich zu machen.

Unsere drei Snack-Kuchen to go sind mit bis zu 30% Gemüse vollgepackt, glutenfrei, vegan, ohne raffinierten Zucker, ohne künstliche Konservierungsstoffe, ohne Palmöl und das alles in Bio-Qualität und einer langen Haltbarkeit ohne Kühlung. Und das Wichtigste haben wir noch vergessen: Sündhaft lecker.

Für Retail- oder B2B Kooperationen: b2b@bettercakez.de

Description:
En Grupo Upper somos una Sociedad Cooperativa que gestiona la marca internacional de supermercados SPAR, operando bajo las enseñas EUROSPAR, SPAR, SPAR Express y SPAR City en las provincias de Murcia, Alicante, Almería, Albacete, Granada y Málaga Oriental.

Trabajamos junto a pequeños, medianos y grandes detallistas independientes, quienes, al unirse a nuestra cooperativa, pasan a ser propietarios de la misma, formando parte de un modelo de negocio basado en la colaboración y el crecimiento conjunto.

Nacimos en 1982 gracias a la unión de un pequeño grupo de comerciantes independientes de la zona de Cartagena, que, ante el auge de los hipermercados, buscaban fortalecer su competitividad y afrontar los retos del mercado. Hoy, con más de 40 años de trayectoria, 240 puntos de venta y 1.840 profesionales, seguimos creciendo y adaptándonos a los nuevos tiempos, impulsando la expansión y consolidación de supermercados y autoservicios con soluciones integrales que optimizan la competitividad de nuestros socios.

Nuestra infraestructura nos convierte en un partner estratégico clave, con más de 16.000 m² de plataformas logísticas en Cartagena, incluyendo un centro de más de 5.000 m² especializado en productos hortofrutícolas y refrigerados. Gracias a ello, ofrecemos una distribución eficiente, competitiva y con un alto estándar de calidad en el servicio.

Nuestra fortaleza nos permite responder a las necesidades de nuestros socios, proporcionándoles un amplio surtido en Marca de Fabricante y Marca Blanca, lo que les permite ser competitivos frente a los principales actores del mercado y ofrecer a los consumidores productos de calidad al mejor precio.

Si buscas una alianza sólida en el sector retail que no suponga trabajar para enriquecer a otros, Grupo Upper es su solución.

Name: DTL
Description:
Domaći trgovački lanac ili skraćeno - DTL, od svog osnivanja, već preko 14 godina, preduzima niz projekata sa ciljem da pruži podršku lokalnoj zajednici, osnaži domaće proizvođače i privredu Republike Srbije u celini. Kontinuiranim širenjem maloprodajne mreže, postali smo trgovački lanac sa najvećim brojem objekata i najširom geografskom disperzijom u Srbiji. 

Naša maloprodajna mreža je sačinjena od 13 trgovačkih lanaca i broji preko 800 objekata, sa više od 7.500 zaposlenih. Otvaranjem novih radnih mesta i negovanjem partnerskih odnosa sa domaćim dobavljačima direktno doprinosimo očuvanju životnog standarda lokalne zajednice i zadržavanju stanovništva u matičnim sredinama, čime sprečavamo migracije ka većim centrima.

Sve što radimo posvećeno je porodici kao prirodnoj i osnovnoj društvenoj jedinici. Verujemo da su međusobna pažnja, briga, zajedništvo, iskrenost, poštenje i tradicija ključne vrednosti na osnovu kojih se gradi lojalnost prema porodici, prijateljima i kolegama.

Naša porodica sačinjena je od 13 članova:

DTL SP marketi
DTL PerSu
DTL Podunavlje
DTL Vum
DTL Žuti marketi
DTL Styline
DTL Tekijanka
DTL Europrom
DTL Viva
DTL Proleter
DTL Morava
DTL Zlatan Trag
DTL Leon

Mi poznajemo ljude zbog kojih radimo, kao i potrebe i želje onih sa kojima sarađujemo. Zato ponosno ističemo činjenicu da svakoga dana više od 300.000 zadovoljnih kupaca obavi kupovinu u prodajnim objektima Domaćeg trgovačkog lanca širom zemlje.

Naše udruženje, nastalo iz potrebe da kupcima ponudi što bolje cene, kvalitet i asortiman domaćih proizvoda, danas više nego ikada pre veruje u značaj negovanja i razvoja malih, lokalnih prozvođača i, posledično,  kreiranje povoljnog poslovnog ambijenta za plasman proizvoda, održivi rast i razvoj.

Name: Levanthym
Description:
J'ai lancé Levanthym avec pour mission de rendre disponible en Europe un vrai Zaatar, cueilli à la main, de haute qualité et Made in France.
Levanthym est un jeune atelier de produits artisanaux basé à Strasbourg, nous sommes une entreprise éthique, qui ne travaille pas avec de gros fournisseurs, nous travaillons avec des petites agricultrices au Liban.
En réduisant les intermédiaires, nous vous assurons la meilleure qualité, saveur et fraîcheur et aussi pour elles, nos partenaires, d'obtenir un meilleur prix pour continuer à travailler avec amour, attention et passion.

Notre zaatar (un mélange de thym sauvage, sumac, sésame et huile d'olive) est préparé dans notre atelier selon une recette traditionnelle et familiale. Toujours en adéquation avec les saveurs libanaises, nous proposons également d'autres gammes de produits comme des hydrolats, des plantes, et des mélasses, toutes importées directement du Liban.

Levanthym met un point d'honneur à produire et vendre des produits sains, 100% naturels, sans conservateurs ou autres additifs, pour convenir à tous types d'alimentations.   

Nous sommes le seul atelier en France à proposer un zaatar qui n'est pas importé, le rendant ainsi très frais et lui permettant de conserver toutes ses saveurs. 

Aujourd'hui, nos produits sont vendus en ligne et dans des épiceries fines sur Strasbourg, en France et partout en Europe. 

"Étant libanaise, pour moi le zaatar est un mode de vie. C’est l’une de ces choses qui me fais instantanément me sentir chez moi où que je sois dans le monde." - Sarah, fondatrice de Levanthym

Name: Farmer's Snack GmbH
Description:
Quality, innovation, sustainability and transparency – these values guide us at Farmer’s Snack as one of the leading manufacturers of high-quality nuts and dried fruits on the way to a future worth living.

  We have been a family business for over 50 years and are now based in northern Germany, just outside Hamburg. Our current snack family consists of over 180 employees from 24 nations, and together we create delicious and trendy snacks.

  “From the field to you” – that’s what we live by: We search worldwide for special raw materials to ensure the best quality and unique taste. We set high standards from cultivation to harvesting to processing. Nuts and fruits from sustainable sources, in-house recipes and innovative refining processes make up the special “Farmer’s Snack”.

 We are proud of our Seevetal production site, which is one of the most modern production facilities in Germany and has also been producing climate-neutrally since 2022*.
(* from raw material input to finished goods output; certified by the German Institute for Sustainability and Economics, 2022.)

We have been certified by EcoVadis with a bronze medal for our good sustainability performance since May 2024. We have already been certified as "securely sustainable" (DINO) since 2022.

 You can find all of our sustainable activities relating to the environment, origin, society and product under the umbrella of GutVertrauen: ww.gutvertrauen.de

  Today we stand for a trend-conscious lifestyle that combines an active, healthy life with quality, enjoyment and sustainable responsibility - always with the right healthy snack.

 Find out more at: www.farmers-snack.de

Our intent is to offer an alternative food buying network, by connecting an urban community with the local farming community.

Name: daves Food Stores
Description:
Since it’s inception in 2013, daves Food Stores has set it sights on a single objective: to offer an unparalleled shopping experience to the island of Malta.

Nestled squarely in the Mediterranean with a vast array of cultural diversity, an ever-increasing appetite for great products and friendly, efficient staff that offer you, not only 24 hour in-store solutions, but an online shop that brings groceries to your door, exactly when you expect it. Furthermore, our local and international partners allow us to bring you the finest quality products, everyday needs, and household consumer goods that you could expect from any large continent supermarket, with of course, that warm Maltese smile.

Our continued commitment to 'care for you' is a promise that extends beyond just words and is measured by the satisfaction of our clients, the engagement we share with suppliers and ultimately in the way you experience your shopping with us.

With class-leading infrastructure, technological advancement and a team driven by foresight, experience and clear objectives, our future path is undeniably bright.

Boasting close on 20 stores and expanding rapidly, we are uniquely proud of our achievements, awards, daily feedback, and infrastructure we have built to serve you and the driving factor behind our efforts will remain underpinned by traditional values such as quality products, great service, a guarantee of fresh goods and solutions that make your life a touch easier.

daves Cares about you!

Honey Money Top was established in the year 1997 by Lecturer turned businessman Late Sh. N.L. Gupta & his sons with a True vision & great leadership skills . From the modest beginning in New Friends Colony, Honey Money Top has come a long way under the able leadership of Late Sh. N.L.Gupta and later by his sons.

Description: Wir, die HIT Handelsgruppe, sind seit einem ganzen Jahrhundert eine feste Größe im deutschen Lebensmitteleinzelhandel. In mittlerweile über 100 modernen, individuellen HIT Märkten in ganz Deutschland genießen unsere Kunden die riesige Auswahl und einzigartige Frische unserer Produkte: Dafür arbeiten wir zum Beispiel Hand in Hand mit lokalen Gemüsebauern und Landwirten zusammen. Wir bieten bereits über 7.000 Lebensmittel-Begeisterten spannende Perspektiven und ein echtes berufliches Zuhause.

Name: Sunset Foods
Description:
Sunset Foods is a family-owned, neighborhood supermarket dedicated to providing customers with high-quality products, friendly and knowledgable service, and competitive prices. Shopping natural, organic, local, and antibiotic-free isn't a trend for Sunset Foods - it's who we are. 

Since our creation in 1937, we have focused on offering fresh, premium items and extraordinary customer service while integrating ourselves within the community. The same promises ring true today as we continue to largely source items from local producers and manufacturers in our store, kitchen, deli, butcher, and floral departments. From produce and meats to whiskey and wines, our commitment to offering home-grown and natural items is unwavering. 

Sunset Foods operates five stores throughout Chicago: Highland Park, Lake Forest, Libertyville, Long Grove, and Northbrook, and two Grand Food Centers in Winnetka and Glencoe. We're committed to finding and training friendly, conscientious, and knowledgeable staff to help provide the freshest, highest-quality products in clean, fun-to-shop stores.

Name: bonVeno Česko
Description:
1st Bonveno store in Prague, Czech Republic, opened in July!

We are delighted to announce that we have successfully opened our first Bonveno store in Prague 5 – Karla Engliše 1. 
 
The store covers an sales area of 90 m² and offers to customers around 2,000 different types of goods, with 80% of the assortment consisting of high-quality grocery food and 20% fresh food. 

Bonveno is open every day for customers who want to buy high-quality groceries at great competitive prices, as well as those seeking quick refreshments.
Next to carefully selected grocery products, customers can enjoy excellent coffee, fresh croissants, baguettes, sandwiches, top meat quality hot dogs with cold drinks in combo offers and of course, our helpful and friendly staff. 

In coming months we plan to open more branches in carefully selected Prague locations. Bonveno will prove to customers that it has very much to offer! 

We are proud that we were able to bring this new concept of convenience shopping to the Czech market. 

MAKRO Convenience and BONVENO Team

Today, our supermarkets serve as a grocery store, gift shop, stationery store, and kitchen and home appliances mart, to the people nearby. Siamo una società consortile nata nel 1999 dall’unione di nove imprenditori locali con differenti background aziendali ed un Presidente con pluriennale esperienza nella Distribuzione Organizzata.

Oggi rappresentiamo una famiglia composta da circa 250 supermercati consociati, presenti su Lombardia, Piemonte, Liguria, Veneto, Emilia Romagna e Toscana. 

Dal 2004 la nostra sede a Siziano, nella cintura dell’hinterland milanese, in una recente area a vocazione industriale, dove accanto agli uffici del Consorzio, trovano posto il magazzino generi vari (15.000 mq), quello di freschi e surgelati (5.000 mq) e il magazzino di frutta e verdura (5.000 mq), che ha sede a Triuggio.

Nel 2010 i soci di Consorzio Europa hanno scelto il marchio d’insegna Sigma, aprendo un nuovo, importante capitolo della nostra storia. 

Oggi siamo parte del gruppo multinsegna e multibrand D.IT-Distribuzione Italiana, che riunisce Sigma e Sisa.

Description:
Proxi est une enseigne qui s'adresse à des futurs exploitants indépendants ou commerçants déjà en activité. L'enseigne Proxi bénéficie de toute l'expertise et soutien du Groupe Carrefour, mais reste pour autant indépendante.


L’enseigne Proxi s’est donnée la mission de dynamiser aussi bien les milieux ruraux qu’urbains. Il s'agit d'un magasin convivial proposant aux consommateurs différents services complémentaires. La relation client est le point d’excellence de l’enseigne Proxi. Sa valeur repose sur la relation privilégiée que chacun doit avoir avec chaque client. Name: Stong's Markets
Description:
Stong’s Market is your local full service grocery store, established in 1931 in Vancouver by Carson Stong. We are 100% BC owned and operated.

At Stong’s, we offer a wide selection of products. We carry all major national brands as well as an extensive selection of unique, gourmet, natural and organic products. We pride ourselves on being the local grocer and in turn support local suppliers large and small. You can find hundreds of local brands throughout our stores.

To top it off, our Meat Department is second to none. Our meat is cut fresh and packaged in-store by apprenticed meat cutters not at a central plant. Our selection includes exotic seafood and gourmet items such as pheasant, quail, and ostrich.

Thank you for choosing to shop local.

Name: StoreReport LLC
Description:
StoreReport is a cloud computing company with an emphasis on web-based inventory control for the retail industry. StoreReport is a sole proprietorship and owned by Bill Scott, author of 'Turning Convenience Stores Into Cash Generating Monsters,' and 'Retail is Detail.'
My name is Bill Scott. The president of StoreReport. For 45 years I have worked with convenience store companies to provide them with software to run their companies.
Most recently, our mission has been to partner with cstore businesses to help retailers grasp the significance of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and how it will soon change the way they manage their business. We accomplish this by focusing on every item in their stores and either turn these items into profitable cash machines, or remove them from the sales floor, coolers and stockrooms by using state-of-the-art demand forecasting data analytics. We teach cstore owners how to buy inventory on consignment, eliminate carrying cost, prevent cannibalizations, reduce theft, eliminate stock outs and overstock, thereby seeing an increase in profits by 100% or more, seeing positive results during in the first 90 days. 

More information at www.storereport.net Email: BillScott@StoreReport.com or grab the phone and call (601) 847-9480 OR join us at "Convenience Store Supply Chain Management" located at http://www.linkedin.com/groups/Convenience-Store-Supply-Chain-Management-3438781 and join in our discussions. 

Specialties: Convenience Stores, Supply Chain Management, Cloud Computing, speaking engagements, retail, store management, just-in-time inventory control.

Name: GLUCO UP!
Description:
DE LA NECESIDAD A LA IDEA.
Comenzamos en 2017, cansados de no encontrar en España productos que ayudasen a remontar las hipoglucemias de manera más natural, productos que sí encontrábamos fuera. Algo teníamos que hacer!

¿Y SI LO TRAEMOS NOSOTROS?
Esa fue la primera pregunta que nos hicimos. ¿Y si acercábamos a las personas esos productos que descubrimos y consumimos y que ellos aún no conocen? Así empezó todo.

EL QUE BUSCA, ENCUENTRA.
Buscamos, testeamos y filtramos nosotros mismos los productos que ofrecen los mejores fabricantes europeos, nos hemos convertido en distribuidores oficiales de las mejores marcas, lo que nos permite siempre ofrecer la máxima calidad.

PRODUCTOS PARA TODOS Y CASI PARA TODO.
Nuestra prioridad es poder ayudar a tener las hipoglucemias controladas, pero nuestros productos ayudan mucho más. Facilitan la concentración durante el estudio, ayudan con la atención durante la conducción, a tener más energía en el gym, a mitigar el cansancio durante los días duros… o simplemente en tu día a día como el complemento perfecto para ese chute de energía que siempre viene bien!

MÁS FÁCIL Y CERCA.
Y como las necesidades son tan variadas como los clientes, no dejamos de añadir productos para cubrir todo lo que nuestros compradores nos demandan, siempre cuidando los precios y tiempos de entrega, haciendo llegar todos los productos sin tener que pagar costes aduaneros o portes abusivos. 

¿Te animas a probar?

Name: Hopcott Farms
Description:
Hopcott Farms is a third-generation family-run farm and local butcher shop based in Pitt Meadows, BC. Since 1932, we've grown from a small dairy farm into a multi-dimensional agri-business that includes a full-service meat shop, grocery market, café and bistro, on-site abattoir, event venue, and active farm.

Rooted in family values and a love for local, we’re proud to raise our own naturally fed, hormone-free beef, grow seasonal produce and cranberries, and partner with fellow BC farmers and producers to bring fresh, high-quality food to our community. From our heritage butcher shop to our on-farm bistro and event spaces, everything we do is about creating connection—to the land, to the food, and to one another.

We’re committed to building relationships founded on trust and transparency, while supporting local agriculture through every channel of our business. Whether you’re picking up groceries, sharing a meal, or celebrating a milestone on the farm—we’re honoured to be part of your table.

A segunda unidade - Loja Portal - está localizada na belíssima região do Portal da cidade e tem 2.200 m² de área de venda. Conta com produção própria de diversos produtos - confeitaria, padaria, rotisseria e restaurante, além da comercialização de uma variedade de itens de qualidade nas mais variadas seções

Description:
Chef de file des industries du jouet et de la papeterie fine depuis plus de 50 ans, Pierre Belvédère est fière de vous faire retomber en enfance avec son immense gamme de jouets éducatifs pour tous les âges. Des jeux de logique aux puzzles, en passant par les blocs de constructions, vous trouverez des produits qui plairont aux petits comme aux grands pour remplir vos magasins d’articles colorés et amusants. 

Pour les passionnés de papeterie, vous ne serez pas en reste! Découvrez chaque année des collections de cahiers de notes et d’agendas pour combler vos besoins d’écriture et d’organisation. Toujours à l’affût des nouvelles tendances, Pierre Belvédère se renouvelle sans cesse pour vous offrir des produits qui vous rendront complètement accro. Suivez-nous dans notre belle aventure!

Name: Panda Egypt- بنده مصر
Description:
Panda was founded in 1978 as one of the most important organizations in the retail sector in Saudi Arabia. In 1994, Panda merged with Azizia Company then in late 1998 Azizia Panda United was acquired by Savola Group, one of the largest diversified conglomerates in MENA region, Azizia Panda United became the retail sector of Savola and started its journey to become the leading food retailer in the region. In 2008, 
This acquisition has aided Panda in its growth and expansion by having the largest market share in the Saudi retail sector. 

The first new format of Hypermarket was opened in Riyadh city in 2004. In 2006, Panda moved forward with its regional expansion by opening its first store in Dubai. In 2008, more numbers of stores were operating under the name of Panda when Savola Group acquired “Giant” supermarkets in Saudi Arabia and merged them with Panda. One year later in 2009, Panda has landed another great success by acquiring all Geant stores in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. 

In 2014 the company name was changed from Azizia Panda United to the Panda Retail Company. And another big step in the expansion plan was achieved when Panda opened it hypermarket in Egypt in the year of 2015. These big steps have raised Panda share in the retail sector from 7% to more than 8%. Today Panda is the largest food retailer in the Middle East owns more than 400 branch of panda Super, Panda Hyper and Pandati in Saudi Arabia & Egypt making it the largest retail company that offering its services to more than 400 million visitors annually.

Name: Coop Adriatica
Description:
Coop Adriatica è una delle nove grandi cooperative che fanno parte del sistema Coop: la più importante catena distributiva italiana e, insieme, una grande organizzazione di consumatori.
Coop Adriatica nasce infatti dalla volontà dei consumatori di unirsi per meglio tutelare il loro potere di acquisto e per ottenere garanzie sulla qualità e la sicurezza dei prodotti. La Cooperativa non è una semplice impresa commerciale, non è una società di capitali: i suoi proprietari sono i soci, cioè tutti i cittadini che, compiuti i 18 anni di età, versano una quota sociale di 25 euro per aderire.
La base sociale sfiora oggi il milione e 300 mila persone, mentre la rete di vendita è composta da quasi 200 negozi in quattro regioni: Emilia-Romagna, Veneto, Marche e Abruzzo.
Coop Adriatica ha quasi 9.000 dipendenti, per il 95,5% a tempo indeterminato.

Name: SuperValue
Description:
Based in New Zealand. We believe good people working towards a common goal can achieve anything. With our owners living and working in their community, community values are very important to us.

Because we are in so many different locations around New Zealand we change our range to suit what our locals need. What is common to all SuperValue supermarkets is the high standards of friendly service and the uncompromising high standards of fresh produce. We support this with our replace and refund guarantee.

SuperValue supermarkets are all locally owned and operated. Our supermarkets are served by local people. We are proud of being local and value being part of the local community. SuperValue has stores across New Zealand including Christchurch, Auckland, Dunedin and more.

Name: VOG - Home of apples
Description:
VOG is the Consortium of South Tyrolean Fruit Growers‘ Co-operatives. Since 1945, the year in which it was founded, it has grown to become Europe’s leading commercial organisation. The centralised quality control system ensures unique guidelines through growing, quality control, marketing, sales and logistics phases that promote the presence of apples from South Tyrol - Südtirol on markets the whole world over.

11 member co-operatives actually represent over 4,000 apple farmers who harvest annually approximately 550,000 tons of apples of highest quality on 10.700 hectares of production area.

Care in creating the ideal conditions for the cultivation of each single variety ensures that apples are produced which stand out for the uniqueness of their aroma and quality. This means that in the vast assortment (for example Gala, Golden Delicious, Fuji, Granny Smith, Braeburn, Red Delicious, Pinova, Pink Lady, Jazz, Kanzi, envy, yello, Crimson Snow, Joya, Cosmic Crisp, Giga, RedPop) there will always be the right apple for every need and all year round.

They continuously strive to increase efficiency, reduce costs and guarantee high quality standards so that customers will be satisfied to an even greater extent.

Name: Supermercados Inter
Description:
Fundada por portugueses, o Intercontinental Comércio de Alimentos Ltda iniciou suas atividades como empresa de importação e a partir de 1991 inaugurou a primeira loja de varejo da rede, dando origem aos Supermercados Intercontinental.

Hoje, com uma rede de 20 filiais, no Rio de Janeiro e Grande Rio, o Inter, como é chamado carinhosamente por seu público, reafirma seu compromisso de buscar as melhores condições de compra junto aos parceiros fornecedores, a fim de garantir os melhores preços e qualidade nos produtos oferecidos aos seus clientes.

Esta página é dedicada aos funcionários dos Supermercados Inter e para divulgarmos oportunidades em nosso quadro de funcionários.

Description:

Vindémia Group est leader dans la région grâce à son positionnement multi-format et multi-canal au travers des enseignes d’hypermarchés (Jumbo), de supermarchés (Score et Score Express), de magasins de proximité (Spar et Vival), de cash & carry (Supercash) et de magasins spécialisés (Fnac).

A propos de Casino :

Acteur historique de la distribution en France, le groupe Casino est aussi l’un des leaders mondiaux du commerce alimentaire. Le groupe défend une vision du commerce axée sur deux points forts : d’une part la proximité qu’il entretient avec ses clients grâce à ses 227 000 collaborateurs dans le monde, d’autre part sa capacité à s’adapter à des réalités locales extrêmement variées.

Description:
A janela que deu início a um sonho...

Na janela de uma família pernambucana, nasceu a pequena e humilde venda de dona Antônia e sr. Armínio, que com muito esforço e dedicação fez o negócio prosperar e se transformar no que hoje é o Arco-Mix e Arco-Vita. 

Hoje, inspirado no exemplo dos nossos fundadores, continuamos tendo como propósito a valorização do trabalho, a fé em Deus, a união e o respeito entre as pessoas. 

Convidamos você a conhecer um pouco mais da nossa empresa, da nossa história e que possas vim a fazer parte dessa grande família sendo um multiplicador deste mesmo sentimento e do nosso jeito Arco-Mix e Arxo-Vita de ser.

Name: MAX ATACADISTA
Description: As ofertas dos produtos aqui divulgadas são exclusivamente para compras nas lojas físicas do Max Atacadista e estão sujeitas a alterações de estoque dentro do prazo de validade determinado de cada material

Name: Hippo Supermercados
Description:
O Hippo é uma empresa humana. Feita de pessoas, para pessoas. Em 1997, nasceu o que hoje é uma enorme família afetiva formada por clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores. 

Em mais de duas décadas de história, oferecemos atendimento exclusivo e personalizado em quatro lojas que são referências no setor alimentício: duas na região central de Florianópolis, uma em Coqueiros e outra na Cidade Pedra Branca, em Palhoça.

Aqui, honramos diariamente o compromisso de servir bem porque temos uma verdadeira satisfação em ajudar todas as pessoas, proporcionando produtos de qualidade, acompanhando nossos clientes de perto e oferecendo sabores inesquecíveis não só em momentos especiais, mas todos os dias.

Por este motivo, aprimoramos diariamente a nossa capacidade de promover bem-estar, um conceito amplo para nós e particular para cada pessoa. 

Viver bem pode ser degustar vinhos fantásticos para relaxar, preparar refeições com ingredientes selecionados, comer ou deixar de comer açúcar, glúten ou lactose e até mesmo preferir alimentos orgânicos, veganos ou vegetarianos. 

Quem decide são os nossos clientes e a nossa parte é ajudar cada um deles a comer bem, beber bem e viver bem todos os dias.

Name: Risen
Description:
At Risen, we’re not just about retail; we’re about building a community where passionate individuals can thrive. Our workplace is designed for those who seek intention in their careers, offering an inclusive environment that nurtures creativity, collaboration, and growth.

We value diverse perspectives and believe that every team member contributes to our success. Our commitment to professional development means you’ll have access to resources, training, and mentorship that empower you to pursue your goals and excel in your role. We offer attractive salaries along with the compensation and appreciation of hard work.

Join Risen and contribute to a forward-thinking team that's redefining the retail landscape. Here, your ideas matter, your growth is prioritized, and together, we create an atmosphere where everyone can succeed.

Name: Hiperideal Supermercados
Description: Com um total de 27 lojas distribuídas pelos bairros de Salvador, região metropolitana e Feira de Santana, fomos a primeira rede varejista 100% baiana a introduzir o e-commerce e mobile commerce de supermercados na cidade. Há 32 anos, atuamos tendo como objetivo primordial entregar atendimento de excelência, vasto portfólio de produtos e toda a experiência ideal que a família baiana merece. Valorizamos e fomentamos o mercado local e também entendemos a importância de conectar a capital soteropolitana com as melhores novidades do mundo, por isso, também damos destaque a execução das estratégias de importação. Originalidade, exclusividade, inovação e trabalho em equipe são o nosso lema.

Name: Tawa Supermarket, Inc.
Description:
99 Ranch Market, the flagship banner of Tawa Supermarket Inc., has been connecting communities through the vibrant flavors and traditions of Asia since 1984. Founded by Mr. Roger Chen, what started as a single store in Southern California has grown into one of the largest Asian supermarket chains in the United States, proudly serving as the "Gateway to Asia" for millions of customers and employees.

At 99 Ranch Market, we know our success comes from our people. From our store associates to our corporate teams, we foster a culture that values collaboration, innovation, and diversity. Every team member plays a vital role in delivering exceptional experiences and bringing our mission to life. Together, we create connections, inspire cultural discovery, and serve the communities we’re proud to call home.

Working at 99 Ranch Market means more than just having a job—it’s about being part of something bigger. It’s a chance to find purpose, build a community, and take pride in shaping a meaningful career. With us, you’ll grow, thrive, and help build a legacy that connects people and cultures through food.

Name: Market Basket
Description: The Market Basket opened its doors in 1960 as a family-run gourmet market and catering company. More than 50 years and 3 generations later, The Market Basket is still recognized as one of New Jersey’s best gourmet grocery stores, providing customers with individual care and a unique experience. Open 7 days a week, customers can treat themselves to store-made prepared foods, fresh produce, an expansive deli, prime meat, fresh seafood, store-made baked goods and so much more. Stop in, and discover how The Market Basket is committed to bringing you… “The Best for Less!”

Name: Migros Ticino
Description:
Siamo una delle 10 cooperative regionali autonome facenti parte della Federazione delle Cooperative Migros in Svizzera. 
Siamo uno dei principali attori del commercio al dettaglio in Ticino e uno dei maggiori datori di lavoro nella nostra regione. 

La nostra storia inizia nel 1933 con la costituzione di Migros Ticino, prima azienda voluta dall’imprenditore e fondatore Gottlieb Duttweiler con lo statuto di cooperativa, e con l’apertura dei primi negozi a Bellinzona, Locarno e Lugano.

Oggi, attraverso una rete capillare di oltre 50 punti vendita tra supermercati, negozi specializzati, outlet e ristoranti la nostra Cooperativa conta quasi 1’600 dipendenti e più di 96'000 soci.
In aggiunta alla vasta proposta di prodotti locali, il nostro impegno a favore del territorio si estende anche alla formazione continua e al mondo della promozione della salute fisica e del benessere; inoltre, tramite il Percento culturale e il settimanale Azione promuoviamo l’informazione e sosteniamo la diffusione e la fruizione della cultura nel nostro territorio.

Con una grande varietà di professioni in diversi settori offriamo ai nostri collaboratori un ambiente di lavoro ricco e appassionante, nel quale la formazione e lo sviluppo professionale sono facilitati.

Dal 2015 siamo l’unica azienda ticinese a possedere il prestigioso label Friendly Work Space, che certifica e riconosce uno speciale merito alle imprese che si impegnano a implementare misure aziendali per promuovere attivamente il benessere dei propri collaboratori e di riflesso delle loro famiglie.

Con lo stesso impegno, con tutte le attività della Comunità Migros Ticino, portiamo avanti la missione di promuovere una buona qualità di vita della popolazione nella regione nella quale operiamo.

Visita il nostro sito www.migrosticino.ch e scopri le posizioni aperte nella sezione “Lavora con noi” oppure inserisci la tua candidatura spontanea.

Name: Brookshire Brothers, Inc.
Description:
At Brookshire Brothers, and in each of our retail brands, our mission is to be good people who sell good food and do good deeds. So that’s what we do: Deliver exceptional customer service, provide the freshest food and volunteer our time and efforts to helping those around us, just like we’ve been doing for the past century.

Brookshire Brothers is employee-owned. With more than 7,000 employee-owners, it’s likely one of your neighbors is part of the Brookshire Brothers family. Our employee-owners take great pride in serving their community. They can be found coaching baseball, volunteering at schools or church or just about anywhere good things are happening. Customers enjoy a neighborly relationship with our stores and our employees. That makes for a stronger community and it makes good sense to us.

We don’t take a one-size-fits-all approach to our stores. Each provides for the unique needs of the community it serves. We operate under nine distinctive retail brands – Brookshire Brothers, Brookshire Brothers Express, Cormie’s, David’s Supermarkets, David’s Express, Pecan Foods, Polk Pick-It-Up, Brookshire Brothers Pharmacy and Tobacco Barn. From contemporary grocery stores, convenience-supermarket hybrids to traditional convenience stores, we deliver choices to our customers. At Brookshire Brothers, and in each of our retail brands, our mission is simple: To create a satisfied customer!

Name: Grup Sorli
Description: La historia de Sorli, antes Sorli Discau, empieza en 1923 en el barrio del Poblenou de Barcelona, cuando Francesc Sorli abrió un colmado en la calle Pere IV. El negocio creció hasta convertir la empresa en una cadena referente en el mercado de alimentación de calidad. Hoy Sorli continúa siendo una empresa familiar con capital cien por cien catalán que gestiona, además de la cadena de Supermercados Sorli y Sorlinyam, los centros deportivos Sorli Sport, el centro Sorli Emocions, el Hotel del mismo nombre y la Fundación Sorli.

Name: Supermercados Econômico
Description: Nossa missão é oferecer aos nossos clientes produtos e serviços de qualidade pelo melhor preço, todos os dias.

Name: MPREIS
Description:
Das Tiroler Familienunternehmen ist mit über 270 Lebensmittelmärkten, rund 170 Baguette Filialen und eigenen Produktionsbetrieben einer der größten privaten Arbeitgeber in Tirol. Als nachhaltig wirtschaftendes Unternehmen mit über 5.500 MitarbeiterInnen zählen Verantwortung, Vertrauen, Innovationsstärke, Teamarbeit und Chancengleichheit zu unseren zentralen Werten.

Der Sitz unseres Unternehmens befindet sich in Völs in Tirol, nahe Innsbruck, hier befinden sich zahlreiche Abteilungen wie Marketing und Werbung, Filialorganisation, Personalentwicklung und Verrechnung, IT, Technik, Einkauf und viele mehr. 

MPREIS bietet motivierten Menschen zahlreiche gute Karrierechancen, individuelle Aus-und Weiterbildungen und die Stabilität einer beständigen Branche.

Name: Seeberger
Description:
The Seeberger family business is today the leading brand for nuts and dried fruit, and is looking to the future with 180 years of experience, plenty of drive, and fresh ideas. Social and ecological responsibility is a fundamental part of Seeberger's corporate philosophy. Fair partnerships and respect for people and nature are therefore at the core of the sustainability strategy. In addition to the well-known snacks, the product range also includes coffee - after all, Seeberger is one of the oldest coffee roasting companies in Germany. The company currently employs around 1,000 people.

The company has a successful presence in the German and international food trade with its natural Seeberger snacks. Packed in the unmistakable orange-coloured wrapper, they provide new energy and a little break in between meals, whether on the go or at home.

Seeberger Professional GmbH is a concept partner operating throughout Germany, specialising in the needs of corporate customers and high-quality catering. This division supplies customers with a comprehensive product portfolio of diverse hot drinks, matching snacks, and modern machine and vending solu-tions with innovative cashless payment systems

All areas of the company can be experienced in the Seeberger Genusswelt located at the Ulm site: the Genussmarkt offers the entire selection of natural snacks and coffee specialties. The culinary journey is completed by a café and a guest restaurant, a comprehensive range of cooking and barista courses, as well as modern event and conference rooms in a high-quality ambience.

More information at: https://gruppe.seeberger.de/en/

Name: Carefour
Description:
Carefour mainly focuses on food items like vegetables, fruits, bakery, dairy, fish, meat, and grocery. Carefour also has household, grocery, personal care.

Carefour started its journey in the year 2010. We offer our customers a great range of food, toiletries, meat and other items with high quality. We try our best to satisfy our customers with the best service, welcoming environment, and best products.

Name: Rede Super Frangolândia
Description:
Em junho de 1979 em Fortaleza, com um pequeno comércio de frango abatido surgiu com muita luta, união e persistência, o Super Frangolândia.

Hoje a empresa possui 14 lojas, 1 atacado e o Centro de Destribuição  e gera mais de 2000 empregos diretos e 4.500 indiretos.

A empresa continua em plena expansão e aprimoramento logístico através da eficiência e eficácia dos processos estabelecidos no abastecimento, na distribuição e principalmente valorização e profissionalização do colaborador, atuando com a habitual cordialidade, presteza e respeito aos seus clientes.

Name: Super Golff Supermercados
Description: Ofertar preço justo e satisfação de compra aos nossos clientes, contribuindo ativamente para o desenvolvimento e progresso da nossa região.

Name: Metro Market Egypt
Description:
As one of Mansour companies, Metro Market company came out to market to complete the chain started by Mansour Distribution Company in Alexandria in January 1996, and then stores a series of rapid and remarkable expansion starting up now to more than 40 branches in 10 governorates of Cairo, Giza, Alexandria, Mansoura, Ismailia and Sharm el-Sheikh, Hurghada, Port Said.
Most of the stores (except a few branches) are open 24-hours. We, at Metro Markets, are distinctive by the vast diversity of products and brands we present to our customers to satisfy all tastes. It honors us to deliver quality and value to our customers. As one of the Mansour companies, Metro Market came out to the public in the year 1998. The first branch was in Heliopolis. And since it began operating its first branch in the Egyptian market, Metro Market went through rapid expansion to now have 40 branches in more than five governorates. Other openings and expansions will continue to deliver higher levels of service for consumers and to make the buying process more fun and easy.
كإحدى شركات منصور خرجت شركة مترو ماركت إلى السوق لإستكمال سلسلة الفروع التى بدأتها شركة منصور للتوزيع
بالأسكندرية فى يناير 1996 ثم بدأت سلسلة المحلات فى التوسع السريع والمتميز لتصل الآن إلى أكثر من 40 فرعاً في 10
معظم فروعنا (باستثناء البعض) تسعد بخدمة عملائنا على مدار 24 ساعة. ونحن في مترو ماركت نفخر بتقديم أعلى مستوى من التنوع في المنتجات للعملاء وذلك من أجل إرضاء جميع الأذواق وهو ما يجعلنا نشعر بالفخر لتقديم أفضل ما في الأسواق محافظات تغطي القاهرة، الجيزة، الإسكندرية، المنصورة، والإسماعيلية، وشرم الشيخ، والغردقة، وبورسعيد. العالمية لعملائنا الكرام بالسعر المناسب وهو شعـار شركتنا الحالي "تقديم أفضل الخدمات بالأسعار المناسبة ".

Name: WEBUY
Description:
WEBUY is the latest social e-commerce platform founded by a group of experienced and passionate entrepreneurs. The mission of WEBUY is to make social shopping a new lifestyle for everyone, by having fun, paying less for more value, and have less worries. Since inception in Aug 2019, WEBUY has become one of the fastest growing start-ups in Singapore. Currently WEBUY has operations in both Singapore, Malaysia, and Indonesia.

WEBUY is backed by Rocket Internet and a group of well-known angel investors in the region.

We are committed to develop a people-centric institutional technology platform that will operate in the Southeast Asia region. Running on our unique model of Group Buy, people who live in the proximity of each other will be able to purchase various types food and groceries as a group, collect them at designated locations and in the process, save money through bulk purchase and low delivery costs.

At WEBUY, we believe that food energizes and shapes our daily lives. Hence, we started the platform and focus on sourcing quality food products to bring them to our consumers, their family and friends. Our aim is to gather everyone to eat well and be healthier & happier. Seeing the smiles on our customer’s faces as they share, eat and find delight in the products purchased from us keeps us motivated! As the saying goes, sharing is fun!

If you love food, believe in sharing and enjoy innovation, come and join us. Together, we will create a better world.

Name: Woodman's Food Markets
Description:
Established in 1919, Woodman’s has grown steadily over the years through word of mouth, exceptional customer service, huge varieties of products, and extremely competitive pricing. You can fill a shopping cart with more at Woodman’s and spend much less than you will at any other grocery store or super box store.

Woodman’s Markets are a fresh change from the super box multi-product stores like Wal-Mart and Meijer and the regional grocery chains like Jewel and Pick n’Save. Currently, shoppers access Woodman’s stores all the way from Green Bay, WI to the Chicagoland suburbs of Illinois. Customers rely exclusively on Woodman’s stores for their grocery needs, and there is good reason why. Woodman’s offers huge variety and much lower prices than these other grocery stores and super box operators. In addition to grocery items, Woodman’s stores also feature huge, extremely well-stocked liquor stores, discount gas stations, oil change centers and car washes. This makes Woodman’s a convenient one-stop, grocery-shopping destination.

Name: SPAR Hrvatska d.o.o.
Description:
SPAR Hrvatska jedan je od vodećih trgovačkih lanaca u zemlji, a s investicijama od gotovo 400 milijuna kuna u ovoj godini SPAR potvrđuje poziciju najvećeg investitora u maloprodaji u Hrvatskoj.

SPAR Hrvatska kontinuirano širi svoju prodajnu mrežu koju danas čini više od 20 INTERSPAR hipermarketa i 90 SPAR supermarketa. Svojim kupcima nudi široki asortiman proizvoda originalnih brendova i SPAR robnih marki te surađuje s velikim brojem hrvatskih proizvođača.

SPAR je ujedno i jedan od najvećih poslodavaca i zapošljava gotovo 4600 ljudi. Upravo su zaposlenici najveća snaga SPAR-a i svakodnevno doprinose uspjehu cijele kompanije.

Name: Supermercado Megatiendas
Description:
Bienvenido/a a Megatiendas! Somos una empresa del sector retail en Colombia, con 34 sucursales en Bolívar, Atlántico, Magdalena y Bogotá. Estamos comprometidos día a día a ofrecer productos frescos y de alta calidad, servicio al cliente excepcional y opciones de compra innovadoras. Únete a nosotros y descubre que, con Megatiendas en el total, se ve la diferencia! 
#Megatiendas llega a tu hogar#EnElTotalSeVeLaDiferencia 
#MegaDomicilios 
 605-694-0104 | BOL
 605-309-3090 | ATL
 601-756-3365 | BOG
 605-436-6077 | MAG

Name: Maskom Supermercados
Description:
Cadena de supermercados malagueña que nace en 1978, con el objetivo de ofrecer a sus clientes los mejores productos en alimentación, higiene personal, cuidado del hogar y mascotas. Actualmente contamos con más de 58 tiendas y tres enseñas de negocio Maskom, Maskom One y Maskompra. Contamos con un amplio surtido de productos a precios muy competitivos, tanto de las principales marcas líderes del sector, como de nuestras marcas propias de la máxima calidad. Trabajamos cada día con productores y proveedores tanto locales como regionales, acortando los tiempos de distribución para ofrecerte siempre los mejores productos de nuestra tierra, con la máxima calidad, frescura y garantías, todo ello siempre al mejor precio. 

Nuestra filosofía de negocio está basada en la satisfacción de nuestros clientes, por ello, el cliente es nuestro pilar fundamental sobre el que se sustenta toda nuestra estrategia. Analizamos sus necesidades de forma constante con el objetivo de ofrecer siempre un valor añadido a todos y cada uno de nuestros productos y servicios. Para lograrlo contamos con un equipo humano cualificado del que nos sentimos orgullosos, siempre en constante cercanía con el cliente. Como empresa nos caracteriza además nuestra preocupación y compromiso con el medio ambiente y la sostenibilidad, cuidando de nuestra tierra y su entorno social-económico, por medio del desarrollo de acciones solidarias con diferentes organismos públicos y organizaciones.

Name: Juan Marcet
Description: Somos una compañía innovadora de ventas retail, especializada en papelería, suministros escolares, oficina, tecnología, arte y variedades: capaz de entregar satisfacción de compra a nuestros clientes, a través de calidad y buen servicio.”

Name: Apolónia Supermercados S.A.
Description:
A missão do Apolónia Supermercados S.A. é disponibilizar um ambiente e um serviço integrado, diferenciado pela elevada qualidade, onde a diversidade e a inovação de produtos e serviços faça das compras um prazer para o cliente e um prestígio para a comunidade.

Tem como visão ser a referência no prazer de ir às compras.

Mantém como valores a Excelência, Transparência, Confiança, Qualidade, Inovação e Distinção.

Name: BeMais Supermercados
Description: Junte-se a uma empresa inovadora, líder em seu mercado e que oferece amplas oportunidades de desenvolvimento de carreiras Procuramos pessoas extraordinárias que buscam excelência em sua habilidade única. Faça parte de uma equipe que sempre joga pra ganhar.

Name: Bigmais Supermercados
Description:
O Bigmais está presente nas casas e na mente dos “mineiros do Vale” há mais de 20 anos, mas nossa história começou bem antes disso. Lá no início dos anos 90, mais precisamente em 1991 foi inaugurado a Casa de Carnes Formosa e três anos depois surgiu a mercearia Formosa, com o mesmo nome e no mesmo bairro, o Jardim Pérola, sede da loja matriz até os dias de hoje.

Atualmente com seis lojas, e-commerce e um moderno Centro de Distribuição, geramos mais de 1.400 empregos diretos e milhares de indiretos. Todos os nossos empreendimentos estão instalados em Governador Valadares, cidade natal dos nossos negócios. Afinal, somos completamente ligados às raízes e tradições familiares.

Buscamos constantemente a melhoria dos nossos processos e também da estrutura física com um único objetivo, encantar o cliente. Estamos focados no atendimento das necessidades de cada consumidor, buscando continuamente os melhores produtos ao menor preço possível. Assim é o Bigmais!

Name: Osmar Nicolini Comércio e Distribuição SA
Description:
O Nicolini começou em 1979 com Osmar Nicolini, a esposa e os filhos, que deixaram sua cidade natal, Garibaldi, e foram para Bagé com a proposta simples de vender frangos do frigorífico dos irmãos de Osmar.Em junho de 80, Ivo Manfroi, genro de Osmar, funda outra empresa do mesmo ramo, a Ivo Manfroi e Cia Ltda., sob o mesmo nome fantasia. Passam a trabalhar juntos e fazer a distribuição dos produtos em Bagé e região. 

Com o passar dos anos, outros produtos começaram a ser agregados, outras 4 lojas foram criadas e a fusão das empresas aconteceu em 2001. A empresa foi crescendo, melhorando e abrindo mail lojas. 
 
Em 2023, mais uma fusão! A União com as empresas Aviário Nicolini e Super Engenho. Histórias e valores parecidos que se somam. Aviário Nicolini Fundada por Luiz e Hilário Nicolini com 2 lojas em Santana do Livramento e 53 anos de história na fronteira e as 4 Lojas do Super Engenho, fundada por Maria e Danilo Frighetto que junto com os filhos Daniela, Giovani e Guilherme há 25 anos constroem uma história baseada no prazer e na excelência em atender seus clientes

Com a Fusão, a Osmar Nicolini Comércio e Distribuição SA, passa a contar com uma equipe de 1800 pessoas, oferecendo mais de 10 mil itens aos seus clientes em 16 lojas (13 supermercados e 3 Atacarejos), operando em 8 cidades diferentes (Bagé, Dom Pedrito, Pelotas, Livramento, Quarai, Caçapava, São Gabriel e Rosário). Possui ainda um Centro de distribuição, o Açougue Central, a Central de Produção e a Chácara (produção hortaliças).

Nossa Missão 
Crescer, buscando o aperfeiçoamento profissional, comercializando os melhores produtos e serviços, mantendo a personalidade do nosso atendimento. 

Nossa Visão 
Até 2029, aumentar a participação no mercado, expandindo e diversificando o negócio de maneira sustentável. 

Nossos Valores 
# O melhor Atendimento
# Dedicação
# Honestidade 
# Espírito de Equipe
# Resultado
# Entusiasmo

Name: Saveco
Description:
Saveco began in 2014 as the brainchild of our owner to bring convenience and low-cost to Kuwaitis and expatriates.

What We Do

Saveco is a high end hypermarket that brings convenience and savings to the Kuwaiti market, while also providing a unique shopping experience. A one stop shop full of ambiance and aesthetics.

Name: Carrefour Express
Description: Carrefour Express is a supermarkets company based out of 65 AVE MARÉCHAL FOCH, Lyon, France.

Name: Auchan Retail Luxembourg
Description: Chez Auchan Retail, nous sommes persuadés qu’un monde qui consomme mieux a plus de chance d’être meilleur. Ancré dans la vie quotidienne, nous voyons que le monde change et que les besoins évoluent. A quel point la planète s’essouffle, combien nos clients, nos partenaires, nos collaborateurs attendent de nouvelles pratiques. Ils comptent sur Auchan Retail, sur nous, pour les accompagner. C’est pourquoi nous voulons activement changer la vie des habitants, en donnant le ton d’un commerce nouvelle génération, qui s’engage et donne des repères essentiels. Un commerce qui permet à chacun de mieux vivre au quotidien et à tous de mieux vivre ensemble.

Name: Unverschwendet
Description:
Gutes aus gerettetem Obst & Gemüse.

Unverschwendet rettet Obst und Gemüse das zu klein/groß/unschön/zuviel ist und macht daraus köstliche Feinkost wie Marmelade, Chutney, Sirup, Pesto, Essigdelikatessen und mehr. Was wie ein kleiner netter Feinkostbetrieb klingt ist jedoch nur der Anfang. Bisher haben wir über 10.000.000 kg Obst und Gemüse angeboten bekommen und unser Ziel ist es dafür eine umfassende Lösung zu finden, sowohl mit einzelnen Marmeladegläschen bis hin zu einer KI die bei der Prognose von Überschüssen hilft.

Das Ziel ist ein großer nachhaltiger Impact.

Name: Hipermercados Olé
Description: Somos una cadena de supermercados con 11 sucursales distribuidas en Santo Domingo, nuestro lema es el Rompe precios ya que nuestra ventaja competitiva son precios bajos manteniendo un buen servicio y garantizando la calidad de los productos, a través de un equipo humano comprometido y buenas alianzas con los proveedores y la comunidad.

Name: Grupo Queiroz
Description:
Sob a liderança de Jair Queiroz, agora somos Grupo Queiroz com as renomadas bandeiras Hiper Queiroz e Queiroz Atacadão, contando com 20 lojas estrategicamente posicionadas nos estados do Rio Grande do Norte e Paraíba. Além disso, temos uma sólida infraestrutura composta por 3 centros de distribuição, uma transportadora e um Centro Administrativo de excelência. A família cresce a cada dia, atualmente, somos mais de 2.200 colaboradores diretos, dedicados a construir um futuro de sucesso no varejo alimentar. 

Deseja fazer parte desta história de crescimento e realizações?

Junte-se à #FamíliaQueiroz e faça parte de uma cultura de 
#Cuidado, #Desenvolvimento e #Acompanhamento. Aqui no Grupo Queiroz construímos, além de carreiras, laços duradouros. Venha fazer parte dessa jornada única, onde a inovação e o comprometimento moldam o futuro do varejo alimentar.

Acesse: https://grupoqueiroz.jobs.recrut.ai/

Name: Haggen, Inc.
Description:
It all started with $1,100 and a dream for Ben and Dorthy Haggen and Doug Clark when they opened their first store in 1933 in Bellingham, Washington. For over more than 80 years, Haggen has been passionate about serving our customers with freshness and quality—that’s why we continuously strive to cultivate talented, dedicated associates who share our passion for bringing guests the freshest, local products possible with genuine service while building a sustainable local food economy and supporting our communities. 
 
We’re a local neighborhood grocer who strives to sustain partnerships with our local farmers, ranchers, fisheries and businesses that supply our stores to bring the very best to our community markets. We are proud to offer fresh, local produce, sustainable seafood, fresh meat, a scratch made bakery, a vibrant delicatessen and a wide assortment of organic, gluten free, local and specialty items.
 
If you’re excited about providing a destination shopping experience for your community, join our team and help us provide our guests with fresh, wholesome and sustainable products and service with a smile. It's always an exciting time to join Haggen, so visit our website at http://www.haggen.com to find your next opportunity or send us your resume at careers@haggen.com!

Name: U Maroc
Description:
U Maroc est une franchise du groupe "Système U" qui est une coopérative de commerçants de grande distribution française. Le groupement coopératif rassemble les enseignes Hyper U, Super U et U Express qui est le supplantant Marché U et Utile.

Des magasins conçus spécialement pour votre confort, des prix très compétitifs et une large panoplie de produits locaux et importés, tant d’avantages qui font de U express votre adresse privilégiée pour des courses agréables, dans la joie et la bonne humeur.

Notre personnel, toujours souriant et accueillant, met un point d’honneur à répondre à tous vos besoins et désirs.

Name: Metropolitan Market
Description:
It all began in 1971 with one store in Seattle. Today, Metropolitan Market has become an award-winning grocery store with multiple locations throughout Seattle and Tacoma.

It has always been our goal as the area's leading progressive, independent grocer to always be the first to bring you the best. Our specialists travel the world to find unique products of the highest quality that will satisfy even the most discriminating palate. Everything in our stores reflects this passion for food, from our knowledgeable specialist in each department, to the thousands of Good Cuisine recipes we've developed and our culinary kiosks, where you can experience the quality foods from our stores firsthand.

Name: Maxi Di srl
Description:
Gruppo Commerciale che opera nel settore della grande distribuzione.
Il nostro impegno quotidiano è di perseguire la soddisfazione dei nostri clienti offrendo prezzi e servizi sempre più competitivi in relazione alla continua evoluzione delle tendenze e del contesto socio-economico.

Name: Supersol Spain
Description: En Supersol queremos que sientas que tu supermercado Supersol es tu tienda para hacer tus compras diarias, queremos que sientas como tuya tu tienda Supersol más cercana. Nuestros empleados están para ayudarte y asesorarte y de esta manera hacerte tu compra más fácil y cómo; tú eres siempre lo más importante para nosotros.

Name: Rede de Distribuição Zeferino
Description:
Somos uma rede com 16 lojas, sob 2 bandeiras: 
SMC - Supermercados Cubatão s e Spasso Sabores. Estamos presentes em 10 cidades do interior de São Paulo, segmentados da seguinte forma: 
- SMC - Supermercados Cubatão: Itapira, Espírito Santo do Pinhal, Mogi Guaçu e Araras, Mogi Mirim (3 lojas), Conchal.
- Spasso Sabores Supermercado: Jaguariúna (2 lojas), Valinhos, Mogi Mirim (2 lojas), São João da Boa Vista e Amparo.
Contamos com um amplo Centro de Distribuição, localizado na cidade de Mogi Mirim e uma Central de Produção na cidade de Itapira.

Name: Chedraui USA
Description:
At Chedraui USA, we’re dedicated to nourishing communities through our shared love of food, family and tradition. Our mission is to provide customers with an exceptional shopping experience with the freshest selection available across all our retail banners, and our people are at the heart of what we do. 

With a rich history originating in Mexico in 1921, Chedraui USA was formed in 2021 following the renaming of Bodega Latina Corporation, the U.S. subsidiary of Grupo Comercial Chedraui. Today, the company serves as the fourth largest grocery retailer in California with sales of $8 billion annually, operating more than 380 stores across five states in the western U.S. under three store banners: El Super, Fiesta Mart and Smart & Final. 

We are made stronger by our family of more than 25,000 associates, who proudly serve in our stores, warehouses and corporate offices. Our team is continually looking for talented individuals to bring our mission to life.

Name: La Granja Supermercados
Description: Somos una industria Ecuatoriana procesadora de alimentos cárnicos y productos de consumo masivo de primera necesidad. Desde nuestros inicios estamos comprometidos con el desarrollo de nuestra gente y sobre todo calidad y buen servicio para nuestros clientes.

Name: ZON
Description: ZON is een van Europa’s grootste telerscoöperaties en is op onderscheidende wijze actief in de internationale wereld van groenten en fruit. Onze telers telen groente en fruit van de beste kwaliteit, vers van de bron! Het brede assortiment aan groente en fruit legt dagelijks zijn weg af via onze veiling of rechtstreeks geleverd aan onze handelspartners, om zo ultravers bij de consument te belanden. ZON is hierin de verbindende schakel in de keten en de wensen van onze telers en klanten staan hierbij uiteraard centraal.

Name: Supermercados Abastecedor
Description:
Supermercados El Abastecedor es la cadena regional #1 en ventas de Bs As. 

Somos una empresa familiar Argentina, con más de 50 años de trayectoria y tenemos el orgullo de contar con una producción granadera propia. Además, recibimos diariamente frutas, verduras y hortalizas directo de productores, esto nos asegura calidad y frescura. 

Somos más de 600 empleados directos y 400 de forma indirecta.
Contamos con una tienda online y 11 locales propios ubicados estratégicamente en zona oeste, que nos convierte en el supermercado de cercanía más elegido.

Name: GDA | Gruppo Distribuzione Alimentare
Description:
Gruppo Distribuzione Alimentare, GDA, è una società distributiva multicanale,
specializzata nei prodotti alimentari e di servizio con punti vendita che offrono
specifiche soluzioni di format – layout, assortimento, prezzo, comunicazione,
servizio.
Futura, Pick Up e Conviene sono gli attuali brand del gruppo dedicati al settore consumer, Talento è il cash & carry dedicato al settore professional.
Al Centro Distributivo di Polla fanno capo tutte le attività operative di stoccaggio, movimentazione e trasporto merci. L’utilizzo delle tecnologie più avanzate, l’efficiente organizzazione del lavoro e il costante controllo della qualità, fanno della piattaforma di GDA il polo logistico di riferimento in Italia, con un elevato livello di servizio ai propri clienti. 
La logistica di GDA, ad oggi al servizio di 7 regioni d’Italia, è stata premiata a livello nazionale all’ultima edizione de “Il logistico dell’Anno” in quanto esprime i metodi di eccellenza nel mondo della tecnologia e dei sistemi integrati, conseguenza di anni di lavoro e di determinazione da parte dell’azienda che investe costantemente nello sviluppo dei processi.

GDA S.p.A. Unipersonale
P.I e C.F. 01448340768 - REA CCIAA PZ 110622

Name: Jaleel Distribution
Description: At Jaleel Distribution, we take pride in our unwavering commitment to quality across all aspects of our operations. Our reputation as a trusted and credible partner is built on the strong relationships we maintain with our suppliers and partners. As a trailblazer in digitization and cutting-edge technology, we have established ourselves as a top distributor of premium consumer brands in the UAE. Our state-of-the-art logistics infrastructure, including temperature-controlled warehouses, coupled with our extensive local knowledge, enables us to ensure that our products are always available to consumers when and where they need them.

Name: BIG BOX
Description:
Com muito trabalho e dedicação, ao longo desses 36 anos, tornamo-nos um dos principais grupos empresariais genuinamente brasiliense. O grupo BIG BOX conta hoje com 24 estabelecimentos no segmento de supermercado e 23 estabelecimentos no segmento de atacado, todos localizados em pontos estratégicos do Distrito Federal.  

A rede de supermercados BIG BOX, além da qualidade, da economia e do bom atendimento, tem como diferencial o conceito de supermercado de vizinhança, sempre perto, sempre pronto para oferecer tudo o que os moradores da cidade precisam.

Investimos constantemente na capacitação de nossos colaboradores e na melhoria e modernização de nossas lojas. Fazemos questão de cultivar um relacionamento de parceria e respeito com todos os nossos fornecedores.

Uma empresa que nasceu e cresceu em Brasília e é formada por gente apaixonada pelo que faz.

Quer fazer parte da nossa equipe? Acesse: https://bigbox.jobs.recrut.ai/

Name: Hyper U La Rochelle Beaulieu
Description:
Bienvenue dans votre Hyper U La Rochelle Beaulieu - Groupe Coop Atlantique !
