Name: Alvear Supermercados
Description:
Somos Alvear Supermercados, una cadena de supermercados regional en constante crecimiento con más de 500 colaboradores que trabajan para brindar el mejor servicio al cliente. 

Nuestra misión es brindar un servicio de excelencia al cliente para lograr crecimiento sostenible y un sano desarrollo de la Empresa.

Nuestra visión es que nuestro personal nos posicione como líderes en la zona y en la región.

Con lo que respecta a infraestructura, contamos con un Centro de Distribución de 8.000 m2 construidos, logrando abastecimiento y disponibilidad permanente de productos en las góndolas de nuestras 14 sucursales fisicas que se encuentran distribuidas en 4 localidades distintas (Santa Fe, Santo Tome, Recreo y Coronda)

Disponemos de una planta compactadora de cartón y papel, un Centro de Elaboración de Productos Alimenticios y una Panificación donde se elaboran y distribuyen los productos.

Además,  contamos con la tarjeta de Beneficios: Clientazo. Con más de 300.000 suscriptores que disfrutan de beneficios y ofertas exclusivas. 

Contamos con programas de capacitación constantes para nuestros colaboradores con cursos en normas, procedimientos y oficios, entre otras temáticas. También asistimos a conferencias, capacitaciones y Jornadas para que nuestros Ejecutivos y mandos medios adquieran nuevas herramientas que les permitan fortalecer el liderazgo y mejorar el desempeño de los equipos de trabajo. 

En 2015 nos unimos al Pacto Global de las Naciones Unidas con los reportes anuales de Comunicación sobre el Progreso.
 
Porque crecemos al ritmo del mundo actual, en 2020 creamos el primer sitio de e-commerce del rubro en Santa Fe ciudad. Alvear es la cadena local de supermercados más importante de la región, creciendo año tras año en cantidad de sucursales, calidad de servicio y en adherentes a su tarjeta Clientazo.

Name: Mi Pueblo Food Center
Description:
Mi Pueblo is changing the way people think and experience grocery shopping. We offer professional opportunities for career growth, investment and development to individuals seeking to make an impact in a growing organization, positioning itself to lead in a very competitive market.

We are value driven, traditionally minded and outcome oriented. Mi Pueblo is not just a company. . .we recognize high performers, we invest in the right potential and we engage our communities and deliver nothing but the best; from scholarship programs, cultural nostalgic experiences, to donation campaigns. We do all this - and sell quality groceries!

We currently operate 15 locations throughout San Francisco Bay Area, Center Valley and Monterey Bay Area. Mi Pueblo's 80,000 square foot distribution center is located in Milpitas, California and features dry and refrigerated storage space.

Products:
• Meat department with more then a 100 different cuts of meat.
• Produce department offering over 400 items from fresh produce, spices, ready-to-eat cut fruit, a wide variety of nuts, and cut flower bouquets.
• Bakery selling items such as bolillos, pastel de tres leches, and pan dulce.
• Tortilleria that prepares warm, fresh tortillas on a daily basis.
• Deli department offering a diverse selection of appetizing dishes showcasing various flavors from Mexico and Latin America.
• Full-service conventional grocery store with over 17,000 products.

Name: Seasons Kosher Supermarket
Description: Seasons Supermarkets is one of the largest kosher supermarket chains in the nation.  At present there are seven Seasons locations across the Tri-State area with plans to expand.  Seasons offers its customers a full-service kosher shopping experience where everyone, including its highly dedicated associates, are treated like family.

Name: HVAC Distribution Maroc
Description:
Nous sommes experts dans les domaines de la Traitement d’air, la Climatisation, la  Ventilation , la filtration et le Chauffage. Ainsi que la Protection incendie.
Nous offrons des solutions innovantes dans la climatisation et le froid et disposons d’un  service après vente réactif et opérationnel. L’innovation , la compétence technique et  l’engagement qualité sont au cœur de notre activité.
Nous proposons à nos clients des produits et services de grande qualité qui leurs  permettent de sécuriser leurs projets. Nos clients sont nos partenaires et nos meilleurs  prescripteurs.

Name: Prado Supermercados
Description:
Prado Supermercados é uma rede em plena expansão, consolidando-se como uma referência em excelência e qualidade. Nossa filosofia é ser especialista em carnes, oferecendo um açougue personalizado em cada uma de nossas lojas, proporcionando uma experiência única aos nossos clientes.

Além disso, o cuidado com o hortifrúti é uma prioridade para nós. Orgulhamo-nos de oferecer frutas, verduras e legumes fresquinhos todos os dias, garantindo saúde e sabor à mesa de nossos consumidores.

A padaria do Prado é verdadeiramente uma referência em qualidade. Contamos com uma fábrica de pães, doces e salgados que segue um padrão de excelência incomparável, proporcionando aos nossos clientes uma variedade de produtos frescos e deliciosos.

E para tornar a experiência de compra ainda mais especial, oferecemos promoções imbatíveis, garantindo que nossos clientes tenham acesso aos melhores produtos com preços acessíveis.

Com unidades em Biguaçu, Governador Celso Ramos, Canasvieiras, Estreito, Serraria, Palhoça no Pagani e Bela Vista, o Prado Supermercados está sempre perto de você, pronto para oferecer o melhor em açougue, hortifrúti e padaria.

Nossa jornada começou em 2008, no município de Biguaçu, no bairro Prado, onde Fábio e Luciane iniciaram com garra e determinação a construção desse sonho. Desde então, temos crescido e nos dedicado a oferecer o melhor aos nossos clientes, mantendo sempre o compromisso com a qualidade, a variedade e o atendimento personalizado.

Escolha o Prado Supermercados como seu parceiro de confiança. Estamos aqui para tornar suas compras mais práticas, econômicas e saborosas. 
Venha fazer parte da nossa história!

Name: Go Bazaar.in
Description:
Imagine needing something when you are at home and getting it before you have tied your shoelaces to step out. We are revolutionizing e-commerce by making the stuff most important to you, available to you in a 20 minutes of your eye.

We want our customers to focus on the more important things for themselves and not need to plan for the little things that life needs on an everyday basis. We are here to get your chores out of your way.

Our mission is – “instant commerce indistinguishable from magic”. Using a backbone of technology, data sciences, and rich customer insights, we've built a dense and fast network of partner stores enabling lightning fast deliveries in 20 minutes.

We are already one of the largest e-grocery companies in India. Our ambition however, is to be 100x this size in the next five years.

In order to become one of the most important e-retail companies of our generation, we need builders who can think on their feet, take extreme ownership and commit to making outcomes happen. If you are ambitious, smart, and don’t have an ego about it, we’d love to hear from you. 
Opportunities to create $100 billion businesses in India are rare. We are on the way and looking for the hungry.

"Go Bazaar" is owned & managed by "Kaonain Pursuit” (formerly known as Kaonain Pursuit Overseas Exporter) and is not related, linked or interconnected in whatsoever manner or nature, to “gobazzar.in” which is a real estate services business operated by “Kaonain Pursuit”

Instant delivery service in Pune

Shop on the go and get anything delivered in minutes. Buy everything from groceries to fresh fruits & vegetables, cakes and bakery items, to meats & seafood, cosmetics, mobiles & accessories, electronics, baby care products and much more. We get it delivered at your doorstep in the fastest and the safest way possible.

Single app for all your daily needs

Order thousands of products at just a tap - milk, eggs, bread, cooking oil, ghee, atta, rice, fresh fruits & vegetables,

Name: DRUMEDIS - E.LECLERC Drumettaz
Description:
Implantée à Drumettaz-Clarafond depuis 1996, notre entreprise revendique le combat national E.Leclerc du pouvoir d’achat au niveau local.

Respectueuse de ses collaborateurs, soucieuse de ses clients, la société s’efforce quotidiennement de proposer une offre large et qualitative en alimentaire et non-alimentaire.

DRUMEDIS exploite à Drumettaz-Clarafond un hypermarché de 6000m2 avec sa galerie commerciale comprenant les concepts E.LECLERC Espace Culturel, le Manège à Bijoux, la Parapharmacie et l'institut-parfumerie Une heure pour soi, mais aussi un Drive déporté sur la commune de Voglans.

Notre société collabore avec ses partenaires afin de répondre aux attentes actuelles de consommation : le Bio, le vrac ou encore le Fait-maison dans nos différents rayons traditionnels.

Entreprise de proximité et fière de l’être, actrice du tissu social et partenaire avec les alliances locales, E.LECLERC à Drumettaz s’inscrit dans une démarche de qualité, de RSE, d’innovation et de créativité.

We have an elegant solution to virtually any merchandising need you may have. All of our units are constructed with the highest quality materials and care at our plant in Lexington NC. You can contact sales@arnegusa.com for inquiries.

Name: FRIEX Refrigeración comercial y climatización para el sector retail
Description:
Friex  fue fundada en 1990. Nos dedicamos a la refrigeración comercial y climatización del sector retail. Nuestra cobertura es nacional y somos instaladores autorizados Nivel 2. 

Después de 30 años, Friex se ha convertido en un referente en el sector del desarrollo de instalaciones de refrigeración y climatización dentro de las cadenas de alimentación. 

Somos expertos en realizar proyectos de forma estándar de fácil aplicación en distintos establecimientos de una misma cadena o marca. Trabajamos día a día para establecer procesos encaminados a un mejor servicio a nuestros clientes, apostando por la formación constante y dual dentro de la industria 4.0 , haciendo un esfuerzo notable por especializarnos en las nuevas tecnologías relacionadas con la refrigeración y la climatización, afrontando los retos de un sector en continua evolución, lo que nos convierte en un claro referente.

Prodotti food, non food, accessori, farmaci e prodotti parafarmaceutici, attrezzature specializzate: tutto quello di cui hanno bisogno i nostri amici a quattro zampe!

Tutti i nostri Store sono studiati nei minimi dettagli per accogliere una clientela sempre più esigente. Il servizio è curato con grande attenzione per garantire sempre il massimo della professionalità e del supporto nell'acquisto.

Name: Foster's Food Fair, Ltd.
Description:
In 1980, David Foster identified the need for a modern supermarket on Grand Cayman that provided quality food and a larger selection of items at a lower cost.

With the help of his mother, Alta, and brother, Steve, the trio opened Foster’s Food Fair. The Airport Store, with less than 6,000 square feet and 25 employees, was the beginning of what has become a staple of service and value for the people of the Cayman Islands.

Foster’s is the island’s supermarket that shoppers trust. We’re committed to caring for our community and providing quality products at affordable prices. We offer a wide selection of specialty, organic, local, name brand, and global products at an everyday, affordable price with added services like delis, bakeries, pharmacies, catering, floral and money transfer services.

No matter where you are on island, Foster’s is never far from home; and because affordable, quality groceries are important to you, they’re important to us too. 

Foster’s – better because we care.

Name: Supermercados Alabarce
Description:
A primeira loja da rede Alabarce foi inaugurada em 1994 e partiu do desejo de uma família mogiana em montar um supermercado que primasse pela qualidade dos produtos e do atendimento aos clientes.

Com o apoio dos pais, Nildo e Valéria Alabarce, os irmãos Roberta, Rafael e Ronaldo Alabarce – na época com 22, 19 e 17 anos – abriram então a primeira unidade dos Supermercados Alabarce na Rua Doutor Deodato Wertheimer, número 1.600, no Centro de Mogi das Cruzes. A loja tinha 700 metros quadrados e apenas quatro caixas mas, apesar de pequena, já se destacava no mercado pelo alto nível das instalações e dos serviços prestados.

Em 2002, veio a segunda loja da rede, na Vila Oliveira. No ano seguinte, em 2003, o grande movimento na unidade do Centro exigiu uma ampliação que dobrou a área do supermercado. O crescimento do grupo Alabarce não parou por aí.

Em 2007 foi inaugurada a loja do distrito de Brás Cubas com a mesma proposta de oferecer qualidade, variedade e o melhor preço.

Em 2012, veio a ampliação da unidade da Vila Oliveira com o conceito de “boulevard”, um centro de compras que, além do supermercado, reúne lojas de vários segmentos, praça de alimentação e prestadores de serviços.

Em 2015, o Alabarce Mogilar, também no formato de um moderno boulevard, vem coroar a liderança da rede no setor varejista de Mogi das Cruzes.

ReStore:  Through custom reskinning, close the case, door swap services, we can restore your refrigerated equipment quickly and efficiently. We also manufacture replacement parts and accessories compatible with all major commercial refrigerated cases. 

DeFend: Through our line of Retail Fixture Protection, we extend the life of valuable in-store assets that most need protection. 

With over 25 years of experience, and 12 locations across North America, CSF is your trusted partner to extend the life of your equipment while optimizing its performance.

**For all quote requests: info@conceptfixtures.com

Description:
Choices Market is BC-owned grocer focusing on organic, specialty and natural foods. 

Choices prides itself on offering superb customer service with an enthusiastic, positive and friendly team. We are looking for magnetic people who possess exceptional customer service skills, enthusiasm and a great attitude.

- A Little About Us -

We are a 100 percent British Columbia owned and operated business. As such, we recognize the importance of supporting the local community. This is manifested in our support of local growers and producers as well as local charitable and community organizations. Choices supports community growth and global sustainability.

Choices takes great care to source the finest food and wellness products available. With our commitment to sustainability, we always source local products first, and if it must be ordered from abroad, we source fair trade everywhere we can.

Our stores are also the place to go for nutrition education. We offer nutrition services to help our customers along their journey to better health. We’re proud to have a Nutrition Team member in each and every Choices location who work together in harmony to provide evidence-based and holistic food and nutrition recommendations. Whether you have a new diagnosis, like a food intolerance, celiac disease or diabetes, or you just want to learn how to read labels or avoid genetically modified foods, Choices’ Nutrition Team can help.

Name: Rede SuperMais
Description:
A Rede SuperMais teve seu início em abril de 2000, quando empresários da Zona da Mata decidiram unir forças e formar a Associação SuperMais de Varejo. Um grupo que já nascia com um faturamento anual superior a 90 milhões de reais.

De lá pra cá, muita coisa mudou. A estrutura cresceu, os horizontes se ampliaram e hoje a SuperMais se orgulha de estar entre as maiores Associações do Brasil. Através de um trabalho sério, a Rede possui o respeito dos principais fornecedores nacionais e admiração de seus clientes.

Hoje contamos com 15 Associados e 39 lojas localizadas nas seguintes cidades da Zona da Mata: Barbacena, Barroso, Bicas, Bom Jardim de Minas, Carangola, Descoberto, Mar de Espanha, Maripá de Minas, Mercês, Cataguases, Juiz de Fora, Muriaé, Lima Duarte, Piraúba, Rio Pomba, Rodeiro, Santa Bárbara do Monte Verde, Santos Dumont, São João Nepomuceno, Tocantins, Ubá e Visconde do Rio Branco.

A sede administrativa e o Centro de Distribuição estão localizados na cidade de Juiz de Fora. Possuímos assessoria nas áreas jurídica, contábil e TI dentro da própria estrutura, dando toda agilidade que uma grande empresa precisa no seu dia a dia.

Hoje a Rede SuperMais se orgulha em ser a terceira maior Central de Negócios de Minas Gerais.

Name: Hartkorn Gewürzmühle GmbH
Description:
Seit über 100 Jahren bringt die Hartkorn Gewürzmühle GmbH eine ordentliche Portion Geschmack in die Küchen dieses Landes und sorgt dafür, dass das Leben alles andere als fad, langweilig und eintönig ist. Als inhabergeführtes Familienunternehmen in vierter Generation entwickeln, mahlen und veredeln wir täglich neue Gewürzmischungen, um die kulinarischen Kreationen unserer Kund:innen zu bereichern. 

Unser Sortiment mit über 600 Produkten reicht von unverzichtbaren Basics über ein nachhaltiges Bio-Sortiment, die wichtigsten Gewürze für die nächste Grillparty, moderne Gewürzmischungen für die junge Küche bis hin zu ausgefallenen Gourmetgewürzen. Unsere Produkte bieten den perfekten Genuss für nahezu jedes erdenkliche Gericht – ganz ohne Geschmacksverstärker, Laktose oder Hefeextrakte. 

Aber wir sind mehr als nur Gewürzexperten. Jede:r Mitarbeiter:in ist auch ein:e Held:in des Arbeitsalltags. Und unsere Hartkorn Heroes sorgen mit ihren Superkräften für Frieden und Ordnung in der Gewürzwelt und stellen sicher, dass unsere Gewürze jederzeit sicher zu dir nach Hause kommen. Auch wenn sie nicht gegen Superschurken wie Thanos kämpfen, so brennen sie doch für das, was sie tun, genauso wie jeder Marvel-Held. 

Fühlst du dich inspiriert von unserer Leidenschaft für Gewürze und unserer Vision, das kulinarische Erlebnis unserer Kund:innen zu bereichern? Möchtest du mehr über unsere Unternehmensphilosophie, unser Marketing und deine mögliche Karriere bei uns erfahren? Dann begleite uns auf unserer Reise und folge uns hier auf LinkedIn!  

https://hartkorn-gewuerze.de/de/content/impressum.html
https://hartkorn-gewuerze.de/de/content/datenschutzerklaerung.html

Name: Armazém 3
Description:
Fundado em 1992, o Armazém 3 agora opera com nove nome, espaço mais amplo e outras novidades. Mas fizemos questão de manter a tradição e o clima aconchegante que, há 22 anos, fazem com que nossos clientes sintam-se sempre em casa.

Vender frutas, verduras e legumes fresquinhos era a nossa especialidade como feirantes, quando fundamos o Mercado 3 Irmãos. Na época, tratava-se apenas de um mercadinho de bairro. Mas os vizinhos já reconheciam a qualidade do nosso hortifrúti. Algumas das frutas e verduras vendidas ali eram plantadas por nós mesmos. (Algumas ainda são). E assim nosso negócio foi se desenvolvendo.

A partir de 2009, atualizamos a nossa gestão, buscamos maior profissionalização e fomos adequando nosso mix de produtos ao perfil da clientela. Mas fizemos tudo isso com um único objetivo: conquistar a sua preferência.

Foi também pensando nisso que, em 2013, inauguramos uma nova fase. O Mercado 3 Irmãos passou a se chamar Armazém 3. O espaço foi ampliado, ficou mais bonito e moderno. O mix de produtos também passou a contar com marcas gourmet, itens importados, além daqueles que já agradavam aos consumidores.

Hoje, o Armazém 3 é um lugar para conhecer novos sabores, encontrar antigos amigos, inventar novas receitas, degustar os melhores rótulos, descobrir outros aromas, outros temperos, outras frutas, outras cores. É um lugar para para conversar, para se inspirar, para sorrir, para encontrar. Porque, hoje, a gente quer mais do que vender os melhores produtos.

A gente quer fazer parte dos seus melhores momentos.

Με παρουσία σε όλες τις μεγάλες πόλεις της Κρήτης με 43 καταστήματα, όντας ο μεγαλύτερος εργοδότης στο λιανεμπόριο του νησιού με πάνω από 1.900 ανθρώπους στο δυναμικό της και στηρίζοντας με κάθε μέσο τον κοινωνικό ιστό του νησιού μέσα από προγράμματα φιλανθρωπικών, αθλητικών και κοινωνικών δράσεων η εταιρεία Χαλκιαδάκης θεωρείται το σούπερ μάρκετ των κρητικών. Η επιχείρηση υποστηρίζεται και στηρίζει την κρητική οικονομία: τα κρητικά προϊόντα έχουν τη τιμητική τους στα ράφια της αλυσίδας και η στρατηγική στήριξης των κρητικών παραγωγών είναι έκδηλη σε όλους τους τομείς όπου δραστηριοποιούνται. Η εμπιστοσύνη των Κρητικών προς την επιχείρηση, αλλά και η δέσμευση της επιχείρησης για την αδιαπραγμάτευτη και συνεχόμενη ανταπόκριση στις ανάγκες του κρητικού καταναλωτή αποτελούν την κινητήριο δύναμη και την ψυχή της Χαλκιαδάκης Α.Ε.

Name: Ryan's SuperValu Group
Description:
Liam Ryan, an accountant by trade took ownership of his first store in Togher, a suburb on the southside of Cork city on 30th September 1991. It wasn't all plain sailing at the start, he had a tough 12 months when he took over, he soon learned how to work with people and encourage and develop them, he learned that you had to win the confidence of the people, both the people that work with you every day and the public, our customers.

What happened next?
He opened his second store in Glanmire in February 1996, which first opened as a 3,500 sq. ft. Centra at Riverstown, Glanmire, Cork. Then in May 2000 the store moved to a new location over the bridge and opened a new 11,500 sq. ft SuperValu. In 2003, the Togher store underwent an extension increasing the size to 11,000 sq. ft.

In 2010, it was decided to extend the Glanmire store to cater for the thriving Glanmire community, the store greatly increased to a 26,000 sq ft. store together with a multi-storey car park with three levels of parking available for customers. The third SuperValu was built on the old Munster Carpets site in Grange, Douglas, Cork and opened for business in August 2005, the store won SuperValu Store of the Year three years later. In October 2018, the Grange store officially re-launched after it underwent a revamp, the store has been extended by 3,000 sq. ft together with new production facilities.

In 2006, he opened a 2,500 sq ft. Centra in Aherla, Cork and a year later purchased the SuperValu in Kilmallock, Limerick. The Kilmallock store was renovated in 2014, it greatly increased from its original size of 4,500 sq. ft. to 10,000 sq. ft.

In 2023 Togher was relaunched yet again, it is now a state of the art store at the heart of the community, we can't wait for the next chapter of Ryan's SuperValu!

Description:
A Associação Capixaba de Supermercados (ACAPS) é a entidade que congrega o setor de supermercados no Espírito Santo. Começou com um pequeno número de associados e hoje dela participa a grande maioria das lojas do Estado, além de todas as redes de supermercados. É a Associação que os representa atuando em sua defesa junto aos Poderes Públicos e à Sociedade Civil.

Além de representar e defender os supermercados, a ACAPS oferece uma série de serviços a seus associados, tais como: consultoria e assessoria jurídica e tributária, convênios médicos e de assistência odontológica, oferecimento de cursos e palestras, envio de informações atualizadas e de grande importância para o funcionamento das empresas, etc.

Name: Rainbow Grocery Cooperative, Inc.
Description:
Operating since 1975, Rainbow Grocery Cooperative has grown to be the Bay Area destination for the highest quality organic packaged and bulk foods, with a wide selection of organic locally-grown produce, a large selection of gourmet local and imported cheeses, organic and cruelty-free health and beauty aids, and by far the most extensive vitamin and supplement selection in the Bay Area.

We are worker-owned, collectively run, and democratically managed. Employees become members after meeting a series of requirements and the purchase of a minimum number of shares.

Although our motto is Food for People, not for Profit, we are a for-profit company. Still, the profits are re-distributed 100% to the membership in the form of shares. We donate significantly to the community and to organizations that are often unrecognized by the usual corporate donors.

Name: Society Stores
Description:
Society Stores is one of Mumbai’s oldest and most respected premium supermarket chains, established in 1947 by Shri Ratanshi Gada. Built on a deep-rooted commitment to quality and customer care, the brand grew from a small grocery store in Lower Parel to a modern FMCG and gourmet retail destination in Santacruz West in 1969. In 1997, under the leadership of Laxmichand Gada, Society Stores became a pioneer by introducing one of India’s first computerized, barcoded, air-conditioned supermarkets with chillers and freezers.

In 2013, the third generation, Manan Gada, joined after completing his master’s degree in the USA, bringing global exposure and new-age thinking into the business. This led to expansion into Lokhandwala and later multiple premium locations across Mumbai. In 2017, Manan and his wife Rikta Gada launched The Home Story, a premium homeware store offering crockery, cookware, bed & bath linen, décor, and more.

Today, Society Stores operates 5 supermarkets and 4 home stores, serving customers with gourmet foods, FMCG, international products, lifestyle items, and curated home solutions. With a heritage of 78 years, Society Stores continues its mission and purpose to deliver quality, trust, and modern retail excellence.

Το 1975 οι ιδρυτές της, τα αδέλφια Κώστας και Βασίλης Ανδρικόπουλος, άνοιξαν ένα παραδοσιακό παντοπωλείο σε κεντρικό σημείο της πόλης, το οποίο εξελίχθηκε στο πρώτο κατάστημα αυτοεξυπηρέτησης της Πάτρας.
 
Τα επόμενα χρόνια ακολούθησε η σταδιακή επέκταση της οικογενειακής επιχείρησης έως τη σημερινή της μορφή, διατηρώντας σταθερά στο επίκεντρο της φιλοσοφίας και των δραστηριοτήτων της την άριστη εξυπηρέτηση του πελάτη, προσφέροντας πάντα προϊόντα υψηλής ποιότητας σε χαμηλές τιμές.
 
Η εταιρία λειτουργεί 13 καταστήματα στην ευρύτερη περιοχή της Πάτρας και διαθέτει σύγχρονο Κέντρο Διανομών έκτασης 7.500 τ.μ. . Αποτελεί βασικό μέλος του ΕΛΟΜΑΣ και συγκαταλέγεται στις 15 μεγαλύτερες επιχειρήσεις του κλάδου στην Ελλάδα.

Description:
SUPER U VAL DURANCE supermarché de 5400m2 situé au cœur des Alpes de Haute Provence à Sisteron (04).
Ce magasin est construit dans une démarche de développement durable pour donner du choix au meilleur prix dans un cadre spacieux et confortable. Nous mettons tout en oeuvre pour répondre aux attentes de nos clients.

La proximité est un point essentiel pour notre entreprise. Nous agissons localement.
Nos services : U location, Courses U, U Parapharmacie, U Traiteur, Snack Pause Gourmande.

Chez U nos réussites ont toutes un point commun : l'Humain.
Quelle que soit sa taille, récent ou plus ancien, on retrouve dans chaque magasin U et chaque entité du Groupement Système U la même volonté d'avoir un projet humain. Tous ancrent leurs actions sur des valeurs vécues au quotidien, une ambition commune, le partage des expériences et des ressources.

Le bien-être des femmes et des hommes fait partie de l'ADN U. Cela passe aussi bien par la prise d'initiative et l'autonomie laissées aux collaborateurs que par l’évolution et sa réussite professionnelle. Notre objectif est de permettre à chacun de pouvoir se développer professionnellement et personnellement, à travers son parcours et les projets qui lui sont confiés.

Name: The Farmette
Description:
The mission of The Farmette is a collective effort, supporting small to medium farmer holders growing premium and speciality produce previously suffering from the effects of an unbalanced distribution chain and unfair rates. 

We also want The Farmette to be a symbol for women in this field as we need more capable women running agri-businesses in Pakistan.




We believe in promoting our local agricultural eco-system and helping small and medium-sized farmers by assisting them in adopting the latest sustainable farming practices. We aim to build a local food system that is both financially sustainable for the farmers as well as affordable for consumers without compromising on quality.

We also want The Farmette to be a symbol for women in this field as we need more capable women running agri-businesses in Pakistan.

Name: Bakkerij Koenen
Description:
Al meer dan een eeuw is bakkersfamilie Koenen een begrip op het gebied van heerlijk brood en banket. Bakkerij Koenen is een familiebedrijf dat is opgericht in 1869 en sindsdien gevestigd aan de klapstraat in Westervoort. Ton en Paul Koenen zijn de 5e generatie in het familiebedrijf en hebben de bakkerij in 1992 overgenomen en verder uitgebouwd tot een middelgroot ambachtelijke bakkerij. in 2004 is er op het Vergun in Westervoort een nieuwe bakkerij gebouwd wat een nieuwe impuls heeft gegeven. 

Door de jaren heen is bakkerij Koenen uitgegroeid tot een bloeiende onderneming. In 2005 zijn Ton & Paul Koenen zelfs benoemd tot ‘Ondernemer van het Jaar’ in de gemeente Duiven. Vanuit de bakkerij worden dagelijks de 10 bakkerswinkels in Westervoort, Duiven, Arnhem, Didam, Doesburg en Nijmegen als diverse supermarkten, instellingen, scholen en collega bakkers voorzien van vers brood en banket. Bakkerij Koenen staat voor professionaliteit, kwaliteit en service. 

Top Bakkers
Bakkerij Koenen is lid van Top Bakkers. Deze organisatie is in 1985 opgericht en heeft als doel belangenbehartiging voor de aangesloten bakkerijen. In haar marktbenadering hebben Top Bakkers en haar bakkers zich met name gericht op de marktsegmenten: Catering, Hotels, Institutioneel, grootverbruik en Retail. Van de bakkers vraagt de organisatie het uiterste op het gebied van kwaliteit, hygiëne en automatisering.

Name: SRI VIJAYA GANAPATHY STORES
Description:
SVGS - Celebrating 40 years of passion, perseverance, and responsibility.
SVGS was once a humble beginning in 1977 by Mr.Chinnamani and his sons Mr.Gopala Krishnan and Mr.Udhaya Kumar, with an investment of Rs.1600 by mortgaging the family's jewellery.         
Reminiscing our journey, we are grateful for the decades of learning and growth we have endured. Back in the day, Our Founder, Mr.Chinnamani never stopped dreaming big and always brought to life his new plans in flourishing the business.           
We experienced the beginning of our success when we saw SVGS through the eyes of our customers. Sourcing quality products from various parts of the country with the undying commitment to replace every product just in time for the customer brought us great ustomer relationships and huge deals with major companies.


Our Proud Moment:
It makes us content to be able to give back to our customers by manufacturing our own top-of-the-line quality products in the market. The love and support from our customers gained us our visibility and opportunity to provide over 50,000 quality products with great deals and offers.        

Spreading Our Wings across Pondicherry and Cuddalore:
SVGS, which first started as a 60 Sq.ft provisional store in 1977 has now expanded as a trusted supermarket to eight locations in Pondicherry and Cuddalore.

Our legacy:
The legacy of Sri Vijaya Ganapathy Stores is all about hard work, persistence, dedication, and being truthful to the work we do with the sole purpose of providing a holistic experience to our customers. It goes without saying, that at SVGS, we offer the best quality products and this has made us come a long way.

Name: Supermercados Myatã
Description:
A empresa Supermercados Myatã Ltda originou-se da cisão da empresa S/A Maffessoni Comércio e Indústria, estabelecida na cidade de Caçador e fundada em 1944, pelos sócios Erminio, Luiz e Reinaldo Maffessoni.

A empresa atuava no ramo de atacado de gêneros alimentícios e de secos e molhados, diversificou suas atividades passando para o setor industrial com o moinho de trigo fabricando a farinha de trigo Myatã. Em 1968 inaugurou a sua primeira loja com o nome fantasia de Supermercado Myatã. O nome Myatã é de origem tupi e significa "fortaleza, firmeza".

Em junho de 1981 surge a nova razão social “Supermercados Myatã Ltda” com matriz na cidade de Lages. Supermercados Myatã, empresa do ramo supermercadista em busca da excelência no atendimento a seus clientes. Atuando no mercado catarinense, o Myatã tem realizado grandes esforços para oferecer aos seus clientes produtos e atendimento de qualidade.

A modernização e renovação dos equipamentos são realizados sempre que se fazem necessários para garantir a boa qualidade dos produtos e agilidade nos serviços.

O Myatã tem como grande diferencial a qualidade no seu atendimento. Apontado por mais de 90% dos clientes como bom e ótimo em recente pesquisa realizada. Todos os colaboradores recebem apoio de uma equipe de gerentes e supervisores para o bom desempenho de suas funções, periodicamente são realizadas palestras ou cursos atualizando os conhecimentos da equipe.

A empresa reconhece a importância de seus colaboradores oferecendo planos e benefícios a todos. Os funcionários da rede Myatã têm oportunidade de crescer com a empresa, que valoriza e oferece chances reais de uma carreira dentro da rede.

Name: Trade Fixtures
Description:
Trade Fixtures has had a focused-goal of helping people offer and shop for bulk food in the best and safest way possible since our start in Little Rock in 1982. We continue with that tradition 40-years later, by offering new, exciting products and technology. We have built strong partnerships through the years with customers across the industry and around the world. We continue to strive to find ways to share the important message of bulk foods and its integral part of sustainability for the environment and the planet.

Specializing in custom design, engineering, project management, manufacturing and fulfillment, Trade Fixtures has emerged as the industry leader in bulk and retail merchandising solutions, and continues to amaze retailers worldwide.  We have clients in more than 67 countries and work with 50 of Fortune’s top 100 companies. 

Trade Fixtures is a Marmon Retail Solutions / Berkshire Hathaway company and is based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin.

Per questo motivo siamo distributori di prodotti come il Pane di Segale, le Fette Biscottate Olandesi o il Preparato per Pancake. Sono tutti prodotti esclusivi, dal forte appeal per la grande distribuzione, che possono entrare nel mercato con una favorevole richiesta da parte dei consumatori.

Name: Iqbal Foods
Description:
At Iqbal Foods, a home grown Canadian brand, true pioneer and market year with a 30-year-old legacy in the ethnic supermarket space in Canada, we believe in celebrating diversity through food. 

Since 1994, we have been a trusted name in bringing the flavors of the world to your table. Whether you are looking for authentic ethnic fresh South Asian groceries, fresh HMA certifies halal meat, spices, staples or specialty products from Asia, the Middle East, Africa, and beyond, we've got you covered.

With a commitment to quality, convenience, freshness and community, we cater to the unique needs of multicultural families, food enthusiasts, and anyone with a taste for the extraordinary. From fresh produce to hard-to-find spices, we are your one-stop destination for a world of flavors.

Our Mission
Our mission is simple: to provide our customers with the best selection of international groceries while promoting inclusivity and cultural connection. We pride ourselves on sourcing products that reflect the rich diversity of our communities and on fostering an environment where everyone feels welcome.

Why Choose Iqbal Foods?
Wide Selection: Over 25,000 products from across the globe.
Quality & Freshness: We ensure that all our items, from fresh produce to packaged goods, meet the highest standards of quality.
Halal Certified: Everything inside our stores is 100% Halal - HMA Certified Our Promise.
Community Focus: We actively engage with local communities, hosting events, supporting cultural festivals, and giving back through various initiatives.
Customer Satisfaction: Our customers come first, and we strive to offer an exceptional shopping experience every time.

Name: MAISON SEVE
Description:
Artisan pâtissier et chocolatier lyonnais classé parmi les 10 meilleurs chocolatiers de France depuis les années 2000 et membre de la prestigieuse association Relais Desserts, Richard Sève est un créateur de tendances.

Très attaché à la tradition, il sélectionne dès que possible ses ingrédients dans la région et toujours avec la plus grande attention. De ses goûts très classiques, il imagine des collections design et de saison.

Depuis 2017, il rejoint le groupe très restreint des chocolatiers français qui réalisent leur propre chocolat de la fève à la tablette, parcourant désormais le monde à la recherche des meilleures fèves de cacao.

Le 21 janvier 2020, Richard Sève est nommé Académicien du chocolat par la très confidentielle Académie Française du Chocolat et de la Confiserie.

Name: Poiesz Supermarkten B.V.
Description:
Poiesz Supermarkten B.V. is een familiebedrijf met 68 supermarkten en 65 slijterijen in het noordoosten van Nederland. Hoofdkantoor en distributiecentrum zijn gevestigd in het Friese Sneek, filialen zijn er in Friesland, Groningen, Drenthe, Overijssel en Flevoland. Het bedrijf is aangesloten bij inkooporganisatie Superunie. Bij Poiesz Supermarkten werken ruim 4800 mensen. Het is het enige zelfstandige regionale grootwinkelbedrijf in het noorden van Nederland.

Op 19 april in 1923 opende Lodewijk Poiesz en zijn vrouw Wietske een groentezaak aan de Havenstraat in Sneek. De familie was na 15 jaar toe aan een grotere winkel en kocht daarom in 1938 een winkel aan het Grootzand in Sneek. Daarnaast gingen Gerard en Willem Poiesz – de zonen van Wietske en Lodewijk – in 1946 groente en fruit venten met een bakfiets en een handkar in de volksbuurten van Sneek.

In de vijftiger jaren werd de zaak aan het Grootzand ‘Fruithal’ genoemd. De verkoop werd gestimuleerd met het rijm: “Voor elke beurs en elke stand, Poiesz Fruithal aan het Grootzand’. In 1962 werd er op het Grootzand een pand van 200 m² aangekocht en hier werd de eerste Sneker 'supermarkt' geopend. Het assortiment werd breder en beperkte zich niet meer tot groente en fruit. Daarna breidde de familie Poiesz haar bedrijf steeds verder uit in de noordelijke provincies.

Name: Grup Tramuntana
Description:
Grup Tramuntana som una empresa del sector de la Distribució. Som un dels principals referents comercials i de serveis de la zona fronterera amb França.

Història:

Els orígens del Grup Tramuntana es remunten al 1945, quan a El Portús (La Jonquera), poble fronterer entre Espanya i França, s’instal·la una petita botiga amb el nom de Casa Raurich, dedicada a la venda de productes d’alimentació.

La situació privilegiada en aquest eix de comunicació  europeu,  incentiva l’activitat comercial entre els dos països, després de la Guerra Mundial, i especialment, a partir dels anys 60, tot coincidint amb el boom turístic.

Al 1967, Josep Raurich i Marissé Santaló comencen la primera gran ampliació de l’empresa. Construeixen el primer centre comercial amb el nom de Tramuntana, adequat a les necessitats i a les exigències del client de l’època: el turista, majoritàriament francès, que viatja en cotxe. En aquest ampli espai ja s’instal·la el primer supermercat amb els productes d’alimentació i licoreria com a principal reclam, però també objectes de regal i decoració, així com sabateria i marroquineria.

Qui som:

El Grup Tramuntana ens caracteritzem per ser una empresa familiar, dinàmica, emprenedora i en continuo creixement.

Actualment els nostres serveis es centren en 4 grans divisions: supermercats, perfumeries, moda i restauració (restaurants i hotels).

La nostra filosofia:

Allò que distingeix un establiment d’un altre, molt sovint radica en les persones que hi treballen i que busquen contínuament la satisfacció i la confiança dels clients. Treballem perquè tothom que passi pels nostres establiments, ho valori com una bona experiència.

La nostra missió:

Volem estar sempre pendents de les novetats que el consumidor demana, les modes i tendències i els canvis d’hàbits. Ens interessa molt estar sempre atents als canvis tecnològics i que millorin l’experiència del consumidor.

Name: Tiãozinho Supermercados
Description:
Uma História de Sucesso e Expansão

Fundado em outubro de 1999, o Grupo Tiãozinho vive um momento de constante crescimento, com 7 lojas em Franca, gerando mais de 500 empregos diretos e cerca de 800 indiretos. A administração da empresa está nas mãos dos irmãos Samuel e Tiago há 25 anos, e a cada ano que passa, o grupo se consolida como referência em atendimento, qualidade de produtos e preços imbatíveis. A fórmula que une bom atendimento, produtos de excelência e preços acessíveis fez da varejista um sinônimo de qualidade, economia, comodidade, competência e variedade.

Mas essa história de sucesso começou bem antes. Em 1983, o senhor Sebastião, carinhosamente conhecido como Tiãozinho, e sua esposa Dilma abriram uma pequena mercearia no bairro Jardim Planalto, em Franca. Com o sonho de construir um futuro melhor, eles plantaram a semente do que viria a se tornar uma das maiores redes de supermercados da região.

Ao longo dos anos, Samuel e Tiago, com espírito empreendedor e visão inovadora, transformaram o pequeno negócio em um grupo forte e em constante evolução. A mudança para o bairro City Petrópolis marcou uma nova fase, trazendo inovação em serviços e preços acessíveis para os clientes, elementos que se tornaram parte fundamental do sucesso do grupo.

Hoje, passados 25 anos de administração moderna, o Grupo Tiãozinho segue crescendo, mantendo o compromisso com a população francana, sempre investindo na melhoria contínua de suas lojas, na expansão de sua presença e no fortalecimento das relações com clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores.

O foco em oferecer variedade, qualidade e economia faz parte da identidade do Grupo Tiãozinho, e a busca pela excelência é um compromisso permanente. O futuro reserva ainda mais crescimento e inovações, sempre com o cliente no centro de tudo.

Tiãozinho, melhor pra você!

Name: ArYu Retail Limited
Description:
Aryu Retail is the retail initiative of Aryush Industries Ltd. and an epicenter of its consumer facing businesses. Through our chains of neighborhood stores, supermarkets, wholesale cash & carry stores, specialty stores and online initiatives we have democratized access to a variety of products and services across diverse segments for Indian consumers. We operate Aryu Fresh, Aryu Smart and Aryu Market stores in the food and grocery category, Aryu Digital and Aryu stores in the consumer electronics category and Trends, Aryu Footprint and Aryu Jewel stores in fashion & lifestyle category in addition to a large number of partner brand stores across the country. 

We have, in a short time, forged strong and enduring bonds with millions of consumers by providing them unlimited choice, outstanding value proposition, superior quality and unmatched experience across all its retail stores. Our operating model is based on customer eccentricity, while leveraging common centers of excellence in technology, business processes and supply chain. More importantly, we have built a strong and unwavering foundation through our extraordinary people. Since its inception in 2018, Aryu Retail has grown to become India’s largest retailer.

With us, your work shapes the future of retail.

Name: FLOCKE
Description:
FLOCKE FLORA setzt auf natürliche und faserreiche BIO-Produkte mit einem möglichst geringem Verarbeitungsgrad, um eine ausgewogene Darmflora bestmöglich zu unterstützen. Die Wissenschaft heute belegt, dass die Ernährung einen starken Einfluss auf die Darmflora hat, die wiederum direkt mit unserem Immunsystem und den Symptomen von chronischen Erkrankungen zusammenhängt. Mit unserem Partner, dem weltweit renommierten Mikrobiom Forschungszentrum Institut Allergosan in Österreich, entwickeln wir gemeinsam darmgesunde Lebensmittel und verstehen uns als Orientierungshilfe für die menschliche Darmgesundheit im Lebensmitteleinzelhandel. Gründer Ivan Cindric (leidet seit 2014 an Morbus Crohn, einer chronisch entzündlichen Darmerkrankung) leitet die Produktentwicklung und greift dabei auf Fachwissen aus den Bereichen Pharmazie, Diätologie, Ernährungswissenschaft und Schulmedizin zurück. Bei der Auswahl jeder einzelnen Zutat legen wir besonderen Wert auf ihre positive und beruhigende Wirkung auf den Magen-Darm-Trakt und ihre Fähigkeit, die Diversität der Darmflora positiv zu beeinflussen.

Herz und Kopf für den Bauch :)

Fruit délicat de l’océan, du soleil, du vent et de méthodes de récolte traditionnelles ancestrales, le sel de Guérande est récolté à la main dans les marais salants depuis des millénaires.

Name: Surgelati Nuova Madero Srl
Description:
Da quarant'anni lavoriamo e confezioniamo prodotti ittici e vegetali. Siamo orgogliosi di essere sempre più presenti sui Mercati, grazie a Prodotti di alta qualità e tracciabilità certificata, importati direttamente dai Paesi d'origine. 
L'evoluzione dell'offerta attraverso i nostri Marchi Commerciali: Madero, Gelserra, Marigel, Fedagel e, per i piatti pronti Le Ricette di Nonno Pietro.
La flessibilità della nostra organizzazione ci permette di soddisfare appieno le richieste, personalizzando modalità di lavorazione e tipologie di confezionamento, con marchi e prodotti su richiesta dei nostri Clienti: Catene di Distribuzione, Supermercati, Ristoranti...
Per ognuno possiamo produrre il “su misura” richiesto, non importa se diverso dai nostri standard dimensionali, ma con la qualità certificata di sempre. Specificatamente per la GDO, possiamo realizzare confezioni con Private Label: un ulteriore strumento commerciale che aggiunge valore alla fiducia reciproca e fidelizza il Consumatore.

Name: leh-vertrieb GmbH
Description:
Die leh-vertrieb GmbH ist einer der Top Player für Vertriebsdienstleistung im deutschen Lebensmitteleinzelhandel (LEH). Wir unterstützen Unternehmen, Mittelständler und Food Startups von der Markteinführung bis zur Weiterentwicklung bestehender Vertriebskonzepte. Ein Schwerpunkt liegt auf nachhaltigen Marken und Bio-Produktlinien.

Ihre Produkte bringen wir mit größter Flexibilität und Effizienz in den Handel: Entweder als ausgelagerter Vertrieb oder in partnerschaftlicher Zusammenarbeit mit Ihrem Außendienst.

Wir bieten eine Außendienststeuerung, die auf individuelle Bedürfnisse zugeschnitten ist. Kunden realisieren Kostenvorteile und profitieren von Synergien aus dem Mehrmarkenmodell. Ein weiteres Vertriebsmodell erlaubt eine noch spezifischere Ansprache trendbewusster Zielgruppen in Ballungszentren.

Das Leistungsspektrum am Point of Sale (POS) ergänzen wir um strategische Beratung. Dabei stützen wir uns auf jahrelange Branchenkenntnis und Marktforschungsdaten über Listungen und Distribution der Kundenprodukte.

Mit einer starken nationalen Vision haben wir 2007 die leh-vertrieb aus fünf regionalen Unternehmen gegründet. Heute haben wir über 100 Mitarbeiter. Wir öffnen Markenartiklern in rund 10.000 Stores die Türen zum regionalen und nationalen Lebensmitteleinzelhandel.

Die leh-vertrieb GmbH steht ein für nachhaltige Personalpolitik und werteorientierte Unternehmensführung. Die rund 80 qualifizierten Außendienstmitarbeiter beschäftigen wir ausschließlich in Festanstellung und bieten so Verlässlichkeit und Planbarkeit. Viele Top-Markenartikler wie z.B. Dallmayr oder Weleda vertrauen seit vielen Jahren auf unsere Vertriebs- und Beratungskompetenz.

Impressum: http://www.leh-vertrieb.de/impressum

Name: Moscow Food Co-op
Description:
We started with some fresh local produce, a few bulk bins, and a ton of big ideas. Now, 48 years later, we’ve grown to over 7,800 owners strong: a community of food-loving individuals who put local and natural products first. We’re a group of advocates for Palouse producers and families affected by food insecurity. Everyone is welcome at the Moscow Food Co-op!

Both the story of our Moscow Food Co-op’s past and future are rooted in the cooperative values and principles as expressed through the International Cooperative Alliance. As noted by the International Cooperative Alliance, "Co-operatives are based on the values of self-help, self-responsibility, democracy, equality, equity and solidarity.” 

The Moscow Food Co-op located at 121 East 5th Street in Moscow, Idaho, and is open every day from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m. We also have a satellite location on the University of Idaho campus in Moscow at 822 Elm St.

Name: EMILIA FOOD LOVE
Description:
Our mission is all about you. It’s about taking the quality and excellence of typical Emilian food to your homes, 365 days a year.

We make passion and expertise available to you, sent to your home with the same care and attention we use in selecting our products, for guaranteed freshness, aroma and flavour.

Even if you live hundreds of miles away from Emilia, with EMILIA FOOD LOVE you can savour Salami, Strolghino, Balsamic Vinegar or Parmigiano Reggiano at its absolute best.

But that's not all. What we want is to send you an invitation together with our products. It is an exclusive invitation to enter our world, listen to the tales told by our land, and perhaps even visit the places you imagined upon tasting our products.

EMILIA FOOD LOVE is a new way of travelling, of discovering flavours and the quality of products selected for you with great attention to detail and passion.

Name: MicroVida-Portugal
Description:
MicroVida - Sustainable and Innovative Urban Nutrition

At MicroVida, we revolutionize access to fresh food, promoting sustainability and supporting local economies. Based in the Porto Metropolitan Area, we connect local producers with businesses and consumers through a practical and sustainable e-commerce platform.

 Business Models:
- B2B: Healthy meals for companies, with smart lockers promoting workplace wellness.
- B2C: Delivery of fresh, customizable baskets, making healthy eating convenient.
- B2G: Partnerships with public entities to foster nutrition and local development.
- C2B2C: Connecting producers and consumers, encouraging responsible agricultural practices.

 Key Differentiators:
- Sustainability: Partnerships with local producers, ensuring quality and freshness.
- Technology: Intuitive platform with subscription options and advanced logistics.
- Social Impact: Focus on cloud kitchens and strengthening the community.

 Mission: We provide healthy, simple, and ethical food, promoting responsible consumption and building trust between consumers and producers.

 Join us and be part of the change!

Deze unieke supermarkt midden in het centrum van Venlo is al meer dan 55 jaar de voedselbron voor het Duitse achterland. Name: Supermercado Aurea
Description:
O Supermercado Aurea nasceu em 07 de julho de 1994, juntamente com a inauguração do conjunto habitacional Jd. Manoel Penna em Ribeirão Preto-SP, quando a moradora do bairro e proprietária do negócio, Aurea Maria Carvalho iniciou com muitas dificuldades financeiras a construção de um pequeno estabelecimento comercial em sua própria residência. A partir daí a micro empresa progrediu chegando ao patamar em que se encontra hoje.

Inicialmente o negócio consistia basicamente na venda de bebidas e outros produtos de necessidade alimentícia básica como pães, molhos de tomate e alguns farináceos. Atualmente a empresa possui em seu ramo de atuação o setor de Mercearia, Açougue, Padaria e Varejão, consistindo assim em uma loja de vizinhança com características simples.

O supermercado Aurea está localizado na região sudeste de Ribeirão Preto-SP, no bairro Jd. Manoel Penna. O local consiste em um conjunto habitacional e que está próximo a outros conjuntos habitacionais como o Jd. José Roberto Benedeti (Bancários) e Jd. São José. 

A empresa conserva ainda nos dias de hoje, os "clientes de caderneta" como estratégia e devido ao bom relacionamento e grande contato com a vizinhança local.

Name: Guará Supermercados
Description:
No ano de 1970, o senhor Jason Roque de Castilho e sua esposa senhora Valdete Lange de Castilho iniciaram um pequeno negócio no bairro Guará, localizado no distrito de Barão Geraldo em Campinas. Esse negócio era conhecido como Bar do Castilho, situado na antiga Rua 8 que depois passou a ser Rua Abílio Vilela Junqueira.

Como naquele momento o bairro estava começando a se formar, o negócio da família passou a se tornar um armazém de secos e molhados, pois o acesso a produtos alimentícios e de limpeza era mais difícil naquela época.

Em 1985 com o falecimento do fundador, seus filhos Jason Roque de Castilho Junior e Wagner Roque de Castilho deram seguimento ao negócio e também um novo rumo, transformando o armazém num mini mercado, carinhosamente conhecido pelos moradores do bairro como Mercadinho Guará.

Em 2002, os sócios inovaram mais uma vez associando o mercado a uma rede, conhecida como Rede Smart, buscando adquirir conhecimento e tecnologia para oferecer cada dia melhor qualidade nos preços e serviços para satisfazer os clientes.

O ano de 2006 foi marcado por mais uma mudança, onde a localização do mercado passou a ser na Rua José Pugliesi Filho nº886, oferecendo acesso mais fácil aos clientes por se tratar de uma das principais ruas do Bairro Guará.

The key to our success in our local community is solely down to people. The people who work for us and the people who shop with us.

The Proudfoot Group has been a member of Nisa Retail Ltd for over 30 years, we are supplied via Nisa’s distribution centres. Nisa is owned by its members, this allows it to be operated like a co-operative, using the collective buying power of the large 'symbol' group and Independent retailers like ourselves to negotiate fantastic and extremely competitive deals from suppliers

Throughout the life time of the Proudfoot Group we have won many different awards in our respective industry, ranging from national to locally recognised awards. Ved å bruke komposterbare materialer bidrar vi til en mer miljøvennlig kopp kaffe.

Vi  må være konkurransedyktige for at kundene enkelt skal bytte fra aluminium eller plastkapsler til våre biologiske nedbrytbare, komposterbare kapsler.  

Vi tilbyr kaffe til privatkunder via vår nettbutikk og vi tilbyr bedriftsavtale til bedrifter og næringslivskunder, som ønsker å ta del i det grønne skifte også når det gjelder kaffe. 

Green Coffee Norge selger i dag Green Coffee Monaco sine produkter i det norske markedet. 

Vi leverer 8 varianter kaffe fra fire ulike kaffe land: Brasil, Guatemala, Colombia og Etiopia.

Vi leverer: 
1. Hele kaffebønner
2. Malt kaffe 
3. Kaffe kapsler (komposterbare) som er 100% Nespresso kompatible 
4. Kaffe abonnement 

Green Coffee Norge leverer kaffe i hele Norge. 

Vår visjon:
Å tilby forbrukerne kaffebaserte produkter med en eksepsjonell smak som er miljøvennlig.

Kaffen skape de store øyeblikkene som kunden aldri glemmer

Green Coffee Norge er et Norsk registrert selskap som er 100% norsk.

Description:
Super-Køl A/S er en af Danmarks største køle-entreprenører indenfor kommerciel køling. Vi markedsfører førende, energibesparende og højteknologiske køle-/fryseinventar. Vores mobile og kompetente køle- og el-teknikere opbygger, servicerer og installerer klima- og miljøvenlige køle-/fryseanlæg.

Super-Køl A/S blev stiftet juli 1980 og følger med i de førende løsninger indenfor køle-/fryseanlæg, og står med et bredt og ajourført kompetenceniveau til rådighed for vores kunder døgnet rundt. 

Vi er medlem af FinDan-Gruppen, som i over 25 år har rammesat et tæt samarbejde om 7 selvstændige landsdækkende virksomheder. Gennem FinDan-Gruppen forstærkes vores kundebetjening og udviklingen af faglige metoder blandt kollegaer.

Vi er en del af Arneg World og specifikt Arneg Nordic, der har rødder i Sverige. Her har vi et tæt nordisk samarbejde, hvor størstedelen af vores produkter indenfor kommerciel køling udvikles.    

Udviklingen omkring naturlige kølemidler og specielt CO2 til anvendelse i danske supermarkeder haft stor fokus i Super-Køl A/S.

Super-Køl A/S byggede og installerede de første anlæg udelukkende drevet af naturlige kølemidler allerede først i 90'erne. I dag har Super-Køl A/S installeret mere end 200 anlæg, der er HFC frie og udelukkende drives med naturlige kølemidler.

Super-Køl A/S har hjemme i Odense og Karlslunde. 

Du kan læse mere om vores virksomhed på vores hjemmeside: www.superkol.dk

Name: ICA Citybutikerna
Description:
"Du som handlar på City, ofta eller sällan. Utan dig finns vi inte. Det är för din skull våra fyra butiker ska vara de finaste. Vi jobbar hårt för att hitta de lägsta priserna. För vi är boråsarnas butik. Och du är vår uppdragsgivare. Vårt löfte är att ge matglädje hela veckan till ständigt låga priser. Från tidig morgon till sent på kvällen. För din skull."

Citybutikerna är en lokal livsmedelskedja med fyra butiker i Borås och är en av stans största arbetsgivare. Företaget har funnits i mer än 40 år och är marknadsledande med fler än 85 000 kundbesök per vecka. Vi är kända för att ha bland de lägsta matpriserna i Sverige. Med våra 400 engagerade medarbetare, hantverkskompetens och egen produktion i form av bageri, kök, kallskänk, konditori, växthus, styckeri och saluhall kan Citybutikerna erbjuda boråsarna en matbutiksupplevelse utöver det vanliga.

Name: Big Distribution ( Taurus Group)
Description:
Fondée en 1962 par Francesc Betriu et Jordi Escaler en Espagne à Oliana, la marque s’est spécialisée d’abord en Moulin à café, pour conquérir tout le pays et devenir leader de la machine à café.
Taurus s’agrandit dans les années 70 et 80 en ajoutant à son catalogue les meilleures friteuses et blenders du marché, ainsi que les ventilateurs silencieux, une innovation majeur dans les années 90. A partir de 2007, Taurus se lance à la conquête de l’international pour couvrir tous les continents du globe, avec notamment de nouvelles gammes de produits, comme que le bien-être avec les sèche-cheveux et les tondeuses, et l’équipement de cuisine tel que les pétrins, les fours électriques, presse-oranges, cafetières et bien d’autres, sans oublier la maison avec les aspirateurs, chauffages, et autres chauffe-eaux. Absolute Frische der Produkte steht ebenso im Vordergrund wie die Nachhaltigkeit im Umweltschutz durch kurze Lieferwege.

Der hohe Anspruch an Qualität und Frische wird durch Sicherheitsstandards und strenge Eingangskontrollen gewährleistet.
Prechtl steht auf Qualität…
darunter verstehen wir höchste Produktqualität, Frische, fachliche Kompetenz, freundliche Beratung und ein gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.

Wir als Firma Prechtl bieten Ihnen neben lokalen Produkten und vielen Spezialitäten auch ein umfassendes Grundsortiment, das Discountpreisen standhält.

Ein wichtiges Unterscheidungskriterium im Wettbewerb sind unsere gut ausgebildeten, hoch motivierten und freundlichen Mitarbeiter.
Diese werden in die werteorientierte Personalentwicklung mit einbezogen und können in unserer eigenen Prechtl Akademie an regelmäßigen fachlichen und persönlichen Weiterbildungen teilnehmen.

Respektvoller und kollegialer Umgang ist die Basis für langfristige und vertrauensvolle Zusammenarbeit mit allen unseren Mitarbeitern.
Höchste Wertschätzung von Mitarbeiter, Kunde und Ware ist uns eine Herzensangelegenheit.

Wir haben uns von unserer (Schwieger-) Mutter inspirieren lassen, die uns Essen mitgeben hat, das wir nur noch aufwärmen mussten - daher der Name Mamaye, was übersetzt "meine Mutter" bedeutet. Eine Hommage an alle Mütter.

Eine Geschichte die universell ist und Essen das verbindet.

-EN-
Mamaye brings authentic (East) African flavors to everyday cooking - organic, vegan and ready in minutes - for anyone who wants to make taste an experience again.

We were inspired by our (mother-in-law), who gave us food that we just had to heat up - hence the name Mamaye, which translates as “my mother”. A tribute to all mothers.

A story that is universal and food that connects.

Name: KON - RAD spol. s r.o.
Description:
Nechceme predať, ale predávať! "Mimoriadne nám záleží na dlhodobých vzťahoch s našimi partnermi, preto sa sústreďujeme na vytváranie priaznivých podmienok pre vzájomne výhodnú spoluprácu."

--------------------------

Spoločnosť KON-RAD spol. s r.o. bola založená 20.09.1990 ako jedna z prvých spoločností zaoberajúcich sa veľkoobchodnou činnosťou v oblasti potravín. V prvých 3 rokoch svojej existencie doviezla vyše 1000 kamiónov nealkoholických nápojov firmy Radlberger, na ktoré získala exkluzívny kontrakt v bývalej ČSFR. Popri explózii permanentne vznikajúcich a zanikajúcich firiem s podobnou činnosťou sa nielenže udržala na slovenskom trhu, ale expandovala do kvantity a kvality poskytovaných služieb.

Svoje produktové portfólio postupne rozširuje a v súčasnosti ponúka okolo 7000 tovarových položiek potravinárskeho ako aj nepotravinárskeho charakteru (kancelársky papier, batérie, obaly na potraviny, telefónne karty Prima a Easy, diaľničné nálepky, tabakové výrobky - cigarety, cigary).

Okrem tovarov ponúka aj tieto služby:
- možnosť nákupu v maloobchodnej predajni
- možnosť nákupu bez registrácie
- rozvoz tovaru priamo k zákazníkovi
- logistiku a distribúciu na celom území Slovenska (ponuku Vám vypracuje na základe vašich požiadaviek, E-mail: ugr@kon-rad.sk)
- import a export tovaru celosvetovo

Vďaka prepracovanej sieti interných a externých obchodných zástupcov, v súčasnosti poskytuje svoje služby na celom území Slovenskej republiky. Denne zásobuje priamymi rozvozmi cca 600 odberateľov, okrem zákazníkov, ktorí nakupujú v maloobchodnej predajni osobne.

Skladové a predajné priestory majú rozlohu 20 tis.m2, cca 200 zamestnancov zabezpečuje všetky služby, ktoré súvisia so zabezpečením uspokojenia požiadaviek dodávateľov a zákazníkov.

Das aus Norddeutschland stammende Familienunternehmen

Nachdem Georg Hayunga 1901 mit einem 
Kolonialwarengeschäft den Grundstein für unser

Hamburg mit einem Tante-Emma-Laden weiter.
Im Jahr 1975 zieht es die Kaufmannsfamilie nach Elmshorn, 
wo im gleichen Jahr der erste Supermarkt am Koppeldamm 
übernommen wird.
Ab 2007 folgen Neueröffnungen in Norderstedt. 
Heute wird das Einzelhandelsunternehmen in der dritten und 
vierten Generation von Jan W. Hayunga Senior und Jan W. 
Hayunga Junior geführt. 
Schon immer ist Familie Hayunga mit seinen Mitarbeiter:innen 
auf der Suche nach etwas Besonderem sowie Neuheiten – 
sowohl für Ihren Genuss als auch für unsere Umwelt.

*Хлеб и Сол* е онлайн бакалия за пазар от вкъщи за вкъщи. Мисията ни е да предлагаме по категории разнообразие само от качествени продукти, които бихме ползвали сами, от доказани доставчици (производители, вносители и дистрибутори) на пазара. Затова се наричаме бакалия, а не супермаркет :)

Онлайн бакалия *Хлеб и Сол* е част от bERS Logistics - www.bers.bg - българска група от компании с над 16 години опит при предоставяне на складови, (международни и вътрешни) транспортни, логистични и микро-дистрибуционни услуги. Създаваме добавена стойност в полза на търговци на дребно (вериги магазини), вносители, дистрибутори и онлайн търговци в България и Северна Македония. bERS предлага и решения за дистрибуция към магазинната мрежа в София и страната. 

bERS и *Хлеб и Сол* извършват дейността си съгласно изискванията на БАБХ, ISO 9001:2015 и IFS Logistics стандарти. Екипът ни управлява повече от 50 000 кв. м. складови пространства, над 150 големи превозни средства и 50+ лекотоварни автомобила. 

***

Hlebisol is an online grocery store for shopping from home and for home. Our mission is to sell by categories an assortment of quality products, which we would consume ourselves, from trustworthy suppliers (producers, importers and distributors) on the market. 

Online grocery store Hlebisol is part of bERS Logistics - a Bulgarian group of companies with more than 16 years of experience in provision of warehousing, (international and domestic) transport, logistics and micro-distribution services for retailers (supermarkets), importers, distributors and eCommerce merchants in Bulgaria and Northern Macedonia. bERS also provides solutions for micro-distribution of goods to the modern retail and traditional trade shops in Sofia and the interiors. 

bERS and Hlebisol operate according to the requirements of the BFSA, ISO 9001:2015 and IFS Logistics standards. Our team manages more than 50 000 sqm of warehousing capacities, more than 150 heavy transport vehicles and 50+ vans.

Name: Supermercados Calvi
Description:
Somos uma empresa varejista de comércio alimentício fundada em 1978 com uma pequena quitanda de verduras no bairro Cruzeiro do Sul - Cariacica/ES, ora dirigida e administrada por Vantiul Calvi e Maria da Penha Spavier Calvi.

Em agosto de 1986 recebemos instalações novas em frente a antiga e em 1996 inauguramos a informatização por código de barras, sendo o primeiro estabelecimento no estado a utilizar o ECF - Emissor de Cupom Fiscal nos check-outs.

Fomos também o primeiro supermercado do estado a receber o cartão de crédito com chip.

Nossa loja passou a funcionar totalmente através de gerador de energia no horário de ponta, das 18 às 21h.

Em Outubro de 2003 inauguramos nossa filial em Cobilândia - Vila Velha/ES, uma loja com instalações amplas, confortáveis e modernas, que proporcionou ao público da região e adjacências um novo conceito em atendimento e prestação de serviços.

Hoje nossos clientes podem fazer suas compras sem sair de casa através de nosso site e aplicativo (Fidelidade Calvi). Oferecemos um serviço e atendimento de qualidade e confiança.

Somos também uma empresa que utiliza energia limpa, através de nossos painéis solares.

Uma empresa de vanguarda que não mede esforços para satisfazer as necessidades de nossos clientes. Com muito esforço, dedicação e determinação conseguimos chegar onde estamos com um grau de excelência em atendimento e bons serviços prestados.

Name: Natural Food Trade GmbH
Description:
Über 15 Jahre im Markt und stetig wachsend! Natural Food ist Ihr Partner für gesunde und funktionale Snacks. Gegründet von Timea Hipf, einer Expertin im Bereich Marketing und Produktentwicklung.

Unsere Spezialität: Kompromisslose Qualität und Transparenz. Wir setzen auf Bio-Zutaten und verzichten auf künstliche Zusatzstoffe. Unsere Produkte sind nicht nur lecker, sondern auch nahrhaft, mit hohen Protein- und Ballaststoffgehalten.

Sie wünschen, wir produzieren. Unsere Auftragsgeber sind Handelsketten und Marken, für die wir innovative Produkte aus 10 Produktkategorien entwickeln. Natürliche Rohstoffe, ausgewogene Rezepturen und ein Schuss Innovation sind die Zutaten für unsere leckeren Snacks und Cerealien. Bei Natural Food beginnt unsere Arbeit lange vor der eigentlichen Produktionsphase. Wir analysieren zunächst Ihr Marktumfeld und identifizieren aktuelle Trends, um genau zu verstehen, was die Konsumenten suchen. Basierend auf diesen Erkenntnissen entwickeln wir innovative Produktideen, überprüfen Ihr bestehendes Sortiment und finden Möglichkeiten zur Kosteneinsparung. Unsere Expertise erstreckt sich von der Produktstrategie über das Design bis hin zur Markteinführung. Wir unterstützen Sie nicht nur bei der Vertriebsstrategie und Markenbildung, sondern auch bei der Auswahl geeigneter Lebensmittelzertifizierungen. Darüber hinaus bieten wir speziellen Coachings für Führungskräfte an, um Ihr Unternehmen in eine moderne und agile Organisation zu transformieren. Mit unserer Private-Label-Produktion begleiten wir Sie von der ersten Produktidee bis zum fertigen Produkt, das in den Regalen steht.

Unsere Produkte:

- Extrudierte Knabbersnacks und Zerealien

- Knuspermüslis, Porridge, Cornflakes, Granolas

- Cheese Cracker und vegane Crackers

- Laugens Snacks (Sticks, Bretzel)

- Babyfood

Mit Natural Food wählen Sie einen vertrauenswürdigen Partner für Ihre Ernährung. Wir freuen uns auf eine erfolgreiche Zusammenarbeit!

Name: Grupo Puro
Description:

O grupo tem a missão de criar e estabelecer o maior e mais completo ecossistema do setor de opções saudáveis, da alimentação ao lifestyle. Combinando mais de 10 anos de experiência de cada empresa, o grupo busca oferecer ao mercado uma ampla gama de produtos e serviços que promovam o bem-estar e escolhas saudáveis para o dia a dia do consumidor. 

Somos parceiros da Indústria e do Varejo e fomentamos o crescimento do setor por meio da expansão de lojas, conteúdos educacionais, distribuição, eventos e parcerias. 

Acreditamos que a alimentação saudável é essencial para uma vida plena e feliz. Unindo nossas marcas, proporcionamos uma experiência única, que engloba desde produtos naturais e orgânicos até suplementos nutricionais e itens fitness de alta qualidade.

Name: ShopRite of Hunterdon County
Description:
About ShopRite of Hunterdon County:
The Colalillo family joined Wakefern in 1954 when Joseph A. Colalillo opened a ShopRite in South River, New Jersey. Four years later, the store relocated to Flemington, and today is owned and operated by his son, Joe and wife Jeannie, who also have stores in Clinton and Greenwich Township, New Jersey as well as Bethlehem and Yardley, Pennsylvania.

The Colalillo family has been serving the communities of Hunterdon and southern Warren Counties for over 60 years.  They started with a small store in downtown Flemington with a handful of associates, and have grown to five stores and a micro fulfillment center, and over 1,500 associates. Over the years their associates, past and present, have worked hard to enable the company to grow and enrich the communities they serve.

"Our vision is simple: Be the Best. We aim to do our best each and every day for our customers and for each other.  Our mission is to be the preferred place to work and shop and to retain the best associates to provide an exceptional experience for our customers."

Name: Salumi Caputo Srl
Description:
Una terra generosa, un saper fare antico e tutta la genuinità della tradizione paesana. Con questi semplici ingredienti ha inizio la storia del Salumificio Caputo, che da oltre 70 anni produce salumi siciliani d’eccellenza a Sant’Angelo di Brolo, antico borgo alle pendici dei Monti Nebrodi.

In questo luogo unico al mondo nel 1950 Gaetano Rifici, apre le porte della sua piccola macelleria di paese ed avvia la produzione di una specialità tutta sua: un salame dal gusto accattivante, che in breve tempo conquista anche i palati più esigenti, aprendo la strada alle esportazioni in tutta l’isola e alla crescita virtuosa dell’azienda.

Nel 1991, dopo quasi mezzo secolo di duro lavoro e ricerca dell’eccellenza, l’azienda e i segreti delle specialità di Gaetano, detto "Nonno Tanu", passano alla nuova generazione Caputo che, sotto la guida di Anna e Salvatore, fa prosperare l’azienda coniugando il meglio della tradizione salumiera con le più moderne tecnologie in ambito alimentare e ottenendo nel 2006 il prestigioso marchio IGP a tutela del Salame S. Angelo. 

Oggi questo patrimonio culinario è giunto fino a Michela e Gaetano Caputo, i nuovi custodi degli antichi saperi e sapori della tradizione paesana di Sant'Angelo di Brolo.

Notre équipe d’amoureux du chocolat est là pour vous accompagner dans le choix de vos cadeaux, petits plaisirs ou tout simplement pour vous faire découvrir notre univers. Vivons gourmands !

Name: Pimenta Foods Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Pimenta Foods is a passion-driven startup project, born out of the desire of two enthusiasts to bring a new quality to the Polish world of antipasti and hummus. It is their love for exploring flavours and sharing them that led them to make the decision of creating a place where they could encapsulate their experiences and passion in an unassuming little box.

Pimenta Foods is an establishment that emphasises two aspects: an honest and meticulous approach in selecting only the highest quality ingredients, resulting in concise ingredient lists free from unnecessary additives, and an ethical approach to conducting their business. Therefore, Pimenta is not just a reflection of a love for travel and culinary arts, but also a company where people are paramount. A cornucopia of flavours, transparency, and integrity are the foundations upon which this project was built.

During the construction of the production line, innovative manufacturing processes were designed and implemented to handle the ingredients with utmost delicacy. All of this is done to preserve their natural flavours and textures.

We are delighted that you are visiting our profile, sit with us at our table and get to know us better!

Baratti&Milano seleziona con cura materie prime eccellenti, come il cacao dell’Ecuador e le nocciole piemontesi "Tonda e Gentile". Coniuga tradizione e innovazione, creando specialità celebri come il Cremino, il Gianduiotto e la Caramella Classica. Ogni prodotto è un gioiello di qualità, frutto della passione e della competenza dei suoi maestri cioccolatieri. Un marchio che custodisce l’eccellenza del gusto italiano.

We strive to not only do our part to lessen the impact of a storm, but also to provide premier service to you and your family by being there when you need us most. Every part of our company mobilizes to respond in an emergency. We assist our communities before and after natural disasters threaten our operating areas.

We are Publix proud — especially during hurricane season.

Name: Seafood City
Description:
Seafood City Supermarket is the #1 Filipino supermarket chain in North America, with 37+ locations across the U.S. and Canada. Headquartered in California, we are proudly committed to serving Filipino communities by offering an authentic selection of groceries, fresh seafood, and beloved homegrown brands like Grill City, Crispy Town, Noodle Street, and Bakers Avenue.

More than a grocery store, Seafood City is a cultural anchor—bringing the warmth of Filipino hospitality, the flavors of home, and a full-service food hall experience under one roof. From California to Hawaii, Nevada, Washington, Texas, Illinois, and across key cities in Canada, we continue to expand our reach while launching innovative digital services through the SFC+ app to serve Filipinos everywhere.

Name: E.Leclerc Obernai
Description:
Le magasin a été créé en 2006 sous l’enseigne Rond-Point exploitée par les Coop d’Alsace.

En 2008, un partenariat est signé entre l’ACDlec et les Coop d’Alsace, permettant au magasin de passer sous bannière E.Leclerc.

En 2012-13, les Coop d’Alsace très fragilisée par des problèmes de rentabilité de ses magasins (Rond Point et points Coop) cède les fonds de commerce des magasins qu’elle exploite sous enseigne E.Leclerc à Hypercoop.

En novembre 2014, Hypercoop cède le fonds de commerce du magasin Oberdis à M. et Mme Leclercq qui deviennent les adhérents et dirigeants du magasin.

Le magasin d’Obernai « Oberdis » n’est donc indépendant, que depuis la fin 2014.

L’établissement emploie aujourd’hui, environ 200  personnes.

Le magasin fait partie de la SCAPALSACE (« SCAP »), la centrale d’achat régionale basée à Colmar qui est une des 16 centrales régionales du mouvement E.LECLERC.

Name: Supermercados Todo
Description:
Supermercados Todo inició su actividad en San Carlos de Bariloche en el año 1980, con la apertura de su primera sucursal ubicada en las calles Moreno y Rolando. Desde entonces, fue expandiéndose a través de la inauguración de nuevos locales en diferentes barrios de la ciudad y en ciudades vecinas, consolidando su servicio como supermercado de cercanía.

La cadena cuenta actualmente con 24 bocas distribuidas estratégicamente en el Corredor de los Lagos, con presencia en Bariloche, Dina Huapi, El Bolsón, Lago Puelo, El Maitén, Esquel, Villa La Angostura, Junín de los Andes y San Martín de los Andes.

Su identidad como empresa regional la caracteriza por ser una de las marcas más representativas de la Patagonia, brindando servicio a residentes y visitantes, y generando empleo directo a más de 400 personas.

“El Todo”, como se lo conoce popularmente, continúa creciendo y trabajando día a día en el mejoramiento de su propuesta comercial, priorizando atención, precio y calidad, y fortaleciendo su compromiso con la comunidad desde hace más de 40 años.
Location: San Carlos de Bariloche, Río Negro

Name: Supermercado Econômico
Description: Supermercado Econômico is a supermarkets company based out of 2373 Av. Minas Gerais - Jardim Apucarana, Apucarana, Brazil.

Name: Ecircular
Description:
Ecircular è una startup che fonda tutti i suoi servizi sul concetto di economia circolare: ovvero su un modello di produzione e consumo attento alla riduzione degli sprechi delle risorse naturali e consistente in condivisione, riutilizzo, riparazione e riciclo di materiali e prodotti esistenti il più a lungo possibile.

I nostri servizi, rivolti sia in ambito B2C che B2B, garantiscono la compravendita consapevole di prodotti ortofrutticoli. Riduciamo le produzioni di CO2 attraverso la scelta di partner locali e favoriamo la riduzione degli sprechi alimentari. Sfruttiamo la tecnologia per mettere in relazione domanda e offerta, riducendo le normali catene commerciali e adottando modelli di filiera corta.

Il nostro team è interdisciplinare; unito dall'amore per l'ambiente si è assunto la responsabilità di essere un motore di cambiamento, a supporto delle persone e del Pianeta.

Name: Buonappetito
Description: Buonappetito è un marketplace che offre ai propri clienti solo eccellenze di piccoli produttori italiani vocati alle produzioni tipiche. La mission di Buonappetito è offrire, a chiunque nel mondo ami il cibo italiano, le migliori produzioni della filiera agroalimentare di tutte le regioni italiane raccontandone i valori, la storia e le caratteristiche distintive.

Name: Fratelli Barbaro
Description:
Die Einführung von Fratelli-Barbaro ist für Antonio und Luigi Jr. Barbaro ein langersehnter Traum, der endlich in Erfüllung gegangen ist. Als Söhne des berühmten Italo-Gastronomen Luigi Barbaro sen. aus Wien haben sie von Kindheit an die Liebe zur italienischen Küche und die Leidenschaft für die Gastronomie im Blut. Gemeinsam haben sie hart daran gearbeitet, ihre Vision von gesunder, moderner und authentischer italienischer Küche in Restaurant-Qualität in die Tat umzusetzen.

Dank ihrer Bruderschaft und ihrem unermüdlichen Ehrgeiz haben sie es geschafft, eine exklusive Produktlinie zu kreieren, die höchsten Ansprüchen gerecht wird. Fratelli-Barbaro bietet acht ausgewählte Produkte, die zu 100% "Made in Italy" sind und keine Konservierungsstoffe enthalten. Von Gnocchi-Variationen mit Kürbis oder Spinat bis hin zu veganen und Vollkornvarianten sowie einzigartigen frischen Pastasaucen wie Sugo alla Puttanesca, al Tartufo (Trüffel) oder einer veganen Bolognese, die Geschmackserlebnisse sind vielfältig und köstlich.

Besonders stolz sind die Fratelli Barbaro auf ihre handgeformten knusprigen Pinsa-Variationen in Gourmet-Qualität nach antikem neapolitanischen Barbaro-Familienrezept. Alle Produkte sind vorgekocht, gegart oder gebacken und in nur wenigen Minuten genussfertig. Die Fratelli Barbaro möchten mit ihrer Produktlinie nicht nur die Herzen von Italienliebhabern höherschlagen lassen, sondern auch dazu beitragen, dass gesunde und qualitativ hochwertige Gerichte für jedermann zugänglich sind.

Die Geschichte der Familie Barbaro und ihre Erfahrung in der Gastronomieszene sind die Grundlage für die neuen Produkte. Die Brüder haben ihre Werte und ihre Leidenschaft in die Produktlinie eingebracht, die für Authentizität, Qualität und Genuss steht. Fratelli-Barbaro ist nicht nur eine Produktlinie, sondern ein Lebensgefühl, das für die Brüder und ihre Familie eine Herzensangelegenheit ist.

Name: Supermercado Gavião LTDA
