Description:
The first LaBonne retail operations were on wheels at the turn of the century, powered by horse and buggy. By delivering fresh fish and meat directly to local families and businesses, George LaBonne, LaBonne Epicure’s progenitor, knew that his customers were getting the freshest goods possible.

Description: Welcome to our online grocery shop! We specialize in providing authentic homemade Indian snacks and groceries right to your doorstep. From crispy papads, delectable farsan, and flavorful pickles to aromatic spices and mouthwatering sweets, we have something for everyone. Our commitment to using only the finest ingredients ensures that our products are not only delicious but also healthy and wholesome. We take pride in our homemade delicacies and are excited to share them with you. So whether you're looking to indulge in some classic Indian snacks or stock up on everyday grocery essentials, we've got you covered. Shop with us and experience the taste of home!

Name: Streets Market
Description: Streets Market carries a wide selection of local, organic, natural and everyday practical goods all under one roof. Our stores are filled with fresh produce, groceries, meat, seafood, baked goods, coffee, tea, nutritional supplements, vitamins, pet products, flowers, household products, and more. Complementing our market is a chef-driven menu of grab & go prepared dishes, made fresh in our kitchen daily. Our stores cater to residents in urban areas who are looking for convenience, variety and of course competitive prices coupled with top-notch customer service.

Name: Save Mart
Description:
Welcome to Save Mart, your local go-to for outstanding savings on all your grocery essentials. We're committed to offering top-quality products at reduced prices, so you always get the best value with every purchase. At Save Mart, we believe that affordability should never come at the expense of quality.

Our goal is to deliver premium goods at budget-friendly prices, ensuring that everyone can enjoy great value.

Name: CARD Indogrosir, Inc.
Description:
CARD Indogrosir, Inc. is a hybrid  business to business (B2B) and business to consumer (B2C) stores of CARD Salim. It aims to provide convenience, quality, reliable and distributor-served price of goods to Sari Sari Stores.  It also enable Sari-Sari Stores to compete with the giant business capitalists in retail arena by backing them with access to financial services and heedful B2B supports.

Description: Du kaufst nicht einfach nur ein. Du entscheidest über die Welt, in der wir leben. Name: Amauri Supermercados
Description:
A história do Amauri Supermercados inicia nos anos 80, quando começa o comércio através da fundação de uma fruteira, onde se iniciou a saga do empresário Amauri Luis Haefliger. 
Em 1999, o sonho de independência e desenvolvimento virou realidade quando inaugurou-se a fruteira Ki Frutas Amauri, com maior diversidade e espaço mais adequado, onde foi contratado seus primeiros colaboradores. 
Em 2003 em resposta a sua coragem e espirito empreendedor se funda o Amauri Supermercado, com espaço amplo, diversidade de produtos, estacionamento próprio, calendário de promoções e uma cultura que privilegia a excelência de atendimento. 
Em 2015, com mais de 100 colaboradores, o Amauri Supermercados se lança em um novo desafio, quando simultaneamente decide pela construção da sede própria: maior espaço, comodidade e tecnologia a serviço do cliente e de seus colaboradores, base importante em seu crescimento e a abertura de uma nova loja na cidade de Maravilha SC, que compõe mais de 80 colaboradores. 
O Amauri Supermercados tem sua marca consolidada pelo dinamismo e visão de seus gestores, pela coragem e espirito corporativo, estabelecendo premissas modernas e arrojadas, que muito contribuíram para transformar e se consolidar como modelo na área onde atua.
Location: São Lourenço do Oeste, Santa Catarina

Name: Leevers Locavore
Description: A community market with local food in the Denver Highlands. Organic & specialty items, wine & beer on tap (sip and shop!) plus dine-in eateries.

Je mets mon expérience à votre disposition pour vous conseiller au mieux et vous proposer des paniers garnis sur mesure.

Name: RJO Produce Marketing
Description:
Specialize in procurement and marketing of fresh Summer Fruit categories on a year around basis, including but not limited to grapes, strawberries, peaches, plums, and nectarines. Combining retail data with field level quality analysis to make sure the right quality is on the shelves that will exceed consumer expectations. 

Working with supermarkets who want on-ground representation to ensure they receive the quality they expect. RJO provides a third party quality and pricing analysis combined with retail data evaluation. 

RJO’s Bird Dog team is renowned in the industry for working with grower/shippers to ensure the right product is headed to the right customer. The Bird Dog program works with local and regional Universities to give Ag and/or Food majors real-world experience.

RJO Bird Dogs are now using the Bird Dog App to quickly collect quality information and create Bird Dog Quality (BDQ) score. This proprietary scoring system allows quality to be independently quantified against the market and over time.

Name: Grupo Crestani
Description: Empresa do ramo supermercadista, fundada em 1984 por Sr. Ermindo Luis Crestani e seus filhos. Possui atuação em São Miguel do Oeste - SC e Francisco Beltrão - PR, sendo destaque nestas cidades. Possui 4 lojas, sendo 3 Vipi Supermercados e 1 Bonno Atacado e Varejo.
Location: São Miguel do Oeste, Santa Catarina

Description: Wir lieben gesunde, nachhaltig produzierte Lebensmittel und sorgen dafür, dass verantwortungsbewusste Produzenten und moderne Unternehmen zusammenkommen.

Name: Lumisolution
Description:
Distributeur de produits d'éclairage industriel et commercial se spécialisant dans la vente de produits d'éclairage en tout genre et en étude d'économie d'énergie. 

Lumisolution est l'un des plus grands distributeurs d'éclairage de l'Est du Canada regroupant près de 4000 clients réguliers. La mission de Lumisolution est de prodiguer les meilleurs conseils en éclairage, d'apporter des solutions fiables et efficaces et de fournir à sa clientèle des produits de qualité et ce, au meilleur prix.

Lumisolution effectue également de l'accompagnement en efficacité énergétique. A titre d'intervenant  de marché, nous sommes en mesure d'effectuer des études d'économie d'énergie dans le but de faire profiter notre clientèle des différents programmes offerts par Hydro-Québec.

Name: People's Food Co-op
Description: We ensure the availability of high-quality safe food at fair prices with an emphasis on local, organic, fairly traded, and natural goods. We create an educated, empowered, and engaged community that thinks and cares about food, health, and sustainability. We develop a robust cooperative economy.

Name: Good Harvest Market
Description:
Specializing in organic, natural, and gluten free foods. We bring healthier eating to the Milwaukee & Waukesha areas at competitive prices.

Our aim is to:
    - improve the health of our customers by offering products that don’t contain harmful ingredients
    - educate area residents about better choices in their food and overall health
    - reduce our carbon footprint by offering as many local foods and local products as possible

We are proud to offer:
    - USDA certified organic foods
    - locally grown foods
    - sustainably harvested foods
    - over 1000 gluten-free options
    - fairly traded

We believe in the importance of eating organic. It's our opinion that the increased use of partially hydrogenated oils, high fructose corn syrup, chemicals and pesticides in the general food supply is a major factor in the rise of many current day illnesses such as heart disease, cancer, diabetes, and obesity.

We believe that the food you eat matters greatly! Eating organic is a simple, enjoyable and worthwhile choice that can vastly improve your health.

Our foods contain:
    - no partially hydrogenated oils
    - no high-fructose corn syrup
    - no artificial sweeteners
    - no added MSG
    - no bleach
    - no sodium nitrates

Name: Gosiez
Description:
"𝐆𝐎𝐒𝐈𝐄𝐙 Fromages & Vins et vous serez rassasiés !

Depuis 2019, avec nos boutiques Chez Nous, nous veillons à ce que vos repas soient accompagnés au mieux grâce à nos fromages et nos vins.

En ce début novembre 2023, nos boutiques se sont parées d'un nouveau nom pour symboliser notre identité unique et véritable.
Chez Nous devient Gosiez. La passion pour les produits d’exception nous permet de vous guider avec amour vers les meilleurs vins, fromages et charcuteries.
Nos plateaux artisanaux élaborés dans notre tout nouvel atelier conquerront les papilles des gourmets les plus exigeants. 

Par notre atelier, nous ouvrons notre offre aux professionnels souhaitant faire partager des moments de générosité et de convivialité à leurs clients.
Nos plateaux dégustations fromages & charcuteries sont travaillés pour une durée de vie plus longue, nos vins sont sélectionnés pour éveiller tous vos sens, nos paniers garnis sont confectionnés pour récompenser votre personnel, remercier votre clientèle et vous offrir un instant de bonheur. 

Plateaux fromages & charcuterie, vins & spiritueux, cadeaux d’affaires  & paniers garnis, Gosiez offre de nouvelles découvertes aux particuliers comme aux professionnels !

Alors venez chez nous  vous en mettre plein le « Gosiez » !

Description:
Tem paixão pelo online, tecnologia? Gastronomia? Pelo nível de serviço de uma empresa ou atendimento? Segue e acompanha Startups? Vê oportunidades no ramo de varejo alimentar? Empresa que deseja inovar no segmento Foodtech na região de Maringá, enxerga também o futuro através de um mundo cada vez mais sustentável, socialmente justo e conectado. Com foco centrado no cliente, o Villa Mercato utiliza-se dos conceitos mais atuais de gestão, tecnologia, logística e operação para gerar uma experiência única ao cliente. Siga e fique atento para as vagas e oportunidades!

Name: Centro Australia
Description:
Centro Australia is an independent, community-focused grocery and fresh food retailer proudly serving Australian families through a growing network of local stores. Established on the principles of quality, trust, and sustainability, we combine traditional grocery service values with modern retail innovation.

Our multi-site portfolio delivers fresh produce, everyday essentials, and local favourites at competitive prices — all while supporting local suppliers, creating rewarding jobs, and building vibrant neighbourhood connections.

At CENTRO, we believe in doing business the right way: putting people first, maintaining operational excellence, and always staying true to the communities we serve. As we continue our strategic expansion, our vision is to grow CENTRO into Australia’s most trusted local grocer and deliver strong long-term value to our partners and stakeholders.

Name: Oryana Community Co-op
Description:
We are a community-owned grocery store with two locations in Traverse City, MI. Everyone welcome!

In 1973, a small group of pioneering people established a buying club to obtain fresh, wholesome food at fair prices. From that one back porch operation run solely by dedicated volunteers, we have evolved into a $26 million, two-store cooperative business serving the Traverse City community and beyond.

Name: PICCOLO Supermercado
Description:
Nossa trajetória se iniciou em 1997, com a inauguração de uma pequena mercearia em Paulínia no interior de São Paulo. Desde então, a empresa foi crescendo e expandindo de forma gradativa e sustentável. 
Proporcionamos aos clientes conforto e praticidade, e nosso atendimento é diferenciado e dedicado em entender necessidades.
O PICCOLO Supermercado está em constante transformação com foco na melhor experiência de compra e um ambiente de trabalho agradável.

Name: Apex Brands
Description:
Apex Brands is a leading manufacturer and distributor of New Zealand-made personal care products: Only Good, Health Basics and Snowberry. Our mission is to provide accessible, effective, top-quality products in the personal care space.

As a fast-paced and dynamic company, we are constantly pushing ourselves to innovate the personal care industry. We are committed to using only the best ingredients and sustainable manufacturing practices, ensuring that our products are not only effective but also environmentally responsible.

At Apex Brands, we believe that everyone deserves access to top quality personal care products that enhance their daily routines. Our products are designed to meet the needs of a diverse range of customers, from those with sensitive skin to those looking for high-performance products, while promoting sustainable initiatives.

We are proud to be a New Zealand-based company, and we are committed to supporting our local community. Our partnerships with local suppliers and manufacturers help us to create products that are truly unique and reflective of our country's rich culture and heritage.

http://onlygood.co.nz
http://healthbasics.co.nz
http://snowberry.co.nz

Name: Super Oliveira
Description: Presente na vida de milhares de famílias da cidade de Águas Claras e região e tendo como propósito participar todos os dias da rotina da população, o Super Oliveira é uma empresa que está sempre pensando no bem-estar do seu cliente. E é essa razão que faz o nosso trabalho ser tão prazeroso, pois estar próximo de quem nos faz, só engrandece as nossas atividades. Também por isso possuímos 3 sedes espalhadas pela RS 040, para deixar o nosso serviço próximo de toda e qualquer pessoa. Cada estabelecimento trabalha com foco especifico nas necessidade dos moradores da cidade. Tanto para o cidadão quanto aos que viajam e passam pela estrada, a intenção dos nossos funcionários e gestores é sempre facilitar a sua vida e proporcionar que o nosso estabelecimento seja um lugar acolhedor e harmonioso.

Name: Surena Market
Description:
شرکت سورنا راهکاری برای تامین و توزیع کالای سوپرمارکتی به فروشندگان بر پایه پلتفرمی هوشمند است. سورنا با شبکهای بیش از ۸۰۰۰ فروشگاه همکار در سراسر ایران، تجربهای ساده، مطمئن و بهصرفه از خرید روزانه را برای خانوادههای ایرانی فراهم میکند.
سورنا از سال ۱۳۹۶ با چشمانداز توسعهی خردهفروشی و ارائهی راهکارهای نوآورانه آغاز به کار کرد. امروز، بهعنوان بزرگترین برند فرنچایز سوپرمارکتی، دوشادوش همکارانمان ایستادهایم و بر این باوریم که با قدرتمندتر کردن کسبوکار آنها، میتوانیم گامی در جهت بهبود معیشت و رونق زندگی برداریم.
ما آیندهای نزدیک را میبینیم که در هر محله، حضور سورنا به معنای دسترسی آسانتر، قیمتهای منصفانهتر و کیفیت بالاتر خدمات باشد؛ تا خرید روزمره کمی سادهتر و زندگی، دلپذیرتر شود.

Name: A&M Distribution
Description: A&M Distribution commercialise principalement les pièces de rechange de première monte destinées aux grandes marques de véhicules industriels et remorques.

Name: Twenty47Market
Description: Unser Unternehmen Twenty47Market steht für ein neues Einkaufskonzept, welches die Bedürfnisse der Konsumenten rund um die Uhr erfüllen kann.

Name: MAMMA NATUR
Description:
Wir machen weniger Zutaten schmecken mehr zum neuen Standard!
Mamma Natur spezialisiert sich auf die Herstellung und den Vertrieb von veganen italienischen Lebensmitteln. Nachweisliche Qualität, Minimalismus und Transparenz nehmen bei Mamma Natur einen hohen Stellenwert ein. Das Firmencredo ist es, Nahrungsmittel zu produzieren, die mit der Gesundheit, Natur und Umwelt im Einklang stehen. Mamma Natur kämpft für die Rückbesinnung auf das Wesentliche: wenige Hauptzutaten mit extrem hoher Qualität und viel Geschmack.
Unsere Zutaten kommen ausschließlich aus kontrollierter biologischer Landwirtschaft. Alle Rezepturen sind eigens entwickelt und das Ergebnis jahrelanger Erfahrung.

Name: La Despensa de Don Juan
Description:
*Not official page*

Fundada por Juan José Domenech, se sitúa como un supermercado líder en El Salvador por la reconocida calidad de sus productos; ofertas y accesibilidad en todo El Salvador.  En el 2003 la empresa es adquirida por la compañía Operadora del Sur. Dicha empresa formaba parte de La Fragua, firma guatemalteca de la cual el Grupo Paiz era socio. Son 31 tiendas las que adquirió el Grupo Paiz en lo que respecta a La Despensa de Don Juan. Más de 2300 puestos de trabajo es lo que empezó a generar la operación de los supermercados recién comprados.

Name: Metro60
Description:
Metro60 is the new way to grocery. 
With a dedicated app, get the best of Woolworths delivered in under 60 minutes.
In a grocery-delivery first, we're bringing hot food, sushi and flowers with pantry and fridge top-ups to your door. 

Look it's not dangerous, but we're saving people from doing grocery runs. 
And, when we did the maths, one weekly shop on the Metro60 app equals a saving of 3,120 minutes a year. 
That's like 60 seasons of your favourite TV show!

We're building a team of people who know how to be themselves, have fun and love what they do. 
In the process we're helping Australians win some time back.

Name: McGrocer
Description:
McGrocer brings the finest British products to your doorstep, wherever you are. As your personal shoppers in the UK, we handpick groceries, household essentials, and more from trusted British brands and top supermarkets.

From iconic snacks to everyday essentials and specialty items, we ensure top-notch quality with every order, packed with care and delivered globally by trusted couriers like UPS and DHL. Whether you're a health-conscious foodie, a Brit abroad craving a taste of home, or simply love British goods, McGrocer is your one-stop shop. 

Explore our wide selection—from beauty products to pet supplies and gluten-free options—and say goodbye to cross-border shopping hassles as the best of Britain comes straight to your door

We believe that groceries should be more than just sustenance; they should enhance well-being and cater to diverse lifestyle preferences. Whether you're a health-conscious consumer, craving quality products, seeking British brands, or simply have a unique taste, McGrocer has something for everyone. We offer a variety of quality brands and products, so you can be sure to find the things you love.

Name: Bulk Shop
Description:
Welcome to Bulk Shop, where affordability meets quality.

For over 25 years, Bulk Shop has been dedicated to providing the Solomon Islands with access to affordable products and services. We meticulously source the finest products from around the world, ensuring that you get the best prices without compromising on quality.

With 8 conveniently located stores across town, we guarantee that you'll never run out of essential groceries. Our wide range of offerings includes everything from fresh fruits and vegetables, rice and dals, spices and seasonings, to packaged products, beverages, personal care items, locally sourced goods, fresh produce, meat, and even fresh bread. We have carefully curated an extensive selection to cater to all your needs, conveniently available under one roof.

Our primary goal is to ensure your utmost satisfaction as a customer. We strive to provide you with a positive shopping experience that meets all your requirements. Say goodbye to the hassle of battling traffic jams, enduring long queues, and lugging around heavy shopping bags. Now, you can browse and shop for groceries in a relaxed and convenient manner from the comfort of your home or office. Whether you choose doorstep delivery or in-store pickup, we've made food shopping online a breeze. Every product on your monthly shopping list is just a few clicks away.

Experience the convenience and joy of shopping with Bulk Shop. Discover new products, fulfill your food and grocery needs, and let us take care of the rest.

Name: Hyper U Reims Village
Description:
Notre équipe a sélectionné pour vous des produits de qualité, fabriqués sur place ou localement. Name: Catalina Offshore Products, Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1977, Catalina Offshore Products is one of Southern California’s premier seafood purveyors. As a primary receiver of fresh fish and shellfish, we specialize mainly in wild and farmed species found up and down the U.S. West Coast and Baja, CA. 

When our company was founded nearly 40 years ago, it was based on bringing California sea urchin to the market via live product and processed uni trays. This continues to be a central item in our operation. Today our product line includes a wide range of sushi grade fish and high quality fresh and frozen seafood. In addition to wholesale and restaurants, we serve U.S. internet retail customers by providing fresh seafood shipped to their door. In 2012 we expanded our customer base even further by opening our walk-in fish market.

Name: Ashland Food Co-op
Description:
Nestled in the beautiful Rogue Valley, the Ashland Food Cooperative is Southern Oregon's first and only Certified Organic Retailer. The Co-op has a long history of bringing healthy, organic food to the community. What started as a buying club in 1971, and has grown into a well-respected, deeply loved full-service cooperative grocery with over 10,000 owners.

We're dedicated to providing the best customer service and highest quality foods in the region. We wholeheartedly support the local economy and our area's growers and producers.

Community is at the heart of our mission. We give back every year through our Community Grants program, awarding yearly grants of up to $1500 to local non-profit organizations. Our Co-op Basics program consists of nearly 100 products that make whole, healthy foods affordable to everyone.

Name: MeinBioMarkt
Description:
MeinBioMarkt ist der erste und bisher einzige bio-regionale Supermarkt mit Bistro & Bio-Vollsortiment aus Österreich. 

Kommen Sie herein. In unsere Welt, in der Lebensmittel mehr sind als Produkte. 

Wir glauben daran, dass kleine Strukturen und große Vielfalt in der Landwirtschaft der Schlüssel sind. Uns geht es um beste bioregionale Lebensmittel. 

MeinBioMarkt ist dabei Teil des großen Kreislaufs – das Bindeglied zwischen Ihnen und hunderten Bio-Bäuerinnen und Bio-Bauern, die ihr ganzes Herzblut in ihre Erzeugnisse stecken. Weil sie gar nicht anders können, als kompromisslos das zu tun, was sie für richtig und wertvoll erachten. 
Genau so entstehen die besten Lebensmittel. Auf gesunden Böden. In einer Gesellschaft, in der wir aufeinander schauen. 

Enkeltauglich, ehrlich und respektvoll. 

Besuchen Sie uns, entdecken und kosten Sie – wir heißen Sie willkommen im MeinBioMarkt.

Ob Firmengeschenke, Catering oder Events – unser vielfältiges Sortiment steht für Qualität, Geschmack und einen bleibenden Eindruck.

Mit der Vision, traditionelle Werte mit modernem Genuss zu verbinden, legen wir größten Wert auf Reinheit, Transparenz und handwerkliche Sorgfalt. Name: Kenfield Ltd
Description:
For over 40 years, Kenfield has been opening doors… to new opportunities. We are the expert in revolutionary doorway solutions, delivering sustainability, usability and reliability to major supermarkets and global brands.

Our experts design and manufacture products that are truly fit for purpose – award-winning products that will integrate perfectly with your operation. The result is incredible return on investment by improving efficiencies and the experience of on-site teams. 

Innovative Kenfield doorway solutions include: 
-	The K750 Energy Saving Door: A patented, highly durable door designed for temperature-controlled areas.
-	The K550 Crash Door: A very robust flexible swing door proven for the toughest warehouse environments.
-	The K150 Swing Door: A hygienic, high grade polyethylene swing door with integrated vision panels, suitable for a variety of applications.
-	K2 Insulated Strip Curtains: sophisticated strip curtains that offer cost effective flexibility to combat ice and temperature issues. 
-	PVC Strip Curtains: robust, long lasting curtains that help you effectively separate environments, improving safety and hygiene.

Quality is our priority – we manufacture to the highest standard and we're certified to ISO 9001 and 14001. We also care greatly about  sustainability, working with the Low Carbon SMEs Programme and helping customers recycle our products when they reach the end of their lifespan.

A broad range of businesses use Kenfield, including supermarkets, local government, retail and many industrial and commercial businesses. This is because our doorway solutions can be used everywhere from heavy engineering to the food, hospitality and pharmaceutical industries.

With a highly trained and experienced sales team, we can provide quick quotation processing and fast, reliable delivery of their products. If you’d like to discover how our solutions can help you, and join our 16,000 customers, please call 0121 451 3051 or email sales@kenfield.com.

Description:
"It's all good, it's all here"

Wholefoods House is an organic supermarket based in Sydney. We currently are operating across two store locations: one in Woollahra and one in Rosebery.

We're committed to supplying our customers with the best quality fresh organic and biodynamic produce available. We also carry a comprehensive range of organic, ethical and artisan groceries, including pantry staples, dairy, meat, household care, cosmetics and baby products.

Name: Vinzenzmurr
Description: Bereits seit 1902 bietet die Handwerks-Metzgerei vinzenzmurr regionale und hausgemachte Produkte an. Die kontrollierte Aufzucht bei unseren langjährigen Vertragslandwirten in Bayern ist die Voraussetzung für beste Qualität. Bei vinzenzmurr gibt es ein außergewöhnliches Sortiment von Fleisch, Dry Aged Beef, Sous-vide-Braten, hochwertigen Steaks zum Grillen, Bio-Produkten, Spezialitäten wie Murroc und Wagyu. Wurstwaren wie die Münchner Weißwurst oder der Leberkäs werden nach Familientradition in München-Sendling täglich frisch hergestellt. Abgerundet wird das Sortiment durch Käsespezialitäten und Feinkostprodukte.

Name: Papantoniou Supermarkets
Description:
Papantoniou Supermarkets is a local based supermarket chain operating seven stores in Paphos and Limassol area. The first Papantoniou Supermarket opened its doors in Chlorakas – Paphos in 1987. Ten years later, in 1997 they opened the biggest Supermarket of the Chain in Paphos – 8,000 square meters. In the years that followed, another two stores were opened, Kato Paphos 2006 and 2007 in Polis Chrysochous. In 2009 they operated their first Supermarket in Limassol district – Pissouri. In March 2012 they opened another one store in Limassol district, located at Ipsonas area. In August 2015 another store opened in Limassol City Centre.

Papantoniou Supermarket offer a large variety of products to choose from. Their highlight is the always fresh produce: excellent quality fresh meat, instore made bakery products and state of the art fruit markets.

Papantoniou philosophy is to serve our customers with honesty, respect and to offer very competitive prices and choice of product

Name: Proudfoot Supermarkets
Description:
G.W. Proudfoot Limted also known as The Proudfoot Group is a family run independent supermarket chain, which has been established for over 65 years. The Family operate four stores in total, one of which is a large non-food store, situated around the Scarborough area. These are Located in Newby, Eastfield and Seamer districts.

Here at the Proudfoot Group our philosophy is all about customer service. We aim to provide a top class service to meet the ever changing needs and wants of our cherished customers. The mission statement we have in place is simple.... 'Live Better For Less'.

The key to our success in our local community is solely down to people. The people who work for us and the people who shop with us.

The Proudfoot Group has been a member of Nisa Retail Ltd for over 30 years, we are supplied via Nisa’s distribution centres. Nisa is owned by its members, this allows it to be operated like a co-operative, using the collective buying power of the large 'symbol' group and Independent retailers like ourselves to negotiate fantastic and extremely competitive deals from suppliers

Throughout the life time of the Proudfoot Group we have won many different awards in our respective industry, ranging from national to locally recognised awards. Our most recent awards came in the shape of ‘The Grocer Gold Award for Independent Retailer of the Year 2011’ and ‘Nisa 2011 Award for Excellence Best Supermarket Award Newby Store’.

Name: Franklins & Family Supermarkets
Description:
Franklins was founded in 1941 by Frank Lindstrom – which is where the Franklins name originated.  In 1954, Franklins was bought by Harold Cornock and Norman Tieck. Their supermarkets quickly developed a reputation for value, which they achieved by managing overheads to keep prices down. This is why Franklins is recognised as Australia’s original discount grocer.

The philosophy of delivering top value for money through low overheads underpinned the business as it grew. In the late 1970s, Tieck and Cornock sold Franklins to Dairy Farm International.  With the exit of Dairy Farm International from the original Franklins business in May 2001, many of the stores were sold to other retailers and wholesalers. Pick ‘n Pay, a highly successful South African retailer, purchased 50 stores and the rights to the Franklins and No Frills brands later that year. At the same time, they bought 19 Fresco supermarkets that became Franklins stores.

Recognising that the Franklins name was an Australian icon, Pick ‘n Pay relaunched Franklins Supermarkets in May 2002 with a new strategy aimed at re-establishing the brand in the minds of Australian shoppers.  This involved renewed commitment to the key benefits for Franklins customers: value for money, quality goods, friendly service, speedy checkouts and a better shopping experience all round.

Franklins has since expanded and consolidated. We have closed some stores and bought more in greater Sydney, the state’s Central West, the Central Coast and Hunter Valley.  Currently Franklins operates 80 supermarkets across New South Wales.

Name: Rural Grocery Initiative
Description:
The Rural Grocery Initiative aims to sustain locally-owned rural grocery stores to enhance community vitality and improve access to healthy foods by identifying, developing, and sharing resources that support grocers and rural communities.

In 2006, K-State held listening sessions across Kansas to identify challenges facing rural communities. During these sessions, the need for greater rural grocery support rose to the top. As a result, the Rural Grocery Initiative was developed to support the viability of rural grocery stores.

Rural grocery stores are an anchor business in rural communities. They are a primary source of jobs, contribute to the local tax base, and help attract and retain residents. Rural grocery stores serve as gathering spaces where community members can connect and bond. They also offer more healthy food options at lower cost than discount retailers and convenience stores. The loss of rural grocery stores threatens the health of local citizens and the very existence of rural communities.

Housed within K-State Research and Extension, the Rural Grocery Initiative (RGI) provides resources to help establish and sustain independently-owned rural grocery stores. RGI works to serve as the national source of evidence-based information for rural grocery questions, identify and respond to the significant challenges that rural grocery stores face, highlight and promote sustainable models of rural grocery operation, and strengthen access to healthy foods.

What We Do:
-Provide technical assistance to grocers and communities
-Host the biennial National Rural Grocery Summit
-Conduct research on rural grocery and food access issues
-Update the Rural Grocery Database
-Partner with organizations and institutions that support rural grocery stores and communities
-Serve as Food Access Organization for Kansas Healthy Food Initiative

https://www.k-state.edu/social

Name: Pra Organics
Description:
We all talk about organic farming, well here’s a farmer who has gone beyond organic to “natural farming”. An ecosystem that sustains within itself. We at PRAORGANICS are on a mission to reduce the use of chemicals and create a healthy & happy community. A farm has chicken, fish, and bees besides the produce of turmeric, ginger, spices, lemons, amla, etc.

Well here’s a living legend in Kangra district, retired Colonel PC Rana ( 76 years old ) better known as the “Turmeric man of Himachal” A para commando and a black belt in Kung Fu trained in Japan.

In addition, he has close to 1500 boxes of honey bees which not only do wonders at our farm in terms of boosting the produce but also are highly beneficial to the forest. Our farm is in a barren forest and he draws water from below specific trees, uses it in his farm, and gives it back to the trees. Our drip system and bees have made the forest green & full of birds and animals.

Over 1500 farmers have been attached to us.  Who buys the seeds from us we provide them with organic seeds and fertilizers & buy back the produce from them.

On our farm, we also have solar dryers and processing/packaging plants in the vicinity. He also pickles turmeric, ginger, lemon & garlic & every ingredient is off his farm. All his products are sold online by Gaurav International. Trust me if you consume once, you shall be hooked for the rest of your life. Gaurav International is using mainly packing materials that are not made of plastics or using packing recommended by the government. We use paper bags glass bottles and jars.

Name: Lifestyle Markets
Description:
Lifestyle Markets is a leading retailer of natural and organic products in Canada. Established in 1995, our mission is to provide our customers with the highest quality natural health products at competitive prices.

We are proud to offer a wide range of products that cater to all aspects of a healthy lifestyle, including organic produce, vitamins and supplements, natural body care products, and a vast selection of gluten-free and vegetarian options. Our team of knowledgeable staff is committed to providing exceptional customer service and expert advice to help our customers make informed choices about their health and wellness needs.

At Lifestyle Markets, we are dedicated to promoting sustainable and ethical business practices. We strive to source products that are made with natural and environmentally-friendly ingredients and materials, and we support local farmers and artisans whenever possible. We are also committed to reducing our environmental impact through responsible waste management and energy conservation measures.

We believe that everyone deserves access to healthy and sustainable products, which is why we offer affordable prices and regularly feature sales and promotions to make our products more accessible. Our commitment to providing exceptional customer service and high-quality products has earned us a loyal customer base, and we are proud to be a trusted source of natural health products in Canada.

Whether you are looking for a specific supplement or just want to live a healthier lifestyle, Lifestyle Markets has everything you need to support your journey to better health. Visit one of our three convenient locations in Victoria, British Columbia, or shop online to experience the Lifestyle Markets difference.

Name: Agricola Gloria Due SRL
Description:
L'azienda Agricola Gloria nasce a Montecatini Terme nel 1932 da una coppia di giovani sposi, Giulio e Gina Magrini che, nel periodo tra le due guerre mondiali, intraprese il commercio locale di prodotti ortofrutticoli. I figli della coppia, Arrigo e Franco, hanno poi mantenuto l'attività fino all'avvento della nuova generazione (Alessandra, Lazzaro, Giulio e Simone) ponendo così le basi per lo sviluppo di un'azienda che, pur mantenendo l'impronta familiare, è cresciuta e si è imposta sul mercato. 

Oggi rappresenta una realtà leader nel panorama del commercio ortofrutticolo italiano: non solo per la sua efficienza organizzativa, ma soprattutto, per la capacità di dare risposte adeguate ai propri clienti in un mercato ogni giorno più difficile ed esigente.

L'azienda distribuisce ortofrutta di prima scelta proveniente da varie zone d'Italia e del bacino del Mediterraneo e, per permettere la continuità stagionale nella fornitura, importa direttamente da Cile, Uruguay, Ecuador, Argentina, Brasile, Costa Rica, Sud Africa e Cina selezionando i fornitori migliori al fine di garantire l'alta qualità  dell'ortofrutta commercializzata.

Oltre a garantire la più ampia gamma e varietà di prodotti ortofrutticoli disponibili, Agricola Gloria è da sempre impegnata a conservarli con il solo ausilio del freddo, senza ricorrere ad alcun trattamento chimico di conservazione o maturazione accelerata, assicurando freschezza e genuinità; non a caso siamo, da 70 anni, la Gloria dell'ortofrutta.

Name: Growy and Tasty
Description:
Growy & Tasty vous invite à découvrir l’authenticité de la Grèce à travers une sélection soignée de produits issus de producteurs et artisans grecs.

Installés en Crète, nous travaillons au plus près du terrain, dans une relation directe et humaine avec ceux qui cultivent, transforment et créent. Chaque produit sélectionné est le fruit d’une rencontre, d’un échange, d’une dégustation. Nous connaissons nos producteurs, leurs pratiques, leurs engagements. Nous valorisons leur savoir-faire avec respect et transparence, loin des circuits industriels.

Notre objectif : vous offrir une expérience sincère et sensorielle autour des saveurs grecques — huiles d’olive vierge extra, olives en saumure, miels de thym ou de sapin, herbes sauvages, confitures artisanales, crèmes balsamiques, tapenades, et bien plus encore.

Nous soutenons les circuits courts, l’artisanat, les pratiques durables et les productions à échelle humaine. Notre sélection est pensée pour refléter la richesse du terroir grec, dans ce qu’il a de plus vrai, de plus simple, de plus vibrant.

Growy & Tasty n’est pas une vitrine délocalisée, mais une passerelle directe entre la Grèce et votre quotidien.

 Livraison dans le monde entier – pour que chacun puisse découvrir, savourer et partager l’essence de la Grèce, où qu’il se trouve.

Name: RENSA REFRIGERACION
Description:
LÍDERES EN SOLUCIONES DE REFRIGERACIÓN PARA EL RETAIL EN MÉXICO Y CENTROAMÉRICA.

Somos la empresa líder en el sector de la refrigeración comercial a nivel nacional. Ofrecemos soluciones de ingeniería en refrigeración, venta y suministro tanto de equipo como del material necesario para el correcto funcionamiento e instalación de cámaras de refrigeración.

Por más de 32 años de experiencia hemos guiado y acompañado a nuestros clientes a elegir el mejor producto y servicio conveniente para su negocio.

Name: fourTaste
Description:
Willkommen bei fourTaste - Ihrem Partner für hochwertige pflanzliche Lebensmittel!

Wir sind ein aufstrebendes Start-up mit Sitz in der malerischen Stadt Lübeck. Bei fourTaste dreht sich alles um Qualität und Geschmack in der Welt der veganen Lebensmittel.

Unser Hauptaugenmerk liegt auf Tempeh, einem pflanzlichen Produkt, das nicht nur lecker ist, sondern auch für seine gesundheitlichen Vorteile bekannt ist. Unsere einzigartige Fermentationstechnik ermöglicht es uns, Tempeh von herausragender Qualität herzustellen, der nicht nur reich an Nährstoffen ist, sondern auch mit seinem einzigartigen Geschmack überzeugt.

Unsere Gründer bringen umfangreiche Erfahrungen aus dem Gastronomiebereich mit. Diese Erfahrungen ermöglichen es uns, nah am Kunden zu agieren und die Bedürfnisse unserer Geschäftspartner zu verstehen. Wir wissen aus erster Hand, wie wichtig Qualität und Geschmack in der Welt der Lebensmittel sind, und wir bringen dieses Wissen in unsere Arbeit ein.

Was uns antreibt, ist unsere Leidenschaft für eine nachhaltige Zukunft. Wir sind fest davon überzeugt, dass vegane Ernährung nicht nur wertvoll für unseren Planeten ist, sondern auch köstlich sein kann. Unsere Motivation besteht darin, noch mehr Menschen für unsere Produkte zu begeistern und zu zeigen, dass gesunde Ernährung und kulinarischer Genuss Hand in Hand gehen können.

Unser Team steht mit Herz und Leidenschaft hinter unserer Mission. Wir sind bereit, die Extra-Meile zu gehen, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Kunden die besten pflanzlichen Lebensmittel erhalten und gleichzeitig einen Beitrag zum Schutz unseres Planeten leisten.

Folgen Sie uns auf LinkedIn, um auf dem Laufenden zu bleiben, und kontaktieren Sie uns, wenn Sie mehr über uns erfahren möchten. Wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Name: Metro Foods Trading Ltd
Description:
In October 1982, Metro Foods Ltd was established with its first hypermarket in Larnaca. The new and very modern at the time store with many innovations like computer systems at tills, electronic stock control and ordering system- the first in the Middle East- and upgraded equipment in all departments, became the stepping stone of our country’s supermarket development.

Throughout the years our course was marked by continuous upgrading with main focus on customer service, the development of a friendly human environment, the quality check on products and competing prices. To accomplish this, we leaned on our human resources of which we feel great pride as well as on the very good and honest relationships we built with our suppliers and the rest of our associates.

Our country’s entry in the EU has presented us a new challenge of upgrading in all fields in order to be able to compete with the European chains that are appearing in Cyprus. Installation of latest technology, modernisation of building facilities and equipment and constant training are the keys of our whole effort.

Our vision is:
	To be established as a supermarket chain that is characterised by quality, variety, excellent service and competing prices.
	To offer our customers a friendly, pleasant environment where shopping is pleasure.
	To respect our customers and to always apply “AT METRO PEOPLE COUNT ABOVE ALL”
	To maintain excellent cooperation with all our suppliers and associates.
	To be a helpful hand to the society that cares for the wellbeing of our county.

All this, and the experience has just started. Speak to our friendly staff for all your shopping needs, and swing by Karoo Kitchen to pick up some premium-quality meat for the braai. Name: Flip.kz
Description:
В далеком 2007 году мы решили, что совершать покупки онлайн должно быть легко и приятно. Все эти годы мы занимались любимым делом и совершенствовались — все как для себя. И на сегодняшний день наша компания стала одним из лидирующих интернет-магазинов в Казахстане, выполнившей более 10 000 000 заказов.


Мы не останавливаемся на достигнутом!

Наш ассортимент непрерывно растет. Это значит, что у нас еще больше качественных, интересных и полезных товаров!
Наши первые клиенты помнят нас как неутомимых книгоманов, но сегодня мы готовы удивить каждого! Хозяйки порадуются товарам, которые значительно облегчат жизнь: посуда, бытовая техника, постельное белье и еще много всего. Для дачников большой ассортимент семян и инструментов для участка. Кто ж не любит модные гаджеты? Смартфоны, фитнес-браслеты, беспроводные наушники и это далеко не все. А еще мы за здоровый образ жизни! Вы легко найдете у нас спорттовары от скакалки до спортивной одежды мировых брендов. Собираетесь делать ремонт? мы и тут вам поможем! Фотообои, лампочки, инструменты и многое другое. Модницы, да и просто все те, кто следит за собой, оценят большой выбор декоративной и уходовой косметики, модных аксессуаров, ювелирных украшений. Вы любите своего домашнего питомца? Порадуйте своего хвостатого или пернатого друга обновками. Ну и конечно, мы не можем обделить вниманием детей! Огромный выбор игрушек просто не оставит их равнодушными!


Мы предлагаем не только ассортимент, но и качество обслуживания!

• курьерская, а также более 100 пунктов выдачи по всему Казахстану;

• оплата при получении;

• регулярные акции и скидки.

Мы искренне преданы своему делу, мы профессиональны, ответственны и полны амбициозных планов и все это мы предлагаем Вам — нашим клиентам!

Name: Mombach Supermercados
Description: Com mais de 60 anos, o Mombach é referência na cidade de Montenegro-RS, buscando garantir a melhor experiência de compras para seus clientes, com produtos de qualidade, e colaboradores capacitados.

Name: Il Sole e la Terra societa' cooperativa - prodotti biologici srl
Description:
Il Sole e la Terra è una cooperativa che opera dal 1979 allo scopo di offrire ai suoi soci gli strumenti per trovare risposte ai diversi regimi alimentari, selezionando prodotti salubri, rispettosi di madre terra e al giusto prezzo per il produttore e per il consumatore. Da allora sempre lavoriamo per la partecipazione, il mutualismo e la solidarietà, promuovendo un consumo responsabile.
Oggi il Sole e la Terra ha l’assortimento di un punto vendita di medie dimensioni con oltre 6000 referenze esclusivamente di prodotti biologici.
La Cooperativa Il Sole e la Terra è orgogliosa dei suoi oltre 165 fornitori.
Preferiamo i produttori diretti, selezionati nel corso degli anni grazie all'incontro con uomini e donne appassionati della madre terra, che ci offrono il frutto del loro lavoro e che ringraziamo per la qualità e unicità dei loro prodotti!
Per noi è importante conoscere personalmente le persone e le realtà produttive: organizziamo con la Commissione Qualità incontri con i produttori e visite periodiche presso le Aziende agricole.

Name: Annagram - Epicerie éco-responsable au Mans

Notre mission, vous proposez des produits fabriqués au plus proche du Mans et issus de l'agriculture biologique, tout en réduisant vos déchets grâce au vrac.
Location: Le Mans, Pays de la Loire

Ela nasceu em Outubro de 2010 e iniciou sua operação comercial em Março de 2011, foi estruturada para prestar os serviços que diferenciam as lojas em sua zona de influência. Além disso, trabalha com foco em desenvolvimento e crescimento sustentável e possui um projeto de crescimento que vem se solidificando ano a ano.

Name: Super U Olemps / Onet le Château
Description:
Nous sommes heureux de vous recevoir dans nos deux magasins : Super U Olemps et Super U Onet le Château.

A travers cette page, nous voulons montrer l’aspect humain et social des deux Super U. Nous souhaitons mettre en avant les différentes expériences et évolutions de nos collaborateurs. 
Grâce à nos équipes dynamiques et dotées d’un bon esprit d’équipe, nous accompagnons chaque collaborateur à être autonome, responsable et à développer leurs projets professionnels.

Name: PITÉU TRANSMONTANO
Description: Bem vindos ao mundo gourmet do Pitéu Transmontano! Descubra os autênticos produtos transmontanos no coração do seu bairro.

Name: United Grocers Inc. (UGI)
Description:
Originally incorporated as United Wholesale Grocers Ltd. in 1972 by a western Canadian based group of independent retailers and wholesalers who were looking to combine their buying so they could better compete with the large grocery chains.

Today, United Grocers Inc. is a National Procurement Organization wholly owned by its members representing a group of key retailers and wholesalers across multiple channels and formats with over 5500 retail locations nationally.

The strong partnership built between the UGI members and the suppliers has been a key success factor that continues to deliver benefits day after day.

Under its new mission, UGI is looking to create new partnerships with suppliers of all business areas, all fresh departments and suppliers of other store operation services.

Name: ZITO dooel
Description:
"Zito" has been successfully operating on the Macedonian market for more than 25 years.

The story begins in the nineties when the owner Jovanche Gjoshevski decided to open his first supermarket in Veles. Since then, with a lot of effort, energy, denials and a desire to succeed, we have managed to open 50 supermarkets on different locations in Macedonia.

Name: Horizon Sales Brokerage
Description: Horizon Sales, a Service Deli broker, was founded by Jack Taylor in 1982, back before service delis were an integral part of the southern California landscape. The focus on such a small segment proved to be successful. As west coast retailers began growing and building delis, Horizon Sales developed to become one of the top premier perishable brokers.  Currently in Southern California, Horizon’s business is about 65 percent service deli, packaged deli and dairy; 20 percent service bakery; and the remainder is service meat, seafood and produce. Horizon is now a total perimeter of the store broker.  When it became evident with the changing marketplace and the consolidation of many retailers that Horizon could and should regionalize the business, Horizon decided to expand outside of Southern California. About ten years ago Horizon branched into Northern California with the purchase of a small specialty grocery company. The company was renamed Horizon Specialties and over the last decade the business has changed from 100 percent specialty grocery to 65 to 70 percent perishable.  In 2007 Horizon branched out into Arizona to serve the Arizona/New Mexico marketplace.  The next markets for Horizon were the Pacific Northwest and Denver, Colo. In these markets, Horizon formed alliances with Willis Marketing Inc. in the Pacific Northwest and United Sales & Services in Denver. Its venture with Willis Marketing has yielded a new company, Horizon Northwest LLC, which represents lines that are regionalized for the West.  Horizon has also opened a Utah operation; expanded the operations in Arizona; and formed an alliance with Rainbow Sales & Marketing brokerage in Hawaii. These changes give Principals a single point of contact in the Western U.S. Horizon handles all the order processing, promotions, deductions and all the financials associated with an account through the Southern California operations team.

Dank unserer Partnerschaft mit REWE haben wir fast 5.700 Rückgabeorte – ob über den Pfandautomaten oder direkt an der Kasse. So wird das Zurückgeben von Verpackungen kinderleicht und für alle zugänglich. 

 Die wiederverwendbaren EINFACH MEHRWEG Verpackungen sind nicht nur gut für die Umwelt, sondern auch super einfach zu handhaben. Dank cleverem Tracking und einer einfachen Integration in bestehende Systeme bringen wir Mehrweg ganz selbstverständlich in den Alltag.

Wir glauben an eine Zukunft, in der Mehrweg die Norm ist – und das auf einfache, unkomplizierte Weise!

En 1970 con la gestión de Alcides Kilgelmann, su hijo menor, se inauguró el primer autoservicio KILBEL, nombre que surgió de la unión de las tres primeras letras del apellido de los fundadores.
En 1995 se inicia una nueva etapa con la participación de su esposa, Mónica V. Savino, y luego con la incorporación de sus hijos Juan Francisco y Maximiliano Kilgelmann.
Hoy contamos con diez sucursales y más de 350 colaboradores quienes trabajamos como hace 75 años, para crear un vínculo de confianza, comprometidos con el desarrollo y bienestar de nuestra comunidad.

Name: Super Fresh Market
Description:
Super Fresh, es la nueva propuesta de supermercado que desde el mes pasado funciona en la Avenida Tiradentes de esta capital. La empresa en palabras de su propietario es una extensión de supermercado tradicional donde el consumidor encontrará opciones que no están disponibles en otros establecimientos.

Antonio Handal, ideólogo de esta nueva propuesta, en una entrevista con DL explicó que el comercio viene a darle la oportunidad al cliente de recrear en sus casas los platos que podría consumir en un restaurante, proporcionándole ingredientes específicos de calidad. “Súper Fresh es una mezcla de mundos”, dijo. “En el local se combina la típica lista de supermercado con el Show Cooking”, esto porqué el negocio cuenta además con un espacio donde el consumidor puede ver el proceso de elaboración de platos y disfrutar de los productos que tiene el supermercado sin tener que prepararlos.

Según el empresario el enfoque de la tienda es la experiencia del consumidor. “Cuando el cliente entra a la tienda por primera vez la sensación que tiene que tener es que no es un supermercado normal”, continuó. Para esto resaltó que cuentan con el conocimiento de un chef que le permite mezclar el mundo de supermercado con el mundo de la gastronomía.

Name: Tesdorpf GmbH
Description:
Weinhandel Tesdorpf

Feinste Weine schaffen Genuss und inspirieren, die schönen Seiten des Lebens auszukosten. Die Weinhandlung Tesdorpf bietet ein sorgfältig kuratiertes Sortiment von mehr als 3500 Weinen aus aller Welt an. Zu finden sind alle Weine, Informationen, Verkostungsnotizen und Bewertungen auf tesdorpf.de. Zweimal im Jahr erscheint ein Katalog, unser Kompendium der feinen Weine der Welt.
Tesdorpf wurde 1678 gegründet und ist bis heute am Markt präsent. Die Historie ermöglicht dem Weinhandel Tesdorpf gefragte Raritäten und gereifte Jahrgänge anbieten zu können. Darüber hinaus sind die über Jahre gewachsenen Kontakte in die Weinwelt der Schlüssel zu perfekt gelagerten Weinen aus den Schatzkammern der Weingüter dieser Welt.
Das Haus Tesdorpf legt Wert auf eine starke persönliche Beratung, um die mitunter komplexe Weinwelt zu beleuchten. Gerne teilen wir unsere Freude am Wein und unsere Leidenschaft mit Ihnen. 
Das Tesdorpf Fine Wine Programm ermöglicht Ihnen eine erfolgreiche Investition in Spitzengewächse, die im Laufe der Zeit an Reife und an Wert gewinnen. Als Experten für die feinen Weine der Welt haben wir den Markt für gereifte Spitzenweine im Blick und können zuverlässig und transparent den aktuellen, marktgerechten Wert Ihrer Weine bestimmen.
Für Kunden aus der Gastronomie und Hotellerie stehen exzellent ausgebildete Mitarbeiter, beratend für jegliche Bedürfnisse rund um die Weine der Welt zur Verfügung. Ein zusätzliches Team bei Tesdorpf kümmert sich speziell um die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden aus der Gastronomie und Hotellerie.

Name: Central Supermercado
Description:
Da nossa família para sua família!
Marcelo Rodrigues, alhandrense, de família humilde e empreendedor, Marcelo Rodrigues trabalha com agricultura e nas feiras livres da região, decidiu investir em um supermercado que fugisse do tradicional ‘feijão com arroz’ e oferecesse aos clientes um atendimento personalizado, com preço justo e um ambiente harmonioso, foi assim que surgiu o Central Supermercado. 
Com um modelo de gestão inovador, o Central Supermercado conseguiu conquistou os clientes e se tornou o líder em vendas na região. Realizando entregas, que até então era novidade na região, o Central Supermercado estreitou laços de amizade entre os clientes e colaboradores, formando uma família. 
Show de prêmios, sorteios, descontos especiais, dias de compras dedicados a produtos do açougue e hortifrúti, tudo que o Central Supermercado inova é referência na região. 
Sem esquecer a gratidão a Deus, o Central Supermercado promove um culto de ações de graças em praça pública no mês de março de cada ano, comemorando a sua fundação.
Em 2018 o Central Supermercado surpreendeu o mercado local abrindo uma filial no distrito de Cupissura, na cidade de Caaporã. Beneficiando mais de 5 mil famílias, a unidade de Cupissura ofereceu um ambiente agradável para compras com economia em um distrito até então, desassistido de um supermercado a altura. 
Mas o crescimento não parou por aí. Em 2019 foi a vez da cidade de Caaporã ganhar sua unidade do Central Supermercado. Com uma mega estrutura, ambiente impecável, e uma gama de serviços agregados como, padaria, Banco 24Horas e Bradesco Express, o Central Supermercado de Caaporã é ponto de parada para os que querem economizar e ganhar tempo nas suas atividades do dia a dia.
Hoje, o Grupo Central Supermercado beneficia diretamente mais de 20 mil famílias em todo litoral sul paraibano, além de empregar mais de 120 colaboradores que fazem do Central Supermercado a sua segunda família. 
E não vamos parar por aí… Queremos estar mais perto de você.

Name: Breizh Odyssée Boutique
Description:
Breizh Odyssée Boutique, Le Meilleur de la Bretagne.

Breizh Odyssée, situé à Landévennec, est un centre d'interprétation culturel qui se consacre à explorer, découvrir et partager la culture, le patrimoine et l'histoire bretonne.

Depuis plusieurs mois, nous avons le privilège de vous plonger au cœur de la Bretagne, de vous faire voyager à travers ses légendes, ses périodes historiques marquantes et son univers contemporain dynamique. Nous avons accueilli des visiteurs passionnés, curieux, et amoureux de cette région emblématique, et nous sommes ravis de continuer à le faire.

Et devinez quoi ? Notre aventure se poursuit avec l'ouverture de notre toute nouvelle boutique en ligne ! 

Vous trouverez le meilleur de la Bretagne, soigneusement sélectionné pour vous. De coffrets cadeaux inédits, des produits artisanaux uniques, des délices culinaires, en passant par une cave exceptionnelle de whisky IGP Bretagne.... des trésors bretons.

Que vous soyez un particulier à la recherche du cadeau breton parfait, une entreprise souhaitant surprendre son équipe et ses clients, ou un comité d'entreprise planifiant des cadeaux originaux, notre boutique est là pour vous servir.
Nous proposons des options de personnalisation pour que chaque cadeau reflète votre intention. Notre équipe dévouée est prête à vous accompagner dans la sélection des cadeaux les plus adaptés à vos besoins.

Chez Breizh Odyssée, chaque présent raconte une histoire, et c'est notre engagement de vous aider à créer des moments mémorables grâce à notre expertise en produits bretons.

Name: AMACOR Capital Limited
Description:
AN INTRODUCTION TO AMACOR
AMACOR Capital’s strategy for growth is focused upon the clear consolidation opportunities that exist in the convenience sector of retail. Multi-million pound backing has been secured for AMACOR by JKA Investments ltd, the Amphlett family’s Isle of Man based Investment Company. Chairman, Kevin Amphlett, is wholly committed to funding what he recognises as an opportunity with parallels to his previous insurance business.

VISION FOR GROWTH
AMACOR’s plans for expansion are ambitious, with a minimum target of a new store being acquired or opened every month. Our financial goals are to deliver a rolling EBITDA of £5m based upon turnover of CIRCA £60m by the financial year 2023/24.

TARGET MARKET
The firm are seeking to acquire independent retail convenience stores with turnover (excluding services) of at least £25,000 per week, particularly where there are prospects for an upside in profits post acquisition. Larger stores or groups of stores are also being actively sought. Average turnover per store is forecast at £20,000 per week.
 
A STRAIGHTFORWARD APPROACH
AMACOR understand that many of the vendors in this market are running lifestyle businesses, it’s their first time selling a company and they are, as a result, naturally anxious regarding the sales process. This market, therefore, dictates an upfront, honest and speedy approach to the acquisition procedure. With this in mind, heads of terms are drafted at outset detailing the key points of the sale, making the path to completion clear for all parties.

Name: Meridian Farm Market
Description:
Good food brings a family together…we’ve proved that.

It all started with my Dad, Darrell, who came from a long line of butchers and was a master at his trade by a young age. He managed the meat department of a local grocery store when I was growing up where I used to help him on Saturdays, cleaning up around the shop and putting fresh sawdust on the floors as was done in those days. Dad had a vision, to open a neighbourhood butcher shop that offered old fashion style service. The vision became reality in October of 1989 when our family opened the doors of Meridian Meats & Seafood, our first store in Port Coquitlam.

Over 20 years later, our business has grown and our family has grown along with it – we now have stores in Port Coquitlam, Maple Ridge, Langley and White Rock, all of them family owned and operated. We still hold true to the values and principles that made that first shop a success. Years ago we began dreaming about opening a fresh food market.  Along with our meats & seafood… we wanted to incorporate fresh fruits and vegetables, fresh baked breads and deli choices, dairy and some specialty groceries.  We wanted to build a community meeting place where people would shop daily, getting the freshest possible food.

In March of 2013, the dream became a reality when we opened the doors to Meridian Farm Market in Tsawwassen, BC.  A shopping experience that combines the market fresh ambiance of Granville Island with the family business charm of a Keremeos road side fruit stand.  We focus on fresh, local, natural foods.


We’re focused on giving you, our customers, friendly exceptional service and quality products that we are happy to serve at our family table. Our ambition is to provide you with a fresh high-quality selection of meats, seafood and delicacies you won’t find anywhere else. We specialize in fresh free range and conventional meats, sustainable Ocean Wise seafood and prepared oven and BBQ ready entrees.

Name: Hearty Mart
Description:
Hearty Mart is the leading name in HoReCa supplies in India, catering to more than 1500+ hotels. We are eager to spread our business across the globe and make a mark of quality with our privet label spices such as GOOD TIME, Zareef, & Chef Ki Pasand.

HeartyMart is also a supermarket chain with 15 stores across Gujarat. HeartyMart supermarket's franchise model has got covered and praised by acclaimed magazines like Forbes, fortune, The economic times, new Indian express, Hindu business line, CNBC, NDTV, and many more. The case study of HeartyMart is being taught and studied in many B-schools, Including IIM-A. 

Apart from its grocery business HeartyMart has also diversified its business into other sectors of the Food Industry and successfully created and founded more than Nine micro-enterprises. HeartyMart created multiple micro-entrepreneurs and enterprises to develop the spirit of entrepreneurship before the word entrepreneurship was Cool.

Contact us for any collaboration or business ideas.

Name: Ernst Knam
Description:
Ernst Knam, classe 1963, tedesco di nascita e milanese d’adozione, dopo numerosi anni passati nelle cucine dei più grandi ristoranti stellati e di prestigio del mondo, arriva in Italia ed entra nella cucina di Gualtiero Marchesi come Maestro Pasticcere, ultimo passo di formazione prima di aprire la sua attività imprenditoriale.

Nel 1992 apre infatti la sua ormai storica pasticceria in via Anfossi 10 a Milano, luogo  caratterizzato da ricercatezza e abbinamenti fuori dal comune con creazioni che seguono la stagionalità degli alimenti e le sue interpretazioni di cioccolato, spezie e frutta rendendo la sua arte inconfondibile.

Dal 2012 inoltre Knam è entrato a far parte della famiglia di Discovery Italia, diventando un noto e amato personaggio televisivo conosciuto come “Il Re del Cioccolato” titolo dell’omonimo programma che lo vede protagonista, giunto alla sua terza edizione. A partire dal 2013 è giudice di un altro programma di Real Time: “Bake Off Italia”, che è arrivato nel 2022 alla sua decima edizione.
Dal 2021, insieme a sua moglie Frau Knam, è entrato a far parte della grande famiglia della RAI, all'interno del programma I Fatti Vostri, presentando una rubrica dal nome 'La Dolceria'.

Name: CIAO International Limited (Best Mart 360°)
Description: 優品360º 成立於2013年，至今已在香港、澳門及內地各優越的購物地段開設超過130間分店。我們以「優質」、「優價」為宗旨，堅持環球採購的理念，務求為顧客提供更多元化的選擇及更舒適的購物體驗。於店內設有多個產品區域，包括朱古力及糖果，堅果及乾果，飲品及酒類，糧油雜貨等，部分店舖更增設急凍及冷藏食品。

Name: Micromarket24 GmbH
Description:
Micromarkets können bestehende Vending-Programme (Verkaufsautomaten) ersetzen oder als ergänzende Option zu Ihrer Kantine fungieren. 

Micromarket bieten den Benutzern ein Shop-in-Shop-Gefühl. Sie bringen ein neues Maß an Auswahl, Service und Zufriedenheit in Ihren Pausenraum und Arbeitscampus. 

Im Kern ist ein Mikromarket ein Selbstbedienungskiosk, an dem man frische Lebensmittel, Snacks und Getränke kaufen kann.

Schlicht und einfach ausgedrückt: eine Verpflegungslösung der nächsten Generation.

Es ist eine neue, bessere Art zu essen, zu trinken und zu snacken – zu jeder Tageszeit 24/7

Name: Gus's Community Market
Description:
We believe that markets are a gathering place for the community, space to both foster and nurture relationships that extend for generations. For over 30 years, our family has served San Francisco with the utmost commitment to offer quality goods, champion local purveyors, advocate for environmental
stewardship, and create a workplace for our staff to grow and prosper. We are ever-evolving yet do not lose sight of our core values created by our father and grandfather, and remain mindful of the character of a neighborhood market. We strive to provide a diverse selection of goods satisfying every palate and price point. We take pride in personally knowing many of our vendors having worked with them for decades. We respect our employees and offer them sustainable livelihoods. We support our community by participating in fundraising efforts such as the Scrip school program. We cultivate, support, and strive for integrity in everything we do – from picking the most pristine peach from the early morning markets to handing a lollipop to a kid waiting for mom.

Name: OLIVETUM COLINA
Description:
Give yourself an unforgettable present and book some unique days in our charming and stylish Olivetum Colina Guesthouse in the heart of Andalusia. A large variety of offers/activities are waiting for you to take advantage of.   

Our intimate and charming guesthouse is the perfect place to unwind and relax. Allow yourself to be pampered by our excellent and professional service.

Our property is wonderfully situated on top of a hill surrounded by its own olive grove. With breathtaking views of the ancient town Montoro, right in the heart of Andalusia, it is a truly magical spot. Perfect for unwinding but yet ideally located for days trips and other activities.

Name: Gebrüder Otto Gourmet GmbH
Description:
OTTO GOURMET ist ein Spezialitätenversand mit dem Schwerpunkt exklusives Fleisch und wurde 2005 von den Brüdern Stephan, Michael und Wolfgang Otto gegründet. Stephan Otto arbeitete damals als Unternehmensberater in den USA. Während eines Grillabends bei Geschäftsfreunden probierte er erstmals ein Wagyu-Steak, das er zuvor über das Internet bestellt hatte – und war schlicht und ergreifend begeistert.

Die Zartheit und der besondere Geschmack des Fleischstückes haben ihn dazu bewogen, umgehend seinen Bruder Wolfgang in Deutschland anzurufen. Er erzählte ihm von dem soeben Erlebten und seiner Vision, dieses besondere Fleisch nach Deutschland zu exportieren. Wolfgang Otto, zu diesem Zeitpunkt verantwortlich für das Handelsmarketing eines Food-Unternehmens, sagte sofort zu. 

Zusammen mit dem dritten Bruder im Bunde Michael, einem diplomierten Luft- und Raumfahrtingenieur, starteten sie ihr kleines Unternehmen aus der obligatorischen Garage, die allerdings im rheinländischen Heinsberg lag und nicht im sonnigen Kalifornien. Dies tat dem Erfolg der drei Brüder jedoch keinen Abbruch. Ganz im Gegenteil: Was als nebenberufliches Projekt aus der Leidenschaft für gutes Fleisch heraus entstand, hat sich seitdem zu einem der renommiertesten Unternehmen für das sensible Lebensmittel entwickelt. 

Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.otto-gourmet.de/datenschutz
Impressum: https://www.otto-gourmet.de/impressum

Notre hypermarché est implanté à Concarneau depuis 1969 et se distingue aujourd'hui par les moyens consacrés à optimiser la satisfaction de ses clients et de ses plus de 320 collaborateurs. 
Animé dans un esprit de PME familiale, chaque collaborateur bénéficie d’une grande autonomie.
Faire partie de l'enseigne E.LECLERC, c'est intégrer un membre d'une coopérative dynamique, en croissance et qui se démarque autant par son mode de fonctionnement et sa capacité à innover et à bouleverser les idées reçues.

Imaginez votre avenir au sein d’une entreprise tournée vers l'humain et rejoignez notre équipe de professionnels.

Name: Union des Maisons
Description:
Nous avons voulu créer la première Union des Maisons qui réunit des commerces de bouche de qualité. Chaque Maison est indépendante car nous croyons en la singularité des produits, des lieux et des Hommes. 
La diversité des territoires, des personnalités et des expériences fait venir et revenir. 
Chez nous, rien ne se ressemble mais la qualité, l’exigence sur le choix des ingrédients et nos valeurs nous rassemblent. 
Nous sommes une union d’artisans passionnés, tous unis par nos métiers et par la liberté de créer des produits de qualité, à notre image, tous uniques.

Nos valeurs :

Pluralité : 
des territoires, des produits, des idées. 
Le pluriel donne l’envie de découvrir la prochaine Maison.
La pluralité provoque la curiosité des  Maisons membres de l'Union.

Transmission de la passion : 
La transmission du métier artisanal à travers l’apprentissage est essentielle. 
La passion du métier nourrit l’entraide et la transmission de notre savoir-faire.

Sincérité : 
La sincérité dans le goût, dans la création d’un produit brut sans artifice. De pains et de pâtisseries maison, viandes et fromages locaux. 
La sincérité convainc et fait revenir nos clients.

Name: Peraga Garden Center
Description:
Peraga Garden Center  è una filosofia di vita, una logica di vendita, una ricerca di emozioni sul filo della natura, della sostenibilità, del benessere, della vita informale di campagna. La gestione dinamica e aperta al nuovo, sul modello dei più grandi e forniti garden center del Nord Europa, ha reso unica la formula del nostro garden center che, a trentasei anni dall’esordio, oggi conta oltre 12.000 metri quadrati di esposizione con più di 70.000 articoli in vendita. 

L’alchimia vincente risiede in una formula semplice: ogni richiesta della clientela ha diritto di venire esaudita, soprattutto se è un desiderio che va nella direzione della vivibilità, della bellezza e della compatibilità con la natura, della serenità e dell’innovazione.
Attorno al nucleo principale di piante e fiori, prodotti per il giardinaggio e oggettistica per il fai da te, sono perciò cresciuti nel tempo nuovi reparti e sono stati messi a disposizione della clientela nuovi servizi.
Ultimi in ordine di tempo: la Biobottega, supermercato di alimentari biologici, il ristorante Bioristò  annesso al garden center e le strutture del progetto  Peraga Junior dedicato espressamente ai bambini e alla loro formazione di giardinieri in erba attraverso la scoperta della natura, la manualità e il gioco.

Name: Supermercado Castanha
Description:
Descendentes de imigrantes italianos, instalados na região rural de campinas, SR Walter Castanha vivia da agricultura e do manejo com gado de leite, mas o desafio de novos horizontes o conduziu à grande metrópole, junto com sua esposa Dona Helena, e nas feiras-livres encontraram o embrião do que seria o futuro de suas vidas, o comercio. O bairro, Vila dos Remédios, estava crescendo e uma placa de "vende-se", num terreno, do outro lado da praça, formou uma combinação perfeita para o nascimento do maior comércio de toda a região.  Assim, no dia 5 de junho do ano de 1971 materializava-se um sonho imaginado com um ideal realizado, surgia o Supermercado Castanha. 
Com muito trabalho e dedicação seus filhos Shirlei e Walter Castanha Filho assumiram juntos o desafio de motivar e liderar com respeito, todos seus funcionários e clientes. 
Desde o início a preocupação sempre se pautou em atender aos clientes, praticara preços compatíveis e oferecer produtos de ótima qualidade, padrão que se firmou ao longo de sua existência.
E do alto dos seus mais de cinquenta anos de vida, a família Castanha se orgulha verdadeiramente de ter nascido e crescido junto com a Vila dos Remédios, pois os faz parte da história da vida de muitas pessoas da região, que hoje levam até a quarta geração para as compras no Supermercado mais querido de todo o bairro.

We know that munching on nuts and dry fruits can be plain and boring. But what if we make the same nuts and dry fruits flavourful? This is what we do - make healthy tasty! At Grocery Farm, we take pride in being one of the most premium yet affordable brand, dealing in the dry fruit and nut business.

Grocery Farm brings the best quality nuts from around the world to your doorstep. Our products are sourced directly from their origin in India, Chile, Afghanistan, Africa, and the US. In the end, we want to nourish you with the scrummiest and healthiest bites.

Exklusivität, Qualität und eine Leidenschaft für besondere Geschmackserlebnisse. Als Partner und Lieferant für die anspruchsvollsten kulinarischen Geniesser verstehen wir uns als Brücke zwischen traditionellen Delikatessen und modernen Gourmet-Trends.

Name: Criollo Chocolatier Toulouse
Description:
Créée en 2002, Criollo Chocolatier est une entreprise familiale et artisanale basée à Toulouse. Forte de son succès, la société compte à ce jour trois points de vente. 
Porté par l’amour de la cuisine et du goût que sa grand-mère a su lui transmettre, Jean-Pierre, créateur de Criollo Chocolatier s’est lancé dans l’aventure, accompagné et soutenu par sa maman. De rencontres en rencontres, la famille s’est agrandie ; chocolatiers et chocolatières, artistes, partenaires, experts en cacao, vendeurs et vendeuses, ce sont toutes ces relations de confiance qui ont permis de construire notre vision du chocolat.
Criollo Chocolatier, c’est aussi la recherche constante de l’EXCELLENCE, de la qualité et du raffinement et l’amour du travail bien fait. 
Nous réalisons deux cartes des saveurs par an avec l’élaboration de nouvelles créations. Le cacao est un produit noble et précieux que nous avons à cœur de sublimer en sélectionnant les meilleurs crus. De la même manière, nous travaillons avec élégance toute la gamme de nos autres produits.
Avec les recettes d’hier et les chocolatiers d’aujourd’hui, CRIOLLO CHOCOLATIER prépare les chocolats du monde de demain. 
Chez CRIOLLO CHOCOLATIER, notre vision est la suivante : Chacun apporte ses souvenirs, sa culture et tout est mis en commun, au service de l’innovation. 
Chez CRIOLLO CHOCOLATIER, la priorité est de faire monter en compétences nos collaborateurs avec des formations métiers et transverses car leur adaptabilité fait notre force. 
Homme ou femme, ouvrier ou agent de maitrise, plongeur, vendeur ou responsable, nous formons toutes et tous une seule et même équipe. Chez CRIOLLO CHOCOLATIER, on est libre d’égo !
Nous avançons tous dans un but commun : l’entreprise doit toujours être portée par la création, l’innovation, l’anticipation afin de pouvoir être la plus adaptable possible au monde qui ne cesse de changer et de changer et de pouvoir continuer à offrir du plaisir et l’excellence à nos clients.
