Name: Le Due Sicilie srl | Master Franchising Coop Alleanza 3.0
Description:
Le Due Sicilie Srl nasce nel 2020 per volontà di un gruppo di imprenditori Campani e di un imprenditore Pugliese tutti già operanti con successo nella grande distribuzione organizzata con reti di proprietà e in affiliazione. 

L'obiettivo comune è quello di avviare il progetto di Sviluppo dell’insegna Coop in Campania, con la formula del Master Franchising proposta da Coop Alleanza 3.0,  attraverso sviluppo diretto con nuove aperture di proprietà ed acquisizioni ed indiretto tramite affiliazione di imprenditori locali che sposano il progetto commerciale e valoriale di Coop.

Ad oggi il gruppo conta 35 punti vendita ad insegna Coop nelle province di Napoli, Salerno e Caserta, serviti dal Centro di Distribuzione di Carinaro (CE) di 14.000mq e dal mese di Luglio 2022 anche dalla Piattaforma Freschi ed Ortofrutta di Caserta (2.500mq). Il service logistico viene inoltre attualmente supportato dal Centro di Distribuzione di Tatò Paride spa (socio pugliese del gruppo) già Master Franchising Coop Alleanza 3.0 in Puglia e Basilicata. 

Affiliarsi a LDS Coop Master Alleanza 3.0 significa condividere i tre pilastri su cui si fonda il nostro successo:
 - ATTENZIONE ALLA CONVENIENZA che per noi significa offrire un prezzo giusto garantendo qualità
 - TUTELA DEL CONSUMATORE mediante controlli accurati dei prodotti, rintracciabilità delle filiere, selezione accurata dei fornitori, trasparenza delle etichette
- RISPETTO della COMUNITA' che si riflette nell'impegno costante di Coop verso l'ambiente, il lavoro, la società
 
Quali sono i benefici per l'Affiliato:
- ESPERIENZA di un'azienda leader nel settore della grande distribuzione
- IDENTITA' E USO DELL'INSEGNA COOP
- PRODOTTI COOP per fidelizzare la propria clientela con uno dei prodotti a marchio più apprezzati 
- SUPPORTO COMMERCIALE 
- ASSISTENZA ALLO SVILUPPO
- COMUNICAZIONE E PROMOZIONE con un efficace Piano di lancio e piani promozionali e mediatici ricchi e dinamici con tanta TV Nazionale.
- PREZZI DI VENDITA competitivi

Name: Albert Heijn Lindeman
Description:
Het familiebedrijf Lindeman (sinds 1869) wordt inmiddels gerund door de 5e generatie. Ooit begonnen als aardappelhandel in de Hazenstraat op de hoek van de Elandsgracht, is het inmiddels een franchise Albert Heijn maar iedereen in de buurt, zelfs ‘ de nieuwkomers’ hebben het nog steeds of meteen al over Lindeman, hoe kan dat? Met andere woorden: Wat is het geheim van Lindeman?

Mary Lindeman die samen met de Supermarktmanager de winkel op de Elandsgracht runt, weet daar wel een antwoord op: een persoonlijke touch, en met passie je werk doen. Toen de vader en oom van Mary nog het bewind voerden, deden zij alles zelf, van de waren ophalen bij de toeleveranciers, tot het berekenen van de prijzen en het vervaardigen van de prijskaartjes. Dat betekende lange dagen en nooit vakantie. En toen Mary zo´n veertig jaar geleden fulltime bij het bedrijf ging werken, wilde zij het assortiment uitbreiden. Zij wilde ook wel eens broccoli in plaats van bloemkool in het assortiment en allerlei nieuwe soorten sla. De eetgewoontes veranderden, van aardappelen vlees en groente gingen steeds meer mensen Italiaans, Spaans, Turks etc. eten, dus moest het assortiment worden aangepast en uitgebreid met pasta en rijst en alles wat daar nog meer toe behoorde. Dat betekende steeds meer toeleveranciers en dat was op den duur niet meer te doen. Toen de 5e generatie het over nam wilden zij dit niet meer; het is ook niet meer van deze tijd. Daarom werd in 2000 het toen 130 jaar oude familiebedrijf een franchise Albert Heijn.

Albert Heijn is dan de helpende hand omdat alles in een keer wordt aangeleverd, maar er blijft nog genoeg te doen. De winkels zijn waar mogelijk 7 dagen per week van 08.00-22.00 uur open en dat betekent dat alles wat er gedaan moet worden tijdens de opening gebeurt en dat vraagt om discipline, “want alles wat je te laat doet haal je de hele dag niet meer in”. Wat het voor Mary leuk maakt zijn de contacten met vaste klanten, waarvan ze er velen al heel lang en bij naam kent.

Name: Grupo Linke
Description:
O Grupo Linke Supermercados é resultado de uma trajetória construída com trabalho, união e espírito empreendedor. A história começou em 1963, em Cruz Alta (RS), quando a família Linke iniciou a distribuição de bananas de forma simples, utilizando um depósito emprestado e charretes para as entregas. Em 1966, surgiu a Fruteira Linke, marco inicial do negócio varejista da família.

A sociedade entre os irmãos Walmir, Darci e Wanderlei Linke foi oficializada em 1971, consolidando a atuação no segmento de hortifruti e fortalecendo a base administrativa e operacional da empresa, sempre com o apoio de outros familiares. Em 1975, o investimento em infraestrutura moderna para amadurecimento climatizado de bananas impulsionou significativamente o crescimento na cidade e região.

Em 1984, após 19 anos de fruteira, foi inaugurado o primeiro supermercado, o Linke da Barão, que se tornou a loja matriz do grupo. A partir da entrada na Rede Super Sul, em 1997, os planos de expansão ganharam força. Em 2002, foi inaugurada a primeira filial, na rua Cândido Machado, superando desafios estruturais e geográficos com o apoio de colaboradores, fornecedores e clientes.

A expansão continuou com a inauguração da loja da Vila Nova em 2007 e constantes investimentos em ampliações e modernização das unidades, tornando-as referências em estrutura, inovação e experiência de compra. Em 2019, o grupo deu mais um passo estratégico com a inauguração do atacarejo Komprão Mais, o primeiro da cidade, reforçando o compromisso com preços competitivos e acesso facilitado.

Hoje, o Grupo Linke Supermercados conta com cerca de 340 colaboradores e segue transformando desafios em oportunidades, mantendo como pilares a inovação, a qualidade, o respeito às pessoas e o desenvolvimento da comunidade onde está inserido.
Location: Cruz Alta, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Interdis
Description:
Interdis è stata una società consortile per azioni attiva nell'ambito della grande distribuzione organizzata.
Fu composta da 21 imprese locali, presenti in 15 regioni italiane, dal Veneto alla Calabria. La rete di punti di vendita era costituita da 1.508 negozi al dettaglio e 16 cash and carry.La quota di mercato sulla distribuzione moderna era del 1,7 (fonte Symphony IRI Group, Top Trade giugno 2013).
Interdis, nata sulla scia di Gruppo VéGé, fu costituita a Milano il 28 gennaio 1999, a seguito della conclusione del progetto Euromadis e alla conseguente separazione di VéGé da Selex. Dal 2014 ha ripreso lo storico nome.
La missione strategica del Gruppo Interdis era quella di offrire ai Clienti dei propri punti vendita servizi ad altissimo valore aggiunto. Attraverso una struttura organizzativa top down, la Sede Centrale coordinava le attività commerciali e di marketing del gruppo, offrendo valida consulenza alle imprese socie. 
Le singole imprese integravano i servizi della sede centrale con i propri obiettivi aziendali e offrivano, a loro volta, ai punti vendita, tutti gli strumenti necessari per presentare ai Clienti Acquirenti un'offerta mirata e di alto livello. Assortimenti studiati sulle esigenze dei singoli bacini di utenza, promozioni aggressive e di sicuro impatto, molteplici servizi in punto di vendita per aumentare la soddisfazione dei Clienti.

Name: LUISE HÄNDLMAIER GmbH - Senf & Saucen
Description:
Alles was wir brauchen....
Viel Fleiß, noch mehr Handarbeit und ein kleines Geheimnis machen Händlmaier
und unsere Spezialitäten seit je her zu dem, was wir heute davon kennen und genießen. Schon bei Johanna Händlmaier 1914 galt der Grundsatz: 
IMMER NUR DAS BESTE MACHEN!
So ist alles, was wir für unseren Senf, unsere Saucen und Dressings verwenden von einzigartiger Qualität: die besten Rohstoffe, die auf dem Weltmarkt und von Mutter Natur zu bekommen sind! Frische Senfsaat aus Kanada, klares Wasser, brauner Zucker, Weinessig und natürlich die feinen Gewürze, die wir aber nicht verraten können... 
Und als kleines Extra gönnen wir uns in der Produktion etwas mehr Zeit, als das üblicherweise der Fall ist.
Qualität ist unser oberstes Gebot
Alle Zutaten werden in unserem Hause und zusätzlich noch von einem unabhängigen Lebensmittellabor auf Ihre Qualität hin geprüft. Auch das fertige Produkt steht bis es unser Haus verlässt unter ständiger Kontrolle.
Umweltschutz ist für uns eine Selbstverständlichkeit
Die Natur ist unser höchstes Gut und muss geschützt und für die folgenden Generationen bewahrt werden. So ist Umweltschutz für uns eine Selbstverständlichkeit. Alle Verpackungsmaterialen werden sortiert und dem Recycling zugeführt. Unser Abwasser wird, bevor es in die Kanalisation gelangt, von uns aufbereitet und gereinigt. Der Transport unserer Waren wird so optimiert, dass die Ladefläche jedes einzelnen LKWs optimal genutzt wird. Die verschiedenen Anlieferstellen werden zu optimalen Routen zusammengestellt, d.h. es entstehen keine Doppelfahrten und es werden möglichst kurze Strecken gewählt. 
Auf unsere Mitarbeiter können wir uns verlassen
Unsere Mitarbeiter sollen sich an ihrem Arbeitsplatz wohlfühlen. Denn es ist Lebenszeit, die wir hier verbringen! Dazu haben wir das Umfeld der Firma so angenehm wie nur irgend möglich gestaltet. 
Weil Qualität das Wichtigste ist. 
Aktuell offene Stellen finden Sie unter https://haendlmaier.de/karriere/

Folge uns, um regelmäßig inspirierende Beiträge über nachhaltigen Kaffeeanbau, Tipps für den bewussten Konsum und interessante Neuigkeiten aus der Kaffeewelt zu erhalten. 
Sei Teil unserer wachsenden Community und entdecke die Vielfalt von ALTOMAYO Bio.

Name: Centro De Compras Zaleski
Description:
Com o espírito empreendedor a família ZALESKI migrou do interior de Pedregulho, comunidade do município vizinha de Horizontina, Doutor Maurício Cardoso. Em 1986, a família se estabeleceu em um bairro chamado Recanto do Sol no município de Horizontina. Logo começou com básicos do ramo alimentício e limpeza. Com o desenvolvimento do bairro, o mercado foi se estabelecendo e crescendo. A visão empreendedora fazia com que o Senhor Valdir Zaleski e Família, identificasse oportunidades de expansão ampliando eus segmentos no ramo alimentício.
Com o passar dos anos foi adquirindo experiência e em 1991, comprou o antigo ECONOSUL no centro do município. Era um prédio alugado e de aproximadamente 350m onde contratou oito colaboradores, mantendo também a gestão familiar. Mais tarde alugou o prédio ao lado com 1000m, conquistou novos clientes e sempre seguindo com seus projetos, implementou uma loja de roupas e utilidades em anexo ao supermercado.
Em 2002, adquiriu um prédio próximo a rodoviária da cidade onde transferiu sua unidade do centro e a loja de utilidades.
Com o novo prédio próprio todo reestruturado e com maior área definiu muito bem suas estratégias e se estabeleceu como um dos Supermercados mais frequentados de Horizontina.
Em 2009, a Família Zaleski, apostando mais uma vez em Horizontina, alugou um prédio com mais de 4000m e abre a 1 filial do Centro de Compras Zaleski permanecendo com a Matriz. Na filial ainda foi incorporado junto ao supermercado: Floricultura, Bazar, Confecção e Livraria. Disponibilizando um ambiente interativo e agradável
Sua estrutura organizacional conta com mais de 90 funcionários e permanece com a gestão familiar: proprietário, sua esposa, seus filhos, gerente, os quais definem as estratégias e processos diários.

ZenSyon Mission: Wellness lifestyle in Abundance

A healthy lifestyle is not just about what you eat, it is also what you consume emotionally, mentally & spiritually. A healthy person, as defined in Sushrut Samhita, one of the primary works text on Ayurveda.

"He whose dosha’s are in balance, appetite is good, all tissues of the body and all natural urges are functioning properly, and whose mind, body and spirit are cheerful…"

This is the base principle of ZenSyon, we are specifically into satvik Ahaar (food), Vihar (recreation) , Aarogya (health) and Dincharya (Daily routine)

ZenSyon  has taken same principles of Ayurveda  i.e. Svasthya which is a meaning of two words Sva (the Being) + Sthya (Centered) + Shailee ( Lifestyle)  actually no word in english can define SwasthyaShailee, it is getting centered to one’s own being in all aspect like Ahaar, Vihaar, Aarogya and Dincharya which aim to develop yourself in
    Mentally
    Physically
    Spiritually 
Ayurveda Classify three type of Gunas like Satvik, Rajas and Tamas gunas

Sattvic is derived from Sattva (सत्त्व) which is a Sanskrit word. Sattva is a complex concept in Indian philosophy, used in many contexts, and it means one that is "pure, essence, nature, vital, energy, clean, conscious, strong, courage, true, honest, wise, rudiment of life.

Sattva is one of three gunas (quality, peculiarity, tendency, attribute, property). The other two qualities are considered to be Rajas (agitated, passionate, moving, emotional, trendy) and Tamas (dark, destructive, spoiled, ignorant, stale, inert, unripe, unnatural, weak, unclean). The concept that contrasts with and is opposed to Sattva is Tamas.

Name: Sleepwell
Description:
Узкоспециализированный интернет-магазин товаров для вашего сна.

Время на полноценный сон разное в разных возрастных группах. Человеку от 20 до 50 лет необходимо спать не менее 8 часов в сутки, людям старшего возраста хватает и 4-х часов.

Дневной сон – индивидуальная особенность каждого. Полезно это или вредно сказать однозначно нельзя. Зато спать на закате не только вредно, но и опасно. «Сон на закате, когда краски жизни затухают – к сокращению жизни» – так сказано в святых писаниях.

Надо отметить тот факт, что никогда количество сна не заменит его качества. Самый важный интервал сна для здоровья человека – это сон до полуночи. Глубокое расслабление организма идет именно в эти часы, также как и отдых, восстановление, пополнение резервов.

Однако, сон под влиянием медикаментов или алкоголя, это лишь выключение сознания на определенное время, и не является фазой полноценного отдыха.

Поэтому ложиться спать нужно обязательно до 24 часов.

Tradition und Qualität aus Ayl-Biebelhausen!

Eingebettet in die landschaftlich reizvolle Umgebung des Saarburger Landes, wenige Kilometer von Trier und der Grenze zu Luxemburg entfernt, liegt der kleine Ort Biebelhausen. 

Bereits seit dem 17. Jahrhundert ist Biebelhausen Sitz unseres Traditionsunternehmens. Eine lange Back-Tradition, die hohe fachliche Kompetenz und ein ausgeprägtes Verhältnis zu naturbelassenen Produkten zeichnen uns aus.

1928 wurde dem traditionsreichen Mühlenbetrieb eine Bäckerei angegliedert und später auch eine Konditorei. Die Großbäckerei beziehungsweise -konditorei beschäftigt heute ca. 400 Mitarbeiter. 
Wir verbinden klassische Backtradition und das Know-how des Bäckerhandwerks mit modernster Herstellungstechnik. Sämtliche Rohstoffe und Endprodukte werden ständig von Mitarbeitern der internen Qualitätssicherung kontrolliert, denn höchste Qualität ist das Rezept für die Erfolge der Biebelhausener Mühle. 

Unser frisches Brot und Gebäck werden im Lebensmittelhandel sowie in 39 eigenen Filialen, hauptsächlich im benachbarten Saarland, angeboten.

Name: Linke Supermercados
Description:
Descendentes de imigrantes alemães, os Linke iniciaram sua trajetória com o comércio de bananas (1962). Inicialmente em um porão na residência do Sr. Waldemar e da Srª Nininha (in memorian), vendendo bananas em um cesto para os militares do antigo 17º BI.
Com o passar dos anos, formaram uma parceria com o cunhado Manoel, quando passaram a vender bananas em uma gaiota. Com a insistência da mãe, Dona Ely Schultz, alugaram parte do prédio de Adelário Shinaider (in memorian) e Eugênia onde fica atualmente o Posto Arco Íris.

No início, era uma pequena fruteira, atendida pelo patriarca da família, O Sr. Waldemar Linke, os filhos Walmir (Chico) e Darci, além de um funcionário. Com a ida de seus pais para o Salto do Jacuí, assumiram o empreendimento Darci, Walmir e Wanderlei, constituindo assim uma nova etapa em suas vidas.
Posteriormente, surgiu a oportunidade de adquirir um terreno, onde hoje se encontra o Linke Supermercado da Barão. A previsão dos Linke era montar uma fruteira ampla, vendas por atacado e varejo de hortifrutigranjeiros, mas o espaço tornou-se tão grande que aos poucos foi tomando a forma de um supermercado, com variada linha de produtos. Em 1984, nascia o Supermercado Linke.
Em Setembro de 2002, nasceu o Linke da Cândido Machado. Um espaço amplo e moderno, maior diversificação de mercadorias, amplo estacionamento. Em  10 de Setembro de 2007, nasceu o Linke da Sete de Setembro. Hoje, os três Supermercados contam com uma equipe com de mais de 270 colaboradores proporcionando para os nossos clientes conforto e economia.

Name: Mach 1 Hot Sauce LLC
Description: Mach 1 was founded by husband and wife duo Cassidy and Jillian Nolan first starting in their kitchen in Napa, CA. Cassidy, an honorably discharged veteran serving in the United States Marine Corps after five years operating in the Intelligence community and serving two combat deployments to Afghanistan, experienced his fair share of bland MRE's (Meals Ready to Eat) during training and deployment.  Cassidy noticed the tiny hot sauce bottles provided in MRE's didn't offer flavor outside of heat and that many other fellow Marines and service members would consistently bring their own hot sauce with them on field exercises and deployments. Many years later, Cassidy wanted to create a sauce that would not only bring a bit of heat to dance on your tongue but also add flavor to enhance any food. The concept of an American hot sauce brand that offered new and innovative flavors was born. One with the right amount of heat that can pair equally with a MRE (Chicken Jambalaya is his personal favorite) or breakfast burrito. He found himself spending weekends and late nights creating the exact sauce he envisioned. He soon dragged his wife into his obsession asking her opinion. The perfect blend of spices and peppers that became our signature Mach 1 Hot Sauce was born. Excited by the creative process they went straight to work on the Mach 2 and Mach 3. With Cassidy's interest in military aviation and Jillian's love of flight from growing up going to airshows with her father as well as tagging along on weekends to a small airfield outside of Napa to watch him work on airplanes, they soon tied the sauces level of spiciness to the Mach speed and the aircraft innovation that achieved it. It perfectly combined two of their loves, hot sauce and human achievement in aeronautics making Mach 1 Hot Sauce what it is today.

Description:
Viele Chilis und Chiliprodukte umrunden den halben Erdball, ehe sie auf unseren Tellern landen. Dieser Irrsinn muss nicht sein, denn auch die exotischsten Chilisorten lassen sich bei uns kultivieren. Sämtliche Chilis, die zu JUNGLE DØG und JUNGLE FRØG verarbeitet werden, wachsen in der Schweiz, und zwar erst noch in urbaner Landwirtschaft.

JUNGLE DØG ist eine puristische Chilisauce, welche allen erdenklichen Speisen eine feurige Schärfe verleiht und ihren Geschmack exotisch-fruchtig ergänzt, ohne ihn zu übertönen.

Ausserdem haben wir mit JUNGLE FRØG ein Chilisalz entworfen, welches ein starkes Zeichen gegen die Lebensmittelverschwendung setzt: Es enthält ausschliesslich Chilis, welche im Herbst nicht mehr ganz ausreifen.

Name: ZB Cleaning BV
Description:
ZB CLEANING komt met een mobiele wasstraat bij u voor rijden. Zo vaak u wilt, of het nu iedere maand, ieder kwartaal of ieder halfjaar is. Onze medewerkers verzamelen en markeren uw wagens, trolleys en mandjes en voeren deze individueel  de wasstraat in. Hier volgt een proces van drie stappen:

1) Materialen worden voorbehandeld en stickervrij gemaakt

2) Grondige reiniging en door middel van wassen met een speciaal ontwikkeld reinigingsmiddel. Het spoelwater wordt in de wasstraat opgevangen.
3) Drogen, waarbij zoveel mogelijk overtollige vloeistof wordt verwijderd. Uw karren en mandjes zijn dus snel weer 'winkelfris" bruikbaar.

Onze mobiele wasstraten zijn voorzien van een aggregaat en vloeistoftanks en hebben dus geen aansluiting op water en elektra nodig. Wij zorgen ervoor dat u zo weinig mogelijk merkt van ons werk. Behalve aan uw schone winkelwagens en mandjes natuurlijk!

ZB CLEANING was en is uiteraard ook uw partner als het op winkelwagens repareren aankomt. Bij het reinigen worden alle winkelwagens met zichtbare defecten nagekeken. Wagens met gebreken worden apart gezet en direct hersteld. Zo vindt het winkelwagens repareren en reinigen tijdens hetzelfde bezoek van ZB CLEANING plaats. Voordelen: minimale overlast en een besparing van de kosten.

ZB CLEANING reinigt ook uw Parkboxen
Om uw klanten een totaalbeeld te geven van een frisse en hygienische supermarkt, hebben we ook het reinigen van uw parkbox (en) in ons servicepakket opgenomen. Bij ons reinigings- en reparatiebezoek aan uw winkel(s) worden de binnen en de buitenzijde van de parkboxen schoongemaakt. Natuurlijk wordt ook de vloer netjes aangeveegd.

Kortom alles weer "Winkelfris" na ieder bezoek !

Name: Herbert Kluth (GmbH & Co. KG)
Description:
Wir sind ein Familienunternehmen und Qualitäts-Experten für Nusskerne und Trockenfrüchte. Seit 1928 liefern wir hochwertigste Lebensmittel für eine abwechslungsreiche Ernährung und höchsten Genuss.

Ob Nuss, Trockenfrucht, Snack oder Zutat – bei uns kommt nur ausgesuchte Qualität in die Tüte bzw. den Becher.  In jahrelanger, partnerschaftlicher Zusammenarbeit werden die besten Nusskerne und Trockenfrüchte direkt aus dem Ursprung eingekauft und selbst importiert.

Mit unserer modernen Rösterei produzieren wir einzigartige Snacks, vom klassischen Nuss-Mix über Rauch-Mandeln bis hin zu dragierten Vanille-Cashews.

Als Familienunternehmen sind wir uns unserer Verantwortung gegenüber der Natur und der Gesellschaft bewusst. Wir produzieren mit 100 % Ökostrom und unsere Rösterei arbeitet mit Wärmerückgewinnung.  Seit 2022 sind wir als „klimaneutrales Unternehmen“ zertifiziert und kompensieren unsere Emissionen mit ausgewählten Klimaschutzprojekten. 

Über regelmäßige interne sowie externe Qualitätskontrollen gewährleisten wir unseren ganzheitlich hohen Anspruch. Der hohe Standard unserer internen Prozesse wird durch die jährlichen IFS Food-Prüfungen und entsprechende Zertifizierungen auf höchstem Niveau bestätigt.

Name: Société d'Articles Hygiéniques
Description:
Implantée dans la zone de développement régional de Medjez El Bab et avec un capital initial de 235 000 D.T, la « S.A.H » a démarré son activité en octobre 1995 par la fabrication des serviettes anatomiques féminines. 
La bonne qualité de ses produits, le renforcement de l’entreprise par un apport de cadres et la collaboration étroite entre les équipes (gestion, technique, commerciale et marketing), ont permis à « S.A.H » de diversifier ses produits fin 1998 vers la fabrication des changes complets pour bébé.

L’introduction des couches culotte bébé a été une grande réussite pour « S.A.H » et ce grâce à la qualité incontournable de ces derniers (analyse du laboratoire COURTRY 2002 / les couches « lilas » ont eu une note de 97/100 et ont été classées catégorie (A) mondial.

La satisfaction du consommateur, l’écoute client et la maximisation du rapport qualité/prix sont les facteurs clés de la performance de « S.A.H ».

Consciente des enjeux stratégiques et des menaces d’une concurrence acharnée de la part des produits locaux et étrangers, la « S.A.H » a choisi de diversifier et de compléter sa gamme de produits et ce par le lancement en 2004 des papiers hygiéniques (papiers mouchoir, serviettes de table et papiers facial) et en 2005 les changes pour adultes pour être le premier et le seul producteur de l’incontinence adulte en Afrique.

Cette orientation a été suivie en même temps par le renforcement des acquis en hygiène féminine et bébé et ce par les différentes améliorations techniques et esthétiques opérées sur ces produits.

Name: Oceanpath
Description:
Oceanpath was founded by the Ecock family in 1991 in, Howth, Co. Dublin. Since then, we have grown to become one of the largest seafood processors in Ireland. 
We supply fish to all major Irish retailers and food service as well as export.
Our highly trained staff continue to adapt to an ever-changing market, and we invested heavily in the areas of quality management and a state-of-the-art traceability system. In 2006, Oceanpath acquired Dunn's of Dublin and in 2020 Carr & Sons joined the Oceanpath group ,which enabled us to further diversify our products with the highlights being our delicious traditional smoked salmon and smoked mackerel.
Dunn's of Dublin is Ireland's oldest fish company which was set up in 1822.
Renowned worldwide for our smoked salmon, we now produce several varieties of both hot and cold smoked fish including Irish, organic, wild and farmed salmon. Quality and taste have been the hallmark of Carr & Sons for over 50 years. This has been preserved in the wide range of fresh and ready to eat seafood products, which subtly combine the traditional taste of Ireland with the needs of the modern consumer.
In 2018 Oceanpath became part of the Iceland Seafood group.

Name: Novel Vegan Crafts GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Novel Vegan Crafts steht für die Entwicklung innovativer, pflanzenbasierter Lebensmittel mit Handwerk, Know-how und Vision. Wir verbinden moderne Food-Technologie mit echter Leidenschaft für nachhaltige Ernährung und schaffen so neue Lösungen für die pflanzenbasierte Lebensmittelwelt von morgen.

Unser Standort an der Hafenpromenade in Münster, mitten in der bekannten Hafenkäserei, ist dabei mehr als nur ein Arbeitsplatz: Hier sind wir Teil eines neuartigen Food Hubs, umgeben von starken Netzwerkpartnern. Der direkte Austausch, kurze Wege und ein kreatives Umfeld treiben unsere Arbeit täglich voran.

Besonders stolz sind wir auf unsere großzügigen Labor- und Technikumsmöglichkeiten, die es uns ermöglichen, Ideen schnell zu testen, Produkte gezielt weiterzuentwickeln und skalierbare Konzepte praxisnah umzusetzen – von der ersten Rezeptur bis zur industriellen Anwendung.

Novel Vegan Crafts steht für Innovation, Kollaboration und pflanzenbasierte Exzellenz – entwickelt im Herzen des Münsteraner Hafens.
___

Novel Vegan Crafts develops innovative plant-based food solutions by combining craftsmanship, food technology, and a strong vision for sustainable nutrition. We focus on creating forward-thinking concepts that help shape the future of plant-based foods — from idea to scalable application.

Our home base is located at Münster’s Hafenpromenade, right in the heart of the well-known Hafenkäserei. Here, we are part of a novel food hub, surrounded by inspiring network partners from the food, tech, and innovation ecosystem. This collaborative environment fosters exchange, creativity, and rapid development.

A key strength of Novel Vegan Crafts lies in our extensive laboratory and pilot-scale facilities, which allow us to efficiently test, refine, and scale new product ideas. These capabilities enable hands-on development under real-world conditions — bridging the gap between research, innovation, and industrial application.

Name: Gujco Mart
Description:
Introducing Gujco Mart, a pioneering force revolutionizing the retail landscape. We're not just your average supermarket – we're a high-tech, professional marketing, and distribution channel dedicated to showcasing products cultivated by farmers. As India's first co-operative FMCG organized retail chain, we take pride in our role as a trailblazer. Our mission goes beyond profit; we're committed to fostering employment opportunities and driving economic growth in both urban and rural communities.

By forging strong partnerships with cooperative societies and Farmers Producers Organizations (FPOs), we've established a seamless supply chain that ensures quick disposal of agricultural products at fair prices, directly benefiting farmers. But Gujco Mart isn't just about retail – we're agents of positive change in agro-economics. The "GUJCO" brand represents quality and reliability, guaranteeing consumers access to top-notch products at competitive rates.

With a focus on technological innovation and a holistic approach to the agricultural ecosystem, we're reshaping the retail industry, creating a win-win situation for both producers and consumers. Join us in our journey toward a brighter, more sustainable future!

Call 1800-891-4211 for business inquiries.

Name: LÜNING Gruppe
Description:
Die LÜNING-Gruppe ist ein fast 170 Jahre altes Familienunternehmen, das heute in der 6. Generation geführt wird. Das Unternehmen gehört heute zu Deutschlands 30 größten Lebensmittelhandelsunternehmen, hat dabei aber seine mittelständische Prägung beibehalten.

Rund um den Kernbereich des Handels ist LÜNING als Gruppe vielseitig aufgestellt. LÜNING betreibt Großhandel, Einzelhandel, Ladenbau und eine Inhouse Werbeagentur. So unterschiedlich die Bereiche von ihrem Wesen teilweise sind, das Erfolgsgeheimnis ist in allen Geschäftsbereichen das Gleiche: Handeln mit Leidenschaft. Die wirklichen Werte des Unternehmens werden nicht dadurch ausgedrückt, was geschrieben wird, sondern durch die Art und Weise wie gehandelt wird. Und zwar jeder Einzelne bei LÜNING, egal ob alleine oder im Team, egal ob als Mitarbeiter oder als Vorgesetzter. Die wirklichen Werte des Unternehmens sind also die Eigenschaften, Talente und Charakterzüge, die LÜNING an seinen Kollegen wertschätzt.

LÜNING ist bunt und so sind auch die Mitarbeiter verschieden. Auch das ist ein Teil des Erfolges: Vielfalt statt Einfalt. Es gibt jedoch Eigenschaften und Charakterzüge, die bei den Kollegen besonders gewertschätzt werden, weil sie den Kern des „Handeln mit Leidenschaft“ ausmachen:

* LEIDENSCHAFT
* VERLÄSSLICHKEIT
* ZUSAMMENARBEIT
* NEUGIER
* UNTERNEHMERTUM

Mehr Infos unter: www.luening.de

Name: Davis Food Co-op
Description: The Co-op is a cooperative business, owned by about 10,000 local households. We are a full-service grocery store in Downtown Davis, specializing in natural, organic and locally produced foods. We exist to serve our Owners and the surrounding community, not some far-off corporation. Our store is open to the public 7 days a week, from 7am to 10pm. Joining is easy, financially savvy (Member-Only deals, Patronage Refund, and our special 30-day no receipt required return policy are just a few perks), and a great way to invest in your local economy. We accept WIC and EBT. We've got a full-service deli with custom sandwiches, prepared salads, a hot foods and salad bar. Our in-house bakery bakes daily. Our produce department offers the local and organic produce, seeds and plant starts, and an olive & antipasto bar. In our meat department, real butchers prepare fresh cuts from the whole animal, and make homemade sausages. We feature an expansive bulk department with everything you need to stock your pantry, plus several aisles of packaged dry goods and frozen foods, as well as a wide assortment of dairy products and specialty cheeses. Vitamins and supplements, health and beauty care products, homeopathic remedies, essential oils, and general merchandise-- we've got that, too! PLUS we offer Davis' best selection of craft beers and microbrews and wines, including local and imports, organics, and value-priced wines. You can even buy wine-by-the glass, draft beer, and draft kombucha in our deli to enjoy on our delightful garden patio.

Name: Biosano Group Srl
Description:
Biosano Italia è composta da un'Azienda Agricola che sorge tra le dolci colline di Nizza Monferrato e due punti vendita dedicati al gusto genuino dei prodotti di nostra produzione a Torino: l'Enoteca e la Macelleria.

A Nizza Monferrato, grazie ai circa 30 ettari di terra fertile e generosa, si trovano le condizioni ideali per dar vita a prodotti agro-alimentari unici, tramite i quali inseguire la nostra filosofia di genuinità italiana. 
Coltiviamo in modo naturale e senza utilizzare pesticidi i principali vitigni autoctoni del Monferrato: Barbera, Dolcetto e Nebbiolo su tutti, che vendiamo imbottigliati, sfusi o tramite l'innovativo packaging della Bag-in-box. 
Un piccolo allevamento di circa 40 capi Fassoni di Razza Piemontese con spazi esterni dedicati alimenta la nostra macelleria: il consorzio di tutela Coalvi ne certifica la qualità e la nostra passione fa il resto. 
Infine qualche ettaro di frutteti, noccioleti, oliveti e ortaggi è dedicato alla produzione naturale di conserve artigianali, che puoi trovare presso la nostra Enoteca.

Name: 永旺百貨有限公司
Description:
永旺(香港)百貨有限公司(「永旺百貨」)成立於1985年12月,並於1994年2月在香港聯合交易所上市,主要業務為經營綜合購物百貨店(GMS),提供物有所值及一應俱全的日常生活用品給顧客。

永旺百貨於1987年在太古創立第一間JUSCO康怡店(現AEON康怡店),其後在港、九、新界各區相繼開設分店。永旺百貨一直以來積極發展多元化的業務及擴充市場領域,相繼開設獨立超級市場AEON SUPERMARKET、Living PLAZA by AEON、日式便當專門店Bento Express by AEON、室內遊樂場 Molly Fantasy及La Bohéme麵包店,引入種類繁多的貨品及服務,為市民帶來無比的方便。除此之外,永旺百貨於2000年推出JUSCOCITY網上購物城(現AEONCITY),讓顧客享受網上購物樂趣。

目前永旺百貨於香港人口密集的地區開設9間綜合購物百貨店(GMS)、4間獨立超級市場、25間獨立Living PLAZA by AEON、6間Bento Express by AEON及2間La Bohéme Bakery,並於廣東省開設20間GMS、6間獨立超級市場及2間購物中心。永旺百貨旨在於香港發展連鎖式業務,我們力求為本地顧客提供物有所值的商品。

Name: HAO mart Pte Ltd
Description:
HAO mart is a chain of convenience stores and supermarkets in Singapore under the HAO Corp, which begun its establishment in 2016. Although it is one of the youngest players in the market,
HAO mart expanded aggressively, and have now opened 45 outlets within a spend three years.

When HAO mart first entered the market, it positioned itself as a 
‘super-mini-mart’ where benefits of a supermarket and a convenience store are offered simultaneously to its patrons – that being carrying an extensive product range in incredibly convenient locations. Following this vision, HAO mart began its operations in HDB estates, especially the older areas where supermarkets were usually situated in heartland malls.

In 2018, HAO mart reached one of its milestones by expanding its positioning from towards ‘full fledged supermarkets’. They provided a wider variety of products and more competitive pricing to customers.

Name: E.Leclerc Pontchateau
Description:
Aujourd'hui, le centre E.Leclerc Pontchateau s'inscrit dans une démarche plus respectueuse de l'être humain et de l'environnement. 

Nous mettons un point d'honneur à valoriser les producteurs locaux avec lesquels nous travaillons. Ces alliances avec les locaux nous sont précieuses, elles valorisent nos régions qui comme vous le savez, ont du talent. 

Nous cherchons à améliorer chaque jour les conditions de vie au travail de nos salariés car le bien être est une cause qui nous porte à coeur. Notre engagement est bien réel : nos responsables sont formés afin de faciliter les échanges, la prise de parole au sein de groupe, ainsi que la gestion des problèmes. 

Enfin, nous souhaitons par dessus tout, valoriser et féliciter le savoir-faire de nos collaborateurs. Nous avons l'incroyable chance de travailler dans un même sein avec des boulangers, des bouchers, des comptables, des spécialistes des fruits, des champions de la mise en rayon... Sans toutes ces personnes, rien ne serait possible. 

Partez à la découverte de notre univers : bienvenue au centre E.Leclerc de Pontchateau

Name: Grow More India
Description:
Grow More is a socially and environmentally responsible Indian brand that provides a wide range of high-quality and natural staples, dry fruits, spices, and whole spices. The company was founded in 2021 with a vision of supporting the farming and trading community while providing the best-in-class products to end consumers. The brand is committed to promoting healthy and sustainable living by offering natural, preservative-free products.

Our range of products includes pulses, rice, flour, blended spices, whole spices, and dry fruits. We believe in going beyond the ordinary and conventional way of providing a healthy diet and culinary choices. Our thought is to deliver a good quality of products for our customers to lead better and healthy life choices. We offer high-quality unpolished pulses that retain all natural nutrients, providing a healthy diet option for customers.

Our goal is to create a positive impact on society and the environment through our operations. We strive to make a difference in the lives of farmers and traders by sourcing products directly from them, providing them with fair prices and promoting sustainable agricultural practices.

In summary, Grow More is a brand that is dedicated to providing high-quality, natural products while supporting the farming and trading communities. We are committed to promoting healthy and sustainable living and making a positive impact on society and the environment. Join us in going beyond the ordinary and conventional way of providing a healthy diet and culinary choices. Shop with us today! #GrowMore #NaturalProducts #Sustainability #SupportingFarms #HealthyLiving.

Name: United Service Technologies, Inc.
Description:
United Service Technologies operates in California, Nevada, and Texas. UST services commercial food equipment in the grocery and restaurant industry. Customers include Safeway, HEB, Whole Foods, Cardenas, Superior, Super A Foods, Winco, Costco, Panera Bread, Einstein Bagels, Kroger, Brookshires, and many more. 

Since 1995 UST has serviced a variety of commercial food equipment including: fryers, slicers, ovens, rotisseries, hot cases, rethermalizers, soup wells, steam tables, woks, salamanders, smokers, steamers, combi ovens, microwaves, convection ovens, saws, grinders, tenderizers, fat testers, scales, bakery ovens, mixers, proofers, dividers, rounders, sheeters, bread slicers, deck ovens, pizza ovens, warmers, night covers, carts, cart pushers, juicers, coffee machines, coffee grinders, peanut grinders, honey pots, waffle machines, ranges, griddles, grills, revolving tray ovens, and many more.

Name: SLOWOOD
Description:
Slowood is an innovative eco-conscious lifestyle grocery chain based in Hong Kong, committed to reshaping consumer habits and fostering a circular economy by oﬀering an extensive range of sustainable products. 

Our primary mission is to reduce waste, promote sustainability, and empower individuals to embrace environmentally responsible lifestyles. 

Aligned with our steadfast dedication to sustainability, Slowood embarks on an exciting expansion journey with our groundbreaking project, REFILL Point. This innovative initiative introduces a user-friendly, patent-protected vending machine design, enabling customers to eﬀortlessly refill their containers with conscientiously sourced, eco-friendly products at any time and location. REFILL Point exempliﬁes our vision to make sustainable living easily accessible and convenient.

Slowood's brand awareness and reputation is strong and encouraged us to develop our own OEM range aswell as begin to supply our exclusive range with other business in the market via our distribution company - GREENROOT.

Around 90% of the products you see in Slowood are imported directly, and exclusively, by us! We aim to be Hong Kong's most sustainable distributor holding the widest collection of zero waste and eco-friendly food and lifestyle products. We work closely with our our customers and enjoy connecting when possible to collaborate with our retail brand.

Name: Trig's
Description:
Trig's is considered more of a collection then a chain. Each store is designed to uniquely serve its community in a very personal and committed way, taking on the personality of its region. But most importantly, Trig's goal is to make sure you get the best service no matter what.

The collection started in 1971 when Trygve (Trig) and Tula Solberg started the company with a single small store in Land O'Lakes, Wisconsin. Today, T.A. Solberg Company, Inc. operates five Trig's stores in the Northern Wisconsin communities of Rhinelander, Minocqua, Eagle River, Wausau and Stevens Point. Each store is a complete one stop experience with an expansive deli, service meat counter, Cellar 70 Wine and Spirits and a full service Healthmart pharmacy.

Trig's is one part of the larger T.A. Solberg Company, Inc., a diverse and healthy organization of over 1,000 associates that also operate Trig's Village Market in Manitowish Waters, Trig's Ace Hardware in Rhinelander, Tula's Café in Minocqua and Rhinelander, three Postal Express stores, several fuel and convenience stores throughout northern and central Wisconsin, Trig's Central Bakery and Trucking Facility, Trig's Recycling Center, and Twice is Nice Consignment in Rhinelander.

Trig's has two goals:

1. Be a great place to shop!
2. Be a great place to work!

Name: Caffé Brunetti | Kaffeehandel
Description:
Weil Kaffee einfach schmecken muß! Aus dieser Überzeugung bieten wir italienische Kaffeetradition gepaart mit deutscher Sorgfalt. Probieren Sie jetzt unsere Premiumkaffees.

Ob für Ihren Vollautomaten im Büro oder zu Hause oder für die Extraktion mit Ihrem Siebträger, unsere Kaffeebohnen sind immer eine gute Wahl. Gerne stellen wir Ihnen für Bestellungen ab 1 KG oder bis zu Großverbrauchermengen Ihre Kaffeebestellung individuell zusammen.

All unsere Sorten sind von uns selbst komponiert und ausgesucht. Sie werden stets mit unterschiedlichen Bestandteilen aus besten Robusta- und Arabicabohnen zusammengestellt und unterscheiden sich in Stärke und Säureanteil. Alle Sorten können problemlos auf Kaffeevollautomaten und Siebträgern verwendet werden. Ob für Caffé Creme, Espresso, Lungo, Cappuccino, Café Latte oder andere – Wir haben den passenden Kaffee für Sie. Achten Sie auf die einzelnen Produktbeschreibungen.

Mit der Trommelröstmaschine werden die Bohnen zwischen 12 und 20 Minuten lang bei maximal 220 °C geröstet. Durch dieses langsame und sehr schonende Verfahren kann sich das kostbare Aroma bestens entwickeln, der Kaffee verliert Bitterstoffe und ist besonders gut verträglich.

Wir legen größten Wert darauf, dass unser Kaffee von bester Qualität ist. Das beginnt mit den Bohnen: Wir verwenden fast nur Hochlandgewächse, denn je höher der Kaffee wächst, desto besser ist er.

Wir stehen einfach auf richtig gute Röstungen!

Name: Zoffi Supermercado Online

Inauguramos no dia 08 de agosto de 2018, em Joinville SC. Inovadores no segmento,  fugimos do tradicional e seguimos com o conceito europeu, sendo o primeiro supermercado 100% online do Brasil. Possuímos o estoque físico, mas sem a presença do cliente comprando nas gôndolas.

A satisfação dos clientes, é nossa prioridade. Nosso contato vai desde a pré e pós-venda, buscando o aperfeiçoamento na entrega do consumidor.

Contamos com um sistema ágil e seguro, facilitando o processo de agendamento, compra, entrega e pagamento. Dessa forma o atendimento se torna essencial para a experiência de compra, com suporte e entregadores ao seu dispor.

Em 2020 alcançamos o sucesso, mas nossa caminhada é longa! Contamos com um planejamento inovador de expansão de franquias, reforçando a nossa marca em todas as cidades do Brasil!

Gostaria de conhecer mais sobre nossas franquias? Acesse https://300f.com.br/zoffi

Name: Best Market
Description:
Today's Best Yet Market facilities and Team Members are still driven by the three basic beliefs that drove our very first store. Our founder Ben Raitses, started with a small fruits and vegetables store in Brooklyn. He traveled daily to the Bronx to pick out the finest quality produce at the lowest possible cost for the customers. Then he trucked this hand picked merchandise from the Bronx Terminal Market to his store in Brooklyn.

In 1994, our current family-owned chain of twelve supermarkets opened its first Long Island supermarket in Lake Ronkonkoma under the name of Produce Warehouse of Ronkonkoma. Our initial store quickly delighted our customers with quality fresh fruits, vegetables, Boar's Head cold cuts, custom cuts of quality meat, freshly baked breads, and unique groceries all sold at unbeatable prices. Shoppers were extremely happy with the personal and friendly service given by our family of dedicated Team Members. In 2002 our name was changed to the Best Yet Market. While our company today hardly resembles our initial market in Brooklyn, our values remain the same and guide us as we continue to grow.

Best Yet Market strives for excellence in all areas of the supermarket industry. Each year we grow and our customers and employees have felt the change that has amassed our company. Employees are always at the top of the most satisfied list and they have many reasons to be up there. Customers have come to expect only the best from our markets. Innovations and advancements in the community has always been our top most priority. We here at the Best Yet Market try to keep our customers happy and satisfied with the best that all our market has to offer.

Name: Du Bonheur Dans La Musette
Description: Créé en 2022, Du Bonheur Dans La Musette propose un retour à une consommation locale et éco-responsable. Nous travaillons avec des artisans producteurs et maisons familiales amoureux de leurs produits, de leur terroir et maîtrisant un savoir-faire unique. Des produits gastronomiques, savoureux, fabriqués dans le respect de l'environnement. Nous vous proposons de découvrir ces produits via l'organisation de commandes groupées. Pour limiter l'impact environnemental, la distribution de ces commandes s'appuiera sur un réseau de point de retrait que nous déployons progressivement, en commençant par la région bordelaise. Vous êtes une entreprise, un CSE, une association, un établissement publique, un club sportif ? Contactez-nous pour faire parti de notre réseau de distribution. :-)

Tudo começou em 2008, como uma pequena padaria de bairro. Com muito trabalho, garra, força e determinação, hoje somos a 3 Irmãos Indústria de Pães. Localizada no município de São Gonçalo, atuamos em várias regiões de todo estado do Rio de Janeiro.

Nossa missão é proporcionar novas sensações e experiências para as pessoas, com qualidade, praticidade e honestidade, sendo sempre a melhor opção para os nossos clientes.

Afinal, seu pão é o nosso compromisso!

Name: Waruwa
Description: Waruwa operates an online farm-to-table platform that delivers fruits and vegetables for everyone. It is reshaping inefficient fruit-veg chains, reducing intermediation and working directly with farmers, carriers and end-users. Waruwa offers an extensive variety of fruit and vegetable qualities, providing competitive and transparent prices for a different type of end-users. It is a logistics solution that reduces the role of messy food distribution centres, decreasing food waste, and empowering thousands of peasant families across the region.

Name: Pro-Inter Groupe Centerkam
Description:
Pro Inter est une enseigne de distribution alimentaire fondée en 1949, aujourd’hui intégrée au Groupe Centerkam, qui regroupe 5 magasins situés à Strasbourg, Wittenheim, Pfastatt, Mutzig et Belfort.

Spécialisée dans les produits frais, la boucherie halal certifiée et les saveurs du monde, Pro Inter s’adresse à une clientèle locale, diversifiée et fidèle. L’enseigne est reconnue pour la qualité de son offre, la fraîcheur de ses produits et une relation de proximité avec ses clients.

Depuis plusieurs années, Pro Inter structure sa stratégie marketing, renforce sa visibilité digitale, modernise ses magasins et développe de nouveaux services pour répondre aux attentes des consommateurs tout en valorisant son ancrage local et ses engagements de qualité.

N'hésitez pas à nous rejoindre pour suivre de près notre transformation !

Name: Gastronome Animal
Description:
Bienvenue au Gastronome Animal ! 
Situé à quelques pas de la sortie 48 de l'autoroute 10, le Gastronome Animal se spécialise dans la mise en marché et dans la distribution de produits pour animaux de compagnie. Nous sommes fiers d’être le plus important distributeur en matière de produits animaliers de la province. 

Depuis déjà 25 ans, le Gastronome Animal offre une importante variété de produits pour animaux aux commerçants spécialisés tels que les animaleries, les centres de nutrition, les salons de toilettage et les cliniques vétérinaires. Notre entreprise se distingue par son vaste éventail de produits, son service à la clientèle hors pair et sa grande convivialité. Nous voulons avoir un impact positif sur le marché des produits pour animaux grâce à nos gammes exclusives et notre équipe passionnée.

En pleine croissance, nous misons sur l'humain afin d’offrir le meilleur service qui soit à tous nos collaborateurs.

MERCI DE FAIRE CONFIANCE À L’ÉQUIPE DU GASTRONOME ANIMAL.

Name: Purificato srl
Description:
Commercio all'ingrosso e al dettaglio di prodotti ittici, asta del pescato, lavorazione e stoccaggio di prodotti freschi e congelati, centro di spedizione.	
L’azienda opera oggi su una struttura di circa 1.000 mq coperti e 2.000 mq scoperti, adiacente all’area portuale. Disponiamo di un’area attrezzata per la vendita all'ingrosso con zona di carico e scarico e di stoccaggio dei prodotti.
Siamo dotati di un tunnel di congelamento e relativa cella per lavorazione e stoccaggio di prodotti freschi e congelati.
Siamo Centro di Spedizione Molluschi (CSM I2667).
Ogni giorno stocchiamo, commercializziamo, trasportiamo pesce fresco, vivo, congelato, decongelato. 
Oltre al mercato locale siamo presenti tutti i giorni sul mercato di Pozzuoli e di Roma in consegna con nostri automezzi per i clienti, in diretta o nelle piattaforme, ed in presa merce dai fornitori italiani ed esteri con cui collaboriamo stabilmente.
Siamo, inoltre, presenti sul mercato dell’isola di Ponza grazie ad un forte rapporto reciproco di anni di collaborazione essendo Formia il punto di partenza e di arrivo dei traghetti verso le isole pontine.
Arrivi giornalieri vi sono dalle zone limitrofe quali Mondragone, Scauri, Gaeta, Terracina, San Felice Circeo, Anzio, Ponza.
Abbiamo rapporti stabili con rilevanti aziende della G.D.O. e con importanti attività del mercato all’ingrosso e al dettaglio. Inoltre serviamo con successo anche diversi professionisti della ristorazione.
Il Team dell’Ufficio Vendite, è in grado di disporre e organizzare prontamente le vendite sia sul territorio nazionale che internazionale garantendo sempre il massimo per ogni cliente/partner.
L’ASTA DEL PESCATO
L'impianto raccoglie il pescato di circa 20 barche, tra strascico e tramaglio.
Ogni giorno dal lunedì al venerdì alle ore 17:00 circa comincia la vendita.

Description: MONDIAL PET DISTRIBUTION è un’azienda moderna, dinamica e in grande espansione nel settore dei prodotti per l’alimentazione e la cura dei piccoli animali (Fortesan).

Description: Adishwar a renowned brand in consumer durables for over a decade has now forayed into supermarket business to deliver daily essentials. We are aiming to make "Adishwar Supermarket" as a preferred choice to our customers in the neighborhood market."

Name: TAAMALA
Description:
TAAMALA est une marque française fondée à Paris en 2019, proposant une gamme de produits d’épicerie gourmet. Issus de l’agriculture et des territoires de l’ancien Empire Mandingue, ses ingrédients sont sélectionnés avec autant de soin que d’exigence. Les ingrédients proviennent du continent Africain et ses produits finis, quant à eux, sont élaborés en France.

Grâce à un sourcing minutieux, nous avons pu sélectionner les meilleurs artisans, pour nous permettre d’avoir les saveurs les plus authentiques et un goût inégalé. TAAMALA souhaite jouir et profiter pleinement de son héritage gastronomique, faire découvrir les ingrédients provenant des territoires de l’Empire Mandingue aux fins gourmets partout en occident. La maison propose des recettes, dans le but de créer des associations inédites de produits connus tels que le miel à partir d'ingrédients inconnus comme le baobab, le karité, ou le moringa. Nous souhaitons créer une explosion de saveurs en bouche chez nos clients mais également leur faire découvrir des trésors et des savoirs-faire pour leur permettre de vivre des moments d’émotion et de plaisir intenses, seuls ou accompagnés.

Name: BulMag
Description:
„Трънчев“ ООД – търговска верига BulMag е българска компания със седалище и управление в град Шумен, която не спира да се разширява и развива от 1995 год. Основната ѝ дейност е търговията с бързооборотни стоки. Веригата има 17 магазина в градовете Шумен, Варна, Търговище и Бургас. Фирмата има почивна база в град Обзор, на разположение главно на нейните служители. Кухня и собствена транжорна в град Шумен.

Общо във фирмата работят над 750 служители. Насърчаваме взаимното уважение и индивидуалността на хората, с които работим. Гордеем се с постиженията им – с растежa и с отдадеността на качеството. Всеки служител е изключително ценен за крайния успех на компанията.

Name: Kawa Pogórza
Description: Robimy kawę kontraktowo we współpracy z Momento Coffe w Rzeszowie, palarnią która wypala nam najświeższe ziarna i najbardziej wyselekcjonowane. Większość naszych ziaren są rangi speciality, w punktacji Specialty Cofffee Association (SCA) posiadają minimum 84 punkty. Inspiracje czerpiemy z lokalnej natury, to ona zdeterminowała nas do stworzenia kaw rześkich, pobudzających, wytwarzanych w naturalny sposób.

Name: Supermercado Primavera
Description:
Em 1986 o casal abriu o Bazar Monte Cristo e, após 4 anos, adquiriram sua primeira sede própria. Em 2007 querendo melhorar e aprimorar, pensando sempre no bem-estar dos clientes, mudaram de ramo de atividades e a empresa passou a chamar-se Mercado Primavera. Trazendo opções diferenci-adas, oportunidades de serviços no mesmo lugar. Depois de cerca de 12 anos, foi adquirida a primeira filial na Rua Cardozo de Mello Neto.

Em 2020 a matriz Primalter muda para uma loja nova, na Rua Dr Carlos de Rezende Enout, deixando em seu antigo endereço uma filial. Em busca pela expansão do Grupo Primalter e a luta por uma loja confortável e aconchegante, então, no começo de 2021, foram iniciadas reformas na Matriz e Filial 1. A Filial 1 foi reinaugurada com sucesso em julho de 2021 e resultou em aumento de 79% no valor mensal de vendas. Em outubro de 2021, o antigo Manb's foi adquirido e ele tornou-se a filial 3.

Em março de 2022 foi concluída a venda da filial que havia ficado na antiga sede, na rua Wilson Cantoni, em busca de um novo conceito para o Grupo Primalter: trabalhar com lojas de médio e grande porte. Em setembro de 2022, a matriz será reinaugurada.

Description:
Maison Pommiers – Une histoire de goût et de famille depuis 1992

Tout commence à Anglet, en 1992, avec Frédéric Pommiers, artisan passionné, amoureux des beaux produits et du travail bien fait. Quelques décennies plus tard, son fils Bastien rejoint l’aventure, avec une vision moderne et des idées audacieuses.

Chez nous, la tradition rencontre la créativité : des gâteaux basques qui font honneur à notre terroir, des glaces artisanales, des cakes et sablés imaginés pour sublimer vos instants gourmands.

Une entreprise familiale, un savoir-faire sincère, une promesse : vous régaler, avec cœur et exigence.
Basés à Anglet, nous travaillons avec les particuliers, les entreprises et les associations qui veulent partager de vrais moments de gourmandise.

Name: Nam An Market
Description:
Nam An Market – là chuỗi cửa hàng bán lẻ thực phẩm tốt cho sức khỏe, được đầu tư bởi Công ty TNHH Đầu tư Quốc tế Nam An hoạt động trong lĩnh vực hàng tiêu dùng, đầu tư và kinh doanh bất động sản.

Chúng tôi hiểu rằng: Thực phẩm rất quan trọng, tác động lâu dài đến sức khỏe, đời sống gia đình và xã hội. Do vậy, chọn được nguồn thực phẩm tốt, phong phú cho gia đình là công việc khó nhọc của người nội trợ; phụ thuộc rất nhiều vào kiến thức và mức độ quan tâm về nguồn thực phẩm, là trăn trở của chúng tôi khi trải nghiệm công việc nội trợ...và Nam An Market được hình thành từ sự trăn trở và trải nghiệm quý báu đó.



Với Nam An Market, chúng tôi mang đến nguồn thực phẩm tốt, sạch, phong phú và nhiều dinh dưỡng, thân thiện với môi trường nhằm chia sẻ những lo lắng của khách hàng khi chọn mua thực phẩm hàng ngày cho gia đình. Vì vậy, Nam An Market là nơi mua sắm tin cậy, thân thiện để quý khách khám phá, trải nghiệm sự đa dạng của văn hóa ẩm thực và nghệ thuật thưởng thức.

Trân trọng cám ơn khách hàng đã tin tưởng chọn Nam An Market làm người bạn đồng hành trong sự phát triển của gia đình.

BAN LÃNH ĐẠO NAM AN MARKET 
 


SỨ MỆNH & TẦM NHÌN:

Tận tâm phục vụ cộng đồng và xã hội
Nơi mua sắm tin cậy, văn minh, thân thiện
Nơi khám phá, trải nghiệm giá trị văn hóa ẩm thực   
 
GIÁ TRỊ CỐT LÕI:  Cởi mở, Chính trực, Công bằng, Cam kết

Cởi mở: Chấp nhận khác biệt, luôn học hỏi, sáng tạo
Chính trực: Hành động chuẩn mực, trách nhiệm, nói đi đôi với làm.
Công bằng: Hành xử công bằng trong mọi hành động.
Cam kết: Giữ lời hứa, luôn theo đuổi các giá trị đã được xác lập.

PHƯƠNG CHÂM HÀNH ĐỘNG:

Tôn trọng và đề cao con người, văn hóa, sự đóng góp của mỗi cá nhân,
Xây dựng môi trường làm việc trung thực, năng động và trách nhiệm,
Tích cực đóng góp vào sự phát triển Công ty và cộng đồng,
Hành động mẫu mực, tin tưởng vào mọi người và tạo được niềm tin nơi họ,
Sẵn sàng chia sẻ và hỗ trợ đồng nghiệp trong công việc,
Cam kết phục vụ khách hàng một cách tốt nhất.

Name: CityMarket NG
Description: CityMarket is your go-to destination for fresh, high-quality groceries and household essentials. We offer a curated selection of produce, pantry staples, frozen goods, beauty products, and specialty items — all at competitive prices. Located inside La Ciudad Mall in Ikota, Lagos.

Name: EA&I
Description:
At EA&I, we work with FMCG brands of all sizes - from emerging startups to established market leaders - to drive greater efficiency, visibility, and growth across their supply chains.

Specialising in Vendor Replenishment Planning (VRP) and Integrated Supply Planning (ISP), we help businesses optimise their performance within major retailers like Coles and Woolworths. Our services ensure your products are on the shelf, when and where customers need them most.

Beyond replenishment, we also support brands with powerful data management, reporting automation, and continuous improvement initiatives — giving you the insights and tools to make smarter, faster decisions at every level of your supply chain.

Whether you need day-to-day inventory management, advanced reporting solutions, or strategic planning support, our team acts as an extension of yours — focused on simplifying complexity, reducing waste, and driving sustainable growth.

 Ready to streamline your operations? Connect with Travis Kemble or Matt Pranic today for a conversation.
 Learn more about our solutions at www.eaai.com.au

Name: Outlander
Description:
Outlander est une TPE spécialisée dans la distribution de produits de grosse puériculture. Elle est distributeur exclusif pour la France des marque Joie et Nuna. Elle est également agent pour Graco.
Outlander développe également des produits de puériculture en marque propre pour des enseignes de distribution et est agent pour la France de California Innovations qui est le leader mondial du sac isotherme souple.

Name: PLUS Verbeeten
Description:
Ons familiebedrijf zit al generaties, met veel passie, in de levensmiddelenhandel. Begonnen vanuit het Brabantse Vierlingsbeek als marskramer langs de deuren met koloniale waren. Vervolgens jarenlang als kruidenierswinkel in de Grotestraat in Vierlingsbeek met veel bezorgingen in de regio. Vanaf de jaren '70 van de vorige eeuw zijn wij als supermarkt begonnen en zijn wij met winkels uit gaan breiden naar Overloon (sinds 1977), Tegelen (sinds 1987) en Malden (sinds 2007). Lokale binding, klantvriendelijkheid en service staan bij ons vanaf het allereerste begin hoog in het vaandel.

Goed eten. Daar houden we van. Want goed eten is belangrijk, voor iedereen elke dag. Daarom selecteren wij voor jou pure en verse producten met een duidelijke herkomst en veel smaak. Lekker eten gemaakt vanuit liefde voor het ambacht en met aandacht voor mens, milieu en dierenwelzijn.
Daarnaast willen we dat goed eten voor iedereen toegankelijk is. We helpen je dan ook graag om goed, lekker eten op tafel te zetten. En bieden een snelle, persoonlijke service – zowel in de winkel als online. Ten slotte vinden we dat goed eten betaalbaar moet zijn. Daarom kopen wij onze producten grootschalig in en zorgen wij wekelijks voor aantrekkelijke aanbiedingen.

Graag tot ziens in onze winkel!

PLUS Verbeeten en medewerkers

Description:
Estamos há mais de 20 anos, diariamente, buscando as melhores experiências para entregar aos nossos clientes, e isso vai muito além de um açougue de qualidade, frutas fresquinhas, produtos importados - com novidades do mundo inteiro, sem contar, é claro, com a entrega de diversos serviços de excelência.

Temos muito orgulho de ser uma rede de Brasília e prestigiar os produtores regionais. Além da possibilidade de entregar produtos ainda mais frescos para o consumidor final, criamos uma rede de apoio para fortalecer ainda mais o comércio local.

Iniciamos nossas atividades em uma pequena unidade no Guará, crescemos, e hoje, nossas 19 lojas geram diversas oportunidades para milhares de famílias, no Distrito Federal e no entorno. E essa é, sem dúvidas, a nossa maior felicidade.

Muita coisa mudou desde o início da nossa fundação. A sociedade, inclusive, evoluiu em diversos pontos. E nos mantivemos sempre atentos a todas essas situações. Nossa marca também evoluiu e isso não ficou restrito ao quesito visual, mas uma coisa sempre foi inegociável: sempre atender o cliente da melhor maneira possível!

Olhamos para a experiência do cliente como algo diretamente ligado à nossa cultura e buscamos oferecer o melhor atendimento em todas as etapas dessa jornada.

A felicidade verdadeira vem do ato de fazer o bem. Essa ideia deixou de ser um conceito e se tornou, além do nosso slogan, uma verdade praticada em todos os nossos dias.

Name: Eurosalad
Description:
Eurosalad is een familiebedrijf dat haar wortels heeft in de groentewinkel van de familie den Hollander. Hier werd de liefde voor en de kennis van groente en fruit van vader op zoon doorgegeven. Nadat onze groentewinkel generaties lang een begrip in Werkendam is geweest, hebben we besloten om het roer om te gooien. Tijden veranderen en de wensen van de consument veranderen mee. Eén ding blijft: De behoefte aan een kwalitatief goed en smakelijk product.

Dit is de opdracht waarmee we aan het werk gegaan zijn. Sinds 2004 maakt Eurosalad op ambachtelijke wijze heerlijke rauwkost- en fruitsalades voor Retail. Door onze vakkennis en de hoge standaard die we onszelf hebben opgelegd zijn we vanaf dag één in staat geweest om een hoogwaardig product neer te zetten.

Eurosalad heeft een spectaculaire groei doorgemaakt, maar dat neemt niet weg dat we er tot op de dag van vandaag in slagen om een ambachtelijk product te maken. Wij gebruiken geen machines, maar al onze salades worden met persoonlijke zorg samengesteld en op smaak gebracht. We bewaken de kwaliteit van onze producten van het land tot de klant. Onze missie is om deze werkwijze vast te houden, ongeacht de omvang van onze productie. Op dit moment leveren we aan de grote supermarktketens in Nederland en België, aan horecabedrijven en slagerijen.

Benieuwd geworden? Neem contact met ons op!

Graag tot snel,

Erik en Aleida den Hollander

Dies trägt dazu bei, dass mehr Menschen zu einer betreuten Beschäftigung verholfen wird, was auch heutzutage keine Selbstverständlichkeit ist. Mitgründer Chris bekam es selbst mit: Seine Schwester kam halbseitig gelähmt zur Welt und hatte mit 18 große Schwierigkeiten, eine Beschäftigung zu finden. Unser Motto: Mit gutem Kaffee Gutes tun!

Name: Natural Valle
Description:
Na Natural Valle, acreditamos que saúde, bem-estar e equilíbrio começam com escolhas conscientes — e isso vai muito além dos produtos que oferecemos.

Somos um empório natural e integral, presente no mercado desde 2015 com o propósito de transformar vidas por meio de uma alimentação saudável, suplementação de qualidade e atendimento humanizado. Nossas lojas são espaços de cuidado, escuta e orientação, onde cada cliente é tratado como único.

Mais do que vender, queremos inspirar.
Mais do que atender, buscamos encantar.
Mais do que colaboradores, formamos pessoas apaixonadas pelo que fazem.

Valorizamos o aprendizado contínuo, a gentileza nas relações e a conexão com um estilo de vida mais natural. Nosso time é formado por pessoas que acreditam no poder da transformação — que começa de dentro, com propósito, e se reflete em cada contato com o cliente.

Se você compartilha dessa visão e quer crescer em um ambiente que une propósito, performance e cuidado genuíno, o seu lugar é com a gente.

Name: Yaras Corp
Description:
Yaras Corp.  fundada en el año 2000, manteniendo hasta la actualidad los criterios bajo los que fue creada: SERIEDAD, RESPONSABILIDAD Y GARANTÍA. Estos son criterios que nos han mantenido durante más de 20 años en el mercado, proporcionando satisfacción total a cada uno de nuestros clientes.
¿Qué Ofrecemos? Nos especializamos en la manufactura y distribución de una amplia variedad de ruedas industriales, carritos de compra, carros de almacén, transpaletas, montacargas; entre otros equipos para la movilización de carga liviana y pesada de cualquier rubro; así como también todo tipo de repuestos y accesorios de excelente calidad para los mismos. Como valor agregado, en YARAS CORP., también  ofrecemos, servicios de reparación y mantenimiento a todos sus equipos para el traslado y  movilización de mercancía, brindándole a  nuestros clientes la oportunidad de alargar su vida útil y disminuir el costo de su inversión.. 
Al pasar los años la Compañía sigue creciendo. Actualmente contamos con la primera Planta de Manufactura y Re-Manufactura utilizando el novedoso proceso de Powder Coating.

Name: Cerrado Supermercado
Description:
Fundado em 11 de junho de 2011, o Cerrado Supermercado sempre busca oferecer excelência em cada um dos produtos oferecidos e em todos os serviços prestados. 
Com duas lojas físicas em Goiânia e uma virtual, O Cerrado Supermercado visa entregar a melhor experiência de compra em todos os sentidos. Na loja física você encontra uma variedade de itens aliada a um alto e consistente nível de qualidade, além de um ambiente limpo e confortável. Na loja virtual, você encontra a mesma linha de produtos com o nível de qualidade igual. A única diferença é que você pode realizar as suas compras na comodidade de casa. Na facilidade de um clique, você realiza a sua compra e nós entregamos o seu produto.

Temos uma tradição familiar, e, após várias gerações, adquirimos cada vez mais experiência no ramo, preservando o respeito aos clientes e fornecedores, valorizando bons preços e atendimento de qualidade. 

Quem chega na nossa loja já se sente em casa. Oferecemos um ambiente agradável, espaçoso, climatizado, repleto de novidades, variado mix de produtos e amplo estacionamento, pra trazer ainda mais comodidade para você na hora das compras. 

Esse é o jeito Cerrado. Do jeito que você gosta!

Name: Morris Hedstrom (MH Online)
Description:
Morris Hedstrom (MH) is Fiji’s largest wholesale and retail organisation with a chain of Supermarkets and Homemaker (variety) Stores. 

Its evolution into today’s large trading enterprise began in 1910 when Suva’s Arthur Joske Limited and Levuka’s Morris Hedstrom and Company joined forces to become “store-keepers, general merchants, wine and spirit merchants, insurance agents, auctioneers and planters.” MH now concentrates on retail and wholesale operations and the “MH” name has become a part of the fabric of Fiji life. 

In the environs of the capital Suva, MH operates supermarkets in the City, Nabua, Nasinu and a suburban shopping complex in Tamavua. It also operates specialised Homemaker Stores in the City and Nabua and a variety and stationery store also in the City.

The MH chain of stores extends to Nausori, Naulu and Korovou not far from Suva, and on to Navua, Sigatoka, Nadi, Namaka and Lautoka in the West, Ba and Tavua on the north-western coast of the main island, Labasa and Savusavu on Vanua Levu, the second largest island, and Somosomo on the island of Taveuni. 

MH merchandise spans a broad range of goods from foodstuffs, overseas fashions and modern appliances to basic agricultural supplies.

Nos bouquets suivent le rythme des récoltes et de la nature. Les fleurs et plantes qui les composent sont ramassées et séchées à la main pour révéler leurs saveurs uniques.

Vous retrouverez nos créations dans 10 lieux ambassadeurs à l'international, chez Cordelia de Castellane, 14 rue du Bac à Paris et dans de merveilleux hôtels & palaces.

Name: SaveCo Bradford
Description:
From a small corner shop to a multi-channel food retailer, SaveCo Bradford is part of a family of companies that have grown with the communities they serve over the last 30 years

Our Transition
We've come along way from our humble beginnings and have seen big changes in the way our customers buy and consume the products we sell. So it was only natural to grow with these changes.

First through growth with multiple outlets, then by opening up new channels and product lines - eventually culminating in the launch of SaveCoBradford.co.uk - the region's premier online delivery service for groceries and halal meats.

Our Mission
At SaveCo our mission is to become the region’s foremost ethnic food retailer and online delivery service. We are committed to providing the freshest groceries, HMC-Certified Halal meat and every day household items. With over 30 years experience in our field, we endeavour to achieve this through impeccable service, uncompromising quality and an unwavering commitment to the most important people to us, our customers.

Name: ACT Cooperative Corporation AS
Description:
On average, 80% of household shopping takes place without any consideration for how producers and their products contribute to CO2 emissions. In addition comes other environmental impacts or whether they treat their workers well. With annual world groceries spending alone worth trillions of dollars, that’s a great deal of money potentially not supporting considerate producers.

We think those who take the trouble to figure out ways to produce great healthy products, are mindful of the environment, treat their workers well and seek to be inclusive in their pricing, deserve your admiration and support. 

This is why we created ACT - an ambitious Norwegian startup with aim of building an-easy-to use system to help people making wise and more sustainable choices every day. 

We believe we are about to bring the most practical solution for a sustainable future to market, a sustainability revolution through sustainable shopping that can potentially reduce the global carbon footprint dramatically and increase worker’s rights. 

Our mission is to make you shop sustainably and really enjoy it.

Name: Mega Mart

Name: Riz & Co
Description:
Bienvenue chez Riz & Co, votre portail vers l'excellence coréenne ! Nous sommes spécialisés dans l'importation de produits coréens haut de gamme et dédiés à partager les trésors culinaires et culturels de la Corée avec la France.
Notre mission : découvrir de nouveaux produits sains originaires de Corée Du sud et les présenter en France ou les consommateurs sont sensible aux nouvelles tendances et spécialités venue d’Asie.
Au-delà de faire simplement du commerce, notre entreprise attache beaucoup d’importance au partage culturel et choisit ces produits avec soin pour qu’ils reflètent fidèlement leur pays d’origine.
Notre but premier est donc de transmettre les valeurs et traditions de la Corée au travers de produits au savoir-faire et à l’histoire exceptionnelle.
Nous travaillons avec des artisans comme Mme KI, nommée grand maître de la cuisine traditionnelle coréenne considérée comme un trésor vivant. Elle produit des sauces soja, de la pâte de soja & de piment d'une grande qualité, contribuant ainsi à enrichir notre sélection de produits authentiques et à promouvoir l'héritage culinaire de la Corée.
Chez Riz & Co, nous aspirons à bien plus que simplement fournir des produits de qualité. Nous vous invitons à vous immerger dans un voyage sensoriel à travers les saveurs et les histoires de la Corée, tout en découvrant les délices cachés de ce pays fascinant. Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure culinaire et culturelle.
  Découvrez MISIKGA, une marque de produits alimentaires haut de gamme conçue par Riz & Co pour répondre aux besoins des professionnels de l'alimentation. Notre objectif est de proposer des solutions innovantes pour intégrer la cuisine coréenne dans vos offres commerciales. Nous sélectionnons avec rigueur les meilleurs produits de Corée, 100% naturels, en collaboration avec des fournisseurs et des chefs réputés.

Description:
Desde 2008, a Canto de Bala tem o orgulho de ser a maior varejista do Rio de Janeiro no segmento de biscoitos, doces, balas, suplementos, produtos naturais e bebidas. 

Nossa história começou com a visão empreendedora de pai e filho, que juntos transformaram uma oportunidade em realidade. Hoje, atendemos cerca de 9.000 clientes diariamente em nossas lojas, oferecendo produtos de alta qualidade e um atendimento excepcional. 

Acreditamos que nosso sucesso é resultado de uma cultura organizacional sólida, baseada em ética, flexibilidade, criatividade e desenvolvimento profissional contínuo. Nosso time é composto por profissionais talentosos que compartilham desses valores e contribuem para o legado positivo da nossa marca. 

Estamos sempre inovando para superar as expectativas dos nossos clientes, integrando canais físicos e digitais para proporcionar a melhor experiência de compra. Além disso, mantemos um compromisso firme com a responsabilidade social e a transparência, fortalecendo nossos relacionamentos com todos os stakeholders. 

Convidamos você a fazer parte da nossa história e a acompanhar nossas novidades. Continuaremos adoçando momentos e criando memórias inesquecíveis!

In 2013, 5 Star was named one of the top 100 fastest growing companies in the State of Florida by Florida Business Journal and was named #42 of the 50 fastest growing companies in the Tampa Bay Area, by Tampa Bay Business Journal.
 
Our Mission at 5 Star Refrigeration & Air Conditioning is to be the highest quality full service equipment company servicing the food industry in the Southeast United States.

We hope to inspire mindset, attitude, behaviour and systemic change in how we treat our food and the environment. 

Started in Jun 2019, Graze Market is located at Ara Damansara and has rescued up to 200 tons of food. Follow us as we do our best to bring awareness on the issue of food waste and how it affects our environment and ultimately our one and only Earth.

A právě v drsném a nehostinném Beringově moři se rodí ty nejlepší ryby na světě. Ryby, které loví spoluzakladatel Vojta s naší partou rybářů a posílá rovnou do ČR v perfektní kvalitě, jako právě vylovené z moře.

Da tre generazioni coltiviamo la terra con passione e rispetto, trasformando ciò che produciamo in alimenti autentici e di qualità.
I nostri valori?
- Sostenibilità: scegliamo pratiche agricole che rispettano l’ambiente.
- Km Zero: portiamo sulle tavole solo ciò che coltiviamo direttamente.
- Stagionalità: ogni prodotto racconta il ritmo naturale della terra.
Non è solo agricoltura, è una filosofia che unisce tradizione, innovazione e attenzione al territorio.
Collaborare con Agricola Bariselli significa scegliere un partner che coniuga tradizione e innovazione, garantendo qualità e valori autentici per ogni progetto.

Name: Docile Online Mart
Description:
DOCILE- Q-Commerce Application - Groceries Delivery In 10-Minutes

We are passionate about revolutionizing the way people shop for groceries through technology and convenience. DOCILE lead a dynamic team that has developed a cutting-edge e-commerce grocery delivery app, providing a hassle-free shopping experience with lightning-fast delivery.

Our app offers a wide selection of groceries, fresh vegetables, fresh fruits, milk and meat, pantry essentials, and household items, all available at the touch of a button. Powered by advanced algorithms and intelligent logistics, our app ensures quick and efficient order fulfillment, enabling customers to receive their groceries in the shortest possible time in 10-mi

With many years of research in the e-commerce industry, we have worked closely with industry-leading experts to understand the pain points of traditional grocery shopping. This insight has driven the development of our app, infusing it with user-friendly features like personalized recommendations, seamless payment options, and 24/7 customer support.

We are proud to have established strong partnerships with local farmers and trusted suppliers, guaranteeing the freshness and quality of every product we deliver. By championing sustainable packaging and eco-friendly practices, we strive to make a positive impact on the environment while serving our customers.

If you are looking to streamline your grocery shopping experience and enjoy the convenience of doorstep delivery, download our app which is about to launch and join thousands of satisfied customers who are already to experience the difference. Together, let's transform the way we shop for groceries.

Docile is the first in India to offer franchising in retail grocery sector, Feel free to reach out to us directly to discuss potential collaborations, partnership opportunities, or simply to learn more about our innovative e-commerce grocery delivery app. Let's connect and revolutionize the way people shop.

Name: MAMASILI
Description:
Quando si cerca il meglio, la distanza che si è disposti a percorrere per procurarsi le migliori spezie e i migliori prodotti della terra non conosce limiti. Questo spirito di avventura ci porta in luoghi indimenticabili, dove scopriamo prodotti unici.

Sulle colline del Ruanda, sulle coste del Madagascar o alle pendici del monte Kenya abbiamo incontrato laboriosi contadini. I paesaggi sono incredibili, così come la loro dedizione alla natura e ai suoi frutti. 

Mamasili nasce per ricercare, selezionare e portare direttamente sulla tua tavola l’eccellenza qualitativa e la massima purezza organolettica offerta dalla meravigliosa biodiversità della natura, rispettandone l’ecosistema, il lavoro delle persone, senza intermediari e senza impatto sulla natura stessa. 

I prodotti che abbiamo in catalogo sono il frutto di un lavoro che ha lo scopo di rispettare e valorizzare appieno la produzione locale e i suoi protagonisti. Per questo collaboriamo da lungo tempo con piccole realtà agricole del Madagascar, del Rwanda e del Kenya  con cui ci impegnamo a promuovere quegli ideali di qualità e sostenibilità che ci contraddistinguono. 

Acquistiamo le spezie, la frutta secca e il caffè direttamente da piccoli produttori da noi attentamente selezionati. Si tratta esclusivamente di piccole e rare produzioni, provenienti da località remote.  Possiamo così assicurarvi prodotti di eccellente qualità.
