Name: Big Save Grocery & Liquor
Description:
Since our humble beginnings in 1989 as Waltloo Wholesalers, the seed of the Big Save brand was sown. Founded in 1995, we started with our very first store in Waltloo, staffed by less than 50 dedicated individuals who shared a common vision - to bring quality products within reach of every South African.

Through years of unwavering commitment and determination, we have grown from that small shop into a thriving enterprise with a strong presence in the FMCG market. Today, Big Save stands tall as a proudly family-run independent company, with over 1,000 employees contributing their expertise and passion to our shared mission.

Our journey has been a testament to the power of dedication and community-driven values. We take immense pride in the positive impact we have made on the lives of countless South Africans, providing them with access to essential goods at prices they can afford.

With five stores located in Hammaskraal, Mabopane, Marble Hall, Tshwane CBD, Mamelodi and a Distribution Centre in Waltloo, we are poised to serve our customers with even greater efficiency and convenience.

We are committed to making a difference in the communities we serve, one customer at a time. Join us in celebrating our remarkable growth and the profound bond we share with the communities we serve.

Name: Hypercheck Group
Description:
Company Profile

Checkstar is a brand with ambitious goals. While we want to deliver a premium hyperstore food retail experience to every city in South Africa we also want to create a brand that benefits four key stakeholders: our customers, our employees, our shareholders and the local communities.

To do this we want to make sure our customers are given the range of products they want at the prices they can afford; that our employees benefit from our culture and collaborate in creating our vision; that our shareholders adhere to the highest standards of stewardship and finally that we act as responsible citizens within the communities where we operate.

Who are we?

Checkstar is helpful, friendly and understanding. We’re humble, hard-working and approachable –we don’t need to pretend to be something we aren’t. We go out of our way to get our product and price right for you and, because we care about our shoppers, our customer service is as important to us as the quality of our products.

Our number one priority is you, our shopper. At Checkstar, we care enough

Name: Goodwin's Organics Foods and Drinks
Description:
Martin Goodwin, a third generation grocery retailer, saw a real need to help people improve the quality and length of their lives by providing the most whole and pure Organic foods and drinks available.

There were some challenges to overcome, including sorting out the clutter of terms surrounding foods: Antibiotic free. Organic. All natural. No hormones. Locally grown.

All of them have their benefits. Unfortunately, when most people hear or see “natural” or any number of the other terms, they assume “Organic” as well. Not so.

After months of visiting a number of “health food” stores and “natural markets” Martin thought, “It would be great to walk into a market with the assurance that everything in the store is certified Organic. No checking labels. No concerns that part of what you’re enjoying on a break between classes or bringing home to your family that evening is going to be laden with contaminants.”

Goodwin’s Organic Foods & Drinks was born. More than a store, Goodwin’s is committed to creating a community dedicated to enjoying life – at the market and online – and we invite you to be a part of it. You’ll see that what we’re ultimately committed to is your health and wellbeing; helping you to vitalize your living. We’re glad you’re here, and look forward to visiting with you in person at the lounge in the market.

The Goodwin family has been in the grocery business for over 60 years, four generations. The newest format of the family’s four stores is the all organic all the time market in Riverside, CA.  

The family is truly dedicated to serving their customers the purest and most wholesome organic foods and drinks available. Their goal is to vitalize you and your family’s daily living.

A sua história começa em 1986, iniciando as atividades com transportes de cargas na região

Aumentando a gama de 
segmento de atendimento, inovando e saindo na frente, em 2019 o grupo cria o food service. Em 2021 mais uma vez os negócios são ampliados, agora com a criação das marca de varejos,

Name: Gruppo SME
Description:
IL GRUPPO SME
SME è un'insegna leader nel settore del commercio al dettaglio in Veneto e in Friuli Venezia Giulia.

Caratterizzato dall'inconfondibile "FOLLETTO VERDE", il Gruppo è multispecializzato nella vendita di elettrodomestici, mobili, casalinghi e prodotti per il tempo libero. Nelle ampie superfici dei 9 punti vendita, ubicati in siti sempre facilmente accessibili, trova spazio un vasto assortimento, profondo e molto completo, che conta oltre 200.000 articoli.

L'azienda, che trova le proprie origini negli anni ‘60, ha vissuto un grande sviluppo nell'ultimo ventennio, affermandosi nel commercio al dettaglio, con una propria formula ed una propria identità, che la rendono unica nel panorama nazionale.Il fatturato è passato dai 140 milioni di euro del 1998 ai 340 milioni di euro del 2020. L'evoluzione del mercato è stata brillantemente presidiata e, nell'ottica della multicanalità, alla tradizionale attività di vendita al dettaglio verrà affiancata un'innovativa attività di e-commerce, che permetterà di estendere i confini del Gruppo a livello dell'Italia intera.

Il Gruppo SME, che fa riferimento alla famiglia Sartorello, conta oltre 1.000 dipendenti e si caratterizza come un'impresa che, con la concretezza del Nordest, guarda con forte modernità, attenzione ed energia, allo sviluppo della propria attività commerciale e dei servizi alla stessa correlati, con un grande obiettivo: la soddisfazione del cliente. Dall'assistenza alla vendita, alle consegne a domicilio, fino alla risoluzione delle eventuali problematiche che dovessero manifestarsi successivamente, sono tutti elementi di netta differenziazione rispetto agli altri operatori del mercato, elementi che hanno consentito a SME di diventare indubbio punto di riferimento per i clienti del Nordest.

Name: Жито Маркети
Description:
Приказната започнува во далечната 1988год. кога семејството Ѓошевски скромно и домаќински го отвори својот прв маалски дуќан за трговија на мало во Велес. Од тогаш со знаење и упорност, со верба во себе и јасна визија сопствениците продолжија да отвораат и други објекти во Велес. Како расте и се развива Жито така се зголемуваа и предизвиците пред кои се исправува. Во 1998год. Жито ја прошири својата мрежа на маркети и го отвори првиот маркет во Скопје.

Вистинската експанзија на брендот се случи во 2014-2015год. кога отворивме повеќе од 20 супермаркети ширум Македонија. Денес, компанијата “Жито” располага со 59 маркети распространети во 20 општини во земјава: Велес, Скопје, Прилеп, Битола, Струмица, Кочани, Виница, Росоман, Градско, Чашка,  Делчево, Демир Капија, Валандово, Тетово, Куманово, Неготино, Гостивар, Облешево, Кичево, Македонска Каменица. Со нашите преку 850 вработени претставуваме препознатлив бренд во својата област, а многубројните признанија (најдобар трговски објект за 2010 и 2017год., Superbrands 2015/2016, International Best Brand 2015) ни даваат поттик да продолжиме да работиме и да го направиме Жито подостапен за сите. На своите лојални купувачи им овозможивме да станат дел од “Клубот на верни купувачи” со цел да добијат и заштедат повеќе.

Денес кога конкуренцијата е огромна и треба да понудите нешто плус и поразлично, многу е важно да се задржи фокусот на потрошувачот. Затоа, во ниту еден момент не отстапуваме од нашите основни постулати на кои се потпира нашиот концепт за работа: ниски цени, љубезност и квалитет.

Name: Maison des Soeurs Macarons
Description:
La Maison des Sœurs Macarons is the oldest artisanal macaron confectionery in Nancy, a stone's throw from the majestic Place Stanislas. Founded in 1793, it is the sole holder of the true secret of the authentic Sœurs Macarons recipe, the origin of the Macaron de Nancy.

For over 220 years, the Maison des Sœurs Macarons has jealously kept the secret of the authentic Macaron de Nancy, a recipe handed down from generation to generation. 

Here you'll find the specialities that are the pride of Nancy and Lorraine, based on Bergamot (a Protected Geographical Indication since 1996) and Mirabelle, as well as our chocolates and fruit jellies, homemade with high-quality ingredients.

A little history... In 1624, Catherine de Lorraine, Catherine de Médicis' granddaughter, founded the Dames de la Charité monastery in Nancy. The nuns made a round cake from almonds, sugar and egg whites. The recipe was kept secret and passed on over the years among the lay sisters of the Dames du Saint Sacrement convent. On April 5, 1792, the decree abolishing religious congregations put two sisters of the community, Elisabeth Morlot and Marguerite-Suzanne Gaillot, out on the street. The community doctor, Docteur GORMAND, took them in at 10 rue de la Hache in Nancy. In gratitude, the two sisters took over the production of macarons, which they offered for sale. They became known as “Les Sœurs Macarons”. The Sœurs Macarons business and secret were then passed on to a niece of Françoise MORLOT (sister of Marie Elisabeth Morlot): Anne MARCHAL épouse MULLER, then from generation to generation to 3 different families, and since 1991 to the GENOT family.

In 1951, the sole store moved to 21 rue Gambetta, and the city of Nancy honored the Macaron Sisters by naming the part of rue de la Hache where the production of the Véritable Macaron de Nancy began.

U Aman i Aman Plus objektima dostupni su dobro poznati domaći i globalni brendovi, ali i uvozni artikli jedinstveni na našem tržištu, koje naši potrošači mogu pronaći isključivo kod nas. Kontinuiranim uvođenjem novih proizvoda i unapređenjem ponude, trudimo se da postavimo više standarde u maloprodaji i budemo pravi saveznik u borbi protiv visokih troškova života.

Naša misija je jednostavna:
„Najlakši način da dobijete ono što želite, jeste da pomognete drugima da dobiju ono što žele.“

Kao kompanija posvećena kvalitetnoj usluzi, realnim cenama i dostupnosti, gradimo dugoročne odnose zasnovane na poverenju – kako sa potrošačima, tako i sa poslovnim partnerima. Unutar kolektiva negujemo međusobno uvažavanje, dobre odnose i profesionalni razvoj, stvarajući radnu sredinu u kojoj se gradi karijera i napreduje.

The association undertook to guarantee to the customer QUALITY - SERVICE - LOW PRICES.

The association carries all the international brands and has a large selection own brand (private label) products.

Quality standards are maintained by continuous lab testing and in dealing with suppliers verified with ISO and HACCP qualifications.

Our extensive range of products includes a wide variety of fruits and vegetables, sourced both locally and from reputable international suppliers. Name: TEA TRIBES & Co.
Description:
When winter comes to Siberia, people from the Taïga gather pine needles and maral roots, steeping them along with beautiful red currants.
The practice is timeless.
The ingredients absolutely natural.
The benefits proven: this practice does heighten immunity all throughout the season.
And as the saying goes, "if you can’t find the proper medicine within 15 meters around you, you're not searching well enough."

You don’t learn that while sightseeing.
At Tea Tribes, we locally live in direct touch with Slavic communities, descendents of the Mayans, healers, botanists ; from Africa to Japan, from Siberia to Guatemala.
We follow them in their quest for virtuous components, whole leaves and sun-dried fruits.

You will probably be surprised to see how much each day, you will wake-up more valiant, appeased, vivified. 
Here lies our promise: Going up the currents of tea, in order to sharing its greatest benefits.

TEA TRIBES & Co.
Tea Rituals to share.

Name: Viva Regenera
Description:
A Regenera atua no desenvolvimento e distribuição de ativos da natureza e nutrimentos saudáveis, orgânicos e 100% naturais, cultivados sem o uso de agrotóxicos e insumos químicos.

Acreditamos que uma vida equilibrada e plena de saúde, bem estar e contentamento passa pelos alimentos que escolhemos para nutrir o corpo, que é o nosso templo.

Apoiamos o sistema agroflorestal, onde espécies agrícolas e florestais são cultivadas lado a lado alimentando-se mutuamente e protegendo umas às outras, como na floresta, pois para nós o alimento é uma oportunidade de deixar a terra melhor do que estava antes da realização do plantio, resgatando sua força vital de ser.

Cremos que o cultivo da terra possa produzir alimentos ao mesmo tempo em que fomenta um solo rico, um ecossistema equilibrado e garante trabalho, dignidade e renda para comunidades antes marginalizadas.

Através de um trabalho justo, honesto e transparente queremos resgatar nossa capacidade de entrar em comunhão com a natureza e nos relacionarmos melhor com o planeta, com uma alimentação saudável e rica em nutrientes, que é o melhor remédio para curar a mente e o corpo.

As embalagens de nossa linha própria, Viva Regenera, possuem o selo ‘’I’m Green’’ porque são feitas com matéria-prima 100% renovável, contribuindo para reduzir a emissão de gases do efeito estufa.

E por fim, trabalhamos somente com fornecedores reconhecidos no mercado por sua qualidade e excelência, oferecendo para você e nossos parceiros lojistas os alimentos mais puros, nutritivos, saborosos e saudáveis para enriquecer a sua dieta alimentar.

NOSSA MISSÃO
Ser o elo entre os ativos da natureza e as pessoas, empoderando-as para alcançarem saúde, equilíbrio e bem-estar”.

NOSSA VISÃO
Estamos determinados a sermos referência global no desenvolvimento e distribuição de ativos da natureza e nutrimentos saudáveis, gerando valor à sociedade, contribuindo para elevar os padrões de mercado e regenerar as pessoas e o planeta.

While our commitment to using premium ingredients may dictate our prices, our customers recognize the value in enjoying a superior product. We proudly supply renowned hotels and restaurants across the UAE, meeting the demand for excellence in every serving.

Beyond traditional venues, Napoli Ice Cream caters to events of all kinds, offering gelato, ice cream, and frozen delights through our kiosks. Whether indoors or outdoors, we ensure your event is enhanced with our delectable treats.

At Napoli Ice Cream, we strive to deliver prompt, friendly, and professional service of the highest caliber, ensuring your experience with us is nothing short of exceptional.

Name: Real Food Company
Description:
At Real Food Company, we've been "keeping it real since 1969". We specialize in natural and organic groceries, supplements, bodycare, and lifestyle products. Enjoy a stable retail working environment with great products, friendly staff and customers, and employee benefits.

Name: Rede Das Supermercados
Description:
Fundada em 10 de setembro de 2008, a Rede DAS é uma associação supermercadista formada por um grupo de empresários de diferentes cidades da região centro-oeste do estado de São Paulo.
Com expertise no ramo de supermercados, eles enxergaram a necessidade de unir forças a fim de levar aos clientes maior variedade e qualidade de produtos, melhor atendimento e preços cada vez mais competitivos.
A consolidação do projeto e o desenvolvimento de um trabalho em grupo transformou a DAS em uma das Redes mais estruturadas e organizadas da região. Em menos de quatro anos o projeto se expandiu, a estrutura passou por mais inovações e adesão de novos associados, sendo que hoje a Rede DAS conta com uma ampla e moderna central de negócios na cidade de Jaú.
Nossas lojas são referência em qualidade nas cidades onde estão localizadas, sendo que a Rede Das hoje é formada por 23 lojas, com 175 check-outs, 1.500 colaboradores, 2 centros de distribuição e 1 atacado.

Name: FoodOne
Description:
ChickenOne ist ein innovatives Produkt der Jud Metzgerei: eine verzehrfertige Pouletbrust, die durch eine spezielle Verarbeitung bis zu 40 Tage haltbar bleibt. Sie besticht durch ihre herausragenden Nährwerte, ist besonders zart und saftig und somit ideal für eine gesunde, bewusste Ernährung. Die Pouletbrust ist direkt genussbereit, was sie perfekt für den schnellen und unkomplizierten Genuss macht. 

Erhältlich in fünf köstlichen Geschmacksrichtungen, bietet ChickenOne eine Vielfalt, die sich vorallem für den Alltag eignet. Ein Produkt, das Qualität, Frische und Komfort auf höchstem Niveau verbindet.

Buy For Less Mission:
To inspire and support healthy communities as Oklahoma's leading grocery provider of fresh, diverse, unique and economical food products.

Name: Guillaume Bichet - Artisan Chocolatier Suisse
Description:
- Votre partenaire chocolatier et gastronomie d'excellence -
À la Maison Guillaume Bichet, nous allions tradition et audace pour créer des douceurs uniques. Dans notre atelier, chaque chocolat, pâtisserie, pain et viennoiserie est fabriqué artisanalement avec le plus grand soin, alliant savoir-faire classique et touches contemporaines. Notre gamme traiteur propose également des créations salées et des repas équilibrés, disponibles dans la majorité de nos boutiques au service des particuliers et des professionnels.
Notre Maison se distingue par des créations inventives qui surprennent et séduisent les amateurs de saveurs raffinées. Classiques revisités ou combinaisons inédites, chaque produit est pensé pour offrir un plaisir gustatif à la fois élégant et gourmand. Pour prolonger cette expérience, nos créations peuvent être commandées en ligne et livrées directement à domicile et aux entreprises, garantissant un service fluide et raffiné pour une clientèle exigeante.

Name: Groccii

By connecting home chefs, small businesses, and local vendors with consumers, Groccii creates sustainable economic opportunities while ensuring access to high-quality, affordable products.

Unlike traditional platforms, Groccii focuses on women-led enterprises, technology-driven growth, and impact-driven innovation. With a scalable digital infrastructure, we aim to build a smarter, more inclusive marketplace, where entrepreneurs thrive, communities grow, and technology powers progress.

Our mission is clear—empower people, drive innovation, and create a sustainable future.

Name: La Garbancita Ecológica
Description:
La Garbancita Ecológica es una Cooperativa de Consumo Responsable Agroecológico de Madrid sin ánimo de lucro, Autogestionada, Popular, Ecofeminista y de Responsabilidad Compartida Agricultores-Consumidores. Impulsamos Economía social desde la educación, la innovación y la autonomía.

 

Ofrecemos una tienda online con más de 1000 referencias y logística para dar servicio a familias, grupos de consumo, escuela y consumidores colectivos. Tenemos una Tienda-Almacén de 300 m 2 en Madrid (Vallecas) que abre de martes a sábados.

 

De 70 proveedores, cinco son miembros de la cooperativa y un transportista-logísta nos acompaña, desde nuestra actividad de Grupos Autogestionados de Consumo, hace más de 15 años. Con ellos construimos relaciones cooperativas preferentes. 

Valores
Alimentos de temporada y cercanía, biodiversidad, fertilidad de la tierra, comercio y precios justos para agricultor@s y asequibles para consumidor@s, certificación ecológica oficial y participativa, investigación, estudio, elaboración y comunicación social, diálogo campo-ciudad, Seguridad y Soberanía Alimentaria para todas las personas y todos los pueblos, así como, Igualdad de Género y trabajo digno,  trazamos una línea divisoria conceptual entre la Agricultura Ecológica globalizada y mercantilizada con sello oficial y la Agroecología Campesina sostenida por Consumo, Logística, Distribución, Cocina y Nutrición Responsables que propician Ecosistemas Sostenibles y Bienestar Humano.

Description:
WACHMEISTER ist ein erfrischendes und koffeinhaltiges Bonbon aus der  Schweiz. Die Sorten ICE MINT und RASPBERRY-Bonbons sind mit Koffein und Mate angereichert, um den Konsumenten einen natürlichen Energieschub zu geben.
 
Die handliche Verpackung ist ideal für unterwegs und ermöglicht es den Verbrauchern, ihren Energieboost jederzeit und überall zu geniessen. Sei es während eines langen Arbeitstages, beim Sport oder einfach nur, um den Geist zu beleben.
 
Das Unternehmen hat es sich zum Ziel gesetzt, Konsumenten dabei zu unterstützen, ihre Produktivität und Aufmerksamkeit zu steigern, ohne auf ungesunde Alternativen zurückgreifen zu müssen.

Name: Hansen's IGA Markets
Description:
In July of 1968, Leo Hansen completed his schooling in Madison. With his new bride, Rosemary, he sold their house and they moved back to his hometown of Bangor. With the $5,000 they made from selling their home plus a $5,000 loan from his brother, John, they bought two stores in Bangor. One of the stores was sold. The other store was a 1,500 square foot Smith’s Grocery Store that was developed into the first Hansen’s IGA. This began Hansen’s IGA’s history.
Today the company is managed by Leo and Rosemary’s sons Nick and Greg Hansen, and Greg’s wife Kari Hansen. Greg and Kari have been involved in various aspects of the business for over 25 years and Nick has been with the business for over 10 years.
Over the last 50 years, Hansen’s IGA has expanded to include 14 grocery stores located in friendly hometowns throughout Western Wisconsin, with the furthest outlying store located up north in Washburn. Our team members have grown to over 750 strong. We have seen success not only in this growth, but also in business operations and cultural development.
 Hansen’s IGA is known for our excellent homemade brats from our smokehouse, double smoked hams for the holidays, and an excellent meat selection. Our smokehouse in Bangor has consistently won awards over the last 20 years. Hansen’s IGA was awarded the 2019 IGA Innovation Award for our smokehouse operation, which only 17 IGA retailers throughout the World have the honor of receiving. Our holiday double smoked hams are a signature item which brings in customers from all over the state during the holiday seasons. Our Meat Department has good old-fashioned Meat Cutters to ensure that our meat selection is of the highest quality for our customers.

Name: AU PAYS DU CITRON
Description:
De la passion à la vente de spécialités au citron de Menton !
Au Pays du Citron est une entreprise spécialisée dans la transformation et la vente de produits à base de Citrons de Menton. 
Au fil des siècles, le « citrus limon » acclimaté à Menton est devenu une variété botanique à part entière. Son fruit, particulièrement apprécié des grands chefs et des gourmets, possède un certain nombre de caractéristiques qui lui sont propres.
Avant la création d’Au Pays du Citron, le Citron de Menton IGP, trop peu connu, n’avait que peu de débouchés à tel point que certains producteurs envisageaient d’abandonner leur production voir même de couper leurs arbres !
L’arrivée d’Au Pays du Citron a permis de relancer la production du Citron de Menton et même d’encourager la replantation de citronniers. Aujourd’hui, Au Pays du Citron utilise pour ses fabrications pas moins d’un tiers de la production locale récolté par 60 petits producteurs Mentonnais. 
Sonia et Fabrice, au travers d’Au Pays du Citron sont fiers d’avoir été les fédérateurs du Citron de Menton qui a depuis obtenu son IGP. C'est d'ailleurs grâce à leur total engagement envers le Citron de Menton qu'Au Pays du Citron est devenu l'une des deux stations officielles de conditionnement du Citron de Menton.
À cela, Sonia et Fabrice ajoutent un brin de créativité, une louche de gourmandise et surtout une immense passion pour le Citron de Menton afin de vous offrir des produits d’exception.
L’aventure Au Pays du Citron a commencé en 2008 avec le fameux Limoncello de Menton, le Vin de Citron et les confitures.
Aujourd’hui c’est près d’une centaine de produits qui ont étaient créés pour votre plus  grand plaisir et l’aventure est loin de s’arrêter car le Citron de Menton IGP inspire toujours et encore de façon inépuisable.

Faire appel à Les Pépites de Peggy, ce n'est pas seulement s'offrir de bon produits, c'est aussi repartir avec pleins de petites astuces pour rendre son quotidien plus gourmand et améliorer son bien-être.

Description:

Waar mensen hun wekelijkse lokale en duurzame boodschappen doen, vaardigheden opbouwen, netwerken en inspiratie opdoen voor nieuwe ideeën en manier van leven. Een door de gemeenschap geleide aanpak van regionale veerkracht, die de ecologische impact van voedselkeuzes vermindert.

De Breda Food Co-op is een plek voor community en verbinding – door participatie en gedeelde activiteiten voelen mensen zich meer verbonden, de kans krijgen om bij te dragen en te genieten van een groter gevoel van zelfredzaamheid, welzijn en empowerment.

De Breda Food Co-op is een hub waar lokale, duurzame en circulaire voedselproducenten hun producten kunnen laten verkopen, zodat zij zich kunnen concentreren op waar ze best in zijn: voedsel produceren.

Wij bieden workshops aan om vaardigheden teleren, verspilling tegen te gaan, kosten te besparen, zelfvoorzienend te zijn en meer plantaardig te eten. En naarmate we ons ontwikkelen, zal het aantalaanbiedingen groeien.

בשנת 1993 נפתח בירכא סניף קטן ומשפחתי, בשם מרכז המזון.
כבר בתחילת הדרך, סימנו את המטרה: להפוך קנייה שגרתית ורגילה לחוויית קניות משודרגת לכל המשפחה בכל הפרמטרים,
בכל המחלקות ובמחירים נוחים לכל כיס.
הגשמת החזון הגיעה בשנת 2014 כשפתחנו סניף שני של מרכז המזון עם  60,000
פריטים ב 20,000- מ"ר, שתי קומות מסחר וארבע קומות של חנייה
בנצרת-עילית. כך הפכה מרכז המזון להיות הסופר הגדול ביותר במזה"ת.
הגענו לשלב שבו זה כבר היה ברור שמרכז המזון,
הוא אמנם מרכז הקניות הייחודי והגדול בישראל
אבל לא רק לקניות מזון.
22  מחלקות מתמחות מהוות גם הן, חלק ממשהו שמאגד בתוכו קניות לכל
מטרה ובילוי לכל המשפחה החל מכלי בית, מוצרי מזון, פירות וירקות, מעדנייה,
תבלינים, פיצוחים, קצבייה, יינות, מוצרי טבע, מוצרי חשמל, צעצועים, ביגוד
לתינוקות קוסמטיקה ומתחם מסעדות קולינרי או בקיצור .

השם הינו שילוב של שתי מילים מרכז ו- CASA שזה בית באיטלקית
ומשם הגענו ל KAZA . המרכז מאגד בתוכו את כל המחלקות והקומות, שכל אחת
מהן היא עולם ומלואו, וה- KAZA נותן הרגשה של בית של אורחים או בקיצור Merkaza! ולכן הדגש שלנו הוא על יחס אישי ותשומת לב לפרטים הקטנים. עם היציאה לדרך חדשה
ושם חדש, אנו מבטיחים להמשיך להיות חלק נכבד ממהפכת הקניות, הבילוי
והשירות החדשני ביותר בארץ ובעולם.

「欲しいものが、いつでも手に入る。」

トライアルは、あなたの生活に「なくてはならない存在」になることを目指します。

DX（デジタルトランスフォーメーション）は、単なる業務効率化にとどまりません。
顧客一人ひとりのニーズをデータで理解し、
未来の購買体験そのものを創り変えること。
私たちは小売業の在り方を、根本から再定義しようとしています。

福岡を拠点に、全国へ、そして世界へ。
トライアルカンパニーは、変革を恐れず、挑戦を続けます。

あなたも、まだ見ぬ未来を一緒に創りませんか。

Description:
Freshmart, founded in 2018, was born from the desire to transform the Portuguese food-retail industry.

We are a multi-format - omni-channel company aimed at a time-starved society. 

Our objective is to provide our customers with the best shopping experience, range, and price and at the same time having a large and profound impact on people's lives by saving them time and changing the way they shop for and think about food.

Our same-day delivery or pickup service bring everyday essentials and fresh groceries to consumers in Portugal, in as little as 2 hours!

Radical Freshness, impeccable Quality, perfect selection and same-day service!
____________________________________________________________________________________

Freshmart, fundada em 2018, nasceu do desejo de transformar a indústria portuguesa de retalho alimentar.

Freshmart apresenta-se como uma empresa multi-formato e omni-channel. 

Acreditamos que esta é a melhor estratégia para atender às diferentes necessidades de cada um dos nossos clientes proporcionando a melhor experiência em compras. 

Dirigida a uma sociedade em que o tempo é um recurso precioso, o nosso objetivo é proporcionar aos nossos clientes a melhor experiência de compras, variedade e preço. 

Paralelamente, ambicionamos ter um grande impacto na vida dos consumidores economizando no seu tempo e alterando a forma como compram e pensam nos alimentos.

Description: Mittlerweile gibt es drei Standorte in Köln, an denen du neben Lebensmitteln mit überschrittenem Mindesthaltbarkeitsdatum auch frisches, zu kleines, krummes oder außergewöhnliches Obst und Gemüse bekommst. Wir gehen bei unseren kooperierenden Landwirt*innen selbst auf’s Feld und ernten nach. So kannst du oft lokal, saisonal, bio und gerettet einkaufen. Nachhaltig einkaufen war noch nie so einfach.

Name: EDEKA BAUR
Description:
An einem der privilegiertesten und lebenswertesten Flecken der Republik, der Bodensee-Region, vermitteln wir seit 30 Jahren voller Begeisterung echte „Lebensmittelfreude“. Mit Einsatz und Leidenschaft leben wir unsere Philosophie eines qualitätsbewussten Lebensmittel-Vollsortimenters. Die Frischemärkte BAUR stehen für den qualitativ hochwertigen Verkauf von Lebensmitteln, Feinkost und Non Food. Gemeinsam mit unseren Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern sind wir jeden Tag neu darauf bedacht den Kunden ein optimales Einkaufserlebnis zu vermitteln. Immerwährende Freundlichkeit, Frische, Ordnung und Sauberkeit sind die grundlegenden Säulen des erreichten Erfolges.

Unsere 13 Märkte befinden sich in Konstanz (5), Allensbach, Friedrichshafen, Gottmadingen, Hilzingen, Gailingen, Mengen, Ertingen und Salem.

Name: Dar Tamr
Description:
Qui sommes-nous | Dar Tamr
Chez Dar Tamr, nous sommes bien plus qu’une simple marque…
Nous sommes une histoire enracinée dans les oasis ancestrales de Drâa, où la terre donne naissance aux dattes les plus exquises, pour les offrir à chaque foyer en quête de raffinement et d’authenticité.

Fondée avec passion, Dar Tamr réinvente l’héritage des dattes marocaines à travers une approche moderne et un esprit royal. Chaque datte est soigneusement sélectionnée, puis sublimée dans un écrin raffiné, reflet de l’hospitalité et du savoir-vivre marocain.

Fiers de notre Sud, nous portons en nous la signature du terroir et une vision d’excellence. Notre mission est de vous offrir une expérience d’exception — en goût, en esthétique et en service.

Name: CASEIFICIO CAVOLA 993
Description:
The dairy “ Caseificio Cavola “ was born in 1929, in Cavola, a small village in the mountains of Reggio Emilia.

In this paradise of meadows, about 900 meters high, we only farm our fields with animal manure, avoiding chemichal fertilizers and pesticides.

This results in better, healthier fodder, a wholesome diet for our cows, and high quality milk, that puts our Parmesan cheese a notch above all cheese from the plain.

Through the decades and generations, Caseificio Cavola 993 has grown, refined, and improved production, while staying rooted in our much-loved tradition.

Number 993 has long been known to be synonymous with the highest quality mountain cheese.

Name: Cofra S.C.
Description:
Cofra nasce nel 1973 come cooperativa di consumatori, per rispondere ad esigenze sociali comuni e diffuse.

Nel 1976 apre il primo supermercato sul territorio faentino.
Ora la rete dei Supermercati Cofra è composta da 14 punti vendita: Conad Centro Commerciale Le Cicogne, Pet Store Centro Commerciale Le Cicogne, Faenza Uno in via Renaccio, Ravenna Bassette, Brisighella, Casola Valsenio, Conselice, Cotignola, Riolo Terme, Bagnacavallo-Albergone, Bagnacavallo-Fossa, Lugo-La Rotonda, Lugo-Stuoie e Piangipane.

L’offerta dei Supermercati Cofra propone ai propri clienti numerose occasioni di risparmio durante tutto l’anno: ogni settimana sono presenti offerte speciali e promozioni su un vasto assortimento di prodotti.

Nel corso degli anni Cofra ha allargato il proprio raggio d'azione, fino a diventare un vero e proprio gruppo di imprese, abbracciando anche l'ambito assicurativo (Assicofra) e fai da te (Bricofer Cofra), con il punto vendita Bricofer di Via Volta e del Centro Commerciale "Le Maioliche".

Nel 2017 ha ampliato ulteriormente la gamma delle attività gestite con l'apertura di un negozio per animali "Pet Store".

Nel dicembre 2020 Cofra si è fusa con Cpda di Bagnacavallo. Nel luglio 2021 Cofra ha acquisito il punto vendita di Lugo in via Ricci Curbastro e ha aperto il nuovo Superstore a Lugo in via Taglioni.
A dicembre 2023 Cofra si certifica per la Uni PdR 125, nell'aprile 2024 viene aggiunto alla propria rete di negozi anche il punto vendita Conad di Piangipane, chiudendo l'anno con un organico di oltre 500 lavoratori.

Name: Jack's Fruit & Meat Market
Description:
Jack’s Fruit & Meat Markets, formally known as Jack’s Fruit Market, was established in June of 1973 in Essexville, Michigan. The original intent was to provide a place where people could shop for fresh fruits and vegetables all year long.  

The core intent has remained the same, but now the “one location” on the corner of Center & Pine, has grown into five locations serving the Tri-City area.

Through everything, our focus has remained the same. Provide our customers with the freshest cuts of meat and the best produce available.  During the summer months, we buy from local farmers, this ensures the freshest fruits and vegetables for our customers. When local produce is not available, we send our own trucks to Detroit and Grand Rapids several times a week to bring the highest quality, fresh produce back for our customers.

Unser Ansatz:
Lebensmittel einkaufen macht selten Spaß. Es ist oft mühsam, zeitaufwendig, und entweder gibt es zu viel Auswahl oder du findest einfach nicht das Richtige. Wir haben uns zum Ziel gesetzt, dein Online-Shopping-Erlebnis zu vereinfachen, damit du dich auf das Wesentliche konzentrieren kannst: deinen Körper mit guter Nahrung zu versorgen.

Warum Beetroute?
Mit Beetroute musst du dir keine Gedanken mehr über die Planung deines Einkaufs oder das Zusammentragen der Zutaten machen. Alles passiert an einem Ort – schnell, unkompliziert und genau auf deine Bedürfnisse abgestimmt.

Was jetzt?
Bleib dran! Bald bringen wir Beetroute auf den Markt und revolutionieren, wie du deine Lebensmittel einkaufst. Folge uns hier, um als Erster zu erfahren, wann wir live gehen.

Name: HuckleberryNZ
Description:
At Huckleberry we don’t believe that choosing ‘organic’ is just about choosing to eat better quality food. 

We think it’s a bit bigger than that. We think that choosing organic is about making positive, healthful and sustainable lifestyle choices that are better for ourselves, our families and the planet.

Organic is about offering communities throughout New Zealand produce grown as it should be; in good, clean soil, washed by the rain and delivered fresh. It’s about providing wholesome groceries that are minimally processed and made with top quality ingredients.

It’s about the peace of mind we get from knowing where all of our products come from, and the pride we take in knowing that the relationships we have fostered with our suppliers supports local businesses and organic farming communities nationwide.

For us, organic is about bringing your own pots and tubs to fill with the very best whole foods and making nutritious meals accessible to all. It’s about recyclable, brown paper bags, and canvas totes that come with notes: WHEN LIFE GIVES YOU LEMONS ASK IF THEY’RE ORGANIC!

It’s about offering the expertise of qualified Naturopaths in store and bringing healthy eateries to our two biggest. It’s about doing our bit to bring simplicity, unpretentiousness and generosity to your pursuit of wellness.

At Huckleberry, organic is about providing the better food and lifestyle choices you’ve been looking for.

Our vision is to create thriving rural communities that can prosper from being land stewards. We incentivize regenerative agricultural practices that protect our cultural and biological diversity. 

We offer beyond organic produce grown from regenerative agricultural practices as well as other ethical and healthy product alternatives such as natural cosmetics and ecological cleaning supplies to Guatemalan families looking to live a more conscious lifestyle. 

We work in partnership with local cooperatives, associations, NGOs, small business owners and individual farmers. To date, we have delivered close to 20,000 orders to over 2,000 families and have supported over 1,000 farmers in generating over $500,000.

O nosso propósito é simples: matar saudades de Portugal, levando a autenticidade e o sabor dos produtos nacionais até às comunidades portuguesas e aos mercados internacionais que valorizam qualidade e tradição.

Trabalhamos diretamente com produtores locais, privilegiando pequenas empresas e métodos tradicionais de produção. Assim garantimos frescura, sustentabilidade e uma seleção criteriosa de artigos que representam o verdadeiro sabor português.

O nosso símbolo -  a andorinha - traduz a essência da marca: a partida, o regresso, a ligação às origens. Tal como os nossos clientes espalhados pelo mundo, voamos com orgulho e esperança, levando Portugal em cada encomenda.

Com uma estrutura logística moderna e uma equipa experiente, asseguramos rapidez, segurança alimentar e atenção personalizada em cada pedido.

Porque em cada palete enviada há mais do que produtos: há um pouco de casa, de identidade e de Saudade.

Name: Meemken Wurstwaren GmbH
Description:
Offen für Neues. Seit über 80 Jahren.

Von der kleinen Landschlachterei im Oldenburger Münsterland haben wir uns in den vergangenen Jahrzehnten zu einem modernen, mittelständischen Familienunternehmen entwickelt. 
Wir bei Meemken haben die Dinge schon immer ein wenig anders gemacht: Wir produzieren eigene Energie, glauben an vegane Produkte und stellen das Wohl von Mensch und Tier in den Vordergrund. Wir produzieren Wurst und übernehmen dabei Verantwortung.


Unser Beitrag für grüne Energie.

Seit 20 Jahren betreiben wir eine eigene Biogasanlage. Dabei verbrennen wir keine wertvollen Rohstoffe vom Feld. Sondern ausschließlich Bioabfälle und Überreste aus der Lebensmittelproduktion, die nicht mehr verwertet werden können.
Damit produzieren wir so viel Energie, wie wir auch verbrauchen. Unser Verständnis von Nachhaltigkeit. Unser Beitrag für eine klimaschonende Energiegewinnung.


Eine Frage der Haltung.

Wir setzen auf Tierwohl – aus Überzeugung. Bereits seit 2017 sind wir Mitglied im Verein zur Förderung der Offenstallhaltung von Schweinen e.V. und unterstützen regionale Landwirte so bei der Umstellung ihrer Höfe auf alternative Tierhaltung. Mit unserem 2018 entwickelten Konzept von Bauer & Metzger gelingt es uns diesen Grundgedanken weiterzuführen und Tierwohl, Regionalität, Nachhaltigkeit und Premiumfleisch in einen Einklang zu bringen. Das Ergebnis dieser Überzeugung sind Wurstprodukte der Haltungsform 4 aus Offenstallhaltung von Familienhöfen zwischen Weser und Ems.


Vegan – aus Überzeugung.

Ein Wurstwarenhersteller, der vegane Produkte anbietet? Ok. Aber „aus Überzeugung“? Ja, denn genau das tun wir. Seit über 80 Jahren orientieren wir uns nicht am Markt, sondern an Ihren Wünschen. Und die verändern sich. Deswegen bieten wir nun auch fleischlose Produkte an. Aus voller Überzeugung und stets in bekannter Meemken Qualität.

Name: The Farmers' Store
Description:
The Farmers' Store sprouted into existence in 2017 to initiate food transparency and traceability across our expanding all-organic range of groceries.

Our journey began under the wings of mentors and pioneers of the organic ecosphere in India such as Kavita Mukhi without whom adopting the organic lifestyle for a lot of us in Mumbai would remain a pipe dream. 

The Farmers' Store's first humble offering to the streets of Bandra was located on Dr BR Ambedkar road. Today, our flagship TFS store stands across the street from where we first began. 

We set out to build a growing organic community through a WhatsApp broadcast group in 2018 with our first 50 subscribers, who still rely on us for their daily organic groceries till date. A year later we set up a store on Perry Cross Road and our third store in Juhu. 

When the pandemic hit us in 2020, our responsibility of being an essentials provider was solidified. The TFS team took it upon themselves to persevere through and keep operations running seamlessly. 

Amidst the pandemic we launched our website and mobile app for online shopping with same day delivery. We were determined that our patrons never went a day without their supply of fresh organic produce and groceries sourced directly from handpicked rural farmers across India who meet our quality standards. It was a challenge we took on with a smile and we continue our digital expansion post-pandemic. 

The Farmers' Store is coming to a street near you. Ordering through our website and app is hassle free. We are one of the very few organic stores that offers same day delivery in Mumbai and also delivery across India. So if you're in Delhi, looking to try some of our organic red rice from rural farmers of Southern India, log in today!

Description:
Супермаркет Бурлекс е българска търговска верига, лидер на пазара за бързооборотни стоки. Притежаваме модерни търговски обекта с обща площ над 100 000 кв. м., благодарение на които сме открили над 5000 работни места, обслужващи почти 470 000 семейства.

В търговската верига пазаруват почти 200 000 клиента на ден, на които предлагаме качествено обслужване и атрактивни цени. Работим с над 700 контрагента, като това са предимно български производители. На територията на страната функционират и няколко собствени логистични центрове, а всеки град разполага със свои регионални складови бази, с които се подпомагат и координират доставките.

Name: Shobi
Description:
Shobi est une marque spécialisée dans la sélection, la transmission et l’accompagnement autour du thé japonais mono-variété, directement sourcé auprès de producteurs artisanaux au Japon. Chaque thé est cultivé avec soin, fraîchement récolté, et sélectionné pour sa qualité, sa traçabilité et son caractère unique.

 Nos Produits
Nous proposons une gamme raffinée de thés japonais mono-variétés, représentatifs des terroirs et savoir-faire traditionnels du Japon :

Sencha – Le thé vert le plus populaire au Japon, riche en umami et fraîcheur végétale.

Gyokuro – Thé d’ombre haut de gamme, à la douceur intense et à la rondeur exceptionnelle.

Matcha – Thé vert moulu utilisé dans la cérémonie du thé, sélectionné pour son équilibre parfait entre douceur, profondeur et intensité.

Hōjicha – Thé vert torréfié au parfum grillé et à faible teneur en caféine.

Genmaicha – Thé vert associé à du riz grillé, avec une note gourmande et toastée.

Genmaicha au Matcha – Mélange harmonieux entre douceur du riz et puissance du matcha.

Thé vert au Yuzu – Alliance rafraîchissante entre thé japonais et agrume typique du Japon.

Mugicha – Infusion d’orge grillé, naturellement sans caféine, appréciée pour son goût de céréales et ses bienfaits digestifs.

 Tous nos thés sont disponibles en quantité adaptée aux professionnels et aux particuliers, dans des conditionnements qualitatifs, adaptés à la conservation.

 Nos Services
Conseil & sélection de thés pour restaurants, salons de thé, concept stores, hôtels ou épiceries fines.

Formations et ateliers autour de la préparation traditionnelle du thé (matcha, sencha, etc.)

Création d’expérience sur-mesure autour du thé pour enrichir une offre gastronomique, événementielle ou culturelle.

Deswegen haben wir das Rezept unseres Ingwershots so lange perfektioniert, bis die ideale Mischung aus herrlichem Geschmack und guten Eigenschaften für dich entstanden ist: 62g frischer Ingwer, 3g indischer Premium-Curcuma, sowie 0,06g milder Pfeffer, verleihen dem Shot seine geschmackvolle Würze. Name: Aman Marketi
Description:
Kompanija AMAN je porodična firma koja postoji već 30 godina, osnovana je 1992 godine u Beogradu. Od svog osnivanja bavi se trgovinom i uslugama.


Svoj bitan razvoj kompanija beleži od 2008 godine kada kreće sa otvaranjem i povećanjem broja maloprodajnih objekata.


Vrednosti koje kompanija AMAN neguje i podržava su poštovanje i poverenje. Konstantnim ulaganjem u znanje zaposlenih težimo da od njih stvorimo kadar za dalji i održivi razvoj kompanije.


U našim maloprodajnim objektima pored dobro poznatih domaćih brendova možete pronaći i artikle iz svih krajeva sveta koji su pažljivo odabrani.


Danas kompanija AMAN ima više od 280 objekata u kojoj je zaposleno više od 3000 ljudi.

 

Za ovakav uspeh zaslužni su svi zaposleni u kompaniji, jer uspeh ne čine dobra vremena već ljudi.

Zato se bavimo i dobrim međuljudskim odnosima, kako unutar kompanije tako i sa našim vernim potrošačima i poslovnim partnerima.

Name: Pobudka
Description:
Pobudka została założona w 2014, jej działalność opierała się na dostarczaniu do biur gotowych posiłków. Wraz z jej rozwojem obszar dostaw rozszerzył się na całą Warszawę.
Od pandemii w 2020 roku Pobudka do swojej działalności dodała sklep internetowy, którego mechanika jest prawie identyczna jak zakupy u sprzedawcy – wybieramy z menu to, co chcemy. Od 2024 roku rozszerzyliśmy zasięg naszych dostaw do kilkunastu miast w całej Polsce. W Pobudce nie ma żadnych diet czy gotowych jadłospisów – codziennie można zamawiać to, na co ma się ochotę. Wychodzimy z założenia, że jedzenie oraz cały proces jego zamawiania/ kupowania ma przynosić przyjemność i dawać radość, a nie ograniczać czy stresować.

Wychodzimy z założenia, że „zawsze stać nas na dobrą energię” – dlatego właśnie czasem nad zyski przekładamy zachowania i postawy, które wydają się nam właściwie. Właśnie z tego powodu w zeszłym roku CAŁKOWICIE przeszliśmy na jajka od kur z wolnego wybiegu („jedynki”) – w żadnym z naszych posiłków nie ma już innych jajek. Stale wprowadzamy do naszego menu wegańskie i wegetariańskie pozycje, staramy się dbać o recykling opakowań i przykładamy ogromną wagę do zarówno do jakości naszej obsługi klienta jak i do wewnątrzfirmowej kultury pracy, co się po prostu przekłada na ogromny szacunek jakim darzymy wszystkich pracujących w Pobudce ludzi. Interesuje nas holistycznie podejście do życia – chcemy, żeby nasza marka kojarzyła się z energią, zdrowiem, work life balance, pozytywnym myśleniem i zadowoleniem z życia.

Name: PAKnSAVE Tamatea
Description:
At PAK'nSAVE Tamatea we provide you with the lowest prices, friendly service, local products that make your dollar go further.

PAK'nSAVE Tamatea follows a food warehouse format unique to New Zealand supermarket shopping. We buy and stock a range of everyday basic products in bulk, and because we can do this in such large volumes it means that we can pass the savings on to you, in the form of New Zealand's lowest overall food prices.

You'll always find great Bonus Buys in-store - we pride ourselves on getting the best deals by taking advantage of opportunities to negotiate in the marketplace.

In our stores, we offer a practical and functional environment with wide aisles, where the grocery items are stacked on the shelf in their boxes so that it's easy to shop, and there are lots of checkouts to get you on your way as quickly as possible.

Because we reduce our costs by these methods, we can pass the savings directly on to you, without reducing the quality of the products we offer. You only need to check out our fresh food departments to find great quality fruit and vegetables, meat, seafood, deli and bakery items, all at competitively low prices.

Cresciuti alle falde del Vesuvio, abbiamo sempre creduto nella vendita diretta e nel valore dei negozi di vicinato, luoghi dove freschezza, relazione umana e fiducia si incontrano ogni giorno. Oggi contiamo oltre 50 punti vendita e più di 20.000 clienti al giorno.

Il nostro marchio si esprime attraverso due format complementari:

Ciro Amodio – Il Fresco Quotidiano
Il brand storico: un modello di spesa di prossimità con più di 300 referenze tra freschi, latticini, salumi, forno e gastronomia, in ambienti che uniscono la modernità delle boulangerie al calore delle salumerie di quartiere.

Ciro Amodio 1825
Il format archivio, nato per raccontare oltre i confini campani la nostra storia gastronomica “fatta come si deve”. Tra i suoi simboli, la marenna, interpretata attraverso una proposta lifestyle ricca e trasversale.

Name: Villadoro Italia Srls
Description:
C’è un filo invisibile che lega i sapori autentici alla passione di chi li sceglie. È questo il cuore di Villadoro Italia, un viaggio iniziato a Milano nel 1994 e cresciuto tra le vigne, i profumi e le storie dei migliori artigiani italiani. 
Oggi come allora, esploriamo con amore e dedizione ogni angolo del nostro Paese, selezionando con cura vini e prelibatezze che raccontano l’anima più vera del Made in Italy: visitiamo cantine e vigneti, ascoltiamo le voci dei produttori e osserviamo le loro mani sapienti trasformare la natura in capolavori enogastronomici.

Ma Villadoro Italia non è solo una collezione di eccellenze. È un mosaico di persone che credono nel calore delle relazioni, nel valore della tradizione e nella bellezza della condivisione. 
Le nostre Collaboratrici e i nostri Collaboratori sono il cuore pulsante di questa realtà: con passione, accompagnano i nostri Clienti in un viaggio fatto di gusto, emozioni e fiducia.

Crescere insieme è il nostro modo di fare impresa: chi entra a far parte di Villadoro trova opportunità, formazione e un ambiente in cui ogni successo è condiviso. Perché dietro ogni bottiglia selezionata con cura e ogni prodotto raccontato con entusiasmo, c’è sempre una storia. E la nostra è scritta da chi, ogni giorno, sceglie di farne parte.

Perché la qualità non dovrebbe mai essere un lusso, ma un’abitudine.

Name: 24H SUPERMARKET
Description:
24H SUPERMARKET es la primera RED DE MERCADEO INTERNACIONAL de productos y servicios que incluiye los bienes de consumo de la canasta familiar.

Es la única red de mercadeo en donde no tendrás que vender ningún tipo de producto o servicio, porque está basada en el autoconsumo de productos de primera necesidad que habitualmente usamos (arroz, azúcar, Frijoles, jabón, pasta dental, etc.)

- Sin comprar productos que no necesitamos
- Sin manejo de inventarios
- Sin vender nada
- Sin manejo de cartera de cobranza
- Sin gastar en desplazamientos para comprar, vender y cobrar
- Sin ataduras
- Sin dejar de hacer nuestras actividades o trabajo cotidiano

24H SUPERMARKET como pionero de este innovador y revolucionario concepto, ofrece a sus afiliados la facilidad de obtener bonificaciones que van desde un ingreso extra, hasta resultados económicos realmente sorprendentes.

Realizando esta labor nos hemos consolidado legalmente en ECUADOR – COLOMBIA – MEXICO – VENEZUELA – COSTA RICA – GUATEMALA – EL SALVADOR – PANAMA y en proceso de expansión a otros países de Latinoamérica y del mundo.

Construyendo un EQUIPO y todos como auto consumidores y promotores, hacemos posible que todos GANEMOS, premiando nuestro esfuerzo y convirtiendo los gastos en ingresos.

Hacer mercado mensualmente pasará de ser una necesidad y obligación a convertirse en una actividad rentable para millones de familias alrededor del mundo.

Si deseas más información escríbenos a gerencia24h@gmail.com

Name: APEROLOGY
Description:
À l'origine : 
 Deux amis passionnés de cuisine, amoureux du goût et fervents amateurs de l'apéritif ont décidé de concrétiser leur passion. Leur parcours professionnel les a conduits aux quatre coins du globe, leur permettant ainsi de découvrir de nouvelles saveurs et cultures culinaires.

 Leur terrain de prédilection : 
 Le sud-ouest de la France jusqu'au bassin méditerranéen, des régions réputées pour leur ensoleillement, leur gastronomie renommée et leur art de vivre convivial. Au cours de leurs périples, ils ont eu le privilège de rencontrer des producteurs tout aussi passionnés qu'eux, dotés d'un savoir-faire ancestral et animés par la volonté de préserver la tradition et l'artisanat local.

 Notre Promesse : 
 Nous avons décidé de fédérer ces producteurs exceptionnels, d’humaniser leurs produits partageant les mêmes valeurs et l'amour du travail bien fait, autour d'une marque commune. Cette marque est le gage de qualité, d'engagement et de respect des traditions. 

 Notre objectif : 
 Notre ambition est de créer une véritable communauté autour de l'apéro, en mettant en valeur les talents de ces producteurs et en les accompagnant dans la promotion de leurs créations uniques. Nous croyons en la force du partenariat, en la synergie entre artisans passionnés.

 Une offre diversifiée : 
 Nous sommes fiers de vous proposer une sélection soigneusement élaborée de produits apéritifs, allant des tartinables aux crackers, en passant par les pâtés et les bocaux de saveurs. Chaque produit a été choisi avec le plus grand soin pour sa qualité, son authenticité et son goût exceptionnel. 

 Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure apéritive : 
 Nous vous invitons à embarquer avec nous dans cette aventure gustative et humaine. Suivez notre page pour découvrir les trésors de nos producteurs, être informé des nouveautés et participer à des événements passionnants. Rejoignez notre communauté et laissez-vous séduire par l'essence même de l'apéro

Name: claro fair trade AG
Description:
Mit viel Herz und Engagement betreiben wir seit 1977 100% Fairen Handel mit Kleinproduzent*innen im Weltsüden und engagieren uns für eine bessere Welt. Bei uns kannst du dich darauf verlassen, dass alles zu fairen Bedingungen produziert und gehandelt wird. Du weisst, dass wir bei der Produktion auf soziale und ökologische Aspekte achten und Dank unserem Engagement die Artenvielfalt in einer kleinräumigen Landwirtschaft gefördert und soziale Projekte unterstützt werden. Nachhaltigkeit ist ein Bestandteil unserer Philosophie - seit 1977. Unsere Produkte werden von unseren langjährigen Partnern und Partnerinnen im Weltsüden bezogen. In den claro Läden, Weltläden, dem ausgewählten Fachhandel und unserem Online-Shop findest du ausschliesslich qualitativ hochwertige, fair gehandelte Produkte.
Mit unseren Produzent*innen verbindet uns eine vertrauensvolle und oft jahrelange Partnerschaft. Unser gemeinsames Ziel ist eine sozial und ökologisch nachhaltige Produktion. Und natürlich ist uns auch die Qualität sehr wichtig. Damit du bei uns mit gutem Gefühl geniessen und dich an unseren schönen Produkten freuen kannst. Die in der Handelsgesellschaft vereinten Aktionärinnen und Aktionäre verbindet die Zielsetzung, einen gerechten Handel zwischen Nord und Süd zu schaffen sowie eine nachhaltige Entwicklung basierend auf den Richtlinien des Fairen Handels zu ermöglichen. Wir übernehmen Verantwortung für Mensch und Umwelt. Für uns ist es selbstverständlich, die natürlichen Reserven unseres Planeten so wenig wie nötig zu beanspruchen. Schonungsvoller und nachhaltiger Anbau heisst für uns, dass wir mit unseren Produzent*innen wo immer möglich auf biologischen Landbau setzen und sie bei der Umstellung finanziell und mit Know-how unterstützen. Sozialverträgliche Arbeitsbedingungen und die Gleichberechtigung von Frauen* gehören zu unseren verbindlichen Grundsätzen. Unseren Handelspartner*innen begegnen wir auf Augenhöhe. Fair, ökologisch und transparent - das ist claro!

Name: Vinhandel.dk - Gunnar Madsen Vinhandel - En del af GLUDVIN
Description:
Om Gunnar Madsen Vinhandel - En del af Gludvin
Forretningsånden er den dag i dag stadig den samme, som for mere end 89 år siden. Begreberne service og vejledning er stadig i højsædet, og vort gamle slogan: "hvorfor ind til byen tørne, når varen er på Madsen`s hjørne" har forsat sin store aktualitet og er højt værdsat af vores kunder.

Gunnar Madsen Vinhandel blev grundlagt d. 1. Marts 1927 af Tage Gunnar Madsen.
I 1948 udvidede han butikken og drev forretningen med sin kone Lilli frem til sin alt for tidlige død i 1961.

Fra starten blev der lagt en ære i ikke at sige nej til noget, og forretningen havde et meget bredt sortiment indenfor især tobaksvarer.
Indenfor vin blev der lagt vægt på kvalitetsvarer, og også her var sortimentet efter datidens forhold særdeles stort.

I 1945 blev den forrige ejer Ole Gunnar Madsen født. Efter endt læretid i 1964, startede han som medarbejder i forretningen og i 1970 indgik han et interessentskab med sin Mor, Lilli Madsen, indtil han overtog forretningen i 1975.

Siden dette tidspunkt har Ole & Birthe Madsen med hjælp fra gode medarbejdere drevet forretningen frem til at være en mere specialiseret vinhandel. Det var startskuddet til at blive den mest velassorterede butik inden for vin & spiritus.

I år 2009 valgte Ole og Birthe at sælge butikken til en lokal øbo, den nuværende ejer Renè Steinvig ( født 1965 ). De næste par år blev brugt på at udvide sortimentet til også at dække friskmalet kaffe, Chai The, Summerbird & Sv. Michelsen chokolade, special øl, delikatesser fra rundt om i verden for at kunne tilfredsstille den store efterspørgsel fra vores kunder.

Ao longo dos anos, a empresa consolidou sua presença no setor, expandindo suas operações e conquistando a confiança dos consumidores. Hoje, 90% dos nossos produtos não são com data critica, mas mantemos o menor preço, com descontos de até 70%. 
Em abril de 2024, a empresa anunciou uma oportunidade de negócio para novos franqueados, destacando-se como uma das redes que mais crescem em minas gerais. Essa iniciativa visa expandir ainda mais a presença da marca no mercado.

Somos a unica rede do segmento que atua em mais de 3 municipos; estamos presente em bh/ contagem/ betim/ santa luzia/ rib. Das neves/ caete e lagoa santa.

Name: La Lucerna
Description:
LUCERNA fue fundada en 1959 por un pastelero suizo quien decidió establecerse como empresario independiente en la ciudad de Pereira, centro de la región cafetera de Colombia, donde se produce el mejor café del mundo. En sus inicios LUCERNA era una pequeña empresa familiar que se dedicaba a la producción de fina pastelería europea. Con el tiempo, LUCERNA empezó a diversificar su producción y a ampliar su distribución. Uno de los productos que se fabricaban de manera exclusivamente artesanal, son los famosos turrones de maní, que fueron adquiriendo popularidad a nivel nacional como un dulce típico de la región cafetera. Debido al éxito del turrón LUCERNA, se decidió tecnificar su producción y ampliar la oferta de productos. En 1985 se inauguró la fábrica de turrones, donde actualmente se producen turrones en diferentes variedades y sabores, tanto para el mercado nacional como internacional. LUCERNA es hoy una moderna empresa de marca reconocida en todo el país, con tres plantas de producción y más de 45 años de experiencia en el mercado de alimentos. Su gama de producción abarca productos de pastelería, panadería, galletería, chocolatería, heladería, turrones y comidas rápidas. LUCERNA se ha caracterizado siempre por la calidad de sus productos, fidelidad a sus principios y respeto al consumidor.                                                            
MISION: Somos una empresa que fabrica productos alimenticios con los más altos estándares de calidad y responsabilidad social, con criterios de rentabilidad y talento humano competente. Nos comprometemos con esfuerzos que nos lleven a incrementar nuestra presencia en mercados nacionales e internacionales y la ampliación de nuestro portafolio de productos.

Name: DEMAIN
Description:
Chez DEMAIN, vous retrouvez des produits provenant de 25 boulangeries artisanales, fabriqués la veille, et vendus le lendemain à moitié prix. 	

133 rue Saint Maur - 75011 Paris

Une boulangerie perd en moyenne 5 à 10% de ce qu’elle fabrique chaque jour : il est extrêmement difficile de prévoir le flux exact, et quand on souhaite proposer de la variété à ses clients, il faut accepter que certains produits ne soient pas vendus. Ces produits sont encore bons, et il est souvent compliqué pour les boulangeries de tout reproposer le lendemain à moitié prix. 

DEMAIN est un lieu dédié, où l’on retrouve les produits qui n’ont pas trouvé preneurs la veille, et qui n’ont pas été récupéré par des associations. Encore parfaitement consommables, les produits sont vendus juste un jour de plus, à moitié prix dans notre local.

Name: Chalira Gewürz- und Senfmühle
Description:
Mit viel Handarbeit und Leidenschaft kreiert das Team mit und um
Gründer Michael Morskoi einzigartige Gewürzmischungen, Würzpasten und Senf. Ideal für die Alltagsküche, besondere Momente und Geschenke.

GEWÜRZ- UND SENFMÜHLE
Wir arbeiten möglichst saisonal, mit Verstand und natürlich von Hand. Zum Beispiel haben wir unsere 120-jährige Schrotmühle mit viel Liebe restauriert. Ein altes Handwerk wiederzubeleben und frisch zu mahlen, bringt viel Freude und tollen Geschmack in die Mischungen.

PHILOSPOHIE
Wertschätzung fängt für uns in der Region an. Deshalb beziehen wir bewusst Rohstoffe aus der Schweiz, aus Österreich und Deutschland und fördern so die regionalen Kleinbauern. Andere mit Fairness gehandelten Rohstoffe stammen von Kleinbauern-Kooperativen aus Griechenland, Serbien, Sri Lanka, Süd-Indien und Madagaskar. Unsere Produkte werden zudem in violette Gläser abgefüllt, um die Aromen und Farben möglichst lange zu schützen. Dadurch sind die Mischungen lange verwendbar und ökologisch nachfüllbar. Unser Versand ist zu 100% plastikfrei, wir nutzen Solarstrom für Mobilität und Maschinen und suchen stets nach ökologischen Alternativen.

QUALITÄT
Wir produzieren Swiss Handmade, mit hochwertigen Bio-Rohstoffen, saisonal, nachhaltig und umweltbewusst. In kleinen Mengen werden Rohstoffe schonend bei 35 °C dehydriert/getrocknet, handverlesen und von uns in 10 kg Einheiten gemahlen und gemischt. Indem wir die Prozesse bewusst auf viele einzelne Schritte aufteilen, können wir
z. B. ohne Hitze arbeiten und so den vollen Geschmack erhalten. Unsere Kreationen stecken voller Überraschungen und Liebe zum Detail.

Sortiment: Gewürzmischungen, Senfe, Saucen und Würzpasten 
Spezialitäten: Birnensenf, Biersenf, Harissa, Olivensalz, violettes Curry
Zertifizierung: CH-BIO-086 (Bio Test Agro AG)

Name: Les Aliments Chicoine
Description:
Depuis 40 ans, Les Aliments Chicoine Inc. se démarque dans le domaine de l’alimentation. D’un petit grossiste de viandes en gros, fondé en 1979 à Roxton Pond, près de Granby, l’entreprise est devenue un important joueur au niveau de la coupe de viandes fraîches sur mesure et de la distribution alimentaire.

En juin 1979, Guy Chicoine entreprit le commerce de distribution de viande en gros ayant comme spécialité à l’époque, la vente de porc frais et de charcuteries. Étant boucher de métier, il a effectué, avec les années, toutes les opérations que doit connaître un gestionnaire d’entreprise telles que la vente, la sollicitation, l’achat, la préparation, la livraison et l’administration de l’entreprise. En avril 1988, il y eut l’incorporation de l’entreprise sous la même raison sociale soit Les Distributions Guy Chicoine Inc.

Plusieurs changements ont eu lieu par la suite, tels que l’ajout d’employés, de camions et de produits qui ont nécessité un nouvel emplacement. Depuis 1994, nous occupons la bâtisse située au 434 Robinson Sud à Granby et l’année suivante, nous avons remporté un méritas attribué par la chambre de commerce de l’endroit pour l’entreprise de commerce de détail de moins de dix employés.

L’entreprise s’est démarquée dans le domaine de l’alimentation avec la gamme complète de produits de viandes fraîches et congelées. Par la suite, un service de découpe de viandes fraîches s’est instauré au sein de l’entreprise pour répondre aux demandes et besoins spécifiques des commerçants. Nous sommes devenus un leader auprès de la clientèle de la restauration, l’hôtellerie, les institutions et bien d’autres.

Depuis ce temps, nous nous sommes améliorés à tous les niveaux que ce soit au niveau du personnel et de sa gestion, les volumes de vente par territoire, la gestion de l’informatique, des équipements et de meilleures méthodes de travail tant pour la qualité de nos produits que la mise en place de bonnes pratiques de fabrication qu’est la salubrité.

A

Name: Triple Fresh Market & Catering
Description:
Triple Fresh is one of the oldest continually operated food establishments in the country. The original building was constructed by Gideon Pierce to serve the needs of the growing village of Ercildoun in 1818.  Pierce, a member of the Followfield Meeting House across the street, was a staunch Abolitionist and conductor on the Underground Railroad.

Pierce's store served as the village's post office, and officially established the village's name of Ercildoun.

The Webster family purchased the building and adjacent farm around 1863 when the family moved to Ercildoun from the Lancaster area. Throughout the Webster’s tenure the market changed to meet the needs of the people of the surrounding area. The three generations of Websters sold everything from paint and nails to buggy and Model T parts and gasoline as well as groceries, school books and clothing. Rocking chairs were on the porch so that the Websters could sit with their friends.

Jim Petro purchased the store from Lloyd Webster in 1987. For over 30 years the Petros have modernized the offering of Triple Fresh Market while preserving the small town institution. Triple Fresh continues the traditions of the last 200 years; serving our friends and neighbors, and continuing to act as an integral part of our community.  The Petro family invites you to share in the rich history and heritage of this two-century old landmark.

Triple Fresh will provide outstanding customer service in clean, well maintained facilities and vehicles. Our customers and clients will be treated as guests and friends. Our staff will be well trained and informed and maintain a professional demeanor and appearance at all times. Our focus will always lie in ensuring our customers are completely satisfied with the quality of product, level of service and overall shopping experience. Triple Fresh will focus on delivering great food and supporting local vendors.

Triple Fresh Market is always evolving and changing to meet our customers’ needs.

Description:
CHOCQLATE exquisite chocolates, embodying pure indulgence and highest quality - with the "Q" in CHOCQLATE representing excellence. It is partly handcrafted by a German mid-sized company. 

What sets us apart is our globally unique recipe, blending the richness of finely roasted cocoa from South America with the unparalleled purity of "Virgin Cacao," obtained through completely natural, unroasted processes.

The true essence of CHOCQLATE lies in the delicate melting sensation and the sublime smoothness found in our 73% cocoa chocolates. The letter "Q" in CHOCQLATE embodies this extraordinary quality. However, our commitment to excellence goes beyond taste alone.

At CHOCQLATE, we place a strong emphasis on sustainability and environmental responsibility. All our ingredients are sourced from ecologically grown produce, ensuring a positive impact on both nature and communities. Our beans are fairly acquired from a peruvian Djungelplantage - a foundation project - known for their ethical practices. Moreover, our packaging is entirely plastic-free, manufactured using solar power right here in Germany.

We believe that the presentation of our chocolates should reflect their inherent power and quality. Hence, we meticulously design our packaging, aiming to create a visually stunning experience for our customers. It is no wonder that CHOCQLATE is often sought after as a premium gift, symbolizing a tasteful gesture of appreciation.

CHOCQLATE is a brand under the TrustFood GmbH, headquartered in Munich, and was established in 2016.

Celebrating the beauty & pureness of chocolate, CHOCQLATE stands in a league of its own.

Afin de sublimer ce produit d'exception, Sandrine a élaboré une recette unique de confitures d'un nouveau genre : les Confits ... de fraises et de framboises. 
Une formule secrète ne contenant que deux ingrédients, le fruit lui-même et un peu de sucre canne bio afin de permettre à chaque variété d'exprimer sa singularité. 
Et oui, car chez Maison Carletti nous connaissons bien nos fruits qui sont élevés, récoltés et transformer artisanalement sur notre site à Bourran dans le Lot-et-Garonne.

MAISON CARLETTI ce sont des produits nés d'un savoir-faire d'exception et soutenant nos valeurs éco-responsables et durables.

Name: Extraplus Supermercados

Aqui tem sempre a comodidade de fazer compras sem enfrentar trânsito, fazendo o pedido na hora que quiser, de onde quiser e com entrega programada no endereço escolhido. No Extraplus você leva para casa marcas exclusivas de produtos nacionais e importados, carnes exóticas, queijos das melhores regiões, vinhos e bebidas de todo o mundo. Tudo selecionado e embalado de um jeitinho especial.

As atividades do Supermercado Extraplus começaram em 2002. Hoje, são dois supermercados na cidade de Vitória e um em Vila Velha, que fazem parte do Grupo Coutinho.

Name: Ipertriscount Supermercati
Description:
Ipertriscount è una delle aziende leader nel settore della  vendita al dettaglio nella città di Roma e della sua provincia.
La storia del marchio inizia nel 1962 con l'apertura del primo punto vendita, prosegue con la creazione del marchio Ipertriscount nel 2003.

Fa parte del GROS, il più importante centro d'acquisto della zona di Roma che con i suoi 170 supermercati punta ad un punto di distribuzione di generi alimentari basato sul consumatore finale.

La politica commerciale di Ipertriscount è volta ad offire prezzi bassi ed un vasto assortimento delle migliori marche: il nostro slogan è "+ Qualità + Prezzo + Quantità dal 1962".

A più di 60 anni dalla nascita, Ipertriscount investe e impiega tecnologie di gestione avanzate, sia per la vendita al dettaglio nei supermercati, sia in quella online, dove offre la possibilità di fare la spesa online come al supermercato.

Ipertriscount è presente a Roma e provincia con 8 Supermercati, impiega più di 1.000 collaboratori e la sede direzionale direzionale si trova a Roma.

Le informazioni sulla privacy relative al trattamento dei dati si trova a questo link: https://ipertriscount.it/privacy.html

Name: Delart Chocolat

Descubre el Arte del Chocolate Personalizado con nosotros! 

En Del´art chocolat, transformamos el chocolate en una experiencia única y memorable. Somos especialistas en crear chocolates personalizados para negocios de todo tipo, desde eventos corporativos hasta regalos promocionales y mucho más.

Nuestros chocolates son elaborados con ingredientes de alta calidad y diseñados para reflejar la esencia de tu empresa. Ya sea que necesites bombones personalizados para un evento especial, tabletas con el logotipo de tu empresa para una campaña promocional, o una colección de chocolates exclusivos para tus clientes, tenemos la solución perfecta para ti.

¿Por qué elegirnos?

Creatividad y Personalización: Trabajamos contigo para diseñar chocolates que se alineen con la identidad de tu marca y satisfagan tus necesidades específicas.

Calidad Premium: Utilizamos solo los mejores ingredientes para garantizar un sabor y una presentación excepcionales.

Compromiso con el Servicio: Nos dedicamos a ofrecer un servicio excepcional y garantizar que cada detalle sea perfecto.

Creemos que cada negocio tiene una historia que contar, y el chocolate es una forma deliciosa de hacerlo. 

Ponte en contacto con nosotros para descubrir cómo podemos ayudarte a hacer de tu próxima ocasión un evento inolvidable.

Síguenos para inspirarte y no dudes en contactarnos para más información!

אנו ממשיכים לעמול לשיפור השירות, שיפור מגוון מוצרים רחב, איכותי וזמין בכל עת, לשביעות רצון הלקוחות.

Name: SENSETORY GmbH
Description:
𝐖𝐞 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐥𝐮𝐱𝐮𝐫𝐲 𝐟𝐨𝐨𝐝𝐬.
We test, analyse and evaluate them – and according to strictly defined criteria.

SENSETORY has a network of experts in the field of sensory analysis that is unique in Germany. Among these experts are wine academics, vintners, sommeliers and oenologists. The advantage of such a mix is the variety of aspects under which the products are tested. The result: a precise evaluation that takes all market-relevant criteria into account. We test alcoholic beverages such as wine, wine-based beverages, sparkling wine, beer and spirits as well as their non-alcoholic variants. 

Because pleasure needs the human senses.

The sensory organs serve as measuring instruments, placing the human senses centre stage. Sensory analysis of appearance, smell, taste and haptics form the framework for the detailed assessment. Part of our company’s philosophy is the continuous training of our tasters. This is how we keep our standards at the highest level.

For reliable quality.

Our efficient, reliable quality control stands out a standardized procedure, always the same procedures as well, a sensory work that is reproducibly implemented according to defined DIN standards. In compliance with these requirements, SENSETORY is accredited by the German Accreditation Body GmbH (DAkkS) according to the current standard DIN EN ISO/IEC 17025:2018. This confirms our competence as an independent testing laboratory for valid quality assurance.

For a characteristic assortment.

Sensory analysis is intended to maintain a continuous level of quality. Our DAkkS-accredited, standardized process is reproducible and provides a basis for decisions you can rely on. We offer security and orientation when evaluating and selecting your products, thereby supporting you in the further development of your product range.

Name: CPFR Advisor
Description:
CPFR ADVISOR, ofrece servicios de asesoría en temas logísticos y comerciales, a aquellas empresas que desean maximizar las ventas en cadenas comerciales, de manera eficiente.

El mercado moderno (cadenas comerciales) presenta un crecimiento sostenido en Costa Rica, sin embargo, el grado de complejidad logística y comercial para atenderlo de una manera eficiente, también crece. Por tanto, CPFR ADVISOR, ofrece a sus clientes, un equipo de asesores con amplia experiencia en la materia, acompañados de herramientas y metodologías innovadoras que le permitirán alcanzar sus objetivos.

CPFR ADVISOR, ofrece asesoría en diferentes áreas:
   - Análisis de indicadores logísticos y comerciales (Fill Rate, OTIF, Ventas, DOH).
   - Gestión de inventarios en puntos de ventas (Revisión de IPs, Capacidades modulares)
   - Métodos de trabajo eficiente de las grandes cadenas comerciales (Walmart, Automercado, Pricesmart, Megasuper)
   - Análisis de datos ofrecidos por las cadenas comerciales, que permiten la colaboración comercial y la disminución del conocido "efecto látigo".
   - Desarrollo del proveedor acorde con los requerimientos solicitados por las cadenas comerciales (reportes periódicos, plantillas de trabajo, normalización de procesos, métodos de comunicación)

CPFR ADVISOR, un aliado logístico para su equipo comercial.

Garantizamos que recupere en el mercado, la inversión ejecutada en nuestra asesoría.

è la storia della famiglia Allegri che ha conquistato decine di migliaia di famiglie in tutta Italia e in tutta Europa grazie alla qualità delle Capsule e Cialde di Caffè, Bevande Tè e Tisane prodotte con amore Interamente in Italia e vendute negli oltre 40 Negozi in Europa a marchio “la Capsuleria” e sul negozio online: 
www.lacapsuleria.com

UNA CAFFE’ SCELTO
CON AMORE E CON PASSIONE

Le nostre miscele iniziano il loro viaggio dalle migliori piantagioni del sud/centro America, India e Africa, per poi essere torrefatte in Italia, nelle città di Brescia & Vicenza.

Nelle torrefazioni con le quali collaboriamo nascono i mix di arabica e robusta che abbiamo minuziosamente studiato, uniche nel loro gusto e cremosità.

Dopo di che, le miscele della Capsuleria vengono incapsulate in capsule di tutte le tipologie, compostabili, alluminio , plastica alimentare. Quando abbiamo iniziato questa avventura abbiamo voluto differenziarci in tutto e per tutto, non solamente per il gusto del caffè che, in ogni caso deve essere l’elemento fondamentale della nostra realtà.

LA NOSTRA 
2° CASA:

Dopo la produzione in torrefazione Il Caffè viene spostato nel magazzino centrale.

Nel nostro deposito di oltre 2000mq di Brescia sono custoditi preziosamente tutti i Caffè, le Bevande, i Tè e le Tisane in Capsule e Cialde per tutti i sistemi presenti sul mercato prodotti a marchio La Capsuleria in collaborazione con le nostre Storiche Torrefazioni Italiane Partner.

Tutte le nostre ricette per le miscele di Caffè, Bevande, Tè e Tisane sono state studiate ad HOC per la Capsuleria e ad ogni produzione mensile tutti i prodotti vengono controllati personalmente da tutti gli addetti in torrefazione e dai titolati della Capsuleria per verificare che ogni tazzina di caffè rispetti la ricetta originale. Ci teniamo veramente tantissimo che ogni tazzina rispetti gli stessi standard, giorno per giorno, senza deluderti, mai!

Name: Green Hills Market
Description:
Green Hills’ history extends back to the 1930s, when Carrie Hawkins opened a roadside farm stand to supplement the dairy’s income during the Great Depression. Located on Route 80 in South Onondaga, the Green Hills farm stand offered the “sweetest sweet corn” and famous succulent tomatoes thanks to the valley’s fertile soil. In the 1950s Carrie’s son, Clifford, expanded the stand to meet growing popularity and it grew in stages to its present size—the current building at 5933 South Salina Street, just a short distance from the Nedrow exit off Route 81.

The Green Hills building encompasses all the older structures, and you can still see the roofs of older building stages—even some remnants of the original troughs the farm stand housed! The store’s growth over the years has been organic and its character and people are the unique result. It has employed generations of local families and is still run by the Hawkins family: Clifford’s son Keith, grandson Gary and Gary’s wife Heather, can all be found in the store daily. While the Hawkins family planted its last crop in the 1970s, Green Hills is a place devoted to local farmers, producers and the community.

Description:
Die Firma Pastificio del Leone GmbH bietet ein Pasta-Sortiment an, das aus 100% Schweizer Zutaten besteht und mit traditionell italienischen Rezepten und Produktionsmethoden hergestellt wird. Dabei achten wir vom Produkteinkauf bis zur Lieferung des Produkts auf die Nachhaltigkeit.

Unsere Pasta
Unsere Pasta werden mit Rohstoffen aus der Schweiz hergestellt. Das Mehl für den Pastateig beziehen wir von der Altbachmühle AG aus Wittnau. Die Eier aus Freilandhaltung beziehen wir von der FOU GmbH.  Die Pasta von der Pastificio del Leone GmbH werden nach traditionell italienischen Rezepten und Produktionsmethoden hergestellt.  Unsere Maschinen sind mit Bronzematrizen bestückt, die dafür sorgen, dass die Pasta eine raue Struktur erhält, damit die Sauce besser haften bleibt. 

Unser Trocknungsverfahren ist sehr schonend (trocknen bei 28 °C bis 32 °C für 24h), so dass die Nährstoffe in der Pasta nicht verloren gehen. Nach dem Trocknungsverfahren wird die Pasta von Hand abgepackt und versandbereit gelagert.
