Name: 99 Grãos Produtos Naturais
Description:
Descubra o segredo do sabor perfeito! Apresentamos a você a Página da 99 Grãos , sua fonte de inspiração culinária. 
 Torne cada refeição uma experiência extraordinária com nossos temperos exclusivos e condimentos de alta qualidade. 

Nossos produtos são cuidadosamente selecionados para realçar os sabores naturais dos seus pratos favoritos. Prepare-se para uma explosão de aromas e sabores incríveis!

 Se você busca um toque especial para suas receitas, estamos aqui para te ajudar! Nossa vasta seleção de temperos e condimentos é a chave para despertar o chef que existe em você. Surpreenda sua família e amigos com pratos irresistíveis, dignos dos melhores restaurantes.

 E não se preocupe com a complexidade das receitas! Nossos temperos e condimentos foram especialmente desenvolvidos para facilitar sua vida na cozinha. Com apenas alguns toques, você poderá transformar ingredientes simples em refeições memoráveis. Cozinhar nunca foi tão prazeroso e fácil!

 Além disso, na Página da 99 Grãos, a qualidade é nossa prioridade. Trabalhamos em parceria com produtores locais e respeitamos rigorosos padrões de seleção, garantindo que você tenha em mãos apenas o melhor. Cada frasco é embalado com carinho e cuidado, preservando o frescor e a autenticidade de cada ingrediente.

 Nossos temperos e condimentos são a combinação perfeita entre sabor e qualidade, para que você possa desfrutar de refeições deliciosas sem comprometer sua alimentação saudável.

 Aproveite nossas promoções exclusivas! Ao nos acompanhar , você estará repleto de receitas especiais e dicas de uso dos temperos e condimentos. Queremos que você se torne um verdadeiro mestre da culinária, encantando todos ao seu redor.

Name: E.Leclerc Vitré
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page LinkedIn du centre E.Leclerc de Vitré !

Depuis bientôt 50 ans, notre établissement est ancré dans le territoire vitréen et a su évoluer avec la croissance de la population et ses nouveaux besoins.

Aujourd’hui, nous restons une entreprise à taille humaine qui emploie près de 250 personnes, proche du cœur de ville, offrant l’accès aux produits et services du quotidien.

Nos valeurs résident dans le bien-être au travail de nos salariés, l’engagement à satisfaire pleinement nos clients, à les conseiller au mieux et à défendre leur pouvoir d’achat.

Nous sommes très attachés à notre territoire et donc à notre environnement à travers nos opérations « Nettoyons la nature », mais également en limitant au quotidien l’utilisation excessive du plastique. Nous proposons des sacs en caisse en fibres naturelles, la possibilité de venir avec ses propres contenants faire ses courses, ainsi que des conditionnements consignés « Berny ». Nous travaillons avec de nombreuses filières de recyclage et luttons aussi contre le gaspillage alimentaire grâce à nos partenariats solidaires.

Le réseau social et économique dynamique du pays de Vitré et de la région nous permet de mettre à l’honneur nos producteurs locaux qui assurent des produits de qualité des circuits courts grâce aux « Alliances Locales », facilement repérables en rayon.

Les partenariats que nous avons mis en place sont aussi au niveau sportif, culturel, social et avec des établissements scolaires.

Notre centre commercial regroupe une douzaine de boutiques et une diversité de concepts Leclerc afin de rendre accessibles au plus grand nombre les biens et les services.

Retrouvez ainsi, l’Espace Culturel, la billetterie, la parapharmacie E.Leclerc, le Manège Bijoux, la station-service et le Drive, avec la possibilité de se faire livrer à domicile.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre engagement pour une expérience responsable au centre E.Leclerc de Vitré !

Name: Fit2go GmbH
Description: Fit to go ist Ihr Partner für gesunde, hochwertige Mahlzeiten, die das Leben einfacher machen. Wir spezialisieren uns darauf, eine ausgewogene Ernährung zugänglich zu machen – sowohl für Endkunden über unseren B2C-Onlineshop als auch für Betriebe und Fitnessstudios im B2B-Segment. Mit Stolz zählen wir namhafte Partner wie Cleverfit, voestalpine Tubulars und Staff24 zu unserem Kundenkreis, die alle den Mehrwert gesunder Mitarbeiterverpflegung erkennen. Unser vielfältiges Angebot umfasst über 20 Gerichte – von Rindfleisch-Gemüse-Wok über High-Protein Kaiserschmarrn bis hin zu veganem Kichererbsencurry und Thunfisch-Pasta. Unsere Mission: Gesunde Ernährung so einfach und bequem wie möglich zu gestalten, mit Produkten, die Frische und Qualität in den Vordergrund stellen. Erleben Sie den Unterschied mit Fit to go – wo Gesundheit, Qualität und Bequemlichkeit Hand in Hand gehen.

Name: Albert Heijn Nuland
Description:
Albert Heijn Nuland is een service-supermarkt voor iedereen. Al meer dan 75 jaar bieden we in onze winkel een ruime keuze, dagelijkse inspiratie en hoge kwaliteit. Onze 80 medewerkers spelen daarin een centrale rol. Zij staan dag in dag uit voor de klant klaar. Naast boodschappen doen in de winkel bieden we ook online veel mogelijkheden zoals boodschappen thuis laten bezorgen of boodschappen ophalen in de winkel. Daarnaast neemt nonfood (keukenartikelen, lifestyle en speelgoed) een steeds grotere plaats in.

Albert Heijn Nuland biedt uitgebreide keuze, volop voordeel en veel winkelplezier. We bieden een groot en gevarieerd assortiment, met een royaal versaanbod. Er is onder andere een ruime sortering delicatessen, groente & fruit en brood komt uit eigen oven. Ook zijn er verschillende kookconcepten, zoals Kookgemak en Maaltijdgemak. In onze winkel zijn producten in alle prijsklassen verkrijgbaar: u kunt kiezen uit de bekende merken, producten van het eigen Albert Heijn-merk en het scherp geprijsde AH BASIC-assortiment.

Door ons assortiment af te stemmen op de specifieke behoeften van onze klanten proberen we iedereen zo persoonlijk mogelijk te helpen. In onze winkel spelen we natuurlijk in op lokale behoeften van Maasdonk en omstreken. Balkenbrij, Bloedworst en Brabants roggebrood zijn hiervan goede voorbeelden. We kijken naar de behoefte van de klanten die in de buurt van onze winkel wonen.

Onze klanten leiden tegenwoordig vaak een steeds drukker leven waardoor gemak en flexibiliteit belangrijker zijn dan ooit te voren. Daarom biedt Albert Heijn Nuland verschillende alternatieven: boodschappen doen in de winkel, online bestelde boodschappen thuis laten bezorgen of boodschappen ophalen in de winkel. Daarnaast bieden ook en webwinkel met unieke merken van keukenartikelen, lifestyle en speelgoed in Nederland. En kunt u aan het einde van het jaar bij ons terecht voor kerstpakketten, particulier of zakelijk.

Gewoon bij Albert Heijn Nuland.

Name: Washington Community Market
Description:
The history of the Washington Community Market reflects the story of the Downtown Eastside itself. Passionate people advocating for residents’ rights. Organizations work together to tackle complex challenges. And the commitment to creating - and maintaining - low-barrier spaces where everyone belongs. 

After several years of operating as a local food security program by Vancouver Coastal Health, PHS Community Services Society took over operations of the Washington Community Market in 2011. The Market continued to operate for many years thanks to ongoing support from Vancouver Coastal Health and BC Housing. In 2021, the Community Impact Real Estate Society assumed management and operations of the Market, with a vision to grow its impact in the community.

Now non-profit organizations, housing operators, health providers and other local businesses are invited to support the neighbourhood and its residents by purchasing groceries, goods and supplies from the Market. Open an account and get started today.

Name: Geflügelhof Schönecke GmbH
Description:
Geflügelhof Schönecke GmbH is an owner-managed family business from Lower Saxony in the 4th generation.

For over 100 years we have been trading with agricultural products from our own farm and with products from regional cooperation partners. we select our partner farms carefully, because sensible, species-appropriate husbandry and high meat quality are our top priorities.

In addition to daily fresh eggs from our own farm and from cooperating farms, we offer a wide selection of the best poultry. In autumn, fresh game from German forests and lamb complement the assortment, and rump steak, ribeye steak and especially fine animal welfare pig "Ringelswin" round off the high-quality meat offer.

Exquisite sausage and ham specialties, homemade delicatessen salads and an attractive bistro with homemade cold and hot dishes are also part of the range.

The cradle of the business is the Harburg weekly market on the sand. Today we are represented at 13 weekly markets in and around Hamburg. In addition, we also sell our products in retail and wholesale.

Name: LES P'TITS CAGEOTS
Description:
Les P'tits Cageots à Bordeaux : La solution pour permettre au consommateur de profiter pleinement des produits locaux en circuits courts 

C’est en 2008 que l’aventure des P’tits Cageots a commencé afin de répondre à une demande croissante de produits locaux et de saison et une aspiration à un commerce plus éthique.

Pionniers sur le territoire : 
Pour répondre à ces attentes, nous avons choisi d’organiser notre activité en lien et proximité avec des petits producteurs d’ici, ensemble réunis autour de volontés et de valeurs communes ! Il fallait oser !

Aujourd’hui et depuis 13 ans déjà, en tant qu’entreprise de l’Economie Sociale et Solidaire, nous distribuons sur l’agglomération bordelaise, de bons et beaux produits locaux, sains et savoureux : fruits et légumes, vrac, produits frais, épicerie ! Des P’tits Cageots qui régalent et vous offrent, à coup sûr, fraîcheur, saveur et bien-être !

3 P’tites Fermes bio : 
Le temps passant, face à des difficultés récurrentes d’approvisionnement en bio, tant en termes de variété que de quantité, c’est devenu une évidence… Il fallait y aller, essayer : mettre les mains dans la terre et produire par nous même ! Nous nous sommes lancés dans notre activité paysanne avec une première P’tite Ferme et avons étés vite confortés dans ce choix. Aujourd’hui, avec nos 3 Fermes maraichères bio - La P’tite Ferme de Léognan en pleine activité, La P’tite Ferme du Haillan avec son beau projet de verger et son projet maraicher en début d’activité et La P’tite Ferme de Saint-Médard D’Eyrans en devenir - nous espérons pouvoir couvrir les ¾ de nos besoins en légumes bio.

Grâce à vos commandes, vous contribuez à une démarche solidaire, qui a du sens, qui nous permet de mener à bien notre mission d’insertion, en accompagnant nos salariés dans la résolution de certaines problématiques sociales, dans la construction de projets professionnels leur permettant d’accéder à des emplois durables.

Name: D.C. SCOTT & ASSOCIATES FOOD BROKERAGE, INC.
Description:
Our Promise: 
D.C. Scott & Associates is a Regional Full-Service Grocery, Specialty, and Natural Food Brokerage. We feel our principals, retailers, and distributors are a part of our extended family and intend to treat them as so. Our account managers average over 30 years’ experience in the food industry and carry insight of the retailers in our coverage area. We partner with our principals, retailers, and distributors to increase sales and perfect our relationships for success. 

Introduction:
D.C. Scott & Associates started in 1998 with 1 man, 7 principals, 1 customer and a business plan to be the best in the market. Never did David dream that he would have a team of people that expanded outside of Texas. It was his vision and determination combined with great leadership, that he would achieve these goals. His daughter Brandi joined the team in 2011; starting from the bottom to grow Brandi developed her skills and knowledge. She now shares the same vision as David; to offer a superior level of service that is memorable. D.C. Scott will continue to put people first. Developing new emerging brands and bringing back attention to established brands to expand their business in this changing and challenging food industry. 

Broker Benefits
•	Access to retailer’s review schedules are evaluated for opportunities to present new emerging brands and innovative products 
•	Knowledgeable on all retailers’ specific goals and strategies for a successful business. 
•	Consumer trends are reviewed regularly basis to maintain current business and grow organically with emerging categories in the grocery industry. 
•	Creative in-house promotions with the ability to review and analyze the sales and data. 
D.C. Scott has rebranded their Retail team as Brand Ambassadors 
•	Current presence in each major city and is committed to their team at all major retailers. 
•	Recaps displays at store level and pictures are recapped monthly via a link to D.C. Scott Share Drive.

Name: Michel Belin
Description:
Fondée par Michel Belin, Maître Artisan au savoir-faire reconnu, la Maison est synonyme de tradition et d'innovation. Reconnue pour ses créations d'exception, la Maison a accumulé des distinctions prestigieuses au fil des années. En 1988, Michel Belin a été classé parmi les 10 meilleurs chocolatiers de France par le Guide des Croqueurs de Chocolat. En 1997, il a remporté le Trophée National du Meilleur Pâtissier de France, suivi en 2001 par le titre de Meilleur Chef Pâtissier de France décerné par le Guide Pudlo.
Son talent a également été célébré à l’international, notamment avec le World Pastry Stars à Milan en 2017, et en 2019, il a été nommé Chevalier dans l’Ordre de la Légion d’Honneur, une distinction rare pour un artisan pâtissier. Plus récemment, en 2023, Michel Belin a été honoré du titre de Meilleur Pâtissier du Monde lors du prestigieux salon Host Milano.

Тус компанийн О'Реш органик сүлжээ дэлгүүр нь 2021 оны тавдугаар сард эхний салбараа 2021 оны долдугаар сард хоёр дахь салбараа нээхээр төлөвлөж байгаа ба эхний салбар нь Удирдлагын хөгжлийн институтийн хойно байрлах Академи хороололд байрлах бол хоёрдугаар салбар нь Хүннү 2222 дээд зэрэглэлийн орон сууцны хороололд байрлах болно. Эдгээр дэлгүүрүүддээ өргөн хэрэглээний бараа бүтээгдэхүүн зарахаас гадна органик хүнс болон өдөр бүр шинэ ногоо жимс хэрэглэгчиддээ санал болгохоор зорьж байгаагаараа онцлог юм. Тус дэлгүүрийн гол үйлчлүүлэгчид нь дээр дурдсан орон сууцны хотхонууд болон эргэн тойрны бусад хотхоны оршин суугчид байх ба органик шинэ хүнс зорин ирж үйлчлүүлэх үйлчлүүлэгчид мөн зорилтот зах зээлд хамрагдаж байна. Мөн бид хэрэглэгчиддээ зориулан аппликэйшн хөгжүүлж, түүгээрээ дамжуулан хүргэлтийн болон pick-up үйлчилгээнүүдийг нэвтрүүлэхээр ажиллаж байна.

Fundada en 1994, actualmente sus asociados engloban a más de 19.000 establecimientos comerciales y 282.000 trabajadores. En Cataluña, representan un 65% de la distribución alimenticia, con más de 3.400 establecimientos.
CEDAC tiene como objetivo trabajar por la mejora de la competitividad, la eficiencia y la sostenibilidad del sector, promoviendo un diálogo permanente y constructivo con las Administraciones Públicas, las organizaciones empresariales, los agentes sociales y los propios consumidores, que asegure un modelo comercial de proximidad que dé respuesta a las necesidades de la ciudadanía.

Name: Garden City Food Co-op
Description:
Imagine a downtown grocery store filled with fresh, locally produced and fairly priced foods directly from local farms. In this store, the money you pay for your groceries is a contribution to the sustainable development of your local community. All for the better, you feed yourself, your family, your neighbours, and the local economy. 

By 2015, Garden City Food Co-op will bring this version of a grocery store to downtown St. Catharines. Our many volunteers, members, farmers, producers, and community partners are working hard to bring wholesome and fairly priced food closer to where we live or work.

Garden City Food Co-op will provide a fresh approach to food and food shopping. This means local food that is high-quality, homegrown, wholesome, and reasonably priced. It means food shopping that supports the local economy, honours our community and consumer issues, and nurtures sustainable food practices. In short, you will be choosing from the best local produce and products around while adding tremendous value to your own community. Farmers, friends and families will all be connected—via real food.  

Expect a change in attitude towards groceries and community. Expect a more sustainable, cost-effective and inclusive local food system. Expect a unique and vibrant alternative to the conventional grocery store experience. Watch for Garden City Food Co-op to open its doors in 2015. Better yet, join us and become a part of the change.

Denn der Durchschnitt der deutschen Bevölkerung konsumiert etwa die vierfache Menge an freien Zuckern, die von der WHO als langfristiges gesundheitspolitisches Ziel für sinnvoll erachtet wird - gerade in Anbetracht der steigenden Adipositas Fallzahlen.

Mit unseren zuckerreduzierten Produkten sowie Workshops - rund um eine gesunde Ernährung - wollen wir den Verbraucher unterstützen, dem Übermaß des Zuckerkonsums entgegenzuwirken.

Die advanced food GmbH ist angesiedelt am Universitäts-Standort Marburg und wurde von der Serial Entrepreneurin und Foodbloggerin Genevieve Larsen gegründet. Zuerst haben wir uns auf verschiedenen Zuckeraustauschstoffe wie unser DATTEL POW(D)ER und dem SWEET + POW(D)ER in unterschiedlichen Geschmacksrichtungen fokussiert. Mittlerweile umfasst unser Sortiment auch weitere zuckerreduzierte und funktionale Produkte wie unser COCOA Drops, das COLLAGEN POW(D)ER, ein Milchsäurebakterienmix und vieles mehr. Description:
Située à Victoriaville dans le Centre du Québec, Produits Delta est une manufacture spécialisée dans la fabrication de tableaux d’écriture et d’affichage.

Depuis 1936, l’entreprise ne cesse d’évoluer et de progresser pour s’adapter aux nouvelles demandes et exigences du marché. Aujourd’hui, Produits Delta est un acteur important pour l’économie de la région. Chaque année, l’entreprise exporte plus de 400 000 produits à travers le Canada et les États-Unis.
Architectes, contracteurs, commissions scolaires, institutions gouvernementales et entreprises font confiances aux produits de Produits Delta.
Les matériaux utilisés pour la fabrication des tableaux sont spécifiquement sélectionnés par des ingénieurs expérimentés dans le but d’offrir un produit de qualité supérieure, répondant aux normes les plus strictes pour un usage intensif et régulier.
En tant que fabricant, il est possible de commander un tableau sur mesure avec des dimensions et caractéristiques hors normes ou sélectionner un produit de la gamme standard.

De plus, produits DELTA est expert en communication visuelle et solutions de collaboration. En effet, nous proposons aussi des solutions clés en main de communication sur écran.  

De l'analyse de vos besoins à la mise en place opérationnelle, nous vous accompagnons à chaque étape du projet : 

- Analyse de l'environnement
- Élaboration d'une stratégie adaptée à vos besoins
- Proposition d'une solution sur écran numérique et tactile
- Création de contenu multimédia
- Intégration des équipements dans vos locaux.

Nous intervenons dans différent projet qu'il soit simple ou plus complexe, nos équipes élaborent des solutions personnalisées.

Name: The Eco Larder
Description:
The Eco Larder is a social enterprise bringing Zero Waste living to Edinburgh. Annual consumption of plastic bottles alone is set to top half a trillion by 2021, nevermind all other plastic packaging in the food and drink industry alone. This plastic epidemic is far outstripping recycling efforts and jeopardising oceans, coastlines and other environments.

Publicity on this waste crisis is finally hitting the mainstream media and this is forcing governments to act. The concept of Zero Waste living has steadily grown alongside the waste crisis over recent years, but there is a long way to go and a huge shift in public awareness is needed to support a real change.
Zero Waste living fundamentally involves consumers minimising all ‘one use’ packaging in their household.
The Eco Larder will stock everyday household goods including dry foods, nuts, grains, spices, herbs, teas, cleaning products, toiletries, baby products and many more zero waste alternatives to everyday items.
The Eco Larder will provide a community shop and dispenser system to take these products home in any reused, recycled packaging owned by the consumer.

We aim for this Social Enterprise to garner a community spirit that can flourish and spread behaviours into more and more households in Edinburgh and beyond.

Our Mission

Our Aim is to reduce plastic waste filling up our oceans and to create a greener planet. If we don’t change our plastic consumption, our ecosystems, health and economies will not survive, impacting future generations.
Running as a Social Enterprise, the Eco Larder will donate its profits to organisations concentrating significant efforts on helping our wildlife and people currently directly affected by waste levels.

Name: Freedom Tech / Cable Box
Berkcious
Description:
In the past, majority of the pigs bred in Malaysia were full of harmful chemicals. Pigs were given artificial growth hormones and antibiotics to increase their growth rate. This results in lower breeding time for pigs hence, lower cost for farmers to increase their profit. With all these harmful substances in the pork, people were worried for their children and loved ones. Parents were scared their children's growth would be stunted because of this.

Moreover, many traditional farms do not properly dispose of their agricultural waste resulting in air pollution & soil contamination. Residues generated from these pollutions will then be channeled into a water source thereby polluting the water and harming aquatic animals.

Hence, Berkcious was established in 2015 in Ipoh. Our aim was simple
1) To produce natural & great meat 
2) To never use antibiotics, growth hormones, beta-agonist, or any chemicals on our pigs
3) To use sustainable farming methods to protect the environment

Name: Meateria.official
Description:
Benvenuti nel mondo Meateria, la vostra risorsa affidabile ed innovativa per prodotti alimentari di alta qualità. 

Siamo orgogliosi di presentarci come fornitore della ristorazione commerciale, specializzati in carni provenienti da tutto il mondo da produttori che si
impegnano ad allevare con impatto climatico neutro o tramite sistemi “rigenerativi”.

CHI SIAMO
Siamo un gruppo di professionisti da oltre 40 anni nel mondo alimentare e, in particolare, in quello della carne, che mettono al servizio della clientela tutta la loro competenza ed esperienza selezionando prodotti sostenibili con una filiera corta e totalmente trasparente.

Privilegiamo rapporti diretti con produttori che ci permettono di proporre una filiera corta dall’allevatore alla tavola (Farm to Fork) sempre selezionando la
migliore qualità.
I nostri prodotti sono anche certificati attraverso la “Blockchain” che ci garantisce una inalterabilità della supply chain e della tracciabilità con una completa trasparenza fino all’utilizzatore finale. Inalterabilità e trasparenza sono le basi per un consumo informato e
responsabile.

PERCHE’ SCEGLIERE Meateria?
 - Qualità garantita: selezione accurata dei prodotti e dei fornitori e dei metodi di rifornimento
- Continuità: disponibilità dei prodotti e standard qualitativi costanti 
- Prezzi concorrenziali: offerte imbattibili grazie al nostro sistema d’acquisto
- Sostenibilità: impegno verso un futuro più attento all’ambiente
- Etica: creazione di un rapporto etico con clienti e collaboratori 
- Sicurezza alimentare: inviolabilità dei dati di tracciabilità e provenienza tramite Blockchain
- Servizio clienti dedicato: supporto ed assistenza personalizzata

 Seguici su instagram! https://www.instagram.com/meateria.carnidalmondo/

Our journey began with the opening of our first store on Agra Road, Jaipur, and has since expanded to over 500+ stores across India.

From Kanota to Adarsh Nagar, and beyond, each iPer Mart store represents our commitment to bringing affordable, high-quality products closer to communities, while providing meaningful employment. As we grow, our core mission remains to offer exceptional value for money and cater to the diverse needs of every Indian family.

At iPer Mart, we're dedicated to researching and delivering new products that enhance daily life, ensuring our customers receive the best value possible. Our ongoing journey is a testament to vision, determination, and collective effort, as we strive to empower lives, enrich communities, and shape a brighter future for all.

Name: Petit Panier
Description:
Petit Panier – The Local Market Without Intermediaries !

 Producers: Sell Directly, Maximize Your Margins

Are you a producer looking to sell your fresh products directly to consumers, without going through a long chain of intermediaries that cut into your profits? Petit Panier offers you a dedicated physical sales space where you keep full control over your pricing and products.

 Why join Petit Panier?
 Direct access to consumers – Build stronger relationships and loyalty
 Better margins – You set your prices, no middlemen
 Increased visibility – A prime location to showcase your products
 Simplified logistics – Focus on your production, we take care of the rest

We’re building a people-centered market that values your expertise and ensures an efficient short supply chain. Join us today and be part of the future of local food distribution! 

 Consumers: Fresh, Local, and Direct !

Love fresh, local, and affordable products but find them too expensive or hard to access? Petit Panier connects you directly with producers, cutting out intermediaries for fair prices and total transparency.

 Why choose Petit Panier?
 Ultra-fresh products sourced from local producers
 Transparent and fair prices
 Guaranteed traceability – Know where your food comes from
 A quick and convenient shopping experience

We are in the launch phase, and your feedback is essential to building a more sustainable and fair model in Quebec. Join us and be part of the short supply chain revolution!

Name: GoodShifter
Description:
Discover our concept and give your opinion : https://goodshifter.com/en/goodshifter-needs-your-help

 Our mission is to help people make better consumption choices - for our health and for the environment.

 This is why we are developing a grocery shopping assistant app that will provide its users with an assessment of the impact of their buying habits on their health and on the planet, and recommend more suitable products that are available to order.

 We want our app to be the go-to shopping assistant app that will allow users to achieve the goals that really matter to them, whether it’s reducing carbon emission or sugar intake, the use of plastics, buying products with less additives etc. 

The app is still in the development phase but check our website and instagram accounts for some tips. 

Follow us on Instagram :
UK : https://www.instagram.com/good.shifter.uk/
FR : https://www.instagram.com/good.shifter/

Goodshifter est un appli d'aide à la consommation durable qui permettra d'évaluer l'impact de nos habitudes d'achat sur notre santé et sur la planète et de recommander de meilleurs produits disponibles autours de vous. 

  Nous voulons que notre application permette à ses utilisateurs d'atteindre les objectifs qu’ils veulent se fixer en matière de consommation responsable, qu'il s'agisse de réduire leurs émissions de carbone ou leur consommation de sucre, l'utilisation du plastique ou l'achat de produits avec moins d'additifs…

L'application est encore en phase de développement, mais consultez notre site Web et nos comptes instagram pour quelques conseils.

https://www.instagram.com/good.shifter/

 Devenez bêta-testeur : 
https://goodshifter.com/fr/devenez-beta-testeur

Name: Chili vo hie
Description:
Chili vo hie ist eine Marke der Firma ProfessionUP GmbH

Auf der Welt existieren über hunderte von Chilisorten, die die unterschiedlichsten Formen und Farben sowie insbesondere die verschiedensten Aromen aufweisen. Diese Aromen sind so vielseitig und facettenreich, dass sie einem ein wahres Gaumenfeuerwerk ermöglichen – und damit ist nicht nur die Schärfe gemeint. Würde man Chilis auf das einzige Attribut seiner Schärfe reduzieren, wäre dies gleich zu setzen, wie wenn man einen leidenschaftlichen Kuss bloss als «nett» beschreiben würde. Mit den richtigen Chilis wird eine geschmackliche Komposition ermöglicht, mit der das Essen zu einer harmonischen Symbiose verschmilzt, die einen wahrlich verzaubern kann. Genau dies ist unser Ziel: Eine ideale Chili-Komposition für alle Gaumen zu ermöglichen. Dafür haben wir erlesene Chilisorten aus der ganzen Welt in der Schweiz angebaut.

Name: Vinofaktur im Genussregal
Description:
Die Vinofaktur im Genussregal ist mehr als nur ein Geschäft – sie ist ein Ort des Entdeckens, Genießens und Erlebens. Hier vereinen sich die besten Weine der Südsteiermark, des Vulkanlands und der Weststeiermark mit einer außergewöhnlichen Auswahl an regionalen Spezialitäten.

Mit über 70 Winzern aus der Steiermark sowie ausgewählten Weingütern aus Slowenien findest du bei uns 50 verschiedene Weinsorten – vom klassischen Weiß- und Rotweinen bis hin zu Schaumweinen oder süßen Raritäten. Unsere Vinothek bietet nicht nur eine beeindruckende Auswahl an Lagen- und Klassikweinen, sondern auch Großflaschen und besondere Jahrgänge für echte Genießer.

Doch nicht nur Weinliebhaber kommen bei uns auf ihre Kosten: In unseren Regalen warten über 430 Geschenkideen, darunter handverlesene Delikatessen wie Chutneys, Käse, Marmeladen, Risottos, Öle, Essige und Eingelegtes – alles von den besten Produzenten der Region. Dazu gesellen sich Edelbrände, Gin, Whisky und Wermut für feine Genussmomente.

Ob für eine besondere Verkostung, ein genussvolles Mitbringsel oder einfach eine Reise durch die Geschmäcker der Südsteiermark.

Le persone sono il nostro punto di forza: specialisti che ogni giorno si impegnano per rendere la spesa confortevole, veloce e conveniente.
Affinché questo sia garantito, i nostri dipendenti vengono formati ed istruiti con corsi ed aggiornamenti. Noi, d’altra parte, siamo sempre disponibili all’ascolto e pronti nel far diventare realtà le loro stimolanti proposte.
È proprio in questo modo che possiamo assicurare che la qualità, al giusto prezzo, arrivi nelle case dei clienti Decò e Dodecà della Marino Group.

Description: 易盛娱乐加【主管σσ:29612】是指对本国的经济和政治具有重要作用的大都市。在城市规模、基建、财政收入、消费、对人才吸引力等各层面，一线城市一般均领先于其他城市。在商业活动中，企业也会将具有重要市场地位的城市称为一线城市。一线城市的划分没有固定的标准。既可按行政级别划分，也可按城市规模、人口数量划分、经济发展水平和GDP总量等标准划分。一线城市：北京、上海、天津、重庆，中国被普遍公认的一线城市是上海、北京、广州、深圳。这四个城市在GDP总量上位居中国大陆前列，对就业者吸引力也是最大的。

Name: Netfood
Description:
Netfood är en medlemsbaserad tjänst där du som kund köper mat av bästa kvalitet, helt utan vinstpåslag.

Genom medlemsavgiften på 195 kr/månad (gäller för årsmedlemskap för 2 340 kr/helår), får du tillgång till ett unikt utbud av högkvalitativ mat och råvaror i säsong.

Våra priser är i snitt 35% lägre än i mataffären, webbutiken eller saluhallen. Ditt medlemskap i Netfood är både en god och lönsam affär.

På Netfood finner du inga “gratis-frakt-erbjudanden", "passa-på-priser", eller "köp-två-betala-för-en". För oss är det viktigaste inte hur mycket du handlar. Det är hur nöjd du är efter du har handlat. Vi tror på transparens och redovisar därför våra priser och kostnader helt öppet. 

Förstå oss rätt, bra mat måste få kosta. Så att ansvarsfulla producenter kan få betalt för sitt arbete och sina produkter, utan att pruta på smak och kvalitet. Men där kan priskarusellen stanna tycker vi på Netfood. 

Vår kostnad = ditt pris.

Our shelves (and menus) feature globally sourced producers using fermentation, botanicals, sparkling tea, and adaptogens to create drinks that pair beautifully with food and real life.

Founded by hospitality and design professionals with decades in beer, cocktails, restaurants, and brand-building, FIZZ exists at the intersection of quality, intention, and culture. We’re not here to replicate alcohol—we’re here to expand what drinking can be.

In addition to our retail storefront on Lower Johnson Street, we offer non-alcoholic and functional bar catering for weddings, corporate events, team-building experiences, and home gatherings—bringing elevated, inclusive drink programs to the table.

Whether you’re drinking less, drinking differently, or simply curious, FIZZ is an invitation to reimagine the way you gather.

Name: Sommariva Tradizione Agricola
Description: The farm has ancient origins that go back to the 1915; the whole complex extends over a surface of about 115.000 square metres of which 6 hectares are vineyards (from which are extracted the Pigato, the Vermentino and the Rossese sold by the Sommariva), about 45.000 square metres are olive groves and 5.000 square metres have glass houses with the main cultivation as basil, wall rocket, tomatoes and artichokes used for the production of sauces and products in oil. All these products share a common factor, the attentive employment of the procedure of ‘organic’ cultivation. Precisely, the Sommariva’s agricultural land has been cultivated for over 40 years following the rules of the “organic” technique, using simple manure and the olive residue (the so called sansa).  The farm has always been a very closed collaborator of the association Suolo e Salute of Turin, the very first institution for the study and control in the field of the organic, founded in Italy in 1972. The company is composed also by an ancient oil mill and a museum, where people can admire all the history of the agriculture tradition of this ligurian area, where its possibile to buy all porducts and where artists can show theier works to all. Name: Limhamns Socker Aktiebolag
Description:
Vi börjar med det viktigaste: CHOKLAD och KONFEKTYR! För att du ska få en överblick över vad jag håller på med egentligen, så kika gärna in på mitt instagramkonto: @limhamnssocker.se.

Jag heter Britta och har jag jobbat som säljare och produktutvecklare av konfektyr av hög kvalitet i över 20 år.  Varumärken som jag bland annat jobbat med är Valrhona, Summerbird, Lakrids by Bülow, Malmö Chokladfabrik och Kusmi Tea. Genom årens lopp har jag skaffat mig stor kunskap om choklad från kakoböna till chokladkaka på utbildningar och resor till kakaoplantage, i chokladfabriker och kakaorosterier. 

Tanken med Limhamns Socker är att bara ha produkter och varumärken jag själv tycker om och som håller hög kvalitet. I augusti 2022 öppnade jag min egen lilla konfektyrbutik på Västanväg 51 i Limhamn. Här hittar du chokladkakor och praliner från franska Valrhona och vietnamesiska Marou, hasselnöts- och pistagechoklad från italienska Venchi, vingummi från danska Wally&Whiz, marshmallows från Emma Bülows The Mallows, smörkakor från Normandie, Kusmi Tea från Paris, gräddbullar med marsipanbotten från danska Summerbird , lakrits från Island och Finland och mycket, mycket annat gott! 

För dig som funderar på en rolig teambuilding, företagsevent, julklappar eller presenter till anställda och kunder har jag rätt många roliga förslag att erbjuda. Kontakta mig gärna så klurar vi ut något kul. Och delikat!

Unsere Produkte sind darauf ausgerichtet, natürliche Nährstoffe einfach zugänglich zu machen und werden sorgfältig ausgewählt.

Name: Pasticceria Moschella
Description:
La Pasticceria Moschella è nata dal sogno di due fratelli: Nicolò, giovane talento della pasticceria e allievo del Maestro Iginio Massari, che compare negli Under 30 di Forbes 2020 e Christopher, giovane imprenditore e primo sostenitore del talento del fratello, che ha ideato il concept di vendita e l’impostazione fresca e d’impatto del brand. 
Quello dei fratelli Moschella è un vero e proprio progetto, in cui la creatività, lo stile e l’arte pasticcera di Nicolò si intersecano con la lungimiranza e le competenze imprenditoriali di Christopher. E’ il 2016 quando i fratelli aprono il Laboratorio di Cornaredo, appena fuori Milano: qui Nicolò e il suo team si dedicano a ricerca, innovazione ed eleganza per ognuno dei dolci della tradizione, monoporzioni coloratissime e prodotti da forno. Nel 2020 nasce il primo punto vendita a Nerviano, insieme a un nuovo concept di pasticceria basato sulla conservazione dei prodotti in nome di qualità e freschezza a lungo termine. Un format ideale per la replicabilità: nello stile delle pasticcerie francesi, la Pasticceria Moschella torna al reale concetto di “pasticceria”, destinata unicamente all’asporto, ma dove i clienti hanno la certezza di trovare il dolce perfetto e sempre freschissimo.

Name: Café Cielo de Oro
Description:
Café Cielo de Oro is an international, speciality coffee producer and importer. We believe that good coffee is the result of tradition, respect for the land, community effort, and exceptional roasting. With operations in Mexico and Europe, our mission is to bring the rich flavors of Mexican coffee to restaurants, cafeterias, and other customers all over the world.

What sets us apart, is that we share a considerable amount of our profits with our farmers, ensuring they and their families lead better lives. Additionally, we allocate a portion of these earnings to support the local community and conserve our vibrant landscapes. This creates a circular economy: we offer exceptional coffee, and in return, your purchase contributes to a healthier planet and happier families.

Our coffee has a an impressive 85.5 SCA rating and is a perfect blend – soft on the palate, yet rich in taste and fully-bodied, making it a fantastic coffee for those who search for perfection in a smooth cup of coffee with almost zero acidity.

Name: ICA Kvantum Varberg
Description:
Upplev mer mat!

Hos oss är matupplevelsen kärnan i vår verksamhet – att få både dig som kund och oss som jobbar här att uppleva flera smaker, varumärken, rätter och recept. Idag är vi drygt 125 engagerade och matälskande medarbetare som varje dag arbetar för att driva Varbergs bästa matbutik.

För att leva upp till vårt löfte om att det är hos oss du får uppleva mer mat, så har vi satsat mycket på att knyta till oss kompetenser som bagare, konditorer, kockar, kallskänkor och styckare. I butikens egna kök och bageri skapar de mängder av rätter och produkter varje dag som alla håller butikens höga krav. Lokala smaker gjorda på plats.

Och du vet väl att vi älskar att prata mat så om du saknar någon produkt, har frågor eller vill rekommendera något just du älskar – tveka inte att prata med oss.

Varmt välkommen till vår butik!
/Vännerna på ICA Kvantum Varberg

Name: Cervecera Cuello Negro
Description:
Hoy, Cerveza Cuello Negro es un referente de la cerveza artesanal en Chile, elaborada en Valdivia con agua pura del sur y un compromiso inquebrantable con la calidad.

Nuestra historia comenzó en 2003, cuando tres amigos decidieron crear una cerveza inspirada en la tradición cervecera de la zona. Desde nuestros inicios en Punucapa hasta nuestra consolidación en El Arenal en 2009, hemos crecido sin perder nuestra esencia artesanal.

Con estilos icónicos como la Ámbar y la Foreign Extra Stout, y nuevas creaciones como la Session IPA (2023) y la Lager (2024), seguimos innovando para compartir lo mejor del sur en cada sorbo.

Name: Consorcio Mayorista
Description:
Alvi estamos convencidos de que somos el mejor socio para que su negocio despegue. Como Autoservicio Mayorista hacemos su experiencia de compra más grata y eficiente, le ofrecemos el mejor mix de productos y nos preocupamos de tener en un solo punto todo lo que necesita para abastecerse. 
 
  Y somos los que estamos siempre más cerca de Usted, en las principales comunas de la Región Metropolitana y en 11 ciudades, desde Puerto Montt a Coquimbo. Donde haya almaceneros, siempre estará Club del Almacenero Alvi.

Nuestros clientes eligen qué y cuánto comprar y para ellos hemos diseñado formatos especiales de empaque de productos para hacer más cómoda y rápida su compra.

Nuestro foco es trabajar por y para los comerciantes. Ellos encuentran precios especiales en nuestras salas y las promociones están orientadas para nuestros clientes. Esto queda en evidencia al mirar las etiquetas de precio, que establecen con claridad los valores para Socio y No Socio.

¿Por qué hacemos esa diferencia? Porque nuestra misión es trabajar por el desarrollo del pequeño comercio y para ello creamos el Club del Almacenero, una instancia donde no sólo hay atractivas ofertas y descuentos sino también una oportunidad para atreverse a ser empresarios en serio, con capacitaciones y asesorías especialmente diseñadas para los almaceneros chilenos.


MAS CERCA

Cuando hablamos de cercanía nos referimos a dos aspectos: estamos físicamente donde nuestros clientes nos necesitan, actualmente con 16 salas en la Región Metropolitana, y 12 sucursales en regiones (vea nuestro mapa); pero también queremos ser los más cercanos en calidad y atención. Queremos que nuestros clientes nos reconozcan por la calidad de servicio, la atención personalizada y el buen trato. Eso es nuestro desafío y exigencia diaria.

Nuestra promesa de valor es: Comprometidos con el desarrollo de su negocio; y a través de ello, con su futuro y el de su familia.

Name: Hania Health
Description:
La boutique Hania Health est la première marque vous proposant des produits végétaux exclusivement d'Afrique, naturels, non transformés et sélectionnés pour leurs vertus et leurs saveurs.

Notre engagement: rester le plus authentique possible.
Accompagnés de notre naturopathe spécialisée dans les végétaux tropicaux, nous choisissons nos végétaux et dérivés auprès de coopératives locales dans divers pays (Bénin, Burkina-Faso, Côte d'Ivoire, Sénégal,...), tout en assurant également une traçabilité de ceux-ci.

Chaque produit vous est proposé sous tous ses aspects : origine, présentation physique, bienfaits, saveurs, diverses utilisations et consommations, synergies, mode de conservation, précautions, etc… de sorte que chacun de vos choix soit réfléchi et vous donne entière satisfaction.

Le conditionnement de chaque produit est fait en France, à la main, aux normes européennes, tout en choisissant des emballages recyclés et recyclables (pochettes kraft réutilisables, bocaux et bouteilles en verre,…) afin de respecter les valeurs auxquelles nous croyons.

Un accompagnement de chacun est également proposé dans l'usage de nos produits à travers des ateliers, des vidéos, des articles que vous pourrez retrouver sur notre site internet ou encore sur nos divers réseaux sociaux.

Wir haben es uns mit der advanced food GmbH und unseren Eigenmarken ZUCKERFREIlich und PURELITE zur Aufgabe gemacht, nährstoffreiche, funktionale POW(D)ER zu entwickeln, die in die tägliche Ernährung integriert werden können und zu einer gesundheitsfördernden Industrie-Zucker-Reduktion beitragen.
Denn der Durchschnitt der deutschen Bevölkerung konsumiert etwa die vierfache Menge an freien Zuckern, die von der WHO als langfristiges gesundheitspolitisches Ziel für sinnvoll erachtet wird - gerade in Anbetracht der steigenden Adipositas Fallzahlen.

Mit unseren zuckerreduzierten Produkten sowie Workshops - rund um eine gesunde Ernährung - wollen wir den Verbraucher unterstützen, dem Übermaß des Zuckerkonsums entgegenzuwirken.

Die advanced food GmbH ist angesiedelt am Universitäts-Standort Marburg und wurde von der Serial Entrepreneurin und Foodbloggerin Genevieve Larsen gegründet. Zuerst haben wir uns auf verschiedenen Zuckeraustauschstoffe wie unser DATTEL POW(D)ER und dem SWEET + POW(D)ER in unterschiedlichen Geschmacksrichtungen fokussiert. Mittlerweile umfasst unser Sortiment auch weitere zuckerreduzierte und funktionale Produkte wie unser COCOA Drops, das COLLAGEN POW(D)ER, ein Milchsäurebakterienmix und vieles mehr. Name: Maria Granel
Description:
Mercearia biológica a granel e "zero waste store". Fundada em 2015. 

Lojas físicas em Lisboa, em Alvalade e Campo de Ourique, e loja online.


Fomos a primeira loja em Portugal - e uma das pioneiras na Europa e no mundo - a dispensar as embalagens descartáveis e a comercializar alimentos biológicos certificados exclusivamente a granel.  Introduzimos o sistema BYOC (“Bring your own container”) - modelo "refill on the go" - no mercado nacional.


Esta opção constitui um gesto de impacto na redução das emissões de GEE e da quantidade de resíduos produzidos.


Além disso, ao incentivar a aquisição apenas da quantidades exatas, procuramos também contribuir para a redução do desperdício alimentar.


Trabalhamos, por isso, ao serviço do Objetivo de Desenvolvimento Sustentável 12 - Produção e consumo sustentáveis, atuando numa lógica de "pre-waste", ou seja, de prevenção de geração de resíduos, através da planificação e da adoção de um consumo mais consciente.


A nossa loja (assim como os nossos produtos) tem certificação biológica (Kiwa Sativa AB1171UT). 


Apoiamos os produtores nacionais e a agricultura e produção em modo biológico, para obtenção de alimentos de elevada qualidade nutritiva, recorrendo a técnicas que garantam a sustentabilidade, preservando o solo e o meio ambiente sem o recurso a produtos químicos de síntese, e proporcionando condições favoráveis ao bem‐estar animal.


Representamos e distribuímos em Portugal 10 marcas ecológicas europeias (www.mariagranel.com/revenda )


Somos embaixadores em Portugal da Réseau Vrac, uma associação internacional dedicada ao profissionais do granel e à reutilização.


Além da promoção de uma alimentação e sistemas alimentares mais sustentáveis e de um consumo mais consciente, a Maria Granel procura também gerar impacto social através do seu premiado programa educativo ambiental (o Programa Z(h)ero), que, junto de escolas e empresa, ajuda a capacitar comunidades, monitorizar e reduzir o desperdício gerado.

Name: Mercado Baratíssimo
Description:
O Mercado Baratíssimo começou em um pequeno espaço de 54m², com o propósito de garantir ao cliente proximidade e produtos de qualidade, aliados ao menor preço para os moradores de Indaiatuba. Um estabelecimento modesto, mas que já tinha no DNA a qualidade e simpatia da vizinhança do Jardim Morada do Sol. O desejo de melhoria contínua sempre foi uma constante e, desta forma, em 2022, o Baratíssimo é reinaugurado em um novo local com amplo espaço (250m²), estacionamento, carrinhos e seis caixas. 

Com uma forte presença nas redes sociais, o Baratíssimo constrói uma relação de confiança com seus clientes ao encaminhar diariamente aos grupos de ofertas do WhatsApp as ofertas e promoções disponíveis no dia. Além disso, também disponibiliza um programa de fidelidade que garante descontos e benefícios exclusivos, como cashback, para os participantes.

Em um ano de funcionamento, o Baratíssimo já contratou e treinou mais de 20 funcionários que são preparados para um atendimento personalizado e humanizado. 

Trabalhar no Baratíssimo é viver em um ambiente cheio de desafios, oportunidades e principalmente inspirador. Venha escrever uma trajetória de sucesso e fazer parte desse crescimento!

Name: Estar Bem Alimentos
Description:
A Estar Bem - Alimentos Conscientes, foi fundada em 2014 por Alexandre Vianna, ex-executivo da Natura Cosméticos e que já atuava no mercado saudável há 7 anos. No início a empresa importava e comercializava produtos a granel tais como Aveia sem Glúten, Açúcar de Coco e Sal Rosa do Himalaia. A medida que a Estar Bem foi construindo sua marca e ganhando notoriedade no mercado saudável, a transição para o varejo foi algo natural. Esse momento culminou com a construção da fábrica em 2018 de onde sai 100% dos produtos da marca.

Nos diferentes segmentos que a marca atua, existe um constante esforço em criar produtos que se diferenciam do mercado seja pela origem, pela composição ou pela riqueza nutricional dos seus ingredientes.

Seremos a ponte que conecta os consumidores a um universo de possibilidades em alimentação saudável e consciente com a praticidade que precisamos no dia a dia. 
Sonhamos em transformar a experiência de cada refeição em um momento de descoberta, bem-estar e impacto positivo, onde cada escolha nutre não apenas o corpo, mas também a alma. 
Acreditamos que a comida pode ser mais do que simples nutrição - ela é o elo que une pessoas, culturas e o futuro saudável que desejamos construir juntos. 
Faremos com que cada mordida seja um ato de amor próprio, que as pessoas se sintam melhor, afinal, todos queremos Estar Bem!

After generations of expertise in sourcing world-class produce to Michelin-star restaurants, in 1988 we set up shop in Borough Market. Today, we stand as one of the market's most respected and comprehensive retailers of premium fruits, vegetables and specialist foods. 

You can also find us serving up Wild Mushroom Risotto, Triple Cooked Chips, Fresh Juice and Chocolate Covered Strawberries. 

All are born from our produce on the stall, fulfilling our mission of zero-waste. Our surplus wild & specialist mushrooms are the basis for our beloved spelt risotto, while leftover tomatoes and carrots from our display morphed into homemade ketchup and curry sauce for our triple cooked chips. All overripe fruit is transformed into fresh juice, hand-pressed or squeezed each morning. 

Our pursuit to source the most premium of produce is rooted in our fundamental passion for extraordinary flavour. It's why restaurateurs, chefs and home cooks trust and love us. 

Come and see what all the fuss is about!

Name: Karambo
Description:
At Karambo we believe that no good or no grocery delivery solution at all exists that could sustainably replace weekly shopping for consumers.
Our mission is to change this and make grocery delivery accessible anywhere, anytime by using supermarkets as our warehouse infrastructure.

To offer our service in almost every city, no matter the size, we deliver our groceries directly from the supermarket to the consumer. Thereby, we can circumvent buying warehouses and reduce overhead cost, while sustaining the largest same-day delivery assortment (12.000 - 40.000 products) and a delivery within 1.5 hours.

We launched just a few months ago and already reached more than €100.000 in revenue and delivered 2.500 orders.
Our customers love our product, which is the reason we are raising our Seed-Investment to conquer new cities.

Den Toer is ontstaan tijdens een wekelijks terugkerende vraag: wie gaat morgen naar de winkel? Aangezien wij lokale handelaren een warm hart toedragen, spenderen we ook heel wat tijd om al onze boodschappen te doen.

Name: De Kruyderij
Description:
De Kruyderij – Ambachtelijke kruiden(mixen) in circulaire verpakkingen

Bij De Kruyderij geloven wij dat lekker koken begint met pure ingrediënten. Wij maken en verkopen gezonde kruiden en ambachtelijke kruidenmixen zonder onnodige toevoegingen, verpakt in circulaire statiegeldpotjes. Ons assortiment bestaat uit meer dan 20 smaakvolle mixen, waaronder nasi-, gehakt- en kruidenboterkruiden. Daarnaast leveren wij een ruim aanbod aan losse kruiden zoals paprikapoeder, basilicum, gemberpoeder en komijnzaadpoeder.

Onze missie ontstond uit een groeiende frustratie: de meeste kruidenmixen uit de supermarkt bevatten te veel zout en onnodige toevoegingen. De Kruyderij biedt een gezond alternatief. Al onze mixen worden met de hand samengesteld, met aandacht voor kwaliteit, smaak en gezondheid.

Wij denken graag mee met onze klanten. Zo bieden wij op-maat-gemaakte kruidenmixen voor mensen met specifieke (di)eetwensen, zoals zoutarm, glutenvrij of zonder suiker. Onze kennis delen wij actief via recepten, advies en persoonlijk contact.

De Kruyderij levert niet alleen aan particulieren, maar ook aan horecazaken en (land)winkels. Verkoop vindt plaats op markten en op bestelling. Wij breiden momenteel uit naar regionale verkooppunten.

Onze communicatie is direct en laagdrempelig via WhatsApp Business en e-mail. Dat persoonlijke contact waarderen onze klanten – inmiddels al meer dan 100 – bijzonder.

Toekomstplannen? Wij willen doorgroeien naar een groter klantenbestand in de regio, meer vaste verkooppunten realiseren, verse kruiden uit eigen tuin verkopen én uiteindelijk een eigen winkel openen.

Bent u op zoek naar eerlijke, gezonde en smaakvolle kruiden, of naar een leverancier die met u meedenkt? Neem gerust contact met ons op.

www.dekruyderij.nl

Name: selangār Extra Native Olivenöle
Description:
Über selangār 

Willkommen bei selangār, einer Familienmarke mit tief verwurzelten Traditionen und einer Leidenschaft für erstklassiges Olivenöl. Wir sind stolz darauf, Olivenöle von höchster Qualität zu produzieren, die sowohl geschmacklich als auch gesundheitlich überzeugen. Unsere Olivenöle werden in der malerischen Region der türkischen Ägäis kutliviert.

Unsere Produkte:

selangār Ayvalik: Ein mildes, fruchtiges Olivenöl aus früh geernteten Ayvalik-Oliven.

selangār Trilye: Ein reichhaltiges, aromatisches Olivenöl, das die Essenz der Trilye-Oliven einfängt.

Aromatisierte Olivenöle: Olivenöl mit grünen Zitronenschalen, Mandarinenschalen oder einer Mischung aus Chilischoten, Kapia und frischem Pfeffer, die Ihre Gerichte verfeinern und einen Hauch von Raffinesse verleihen.

Unser Versprechen:
Bei selangār setzen wir auf Nachhaltigkeit, Qualität und Tradition. Jedes Olivenöl wird mit grösster Sorgfalt hergestellt, um den natürlichen Geschmack und die gesundheitlichen Vorteile zu bewahren. Unsere Produkte spiegeln die Leidenschaft und das Engagement unserer Familie wider, die mit grossem Demut in der Olivenölproduktion tätig ist.

Entdecken Sie die Vielfalt und Qualität unserer Olivenöle und lassen Sie sich von der Geschichte und dem Geschmack von selangār verzaubern.

Name: Casa de Frutas
Description:
A CASA DE FRUTAS CAMPINAS é uma empresa familiar com mais de cinco décadas de atuação no mercado, consolidada como referência em qualidade, eficiência e inovação na distribuição de frutas frescas nacionais quanto importadas.
Nosso grupo econômico é impulsionado por uma estrutura integrada e especializada, que garante o máximo frescor e cuidado em cada etapa da cadeia produtiva:

•	Fazendas próprias dedicadas à produção de bananas, com controle total da qualidade desde o cultivo até a entrega.
•	Parcerias exclusivas para produção de mamão papaia e formosa, em regiões estratégicas do Espírito Santo e da Bahia, próximas a centros de consolidação, o que assegura o menor tempo entre colheita e chegada ao varejo.
•	Frota própria refrigerada, com montagem de cargas cuidadosamente planejadas para absorver impactos, rastreamento em tempo real e rotas otimizadas, posicionando a CASA DE FRUTAS como uma das maiores especialista no transporte de frutas sensíveis no país.
•	Unidade própria de produtos embalados e minimamente processados, focada em oferecer praticidade e frescor em soluções sob medida para diferentes perfis de consumidores.
•	Serviço de abastecimento nos pontos de venda, por meio de uma equipe de promotores treinados para garantir exposição adequada e suporte comercial diretamente nas lojas.

A CASA DE FRUTAS, atende redes de varejo em toda a região Sudeste, na eficiência, qualidade e excelência exigidas no ponto de venda, contribuindo para que o varejista fidelize seu consumidor proporcionando uma excelente experiência de compra.

Name: Honingwinkel
Description:
Het ontstaan van Honingwinkel hebben we te danken aan een gesprek in de tuin met de kinderen. Als gezin hebben wij namelijk onze eigen kasten en genieten we ieder jaar weer van onze eigen honing, puur uit de natuur zonder enige vorm van toevoeging. De honing uit eigen tuin verdeelde we onder familieleden, vrienden en de buurt. De vraag naar onze producten werd steeds groter. Dit is de reden geweest dat we samen met de kinderen hebben besloten om te beginnen met een website waar we alleen maar kwaliteit bijenproducten verkopen.


Het verdienen van geld is echter van secondair belang, imkeren en het leveren van kwaliteit honing is en blijft een hobby. Na gedegen onderzoek naar bijenproducten in Nederland en België zijn we gekomen tot het assortiment dat we nu hebben. Al de producten die wij leveren bestaan uit hoogwaardige kwaliteit voor de juiste prijs. Dit doen wij omdat wij geloven in de meerwaarde van honing voor de gezondheid van de mens.

Naast dit initiatief willen we de helft van de winst aanwenden voor sociale doeleinden.

Name: NAMU MATCHA
Description:
A Namu é a primeira marca no Brasil dedicada exclusivamente ao Matcha, um chá conhecido no mundo todo pelos seus diversos benefícios para o organismo e pela sua versatilidade gastronômica.

Nossa missão é oferecer um produto de alta qualidade que respeite o meio ambiente em todas as suas etapas de produção.

Aquilo que comemos está diretamente associado à saúde do nosso corpo, por isso acreditamos ser fundamental a transparência em relação à rastreabilidade dos alimentos que chegam até nós. Na Namu entendemos que um alimento bom não se resume apenas à sua qualidade, é indispensável que ele também faça parte de uma cadeia de mercado honesta, que respeita o meio ambiente e valoriza cada trabalhador até o consumidor final.

Nosso Matcha é produzido na província de Hadong, na Coreia do Sul, região que há séculos é conhecida por produzir excelentes chás e que hoje, com o suporte do governo regional, conta com um instituo destinado exclusivamente a manter a qualidade e a sustentabilidade na produção do Matcha, o Hadong Green Tea Institute.

Acreditamos que não basta apenas vender um Matcha orgânico por um preço acessível, é necessário construir uma marca que dialogue com o seu tempo, mantendo um olhar atento ao meio ambiente, que fomente a economia local e valorize todas as pessoas envolvidas na cadeia de produção.

A busca por uma harmonia entre aquilo que consumimos e o bem-estar do nosso corpo é o que inspira a nossa marca.

Name: Oliwio.pl - Produkty spożywcze Premium
Description: Oliwio.pl to firma, która z pasją dostarcza swoim klientom najwyższej jakości produkty z regionu Morza Śródziemnego. Specjalizujemy się w sprzedaży oliwy z oliwek extra virgin, pochodzącej bezpośrednio z Grecji, Hiszpanii oraz Włoch. Dzięki bezpośredniej współpracy z wyselekcjonowanymi producentami, gwarantujemy, że nasza oliwa jest zawsze świeża i utrzymana w najlepszej kondycji. Oferujemy także bogaty wybór serów, w tym znakomitego parmezanu, który idealnie komponuje się z naszymi oliwami. Dodatkowo, nasz asortyment obejmuje szeroką gamę oliwek oraz olejów tłoczonych na zimno, które zachowują wszystkie naturalne właściwości i aromaty. W Oliwio.pl wierzymy, że klucz do zdrowej diety leży w wysokiej jakości produktach, dlatego dokładamy wszelkich starań, aby nasza oferta spełniała oczekiwania nawet najbardziej wymagających smakoszy. Nasze produkty to doskonały wybór dla tych, którzy cenią sobie zdrowy styl życia i chcą cieszyć się smakiem prawdziwie śródziemnomorskich specjałów na co dzień. Zapraszamy do odwiedzenia naszej strony i odkrycia pełni smaku z Oliwio.pl, gdzie tradycja spotyka się z nowoczesnością.

Name: Daqui! produtos regionais
Description:
Daqui!, porque tencionamos disponibilizar uma vasta gama de produtos confeccionados em Moçambique e em outras regiões do sul de África.

Daqui! porque sentimos que faltava, no nosso mercado, um local que reunisse todos os “nossos” produtos saudáveis e ecológicos e oferecesse a “nossa” beleza de forma natural e orgânica.

Temos uma missão: partilhar e tornar acessível tudo o que é localmente produzido. Inspirámo-nos nas antigas mercearias de produtos artesanais e nos conhecimentos dos mais antigos e adaptámos o conceito à realidade de hoje com produtos biológicos e super-alimentos que nos ajudam a fazer a transição para um modo de vida mais saudável e sustentável. Compreender o passado para transitar para o futuro.

Queremos disponibilizar aos nossos clientes, apenas num ponto de venda, produtos locais e regionais, mais saudáveis e orgânicos, obtido sem - ou com a mínima - utilização de produtos químicos ou sintéticos que favoreçam o seu crescimento/produção de forma não natural.

Name: Fermenthings
Description:
OUR CONCEPT
Non-conformistic comfort food is what we call what we do. We are not a restaurant so due speak, but we love preparing dishes based on our ferments. Through the years we created lots of different meals that are inspired by the people we meet, the books we read and the products that are in season.

We aren’t  eather a vegetarian place, we could say 90% of what we make is plant based. We love to reuse leftover ferments or things that turned a bit different to give them still a place in our dishes. Nothing goes to waste. From 2020 onward we started to work with a CSA (community sustained agriculture) and are trying even more to work with whats is growing there.

Fermentation is a toolbox for your cooking, and that is how you should embrace it.

Name: New World Victoria Park
Description:
Located in the historical Victoria Park district of Auckland City, New World Victoria Park was opened in 1999 in preparation for the 2000 America’s Cup defense. Since then we have seen many changes to our store, but what makes us great is what hasn’t changed. The team are dedicated to providing you with an extensive range of products, from day-to-day staples, to international gourmet specialty items and exceptional customer service.

Our store also has I shop New World, a platform for you to do your grocery shopping online, wherever you are and at your convenience with the options of collecting your groceries on the way home from work, on the way to the park, as you head to a friend’s house for a wee get together or as you head into or out of town. Alternatively, if you live locally our friendly delivery team will happily deliver your groceries to your doorstep on a day and at a time that suits you. Alongside this is our catering offer – Made to Order. We have an extensive range of platters for you to choose from, which again can be collected or delivered. The link to I shop New World can be found further down our page.

We would love to welcome you to our store and let you be the judge. We love feedback about what we are doing well and where we can improve.

Thank you and we look forward to your visit.

Nga mihi nui

It is an effort to connect the youth of Uttarakhand back to its root. The Pahadis aims at encouraging Rural Entrepreneurship in the state by promoting and marketing the products manufactured by the co-operatives and rural entrepreneurs. 'The Pahadis' also intends to provide a marketing platform to the budding artists from Uttarakhand to showcase their art and products. We have wide range of products. Visit us and enrich your life with cultural roots. 
There are 350+ Hill Products in total that are a highlight of this outlet. 
Our Aim is to open "The Pahadis" outlet across the country by Franchise Model from Uttarakhand and spread the taste and culture magic of Uttarakhand all around.

Description:
The 4 Seasons Organic Food Market, with 14 years of expertise in healthy nutrition, is the must-go food destination in the heart of Athens. We provide high-quality organic foods from Greece and all over the world, while offering a wide range of excellent colors, aromas and textures.
Our products’ selection is being conducted based on our vision and love for real food, while offering the essential knowledge for a healthy and holistic way of living. Furthermore, our products meet the needs of many specialized food trends and/or choices, like vegan, keto, raw, fruitarian, gluten free, lactose free, salt free and sugar free diets.

Name: Terroir Catalan
Description:
Notre département recèle de nombreux trésors, des paysages variés, un patrimoine architectural, des traditions, une culture et surtout des produits de notre Terroir.
 
Nous avons la volonté de proposer une large gamme des meilleurs produits du terroir de notre merveilleux département au même tarif que chez le producteur, afin de vous donner un véritable choix dans le prix et la qualité.
 
Nous souhaitons soutenir par ce partenariat les petits producteurs et communiquer sur le savoir-faire et les traditions perpétués par ces hommes et ces femmes, artisans pour la plupart.

Name: VIRO Market
Description:
Il negozio sotto casa, o di quartiere che dir si voglia, svolge una funzione sociale molto importante.
 
È un punto di incontro, tra domanda e offerta, dove la relazione umana la fa ancora da padrone.
È utile per una popolazione che sempre più a fatica si muove nel traffico cittadino, è utile per i tanti signori avanti negli anni, che trasportano a fatica oggetti pesanti.
È utile ai bambini per le loro veloci merende e spuntini pomeridiani.
È utile alle mamme , che possono comprare l’ occorrente per le scorte domestiche.
È utile alla famiglia, perché trovi prodotti, tra i tanti delle grandi eccellenze che in Sardegna sappiamo produrre.
Non potranno essere pochi centesimi di differenza con la grande distribuzione organizzata , che annullano i vantaggi del negozio di quartiere.
Opportunamente adeguato ai tempi che viviamo, il negozio di quartiere offre servizi che lo rendono la formula vincente dei tempi che stiamo vivendo. Come, ad esempio, il servizio di consegna a domicilio della spesa.
Questo negozio, gestito da sassaresi, per i sassaresi, ha assunto in un periodo in cui si licenzia e conta con coraggio e determinazione di guadagnare uno piccolo spazio tra i giganti della grande distribuzione.
Il negozio dei sassaresi, per i sassaresi, si avvale di ditte e fornitori sardi e, laddove si avvale di grandi multinazionali, opera per il tramite di agenti che operano e vivono in Sardegna, lasciando qui i proventi del loro guadagno.
Non facciamo terra bruciata nell’ottica di massimizzare il profitto ma crediamo che si debba investire una parte del proprio guadagno sul territorio.

Name: Passecti
Description:
Taste to Experience 
Met de pasta van Passecti kun je diverse smaakvolle gerechten op tafel zetten die hoog in voedingswaarde zijn. Hierdoor krijgt je lichaam precies binnen wat ze nodig heeft met een minimale impact op het milieu. En dat proef je!
Passecti is innovatief, voedzaam en goed voor het milieu. De pasta zit boordevol eiwitten, vitamine en mineralen en bevat alleen natuurlijke ingrediënten. De pasta is voedzaam en is makkelijk te combineren met diverse smaken. 
Passecti maakt een innovatieve en voedzame gedroogde pasta met 30% insecten om de vraag naar duurzame eiwitten te voldoen. Pasta is een van de meest gegeten voeding. Door niet te compenseren op smaak, is de pasta van Passecti een laagdrempelige manier om insecten in de westerse cultuur te introduceren. 
Proef zelf de kwalitatieve pasta van Passecti

Description:

Hoje misturamos a cultura humana através do estilo de vida para melhorar sua performance. Através da boa alimentação e de uma vida rica em atividades esportivas, nós todos temos o poder e mudar vidas.

Name: Court-Circuit
Description:
Approvisionner les collectivités locales avec des fruits et légumes de qualité tout en soutenant les producteurs de la région PACA : telle est notre mission. Chez Court-Circuit, nous croyons fermement aux valeurs de l'Économie Sociale et Solidaire (ESS), et notre approche repose sur la coopération, la solidarité et le respect de la biodiversité .

Notre entreprise s'engage à tisser des liens solides entre les producteurs locaux et les établissements de restauration collective. En privilégiant les circuits courts, nous réduisons l'empreinte carbone tout en offrant des produits frais et de saison à nos partenaires. Nous travaillons main dans la main avec les agriculteurs de notre région pour assurer des prix équitables, garantissant ainsi un revenu stable à ceux qui nourrissent notre communauté .

Nous croyons en un avenir où l'économie ne sert pas les intérêts financiers, mais où elle favorise le bien-être collectif. Nous pensons qu'un système alimentaire doit être responsable, étant au coeur de notre civilisation. Grâce à notre réseau de producteurs locaux, nous nous imbriquons dans la filière alimentaire locale en soutenant l'économie régionale. Une démarche centrée sur nos agriculteurs régionaux et portée par nos consommateurs finaux.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre mission pour créer un réseau alimentaire plus juste et durable. Ensemble, nous pouvons bâtir un avenir où l'économie profite à la fois aux personnes et à la planète. Vous avez le pouvoir de faire une différence, alors aidez-nous à construire des ponts entre les producteurs locaux et les collectivités !

Name: Don Don Donki [ Malaysia ]
Description:
Don Quijote, a Japanese discount retail chain famously known as “Donki”, is expanding to Southeast Asia as Don Don Donki.

The Pan Pacific International Holdings (former Don Quijote Holdings, hereinafter referred to as PPIH) Group's overseas holding company, Pan Pacific Retail Management (Singapore) Co., Ltd. (Head Office: Republic of Singapore, Representative: Takao Yasuda), will develop the Don Don Donki stores for Southeast Asia.

Don Don Donki is a new Don Quijote concept store for Southeast Asia selling products only made in Japan or of Japanese concept. The first store in Singapore was launched on December 2017 in Orchard Central and with the high quality of goods at affordable hard-to-beat prices, the brand is steadily growing. The first store in Bangkok, Thailand was launched on February 2019 while Hong Kong's first store opened its doors on July 2019.

Listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange in 1998, PPIH has grown into a general retailing group with more than 350 stores, the cumulative number of customers reaching 300 million a year and annual consolidated sales topping 800 billion yen in Japan. Its revenue and operating profit have increased for 27 consecutive years.

Outside Japan, PPIH has been operating three Don Quijote USA stores in Hawaii since 2006. In July 2013, Pan Pacific Retail Management was established in Singapore as the headquarters of the PPIH Group’s overseas operations. In September of the same year, Marukai Corporation, which operates nine stores in California and two stores in Hawaii, came under the umbrella of the Group.

At home and abroad, the PPIH has not only provided customers with what they needed when they needed it but also built a business model to help them enjoy shopping. It has also designed a variety of store formats best suiting the locations and trade areas where the stores are located -- regardless of their size and structure.

Currently expanding in Malaysia.

More about the PPIH Group: https://ppi-hd.co.jp/en/

Name: Bäckerei W. geiping GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Eine Erfolgsgeschichte seit vier Generationen
Unsere Bäckerei steht nicht nur für erstklassige Backwaren, sondern auch Tradition, Leidenschaft und Qualität. Seit der Gründung im Jahr 1924 hat diese Bäckerei, die als Kolonialwarenladen begonnen hat, Generationen von Kunden mit ihren köstlichen Kreationen verzaubert.


Von Anfang an war es die Leidenschaft für das Handwerk des Backens, welche die Gründer antrieb. Ihre Rezepte wurden von Generation zu Generation weitergegeben, wobei jedes Familienmitglied sein eigenes Know-how und seine eigenen Ideen einbrachte, um das Erbe zu bewahren und gleichzeitig neue Maßstäbe zu setzen.

Name: MPREIS Italia GmbH
Description:
Seit über 20 Jahren ist MPREIS in Südtirol fest verankert und betreibt heute 27 Filialen mit mehr als 500 engagierten Mitarbeiter*innen. Als Familienunternehmen in vierter Generation setzen wir uns täglich dafür ein, Mehrwert für die Region zu schaffen. Wir vereinen das Beste aus Nord und Süd, alpin und mediterran, und bieten eine vielfältige Auswahl an regionalen Produkten. Rund ein Viertel unseres Umsatzes stammt aus heimischen Spezialitäten, die wir vor allem von kleinen Betrieben beziehen. 

Unsere Philosophie baut auf Tradition, Verantwortung und ständiger Weiterentwicklung – für die Menschen, die Umwelt und die Region.

***

Da oltre 20 anni, MPREIS è una presenza consolidata in Alto Adige, con 27 filiali e oltre 500 dipendenti motivati. Come azienda familiare di quarta generazione, ci impegniamo quotidianamente a creare valore aggiunto per la regione. Uniamo il meglio del Nord e del Sud, alpino e mediterraneo, offrendo una vasta selezione di prodotti locali. Circa un quarto del nostro fatturato proviene da specialità regionali, acquistate principalmente da piccole aziende locali.

La nostra filosofia si basa su tradizione, responsabilità e continuo sviluppo – per le persone, l’ambiente e la regione.

Name: Медиахолдинг "Домашний каталог"
Description:
Медиахолдинг «Директ ТВ» - это динамично развивающаяся компания со сплоченной и целеустремленной командой профессионалов, за плечами которой огромный опыт работы на рынке дистанционной торговли.

Среди каналов продаж медиахолдинга «Директ ТВ»: телеканал «Телевизионная Торговая Сеть», телеканал «Домашний Магазин», телеканал «Стиль и мода», интернет магазины и каталоги, а также единый для всех каналов продаж контакт центр «Коннект».

«Домашний Магазин» и «Телевизионная Торговая Сеть»- 100% российские телевизионные магазины, с широким ассортиментом качественных и уникальных товаров по низким ценам. 
Технический охват аудитории телемагазинов медиахолдинга «Директ ТВ»  более  46, 5 млн. зрителей России. 
Все презентации товаров снимаются на собственной производственной базе, а ведущие телемагазинов – известные актеры (Олег Филипчик, Наталья Лукеичева, Яна Чигир и др.).

По заказу телеканала «Домашний Магазин» был снят сериал с одноименным названием - «Наш Домашний Магазин». Это 60-серийная лирическая комедия о жизни и работе телемагазина, о секретах телевизионной кухни. Показ сериала состоялся на телеканале «Домашний» с 17 октября 2010 по 16 февраля 2011 г.

Каталоги медиахолдинга «Директ ТВ» выходят ежемесячно, тиражом свыше 1 млн. экз.  
«Директ ТВ» выпускает такие спецкаталоги как: «Текстиль», «Дача» и «Бриллианит». («Бриллианит» – собственный зарегистрированный брэнд элитной бижутерии с ювелирным покрытием и кристаллами).

Name: Louisville Community Grocery
Description:
Louisville is composed of many diverse communities, each bringing its own unique flare to the city. Throughout the year, weekends in Louisville are filled with art festivals, flea markets, shows in every genre of music, and events that celebrate the cultures and heritages of Louisville’s diverse neighbors. And Louisville’s food, craft beer, and coffee scenes are nothing to sneeze at.

But there’s a problem hidden behind Louisville’s accolades. Communities in West Louisville experience food insecurity at rates disproportionate to areas of East Louisville.

Many residents in Louisville’s west end live more than half a mile from a supermarket and do not have access to a vehicle. These community members must either take long bus rides to the nearest grocers, resort to eating fast food, or source their food from convenience stores. And the recent closings of supermarkets in Central and West Louisville only exacerbate the problem.

Among other problems of poverty, housing insecurity, and lack of economic investment, residents in West Louisville also experience serious health risks, many of which could be mitigated by access to healthy food.

We are joining other organizations addressing food injustice in West Louisville, such as New Roots and Louisville Grows, by opening the city’s first community-owned grocery store.

The Communities We Serve

Neighborhoods being considered for the community-owned grocery are all considered food-insecure, including: Shawnee, Portland, Russell, Parkland, Old Louisville, and Smoketown/Shelby Park.

We hope to empower these neighborhoods to build a grocery store that not only meets their food needs but also creates a space for building community.

Whether you live in one of these neighborhoods, or simply believe in our mission to create an equitable food system, you can support the Louisville Community Grocery!

Нашите ценности
Знанието е в основата на нашия успех. Вярваме, че всяко постижение започва с натрупания опит, с желанието да се учим и да споделяме наученото. Разчитаме на знанието, за да изграждаме устойчиви практики, да предлагаме качествени продукти и да създаваме незабравимо преживяване за всеки наш клиент.
Стремежът към подобрение е част от нашата ежедневна култура. Във Фуудуейс вярваме, че винаги има място за още една идея, още една усмивка, още една по-добра услуга. Работим с отдаденост, за да повишаваме стандартите си – от обслужването до вкуса на всяко кафе и всяка хапка.
Развитието за нас означава движение напред – както като компания, така и като хора. Инвестираме в растежа на екипа си, насърчаваме инициативността и споделяме успехите си. Вярваме, че когато екипът се развива, цялата компания върви напред.
Иновативността ни вдъхновява да мислим различно. Следим тенденциите, адаптираме се бързо и предлагаме модерни решения за съвременния градски начин на живот.
Нашата мисия
Да правим всеки ден по-вкусен, по-удобен и по-усмихнат — с внимание, знание и страст към това, което правим.
 Да създаваме модерни, достъпни и вдъхновяващи места за бързо, качествено и приятно обслужване.

Name: Pastelería Lucerna
Description:
LUCERNA fue fundada en 1959 por un pastelero suizo quien decidió establecerse como empresario independiente en la ciudad de Pereira, centro de la región cafetera de Colombia, donde se produce el mejor café del mundo. En sus inicios LUCERNA era una pequeña empresa familiar que se dedicaba a la producción de fina pastelería europea. Con el tiempo, LUCERNA empezó a diversificar su producción y a ampliar su distribución. Uno de los productos que se fabricaban de manera exclusivamente artesanal, son los famosos turrones de maní, que fueron adquiriendo popularidad a nivel nacional como un dulce típico de la región cafetera. Debido al éxito del turrón LUCERNA, se decidió tecnificar su producción y ampliar la oferta de productos. En 1985 se inauguró la fábrica de turrones, donde actualmente se producen turrones en diferentes variedades y sabores, tanto para el mercado nacional como internacional. LUCERNA es hoy una moderna empresa de marca reconocida en todo el país, con tres plantas de producción y más de 45 años de experiencia en el mercado de alimentos. Su gama de producción abarca productos de pastelería, panadería, galletería, chocolatería, heladería, turrones y comidas rápidas. LUCERNA se ha caracterizado siempre por la calidad de sus productos, fidelidad a sus principios y respeto al consumidor.                                                            
MISION: Somos una empresa que fabrica productos alimenticios con los más altos estándares de calidad y responsabilidad social, con criterios de rentabilidad y talento humano competente. Nos comprometemos con esfuerzos que nos lleven a incrementar nuestra presencia en mercados nacionales e internacionales y la ampliación de nuestro portafolio de productos.

Description:
سيتي مول هو إحدى مشروعات مجموعة أحمد حنفي للاستثمار والتنمية
يعد أول مجمع تجاري على أرض مدينة شبين الكوم بمحافظة المنوفية، تأسس عام 2019م، وهو أحدث وأفضل المجمعات التجارية ذات الطابع المميز والموقع الفريد الذي يجعله في المقدمة عن الجميع، شيد على مساحة شاسعة من الأراضي ليخدم كافة فئات العملاء، وأصبح قادر على تقديم خدمات ومميزات كثيرة، ويضم أكبر العلامات التجارية العالمية، وأيضاً يحتوي على أول ملاهي بأحدث الألعاب، وكما يضم منطقة للأكل فيها مطاعم تناسب كل الأذواق، وأول فرع أوبن آير من سلسلة مطاعم وكافيهات ”تريفل“.

رؤيتنا:
أن نظل فريدين من نوعنا في المجال التجاري، ونتمكن من تطوير الذوق العام، ونرتقي بعملائنا إلى مستوى يليق بكافة فئات المجتمع.

هدفنا:
هدفنا في سيتي مول أن نكون مكان تجمع أكبر عدد من سكان المحافظة ونخدم كافة العملاء، وأيضاً أن نكون مقر لكبرى العلامات التجارية وشركات الاستثمار في مصر والعالم كله.
