Nosso principal objetivo é ser uma marca humanizada, cada vez mais próxima do consumidor final, prova disso são os brindes disponíveis para todas as compras. Nos diferenciamos no preço justo, que beneficia o consumidor final e até mesmo LOJISTAS, tornando-se um motivador para uma vida saudável.

Nós vamos até você, entregando em todo Brasil. Se você precisa de uma companhia até seu resultado você está no lugar certo, junto a Suplementos Já seu objetivo deixará de ser meta e será mais um sonho concluído.

Name: Farm and Market
Description:
Hi, we’re Farm & Market. Our first-of-its kind concept contains a 3,000 square foot ultra-urban hydroponic farm that grows 100,000 pounds of produce per year, utilizes less than 10% of water used in traditional farming, is 100% wind powered, and is chemical-free.
 
Our space is also home to a produce market selling 50 varieties of produce that are harvested daily. Our market also offers a concept we call Live Harvest. Think plant butcher. Herbs and microgreens at Live Harvest are harvested from the plant when you order.
 
We’re Grade-A obsessed with small-impact, big-flavor farming. Although our crops are planted, grown, and harvested just like other hydroponic farms, our secret sauce is that we grow over 50 varieties in one farm, and we’ve created a system for harvesting a portion of each variety daily.
All produce is available and in season every day. Seriously. We don’t truck our produce around the country, the region, or even across town to grocery distribution centers. We sell our produce directly to customers the day it is harvested - with 100% of its nutrition.

Our on-premises offering is rounded out by a restaurant serving a culinary farm-forward menu. The chef-crafted salads, bowls, soups, and starters take advantage of farm produce offering 100% nutrition and flavor that can only be experienced from product harvested and prepared the same day. This kind of delicious, chef-crafted delight is no longer just for the high-end restaurant.
 
Water scarcity is predicted to worsen in 80% of croplands in the next 30 years. Fresh produce travels an average of 1500 miles in the U.S. Leafy vegetables lose over 40% of their nutritional value before consumption. Environmental concerns coupled with lack of variety, freshness, and
nutrition make the produce industry ripe for innovation. We are on a mission to revolutionize how food is grown and sold using sustainable methods.

Name: Naturally Organic
Description:
Naturally Organic was owned by Karen and Neil Thomas. Established in 1998 we began by supplying Organic Fruit and Vegetable Baskets from a warehouse in Albany, Auckland. Over the years we added online shopping and in 2002 we opened a retail store in Rosedale Plaza, Albany.
The business is now owned by Tipu Holdings Ltd.

In June 2014 we opened our Mega Lifestyle Store and Café Bar at 
23/100 Don McKinnon Drive, Northridge Plaza, Albany. With over 4000 product lines available this is a one stop shop for all your healthy food needs. With more space at our new store we can offer you more products, more room to move and fresh organic smoothies, juices, coffees and food to go.

Our product range includes:
- Fresh organic and locally grown fruit and vegetables
- Organic and free-range meats, fresh salmon and organic dairy products
- Natural and organic skin and body care products
- Natural and organic baby care products
- Allergy-free foods (e.g. gluten and dairy free)
- Vegan products
- Allergy-free and organic bakery products
- Natural and eco-friendly household products

We cater for a wide range of customers, offering many specialist products e.g. gluten-free, fair trade, vegan and raw foods.

The cornerstone of our success is our customer service, with a focus on old fashioned service and friendly helpful staff our excellent reputation has been confirmed through the following awards:

- WINNER - Westpac Business Awards 2012
(Workforce Development)
- FINALIST - Westpac Business Awards 2012
(Excellence in Customer Service)
- FINALIST - Top Shop Awards 2012
- WINNER - e2themax Business Mentoring Award 2009

We look forward to bringing you the best quality and variety of organic and healthy products either online or from our friendly team at our Northridge Albany store.

Name: East Angus Grocery
Description:
Welcome to East Angus Grocery, where we revolutionize the way you shop for groceries. We are a leading provider of home delivery services, bringing fresh and high-quality groceries right to your doorstep. With our commitment to exceptional service and convenience, we aim to make your shopping experience effortless and enjoyable.

Time-Saving Solution: Say goodbye to long queues and crowded grocery stores. With our home delivery service, you can save valuable time that can be better spent on other priorities. Simply place your order online or through our dedicated advisor, and we'll take care of the rest.

Convenience at Your Fingertips: Our user-friendly website and 24/7 availability make it easy for you to browse our wide range of products from the comfort of your home or office. Place your orders from home with the assistance of your dedicated advisor, and have them conveniently delivered at a time that suits your.

Freshness Delivered: We understand the importance of freshness when it comes to groceries. That's why we carefully select the finest products, ensuring that you receive only the highest quality items. From farm-fresh produce to pantry staples, we prioritize freshness to meet your expectations.

Personalized Service: At East Angus Grocery, we believe in providing a personalized experience tailored to your needs. Our dedicated advisor, based in Ontario, will assist you throughout the ordering process, helping you choose the right products that align with your preferences, lifestyle, and budget.

Reliable and Timely Deliveries: Our own delivery team ensures that your groceries are delivered promptly and with a smile. We take pride in our punctuality and strive to exceed your expectations every time. Trust us to bring your groceries to you, so you can focus on what matters most.

Support Local Producers: By choosing our home delivery service, you are not only simplifying your life but also supporting local farmers and producers.

Name: Jaipur Masala Company
Description:
Indian cuisine is not just about food. It is about an experience. The joy of eating home-made finger-licking good curries with rice and chapatis is a feeling that cannot be matched by even the most acclaimed master-chef. 

And quintessential to the Indian cuisine are our spices. Sourced from all corners of the country, spices in India lend the richness to the aroma and taste of our dishes. Get one spice wrong and the dish is ruined. Get the balance right, and you have a Michelin star beating dish ready. :)

Talking about balance, have you ever witnessed how moms magically pour the spices in curries without any calculations or measurements? Apart from the rich experience they posess, this balance is derived out of wholesome love. And this is what Jaipur Masala Company aims to bring out in its unique blends of artisanal spices.

Home-made with love and nothing artificial, these premium spice blends are borne out of a mother's desire and will to create the perfect taste for her family. Mastered over decades, these spice blends are now available for all of you to taste and take your dishes to the next level.

Name: SeafoodFriday.hk
Description:
We are seafood lovers and since 2014 we have been exporting sustainable European seafood from the northern part of Europe to the hotels and restaurants in Hong Kong and Macau. Nowadays, together with our partners, we supply over 7 countries in Asia with fresh and fresh-frozen seafood.

Since 2014, the heart and soul of our seafood operations has been our Hong Kong office. In 2017, we started to bring in extra fish species for our friends and families, to let them also enjoy European freshness at affordable prices. A standard selection, vacuum-packed, top-quality and only available on Fridays was the key to keeping the prices affordable and seeing happy friends every week coming back with other friends who wanted to join the group.

With our Seafood Friday platform, we can make our group of friends bigger and more efficient, and since we partner with our trusted local partners, you can receive your fish and seafood home delivered by one of the cold trucks that drive around Hong Kong.

Name: Go Pace
Description:
Pace; your local online convenience store. Locally owned and operated, pace provides on-demand delivery of food and snacks, drinks and alcohol, toiletries and medicine, household items and baby care. 

We stock thousands of everyday convenience items, ethnic foods and drinks in our local fulfilment centres. Our localised approach enables us to provide instant delivery and fulfil all orders within 30 minutes or less.  

Values
We believe in local. Pace is locally-owned and operated, serving our local community by delivering everyday convenience items in a matter of minutes. Although we have a localised approach, we have big dreams. As such, we prioritise innovation, diversity and customer satisfaction. We strive to be authentic, always putting our customers and community first. Our values are rooted in community, culture and convenience: offering an ethnically diverse product range in line with the wants and needs of our customers. 

Vision
Our vision is to create a one-stop-local-online-shop for all your grocery and convenience needs!

Driven by community, culture and convenience, we plan to produce and distribute our own-brand products, to provide our customers with cost-effective options. Additionally, we plan to support our local community by partnering with local businesses to deliver your favourite food and drink items in a matter of minutes!

Mission
As a local online convenience store and delivery service, we want to give back to the community through convenience. We recognise that in our busy lives, time is something in short supply - we all wish we had more time to spend with our loved ones and make cherished memories. At pace, our mission is to give people more time by reducing the time it takes to do menial tasks, such as grocery shopping. We want to do away with old fashioned ways, which are both time-consuming and costly, and provide an innovative, cost-effective and convenient way to shop.

"ТЕЛЕМАКС" – проводник в мир новых технологий. Мы предлагаем современные решения для комфорта, новых впечатлений, проявления индивидуальности. Мы обеспечиваем первоклассный сервис, создаем возможности для выбора лучшей электроники по лучшим ценам в супермаркетах Телемакс и на сайте интернет-магазина www.telemaks.ru

Name: De Insectenman
Description:
Op zoek naar iets unieks en duurzaams voor uw evenement?

De Insectenman zorgt voor een verrassende én leerzame beleving met eetbare insecten. Van bedrijfsfeest tot congres: wij leveren warme of koude hapjes met smaakvolle insectensnacks en trekken gegarandeerd de aandacht van uw gasten.

Wij verzorgen proeverijen voor bedrijven, scholen en particulieren. Denk aan insectenburgers, pulled insectbroodjes, saucijzenbroodjes, sprinkhaanballetjes of krekelchips, chocoladekrekels en veel meer! Eiwitrijk, duurzaam én een perfect gespreksonderwerp. Onze insectenbar, met naturel en gekruide insecten, is een ware publiekstrekker.

Wat ons onderscheidt? De combinatie van smaak, duurzaamheid en beleving. We bieden, op verzoek, interactieve presentaties over insecten als voedsel van de toekomst. 

Voor scholen hebben wij een eigen interactief lesprogramma ontwikkeld.  Simpel, grappig en super leerzaam! Tijden de les maken de kinderen hun eigen insectenkaasstengel, een smakelijke én verrassende activiteit. Hoe leuk én lekker kan leren zijn?

We werken samen met evenementenbureaus voor maatwerkoplossingen. Of het nu gaat om een groen bedrijfsfeest of een originele publieksactivatie, De Insectenman maakt uw event onvergetelijk!

Ook bieden we duurzame relatiegeschenken en cadeaupakketten, waaronder onze Beetles Beer: een Belgisch met goud bekroond speciaalbier met toevoeging van insecten, verrassend en smaakvol! Voor meer info www.beetlesbeer.com

Ontdek ook onze webshop: De Insectenman - New Food Shop, boordevol gezonde insectensnacks voor thuis of op kantoor.

Neem vrijblijvend contact met ons op en ontdek hoe wij uw volgende evenement kunnen verrijken met smaak, beleving en duurzaamheid!

Bug Appetit!

Bringing Freshness, Quality & Community Together in Every Aisle

Our stores aren’t just places to shop—they’re hubs of community connection, where customers can find everything from farm-fresh produce to everyday pantry needs, all at competitive prices. Name: PLUS Pater
Description:
PLUS Pater is onstaan vanuit een overname door Aart & Marion Pater in 2013, eind 2013 is de winkel uitgebreid met ruim 300 m2 waardoor er een supermarkt is ontstaan met verkoop vloeroppervlakte van ruim 1100 m2. Tijdens deze uitbreiding is de winkel volledig vernieuwd tot een PLUS Briljant (tweede generatie) supermarkt. 
Om onze klanten ook in de zomer tijdens het vakantie seizoen van goede service te kunnen voorzien hebben we in 2016 onze parkeerplaats kunnen uitbreiden tot ruim 100 parkeerplaatsen. Tot ziens in onze winkel!

Name: Intermar
Description:
Украинская торговая компания основанyая в 1991 году, эксклюзивный дистрибьютор и импортер косметической продукции итальянских торговых марок Do Brasil, Dorabruschi, Farmaceutici Dottor Ciccarelli на территории Украины.

Интернет-магазин компании Интермар - Stephania (http://stephania.com.ua)

Компания в цифрах:
- Более 25000 тысяч клиентов по всей Украине;
- 14 представительств в 10 регионах страны;
- собственный интернет-магазин Stephania;
- центр эстетической косметологии в г. Донецке.
- учебный центр косметологии на собственной обучающей базе в г. Донецке 
(под руководством дипломированного высококвалифицированного косметолога, выпускника школы эстетики Dorabruschi в г. Флоренция, Италия.)

Опыт:
За спиной компании Intermar более 22 лет успешной и уверенной работы, 17 из них мы занимаемся продвижением косметической продукции на Украинский рынок. В портфеле компании имеется большой опыт работы с такими косметическими торговыми марками как Lumene, Herbina (Концерн NOIRO Corporation, Финляндия), Arcancil (Франция), Naturelle (США), Bottega Verde (Италия), Frais Monde (Италия) и другими.

Name: intermarché Setúbal
Description:
O Intermarché é a primeira insígnia histórica do Grupo “Os Mosqueteiros” a atuar há mais de 40 anos por toda a Europa. Em Portugal há mais de 25 anos, conseguimos consolidar a nossa experiência no mercado retalhista, contando hoje com mais de 230 pontos de venda, espalhados por mais de 180 concelhos, nos 18 distritos do país.

A nossa estrutura organizacional torna-nos distintos, pois é o único Grupo que é dirigido diretamente por empresários independentes, que são donos e responsáveis, na íntegra, pela gestão de cada Loja, e que beneficiam de um conjunto de estruturas comuns de vendas, logística, direção comercial, desenvolvimento, qualidade, etc.

É uma insígnia constituída por empresas de dimensão humana, baseada na partilha do dia a dia com os seus clientes e na adaptação ao ambiente onde estão inseridas, valorizando mercados de proximidade e rapidez na compra.

Name: Association le Drive Angevin
Description:
Sans abonnement, ni montant minimum de commande !

1. Je m'inscris gratuitement sur le site www.driveangevin.fr

En quelques clics, vous êtes inscrits et pouvez profitez des produits locaux de nos producteurs sur une seule et même plateforme.

2.Je choisis mes produits
Je fais mon marché sur le site Drive Angevin et passe ma commande en quelques clics jusqu'au lundi minuit. Les producteurs locaux préparent ma commande pour un retrait le jeudi de la même semaine.
 
3.Les producteurs préparent ma commande
En commandant sur le Drive Angevin, vous achetez des produits de qualité et soutenez l'agriculture locale.

4. Je récupère ma commande
 
Deux options s'offrent à vous lors de votre commande sur le Drive Angevin :
Retrait au local du Drive lors des permanences des producteurs :
Je récupère mes produits le jeudi entre 16h30 et 19h30 au point de retrait situé 8 rue du Maine à Angers.
La livraison à domicile par le prestataire :
J'opte pour la livraison à domicile. Notre prestataire vous contacte et vous livre à domicile vos produits locaux.

Name: 無毒農
Description:
無毒農成立於食安事件層出不窮的2015年底，為了找回國人對食品安全的信任價值，透過「在地小農、成分天然、製程單純、檢驗合格與最佳風味」5個選品標準，成立電商平台銷售台灣在地無毒有機的農產品，建立一個對於農民、土地與消費者的正向循環機制。

為了讓在平台上架的所有農產品全篩檢，2022年斥資千萬購買「全質譜篩檢器」並成立實驗室，採用農藥殘餘檢驗技術最尖端的質譜普篩法，是目前全國唯一擁有農委會農業藥物毒物試驗所（以下簡稱藥毒所）轉移技術並接受指導的電商，產品就算上架之後，無毒農還是會堅持得逐批檢驗，確保消費者安心食用。

Name: Midal GROUP
Description:
In 1994, in conditiile unui mediu de afaceri ostil intreprinzatorilor particulari datorita unei instabilitati politice si economice accentuate, VIZIUNEA, INCREDEREA si PERSEVERENTA au fost factorii care l-au determinat pe actionarul majoritar al companiei MIDAL sa puna bazele unei societati care in numaitrei
ani de zile a devenit un nume de referinta pe piata frigului din Romania.

Grupul MIDAL este in prezent cel mai important furnizor de produse si echipamente frigorifice, cat si servicii profesioniste de proiectare, montaj, amenajare si intretinere pentru acestea pe piata frigului din Romania.

Succesul unei companii pe piata depinde de capacitatea ei de a culege, selecta, prelua si administra informatiile din domeniu si de a analiza dinamica indicatorilor de perfomanta, pentru a lua decizii optime. MIDAL s-a adaptat permanent schimbarilor de pe piata frigului, precum si provocarilor venite din partea concurentei.

Name: Sunny Foods Wholesale & Cash n' Carry
Description:
Being fed up of high prices Sanjay known on island as "Sunny" decided to start a small wholesale and distribution centre in the Industrial Park area of Providenciales with his Belonger partner Sandeep. 

The store started in the industrial park area of Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands but grew rapidly and needed to move. The store relocated in anapprox.10,000 Sq Ft building, the former "Williams Auditorium" on the South Dock Road (opposite to Tropical Shipping) in December 2014.

Although very young as a company the growth has been phenomenal, mostly because of the CRAZY, yes absolutely crazy prices that are being offered. Sunny is always heard saying "Keep the overheads low and transfer all savings to the customers". 

This mind set has paid off, the local Micro Entrepreneurs in the grocery business are happy to now be able to buy on island, whereas they had to bring in LCL (Less than container loads) from Miami and the rising costs of freight and products was eating into their budgets. Madam Kiki a store owner in Kew Town stated "Mein, your prices too good, too good, I come today, I happy, this one big sale that neva finish" Madam Kiki is right, it is like a supermarket sale, but with better prices and unending savings! Local families on island who are part of larger families are excited as they can purchase every day items, like case of water and milk, et cetra at yes, crazy prices! The commitment is ongoing to bring the best products at the best prices to you...

The company provides excellent margins to small and micro grocers so that they are able to resell. The supermarket  managers visit their shops and advises displaying and merchandising at no cost. Plus, they get the product they need right away so as not to have any "down time" while waiting on products from Miami.

Name: Friedas24
Description:
Friedas24 ist ein innovatives Unternehmen, das sich der Aufgabe verschrieben hat, die Nahversorgung im ländlichen Raum zu sichern und zu verbessern. Die Enkel von Frieda haben erkannt, dass die Versorgung mit Waren des täglichen Bedarfs auf dem Land oft unzureichend ist und dass die Menschen dort häufig längere Wege zurücklegen müssen, um an das zu kommen, was sie brauchen. Deshalb haben sie es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, hier Abhilfe zu schaffen und das Leben auf dem Land wieder attraktiver zu machen.

Dabei setzt Friedas24 auf moderne Technologie und innovative Konzepte. Das Unternehmen entwickelt Software und Anwendungen, die die Vernetzung von Nahversorgung, Energie und Mobilität im ländlichen Raum vorantreiben. Die Plattform soll hierbei eine zentrale Rolle spielen und zum führenden Anbieter für die Nahversorgung im ländlichen Raum werden.

Mit diesem Ansatz möchte Friedas24 einen wichtigen Beitrag dazu leisten, dass die Menschen auf dem Land besser versorgt sind und sich dort auch in Zukunft wohl fühlen können. Das Unternehmen versteht sich als Partner der ländlichen Gemeinden und arbeitet eng mit lokalen Akteuren zusammen, um individuelle Lösungen zu entwickeln, die auf die Bedürfnisse vor Ort zugeschnitten sind.

Dabei legt Friedas24 großen Wert auf Nachhaltigkeit und Umweltschutz. Das Unternehmen setzt auf erneuerbare Energien und arbeitet daran, die Mobilität im ländlichen Raum umweltfreundlicher zu gestalten. Auch bei der Auswahl der Produkte, die auf der Plattform angeboten werden, steht Nachhaltigkeit im Vordergrund.

Friedas24 ist ein junges Unternehmen, das sich durch eine hohe Innovationskraft und Flexibilität auszeichnet. Mit einem engagierten Team und einem klaren Ziel vor Augen arbeitet das Unternehmen kontinuierlich daran, die Nahversorgung im ländlichen Raum zu verbessern und das Leben auf dem Land wieder attraktiver zu machen.

Name: Zunderschwamm – Natürlich gesund
Description:
Natürliche Kraft aus dem Zunderschwamm für dein Wohlbefinden

Der Zunderschwamm gehört zu den spannendsten Heilpilzen der Naturheilkunde. Schon unsere Vorfahren schätzten diesen unscheinbaren Baumbewohner und nutzten ihn bei Verletzungen, Schmerzen und sogar zum Feuermachen.

Heute erlebt der Zunderschwamm ein echtes Comeback!

In der Mykotherapie, in der Traditionellen Chinesischen Medizin, in der japanischen Naturheilkunde und bei Naturheilärzten und Tierheilpraktikerinnen hat er längst seinen festen Platz gefunden. Gleichzeitig rückt er seit einigen Jahrzehnten auch in den Fokus der modernen Forschung, die das Potenzial von Medizinalpilzen untersucht.

Der Zunderschwamm ist ein faszinierendes Stück Naturwissen mit langer Tradition und aktueller Relevanz.

Entdecke die natürliche Kraft des Zunderschwamm-Komplexes und erlebe die positive Wirkung auf Körper und Geist!

Ich freue mich, wenn es dir gut geht.

Sonja
Zunderschwamm-Botschafterin

********

Hinweis: Der Zunderschwamm ist ein Naturprodukt. Die Angaben auf meiner Seite sind keine Heilversprechen. Bei gesundheitlichen Beschwerden konsultiere eine medizinisch fachkundige Person.

Name: cooperative khair el janoub
Description:
La coopérative est considérée comme un leader dans son domaine, car elle se distingue en offrant une large gamme de produits naturels qui répondent pleinement aux attentes de la clientèle. Le miel et ses dérivés sont produits avec le plus grand soin, en profitant de situations géographiques uniques et d'une nature fertile, ce qui rehausse le goût naturel et les valeurs nutritionnelles de ces produits.
Quant à l’huile d’Argan, les meilleures pratiques sont utilisées dans le processus d’extraction et de fabrication, afin de garantir la préservation de ses bienfaits uniques. L'huile d'argan et ses dérivés procurent des soins de qualité supérieure pour la peau et les cheveux, ce qui en fait un excellent choix pour les soins de beauté quotidiens.
La coopérative cherche continuellement à élargir et à améliorer sa gamme de produits au fil du temps, en mettant l'accent sur l'innovation et le développement continus. Le désir de répondre aux besoins du marché et d'offrir une expérience d'achat distinctive fait partie de sa vision de développement durable.
En bref, la coopérative se présente comme un symbole de qualité et d'exclusivité dans le monde des produits naturels, où les clients peuvent profiter des bienfaits de la nature de manière luxueuse et durable. 
تعتبر التعاونية الرائدة في مجالها، حيث تتميز بتوفير مجموعة واسعة من المنتجات الطبيعية التي تلبي توقعات العملاء بشكل شامل. يتم انتاج العسل ومشتقاته بعناية فائقة، مستفيدة من مواقع جغرافية فريدة وطبيعة خصبة، مما يعزز الطعم الطبيعي والقيم الغذائية لهذه المنتجات.

أما بالنسبة لزيت الأرغان، فيتم استخدام أفضل الممارسات في عملية استخراجه وتصنيعه، لضمان الحفاظ على فوائده الفريدة. يُقدم زيت الأرغان ومشتقاته العناية الفائقة بالبشرة والشعر، مما يجعلها خيارًا رائعًا للعناية اليومية بالجمال.

تسعى التعاونية باستمرار إلى توسيع نطاق منتجاتها وتحسينها بمرور الوقت، مع التركيز على الابتكار والتطوير المستمر. تمثل الرغبة في تلبية احتياجات السوق وتوفير تجربة تسوق مميزة جزءًا من رؤيتها الاستدامة.
